引入审计机制，在训练时保证环境质量，在测试时通过 VLM 反馈提升智能体性能。
analysis.experiments: 在 CUA-World-Long 上，Gemini-3-Flash 经审计反馈后成功率从 11.5% 提升至 14.0%；从训练轨迹蒸馏的 2B VLM 优于 2 倍大小模型。
limitations: 环境创建依赖编码智能体的能力，可能对复杂软件覆盖不全。
审计机制可能增加计算开销，且审计质量依赖于 VLM 的准确性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 Gym-Anything 框架，将任意软件转化为智能体环境，并构建包含超 10K 长时任务的 CUA-World 基准。

papers.title: Lightweight Multimodal Adaptation of Vision Language Models for Species Recognition and Habitat Context Interpretation in Drone Thermal Imagery
papers.abstract: This study proposes a lightweight multimodal adaptation framework to bridge the representation gap between RGB-pretrained VLMs and thermal infrared imagery, and demonstrates its practical utility using a real drone-collected dataset. A thermal dataset was developed from drone-collected imagery and was used to fine-tune VLMs through multimodal projector alignment, enabling the transfer of information from RGB-based visual representations to thermal radiometric inputs. Three representative models, including InternVL3-8B-Instruct, Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct, and Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct, were benchmarked under both closed-set and open-set prompting conditions for species recognition and instance enumeration. Among the tested models, Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct with open-set prompting achieved the best overall performance, with F1 scores of 0.935 for deer, 0.915 for rhino, and 0.968 for elephant, and within-1 enumeration accuracies of 0.779, 0.982, and 1.000, respectively. In addition, combining thermal imagery with simultaneously collected RGB imagery enabled the model to generate habitat-context information, including land-cover characteristics, key landscape features, and visible human disturbance. Overall, the findings demonstrate that lightweight projector-based adaptation provides an effective and practical route for transferring RGB-pretrained VLMs to thermal drone imagery, expanding their utility from object-level recognition to habitat-context interpretation in ecological monitoring.

analysis.tldr: 提出轻量级多模态适配框架，将RGB预训练VLM迁移至无人机热红外图像，实现物种识别与栖息地解读。
analysis.research_motivation: RGB预训练的视觉语言模型（VLM）在热红外图像上表现不佳，因为热红外与RGB图像存在显著的表示差异，而现有方法通常需要大量计算资源或重新训练，难以在资源受限的无人机平台上部署。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地将RGB预训练的VLM适配到热红外图像，实现物种识别和栖息地上下文解读。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 轻量级多模态适配框架：通过多模态投影器对齐，将RGB视觉表示迁移到热红外辐射输入，仅微调投影器层，保持VLM主干不变。
contributions: 提出轻量级多模态适配框架，有效桥接RGB预训练VLM与热红外图像的表示差距。
构建真实无人机采集的热红外数据集，并验证了三种VLM在闭集和开集条件下的物种识别与计数性能。
展示了结合热红外与RGB图像可生成栖息地上下文信息，扩展了VLM在生态监测中的应用。
analysis.experiments: 在自建无人机热红外数据集上评估三种VLM（InternVL3-8B-Instruct、Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct、Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct），开集条件下Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct取得最佳F1分数（鹿0.935、犀牛0.915、大象0.968）和计数精度（0.779、0.982、1.000）。
limitations: 仅测试了三种VLM，泛化性需更多模型验证。
数据集规模可能有限，未提及数据量及多样性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出轻量级多模态适配框架，将RGB预训练VLM迁移至无人机热红外图像，实现物种识别与栖息地解读。

papers.title: SEM-ROVER: Semantic Voxel-Guided Diffusion for Large-Scale Driving Scene Generation
papers.abstract: Scalable generation of outdoor driving scenes requires 3D representations that remain consistent across multiple viewpoints and scale to large areas. Existing solutions either rely on image or video generative models distilled to 3D space, harming the geometric coherence and restricting the rendering to training views, or are limited to small-scale 3D scene or object-centric generation. In this work, we propose a 3D generative framework based on $Σ$-Voxfield grid, a discrete representation where each occupied voxel stores a fixed number of colorized surface samples. To generate this representation, we train a semantic-conditioned diffusion model that operates on local voxel neighborhoods and uses 3D positional encodings to capture spatial structure. We scale to large scenes via progressive spatial outpainting over overlapping regions. Finally, we render the generated $Σ$-Voxfield grid with a deferred rendering module to obtain photorealistic images, enabling large-scale multiview-consistent 3D scene generation without per-scene optimization. Extensive experiments show that our approach can generate diverse large-scale urban outdoor scenes, renderable into photorealistic images with various sensor configurations and camera trajectories while maintaining moderate computation cost compared to existing approaches.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于语义体素扩散的3D驾驶场景生成框架，实现多视图一致的大规模场景生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有驾驶场景生成方法要么依赖图像/视频模型蒸馏到3D空间导致几何不一致和视角受限，要么局限于小规模3D场景或物体中心生成，缺乏可扩展且多视图一致的3D表示。
analysis.problem: 如何生成大规模、多视图一致、可渲染为逼真图像的3D驾驶场景。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Σ-Voxfield网格离散表示，每个占据体素存储固定数量的彩色表面样本；训练语义条件扩散模型在局部体素邻域上操作，使用3D位置编码捕获空间结构；通过渐进式空间外推扩展到大规模场景；使用延迟渲染模块生成逼真图像。
contributions: 提出Σ-Voxfield网格作为3D场景表示，支持多视图一致的大规模生成。
设计语义条件扩散模型和渐进式空间外推策略，实现可扩展的3D场景生成。
无需逐场景优化即可渲染为逼真图像，支持多种传感器配置和相机轨迹。
analysis.experiments: 在多个大规模城市户外场景上验证，能生成多样化场景，与现有方法相比计算成本适中。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量语义标注数据。
渐进式外推可能引入累积误差。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于语义体素扩散的3D驾驶场景生成框架，实现多视图一致的大规模场景生成。

papers.title: AgentCE-Bench: Agent Configurable Evaluation with Scalable Horizons and Controllable Difficulty under Lightweight Environments
papers.abstract: Existing Agent benchmarks suffer from two critical limitations: high environment interaction overhead (up to 41\% of total evaluation time) and imbalanced task horizon and difficulty distributions that make aggregate scores unreliable. To address these issues, we propose AgentCE-Bench built around a unified grid-based planning task, where agents must fill hidden slots in a partially completed schedule subject to both local slot constraints and global constraints. Our benchmark offers fine-grained control through two orthogonal axes: \textbf{Scalable Horizons}, controlled by the number of hidden slots $H$, and \textbf{Controllable Difficulty}, governed by a decoy budget $B$ that determines the number of globally misleading decoy candidates. Crucially, all tool calls are resolved via static JSON files under a \textbf{Lightweight Environment} design, eliminating setup overhead and enabling fast, reproducible evaluation suitable for training-time validation. We first validate that $H$ and $B$ provide reliable control over task horizon and difficulty, and that AgentCE-Bench exhibits strong domain consistency and model discriminability. We then conduct comprehensive experiments across 13 models of diverse sizes and families over 6 domains, revealing significant cross-model performance variation and confirming that AgentCE-Bench provides interpretable and controllable evaluation of agent reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 提出AgentCE-Bench，通过轻量环境、可扩展任务长度和可控难度实现高效可复现的Agent评测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有Agent基准存在环境交互开销高（占评测总时间41%）以及任务长度和难度分布不均衡导致聚合分数不可靠的问题。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个轻量、可扩展、难度可控且可复现的Agent评测基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于统一网格规划任务，通过隐藏槽数量H控制任务长度，通过诱饵预算B控制难度，所有工具调用通过静态JSON文件在轻量环境中解析。
contributions: 提出AgentCE-Bench，具有可扩展任务长度和可控难度的轻量评测基准。
通过13个模型在6个域上的实验验证了基准的领域一致性和模型区分度。
analysis.experiments: 在13个不同规模和系列的模型上，覆盖6个领域进行综合实验，验证了H和B对任务长度和难度的可靠控制，以及基准的领域一致性和模型区分度。
limitations: 可能仅适用于规划类任务，泛化性有限。
轻量环境可能无法完全模拟真实复杂环境。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AgentCE-Bench，通过轻量环境、可扩展任务长度和可控难度实现高效可复现的Agent评测。

papers.title: Artificial Intelligence and the Structure of Mathematics
papers.abstract: Recent progress in artificial intelligence (AI) is unlocking transformative capabilities for mathematics. There is great hope that AI will help solve major open problems and autonomously discover new mathematical concepts. In this essay, we further consider how AI may open a grand perspective on mathematics by forging a new route, complementary to mathematical\textbf{ logic,} to understanding the global structure of formal \textbf{proof}\textbf{s}. We begin by providing a sketch of the formal structure of mathematics in terms of universal proof and structural hypergraphs and discuss questions this raises about the foundational structure of mathematics. We then outline the main ingredients and provide a set of criteria to be satisfied for AI models capable of automated mathematical discovery. As we send AI agents to traverse Platonic mathematical worlds, we expect they will teach us about the nature of mathematics: both as a whole, and the small ribbons conducive to human understanding. Perhaps they will shed light on the old question: "Is mathematics discovered or invented?" Can we grok the terrain of these \textbf{Platonic worlds}?

analysis.tldr: 探讨AI如何通过理解形式证明的全局结构，为数学发现开辟新路径。
analysis.research_motivation: AI在数学领域潜力巨大，但当前主要关注解决具体问题，缺乏对数学整体结构（如形式证明的全局结构）的理解。
analysis.problem: 如何利用AI理解数学的全局结构（形式证明的结构超图），并实现自动化数学发现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一套AI模型应满足的标准，用于自动化数学发现，并讨论形式证明的通用结构和结构超图。
contributions: 勾勒了数学形式结构的通用证明和结构超图框架
提出了自动化数学发现的AI模型应满足的标准
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 未提供实证验证
框架和标准可能过于抽象
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 探讨AI如何通过理解形式证明的全局结构，为数学发现开辟新路径。

papers.title: AgentOpt v0.1 Technical Report: Client-Side Optimization for LLM-Based Agent
papers.abstract: AI agents are increasingly deployed in real-world applications, including systems such as Manus, OpenClaw, and coding agents. Existing research has primarily focused on server-side efficiency, proposing methods such as caching, speculative execution, traffic scheduling, and load balancing to reduce the cost of serving agentic workloads. However, as users increasingly construct agents by composing local tools, remote APIs, and diverse models, an equally important optimization problem arises on the client side. Client-side optimization asks how developers should allocate the resources available to them, including model choice, local tools, and API budget across pipeline stages, subject to application-specific quality, cost, and latency constraints. Because these objectives depend on the task and deployment setting, they cannot be determined by server-side systems alone. We introduce AgentOpt, the first framework-agnostic Python package for client-side agent optimization. We first study model selection, a high-impact optimization lever in multi-step agent pipelines. Given a pipeline and a small evaluation set, the goal is to find the most cost-effective assignment of models to pipeline roles. This problem is consequential in practice: at matched accuracy, the cost gap between the best and worst model combinations can reach 13-32x in our experiments. To efficiently explore the exponentially growing combination space, AgentOpt implements ten search algorithms, including UCB-E, UCB-E with Low-Rank Factorization, Arm Elimination, Epsilon-LUCB, Threshold Successive Elimination, and Bayesian Optimization. Across four benchmarks, UCB-E recovers near-optimal accuracy while reducing evaluation budget by 62-76\% relative to brute-force search. Code and benchmark results available at https://agentoptimizer.github.io/agentopt/.

analysis.tldr: AgentOpt 是首个框架无关的客户端优化 Python 包，通过模型选择搜索算法在保证精度的同时大幅降低评估成本。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究主要关注服务端效率优化，但用户构建 Agent 时需在客户端分配模型、工具和 API 预算，面临质量、成本和延迟的多目标约束，缺乏系统化的客户端优化方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在多步骤 Agent 流水线中，给定小规模评估集，找到成本效益最高的模型角色分配方案。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在匹配精度下，最佳与最差模型组合的成本差距可达 13-32 倍，表明模型选择对客户端优化影响显著。
analysis.method: 提出 AgentOpt 框架，实现十种搜索算法（包括 UCB-E、低秩分解 UCB-E、Arm Elimination、Epsilon-LUCB、Threshold Successive Elimination、贝叶斯优化等），高效探索指数级增长的模型组合空间。
contributions: 首个框架无关的客户端 Agent 优化 Python 包
系统研究模型选择在 Agent 流水线中的优化杠杆，揭示 13-32 倍成本差距
实现多种搜索算法，UCB-E 在四个基准上以 62-76% 的评估预算节省恢复近最优精度
analysis.experiments: 在四个基准上评估，UCB-E 相比暴力搜索节省 62-76% 评估预算，同时恢复近最优精度。
limitations: 依赖小规模评估集，可能无法完全代表真实分布
未考虑动态任务变化或在线适应
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AgentOpt 是首个框架无关的客户端优化 Python 包，通过模型选择搜索算法在保证精度的同时大幅降低评估成本。

papers.title: Extending ZACH-ViT to Robust Medical Imaging: Corruption and Adversarial Stress Testing in Low-Data Regimes
papers.abstract: The recently introduced ZACH-ViT (Zero-token Adaptive Compact Hierarchical Vision Transformer) formalized a compact permutation-invariant Vision Transformer for medical imaging and argued that architectural alignment with spatial structure can matter more than universal benchmark dominance. Its design was motivated by the observation that positional embeddings and a dedicated class token encode fixed spatial assumptions that may be suboptimal when spatial organization is weakly informative, locally distributed, or variable across biomedical images. The foundational study established a regime-dependent clean performance profile across MedMNIST, but did not examine robustness in detail. In this work, we present the first robustness-focused extension of ZACH-ViT by evaluating its behavior under common image corruptions and adversarial perturbations in the same low-data setting. We compare ZACH-ViT with three scratch-trained compact baselines, ABMIL, Minimal-ViT, and TransMIL, on seven MedMNIST datasets using 50 samples per class, fixed hyperparameters, and five random seeds. Across the benchmark, ZACH-ViT achieves the best overall mean rank on clean data (1.57) and under common corruptions (1.57), indicating a favorable balance between baseline predictive performance and robustness to realistic image degradation. Under adversarial stress, all models deteriorate substantially; nevertheless, ZACH-ViT remains competitive, ranking first under FGSM (2.00) and second under PGD (2.29), where ABMIL performs best overall. These results extend the original ZACH-ViT narrative: the advantages of compact permutation-invariant transformers are not limited to clean evaluation, but can persist under realistic perturbation stress in low-data medical imaging, while adversarial robustness remains an open challenge for all evaluated models.

analysis.tldr: ZACH-ViT在低数据医学影像中展现出优于紧凑基线的干净和损坏鲁棒性，但对抗鲁棒性仍是开放挑战。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学影像中紧凑型Vision Transformer的鲁棒性尚未被系统研究，尤其是低数据场景下对常见损坏和对抗扰动的表现。
analysis.problem: 评估ZACH-ViT在低数据医学影像下对常见损坏和对抗扰动的鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: ZACH-ViT在干净数据和常见损坏下均取得最佳平均排名，但在对抗扰动下所有模型性能大幅下降，ZACH-ViT仍具竞争力但非最优。
analysis.method: 在MedMNIST的7个数据集上，使用每类50样本、固定超参数和5个随机种子，将ZACH-ViT与ABMIL、Minimal-ViT、TransMIL三个紧凑基线进行对比，评估干净数据、常见损坏和对抗扰动下的性能。
contributions: 首次对ZACH-ViT进行鲁棒性扩展评估，涵盖常见损坏和对抗扰动。
在低数据医学影像基准上，证明紧凑置换不变Transformer的优势可扩展到鲁棒性场景。
analysis.experiments: 在MedMNIST的7个数据集上，每类50样本，固定超参数，5个随机种子，对比ZACH-ViT与三个紧凑基线。干净数据平均排名1.57，常见损坏1.57，FGSM下2.00，PGD下2.29。
limitations: 仅评估了低数据场景（每类50样本），高数据场景未知。
对抗鲁棒性仍不理想，所有模型在对抗扰动下性能大幅下降。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ZACH-ViT在低数据医学影像中展现出优于紧凑基线的干净和损坏鲁棒性，但对抗鲁棒性仍是开放挑战。

papers.title: LLM4CodeRE: Generative AI for Code Decompilation Analysis and Reverse Engineering
papers.abstract: Code decompilation analysis is a fundamental yet challenging task in malware reverse engineering, particularly due to the pervasive use of sophisticated obfuscation techniques. Although recent large language models (LLMs) have shown promise in translating low-level representations into high-level source code, most existing approaches rely on generic code pretraining and lack adaptation to malicious software. We propose LLM4CodeRE, a domain-adaptive LLM framework for bidirectional code reverse engineering that supports both assembly-to-source decompilation and source-to-assembly translation within a unified model. To enable effective task adaptation, we introduce two complementary fine-tuning strategies: (i) a Multi-Adapter approach for task-specific syntactic and semantic alignment, and (ii) a Seq2Seq Unified approach using task-conditioned prefixes to enforce end-to-end generation constraints. Experimental results demonstrate that LLM4CodeRE outperforms existing decompilation tools and general-purpose code models, achieving robust bidirectional generalization.

analysis.tldr: 提出领域自适应LLM框架LLM4CodeRE，通过多适配器和序列到序列统一微调策略实现汇编与源码的双向翻译，在恶意软件逆向工程中优于现有工具。
analysis.research_motivation: 恶意软件逆向工程中代码反编译分析至关重要，但现有工具难以应对复杂的混淆技术，且通用代码模型缺乏对恶意软件的适应性。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个领域自适应的LLM框架，实现汇编到源码的反编译和源码到汇编的翻译双向任务，并提升在恶意软件场景下的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出LLM4CodeRE框架，包含两种微调策略：多适配器方法用于任务特定的句法和语义对齐，以及序列到序列统一方法使用任务条件前缀强制执行端到端生成约束。
contributions: 提出领域自适应LLM框架LLM4CodeRE，支持双向代码逆向工程。
引入两种互补的微调策略（多适配器和序列到序列统一）以提升任务适应能力。
analysis.experiments: 实验结果表明LLM4CodeRE在反编译和翻译任务上优于现有反编译工具和通用代码模型，实现了鲁棒的双向泛化。
limitations: 可能依赖特定领域的训练数据，泛化到其他类型软件时效果未知。
未讨论模型在真实恶意软件样本上的效率或资源消耗。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出领域自适应LLM框架LLM4CodeRE，通过多适配器和序列到序列统一微调策略实现汇编与源码的双向翻译，在恶意软件逆向工程中优于现有工具。

papers.title: Social Dynamics as Critical Vulnerabilities that Undermine Objective Decision-Making in LLM Collectives
papers.abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents are increasingly acting as human delegates in multi-agent environments, where a representative agent integrates diverse peer perspectives to make a final decision. Drawing inspiration from social psychology, we investigate how the reliability of this representative agent is undermined by the social context of its network. We define four key phenomena-social conformity, perceived expertise, dominant speaker effect, and rhetorical persuasion-and systematically manipulate the number of adversaries, relative intelligence, argument length, and argumentative styles. Our experiments demonstrate that the representative agent's accuracy consistently declines as social pressure increases: larger adversarial groups, more capable peers, and longer arguments all lead to significant performance degradation. Furthermore, rhetorical strategies emphasizing credibility or logic can further sway the agent's judgment, depending on the context. These findings reveal that multi-agent systems are sensitive not only to individual reasoning but also to the social dynamics of their configuration, highlighting critical vulnerabilities in AI delegates that mirror the psychological biases observed in human group decision-making.

analysis.tldr: LLM多智能体系统中的社会动态（如从众、专家效应）会显著降低代表智能体的决策准确性，暴露类似人类群体心理的脆弱性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM代理正越来越多地作为人类代表在多智能体环境中运作，但现有研究忽视了社会心理学因素对其决策可靠性的影响。
analysis.problem: 研究多智能体系统中的社会动态（社会从众、感知专家、主导说话者效应、修辞说服）如何破坏代表智能体的客观决策。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现：代表智能体的准确性随社会压力增加而持续下降；更大的敌对群体、更智能的同伴和更长的论证都会导致性能显著下降；强调可信度或逻辑的修辞策略可进一步影响判断。
analysis.method: 定义四种社会现象（社会从众、感知专家、主导说话者效应、修辞说服），并系统操纵对手数量、相对智能、论证长度和论证风格进行实验。
contributions: 首次从社会心理学角度系统研究LLM多智能体系统中的社会动态对决策可靠性的影响。
揭示了多智能体系统不仅对个体推理敏感，也对配置的社会动态敏感，突出了AI代表中的关键脆弱性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果细节，但提到通过操纵多个变量进行实验，并观察到准确性下降等模式。
limitations: 可能仅基于特定LLM架构和任务设置，泛化性需验证。
社会现象的定义和操纵可能简化了真实社会互动的复杂性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM多智能体系统中的社会动态（如从众、专家效应）会显著降低代表智能体的决策准确性，暴露类似人类群体心理的脆弱性。

papers.title: Generative-AI and the transformation of workforce. A job postings-driven analysis
papers.abstract: This paper investigates how generative-artificial intelligence AI is reshaping job requirements, skill compositions and sectoral dynamics across global labor markets. It examines the evolving frequency and framing of AI-related competencies in job postings, exploring whether generative-AI functions primarily as an augmentative or substitutive force in the workplace. A large-scale, multi-source corpus of over 150,000 English-language job postings 2018-2025 is compiled from twelve open-access datasets and one public API. The analytical framework integrates lexical skill extraction, semantic framing, topic modeling, BERTopic, LDA, KMeans, and time-series forecasting ARIMA. Skill mentions are categorized into five dimensions: AI_Data, Routine, Soft_Meta, Domain_Specific and Leadership, while cross sectoral analyses and correlation matrices quantify interdependencies between competencies. Sentence-transformer embeddings and cosine similarity are used to compute a Framing Index, distinguishing augmentation- versus automation-oriented discourse. Investigating job postings, our research contributes a replicable, data driven methodology for mapping the diffusion of AI related skills across industries and time. Results reveal a sharp post-2021 increase in AI-related skill mentions: prompt engineering, fine-tuning and model validation, accompanied by a decline in routine tasks: data entry and manual coding. Forecasts suggest sustained growth in AI_Data and Soft_Meta skills through 2025, signaling a structural convergence toward hybrid human-AI expertise as a new foundation of employability.

analysis.tldr: 基于15万条招聘数据，分析生成式AI对劳动力技能需求的影响，发现AI技能需求激增而常规任务需求下降。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成式AI正在重塑劳动力市场，但缺乏大规模、跨时间段的系统性研究来量化其对技能构成和行业动态的影响。
analysis.problem: 如何通过招聘数据量化生成式AI对技能需求、行业动态以及人机协作模式的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 2021年后AI相关技能（如提示工程、微调、模型验证）需求激增，常规任务（如数据录入、手动编码）需求下降；预测AI_Data和Soft_Meta技能将持续增长，形成混合人机专长。
analysis.method: 整合12个开放数据集和1个公共API，构建15万条英文招聘语料（2018-2025），结合词汇技能提取、语义框架分析、主题建模（BERTopic、LDA、KMeans）和时间序列预测（ARIMA），将技能分为五个维度，并计算框架指数区分增强与替代导向。
contributions: 提出一种可复现的数据驱动方法，用于跨行业和时间映射AI相关技能的扩散。
揭示了生成式AI作为增强而非替代力量的结构性趋势，并预测了技能需求的未来演变。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及了技能分类、框架指数计算和ARIMA预测。
limitations: 仅基于英文招聘数据，可能无法推广到其他语言或非正式劳动力市场。
技能分类和框架指数的定义可能受主观因素影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于15万条招聘数据，分析生成式AI对劳动力技能需求的影响，发现AI技能需求激增而常规任务需求下降。

papers.title: LAG-XAI: A Lie-Inspired Affine Geometric Framework for Interpretable Paraphrasing in Transformer Latent Spaces
papers.abstract: Modern Transformer-based language models achieve strong performance in natural language processing tasks, yet their latent semantic spaces remain largely uninterpretable black boxes. This paper introduces LAG-XAI (Lie Affine Geometry for Explainable AI), a novel geometric framework that models paraphrasing not as discrete word substitutions, but as a structured affine transformation within the embedding space. By conceptualizing paraphrasing as a continuous geometric flow on a semantic manifold, we propose a computationally efficient mean-field approximation, inspired by local Lie group actions. This allows us to decompose paraphrase transitions into geometrically interpretable components: rotation, deformation, and translation. Experiments on the noisy PIT-2015 Twitter corpus, encoded with Sentence-BERT, reveal a "linear transparency" phenomenon. The proposed affine operator achieves an AUC of 0.7713. By normalizing against random chance (AUC 0.5), the model captures approximately 80% of the non-linear baseline's effective classification capacity (AUC 0.8405), offering explicit parametric interpretability in exchange for a marginal drop in absolute accuracy. The model identifies fundamental geometric invariants, including a stable matrix reconfiguration angle (~27.84°) and near-zero deformation, indicating local isometry. Cross-domain generalization is confirmed via direct cross-corpus validation on an independent TURL dataset. Furthermore, the practical utility of LAG-XAI is demonstrated in LLM hallucination detection: using a "cheap geometric check," the model automatically detected 95.3% of factual distortions on the HaluEval dataset by registering deviations beyond the permissible semantic corridor. This approach provides a mathematically grounded, resource-efficient path toward the mechanistic interpretability of Transformers.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于李群仿射几何的框架，将Transformer潜空间中的释义建模为结构化仿射变换，实现可解释的释义生成与幻觉检测。
analysis.research_motivation: Transformer语言模型性能强大，但其潜在语义空间缺乏可解释性，现有方法难以揭示语义变换的内在几何结构。
analysis.problem: 如何将释义过程从离散词替换建模为连续几何变换，并实现可解释的语义操作。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现“线性透明性”现象：释义变换可分解为旋转、形变和平移，且形变接近零，表明局部等距性。
analysis.method: 提出LAG-XAI框架，利用局部李群作用，通过平均场近似将释义建模为嵌入空间中的仿射变换，分解为旋转、形变和平移分量。
contributions: 提出基于李群仿射几何的释义可解释框架，将离散替换建模为连续几何流。
发现线性透明性现象，并识别出稳定矩阵重配置角（~27.84°）和近零形变等几何不变量。
在释义分类和幻觉检测任务上验证了方法的有效性与跨域泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在PIT-2015 Twitter语料上，仿射算子AUC为0.7713，捕获了非线性基线约80%的有效分类能力；在TURL数据集上验证跨域泛化；在HaluEval上以95.3%的检测率识别事实扭曲。
limitations: 方法依赖预训练嵌入（Sentence-BERT），可能受嵌入质量影响。
当前仅验证了释义和幻觉检测任务，更广泛的NLP任务有待探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于李群仿射几何的框架，将Transformer潜空间中的释义建模为结构化仿射变换，实现可解释的释义生成与幻觉检测。

papers.title: Scientific Graphics Program Synthesis via Dual Self-Consistency Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Graphics Program Synthesis is pivotal for interpreting and editing visual data, effectively facilitating the reverse-engineering of static visuals into editable TikZ code. While TikZ is the de facto standard for scientific schematics due to its programmatic flexibility, its requirement for rigorous spatial precision presents a significant challenge for Multimodal Large Language Models. Progress is currently stifled by two primary gaps: (1) Data Quality Gap: existing image-TikZ corpora often lack strict executability and reliable visual alignment; (2) Evaluation Gap: a lack of benchmarks for both structural and visual fidelity. To address these, we present a closed-loop framework featuring: SciTikZ-230K, a large-scale, high-quality dataset from our Execution-Centric Data Engine covering 11 diverse scientific disciplines; SciTikZ-Bench, a multifaceted benchmark spanning from basic geometric constructs to intricate hierarchical schematics to evaluate both visual fidelity and structural logic. To further broaden the scope of visual-code optimization methodology, we introduce a novel Dual Self-Consistency Reinforcement Learning optimization paradigm, which utilizes Round-Trip Verification to penalize degenerate code and boost overall self-consistency. Empowered by these, our trained model SciTikZer-8B achieves state-of-the-art performance, consistently outperforming proprietary giants like Gemini-2.5-Pro and massive models like Qwen3-VL-235B-A22B-Instruct.

analysis.tldr: 提出双自一致性强化学习框架，结合高质量数据集和评测基准，实现科学图形程序合成SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 科学图形程序合成对逆向工程静态视觉为可编辑TikZ代码至关重要，但TikZ要求严格空间精度，现有多模态大模型面临数据质量差和缺乏评测基准两大瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何生成高质量、可执行的TikZ代码，并准确评估其结构正确性和视觉保真度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有图像-TikZ语料库缺乏严格可执行性和可靠视觉对齐，且缺少同时评估结构和视觉保真度的基准。
analysis.method: 提出闭环框架，包含高质量数据集SciTikZ-230K、多面基准SciTikZ-Bench，以及双自一致性强化学习优化范式（利用往返验证惩罚退化代码并提升自一致性）。
contributions: 构建大规模高质量科学图形-TikZ数据集SciTikZ-230K，覆盖11个学科。
提出多面基准SciTikZ-Bench，评估视觉保真度和结构逻辑。
提出双自一致性强化学习优化方法，提升代码生成质量。
analysis.experiments: 在SciTikZ-Bench上，SciTikZer-8B超越Gemini-2.5-Pro和Qwen3-VL-235B-A22B-Instruct等模型，达到SOTA。
limitations: 可能仅适用于TikZ格式，泛化到其他图形语言需验证。
数据集规模虽大但学科覆盖可能仍有偏。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双自一致性强化学习框架，结合高质量数据集和评测基准，实现科学图形程序合成SOTA。

papers.title: Graph-PiT: Enhancing Structural Coherence in Part-Based Image Synthesis via Graph Priors
papers.abstract: Achieving fine-grained and structurally sound controllability is a cornerstone of advanced visual generation. Existing part-based frameworks treat user-provided parts as an unordered set and therefore ignore their intrinsic spatial and semantic relationships, which often results in compositions that lack structural integrity. To bridge this gap, we propose Graph-PiT, a framework that explicitly models the structural dependencies of visual components using a graph prior. Specifically, we represent visual parts as nodes and their spatial-semantic relationships as edges. At the heart of our method is a Hierarchical Graph Neural Network (HGNN) module that performs bidirectional message passing between coarse-grained part-level super-nodes and fine-grained IP+ token sub-nodes, refining part embeddings before they enter the generative pipeline. We also introduce a graph Laplacian smoothness loss and an edge-reconstruction loss so that adjacent parts acquire compatible, relation-aware embeddings. Quantitative experiments on controlled synthetic domains (character, product, indoor layout, and jigsaw), together with qualitative transfer to real web images, show that Graph-PiT improves structural coherence over vanilla PiT while remaining compatible with the original IP-Prior pipeline. Ablation experiments confirm that explicit relational reasoning is crucial for enforcing user-specified adjacency constraints. Our approach not only enhances the plausibility of generated concepts but also offers a scalable and interpretable mechanism for complex, multi-part image synthesis. The code is available at https://github.com/wolf-bailang/Graph-PiT.

analysis.tldr: 提出Graph-PiT，用图先验建模部件间结构关系，提升基于部件的图像合成结构连贯性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于部件的图像生成框架将用户提供的部件视为无序集合，忽略了它们内在的空间和语义关系，导致生成的组合缺乏结构完整性。
analysis.problem: 如何在部件级图像合成中显式建模视觉部件的结构依赖关系，以增强生成结果的结构连贯性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Graph-PiT框架，将视觉部件表示为节点、空间语义关系表示为边，通过层次图神经网络（HGNN）在粗粒度部件级超节点和细粒度IP+令牌子节点间进行双向消息传递，并引入图拉普拉斯平滑损失和边重构损失来学习关系感知的部件嵌入。
contributions: 提出Graph-PiT框架，利用图先验显式建模部件间结构关系，提升部件级图像合成的结构连贯性。
设计层次图神经网络（HGNN）模块，实现粗粒度和细粒度节点间的双向消息传递。
引入图拉普拉斯平滑损失和边重构损失，强制相邻部件获得兼容的关系感知嵌入。
analysis.experiments: 在字符、产品、室内布局和拼图等受控合成域上进行定量实验，并定性迁移到真实网络图像，结果表明Graph-PiT在结构连贯性上优于vanilla PiT，且与原始IP-Prior管线兼容。消融实验证实显式关系推理对强制执行用户指定的邻接约束至关重要。
limitations: 可能依赖用户提供的部件和关系标注，自动获取图结构的能力有限。
在复杂真实场景中的泛化能力尚未充分验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Graph-PiT，用图先验建模部件间结构关系，提升基于部件的图像合成结构连贯性。

papers.title: Stories of Your Life as Others: A Round-Trip Evaluation of LLM-Generated Life Stories Conditioned on Rich Psychometric Profiles
papers.abstract: Personality traits are richly encoded in natural language, and large language models (LLMs) trained on human text can simulate personality when conditioned on persona descriptions. However, existing evaluations rely predominantly on questionnaire self-report by the conditioned model, are limited in architectural diversity, and rarely use real human psychometric data. Without addressing these limitations, it remains unclear whether personality conditioning produces psychometrically informative representations of individual differences or merely superficial alignment with trait descriptors. To test how robustly LLMs can encode personality into extended text, we condition LLMs on real psychometric profiles from 290 participants to generate first-person life story narratives, and then task independent LLMs to recover personality scores from those narratives alone. We show that personality scores can be recovered from the generated narratives at levels approaching human test-retest reliability (mean r = 0.750, 85% of the human ceiling), and that recovery is robust across 10 LLM narrative generators and 3 LLM personality scorers spanning 6 providers. Decomposing systematic biases reveals that scoring models achieve their accuracy while counteracting alignment-induced defaults. Content analysis of the generated narratives shows that personality conditioning produces behaviourally differentiated text: nine of ten coded features correlate significantly with the same features in participants' real conversations, and personality-driven emotional reactivity patterns in narratives replicate in real conversational data. These findings provide evidence that the personality-language relationship captured during pretraining supports robust encoding and decoding of individual differences, including characteristic emotional variability patterns that replicate in real human behaviour.

analysis.tldr: LLM能从真实心理测量数据生成人格化自传叙事，且人格分数可从叙事中高精度恢复，接近人类重测信度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有评估依赖问卷自评、架构多样性有限、很少使用真实心理数据，难以判断人格条件化是否产生有心理测量意义的个体差异表征。
analysis.problem: 验证LLM能否将人格稳健编码到扩展文本中，并评估恢复人格分数的准确性及行为差异的生态效度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 人格条件化生成的行为差异化文本在编码特征上与真实对话显著相关，情绪反应模式在真实数据中复现。
analysis.method: 使用290名参与者的真实心理测量数据条件化10个LLM生成第一人称生活故事，再用3个LLM从叙事中恢复人格分数，分析恢复精度、偏差及文本内容。
contributions: 提出往返评估框架，用真实心理数据条件化LLM生成叙事并恢复人格分数。
证明恢复精度接近人类重测信度（平均r=0.750），且跨生成器和评分器稳健。
揭示评分模型通过抵消对齐诱导的默认偏差实现准确性，并验证生成文本的行为差异化与真实对话一致。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及恢复精度、偏差分解和内容分析。
limitations: 仅使用290名参与者数据，样本量有限。
仅评估英语叙事，跨语言泛化未知。
未探讨不同人格理论模型的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM能从真实心理测量数据生成人格化自传叙事，且人格分数可从叙事中高精度恢复，接近人类重测信度。

papers.title: CodecSight: Leveraging Video Codec Signals for Efficient Streaming VLM Inference
papers.abstract: Video streaming analytics is a crucial workload for vision-language model serving, but the high cost of multimodal inference limits scalability. Prior systems reduce inference cost by exploiting temporal and spatial redundancy in video streams, but they target either the vision transformer (ViT) or the LLM with a limited view, leaving end-to-end opportunities untapped. Moreover, existing methods incur significant overhead to identify redundancy, either through offline profiling and training or costly online computation, making them ill-suited for dynamic real-time streams. We present CodecSight, a codec-guided streaming video analytics system, built on a key observation that video codecs already extract the temporal and spatial structure of each stream as a byproduct of compression. CodecSight treats this codec metadata as a low-cost runtime signal to unify optimization across video decoding, visual processing, and LLM prefilling, with transmission reduction as an inherent benefit of operating directly on compressed bitstreams. This drives codec-guided patch pruning before ViT encoding and selective key-value cache refresh during LLM prefilling, both of which are fully online and do not require offline training. Experiments show that CodecSight achieves an improvement in throughput of up to 3$\times$, and a reduction of up to 87% in GPU compute over state-of-the-art baselines, maintaining competitive accuracy with only 0$\sim$8% F1 drop.

analysis.tldr: 利用视频编解码器元数据作为低成本信号，统一优化流式VLM推理中的解码、视觉处理和LLM预填充，实现最高3倍吞吐提升和87% GPU计算减少。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频流分析是VLM服务的关键负载，但多模态推理的高成本限制了可扩展性。现有系统利用时空冗余降低推理成本，但仅针对ViT或LLM的有限视角，未充分利用端到端机会，且识别冗余的离线训练或在线计算开销大，不适合动态实时流。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖离线训练或高开销在线计算的情况下，利用视频编解码器元数据统一优化流式VLM推理的端到端效率（包括解码、视觉处理和LLM预填充）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 视频编解码器在压缩过程中已提取了每个流的时空结构作为副产品，这些编解码元数据可作为低成本的运行时信号。
analysis.method: CodecSight系统：利用编解码元数据指导ViT编码前的补丁剪枝和LLM预填充期间的选择性键值缓存刷新，所有操作完全在线，无需离线训练。
contributions: 提出利用视频编解码器元数据作为低成本信号统一优化流式VLM推理的端到端效率。
设计编解码引导的补丁剪枝和选择性KV缓存刷新机制，完全在线运行。
在多个基准上实现最高3倍吞吐提升和87% GPU计算减少，仅损失0~8% F1分数。
analysis.experiments: 在多个视频流分析基准上对比最先进基线，测量吞吐量、GPU计算和准确率（F1分数）。
limitations: 可能依赖特定视频编解码器格式，通用性需验证。
F1分数有0~8%下降，高精度场景可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用视频编解码器元数据作为低成本信号，统一优化流式VLM推理中的解码、视觉处理和LLM预填充，实现最高3倍吞吐提升和87% GPU计算减少。

papers.title: A Multi-Stage Validation Framework for Trustworthy Large-scale Clinical Information Extraction using Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) show promise for extracting clinically meaningful information from unstructured health records, yet their translation into real-world settings is constrained by the lack of scalable and trustworthy validation approaches. Conventional evaluation methods rely heavily on annotation-intensive reference standards or incomplete structured data, limiting feasibility at population scale. We propose a multi-stage validation framework for LLM-based clinical information extraction that enables rigorous assessment under weak supervision. The framework integrates prompt calibration, rule-based plausibility filtering, semantic grounding assessment, targeted confirmatory evaluation using an independent higher-capacity judge LLM, selective expert review, and external predictive validity analysis to quantify uncertainty and characterize error modes without exhaustive manual annotation. We applied this framework to extraction of substance use disorder (SUD) diagnoses across 11 substance categories from 919,783 clinical notes. Rule-based filtering and semantic grounding removed 14.59% of LLM-positive extractions that were unsupported, irrelevant, or structurally implausible. For high-uncertainty cases, the judge LLM's assessments showed substantial agreement with subject matter expert review (Gwet's AC1=0.80). Using judge-evaluated outputs as references, the primary LLM achieved an F1 score of 0.80 under relaxed matching criteria. LLM-extracted SUD diagnoses also predicted subsequent engagement in SUD specialty care more accurately than structured-data baselines (AUC=0.80). These findings demonstrate that scalable, trustworthy deployment of LLM-based clinical information extraction is feasible without annotation-intensive evaluation.

analysis.tldr: 提出多阶段验证框架，在弱监督下实现大规模临床信息提取的可信评估，无需大量人工标注。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在临床信息提取中潜力大，但缺乏可扩展且可信的验证方法，传统评估依赖大量标注或结构化数据，难以在人口规模上应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖大量人工标注的情况下，对LLM从非结构化健康记录中提取临床信息进行严格、可扩展的可信评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 规则过滤和语义基础去除了14.59%的LLM阳性提取（不支持、不相关或结构不合理）；法官LLM评估与专家审查高度一致（Gwet's AC1=0.80）；LLM提取的诊断在预测后续专科护理方面优于结构化数据基线（AUC=0.80）。
analysis.method: 多阶段验证框架，包括提示校准、基于规则的合理性过滤、语义基础评估、使用独立高容量法官LLM进行目标确认评估、选择性专家审查和外部预测效度分析。
contributions: 提出一个无需大量标注即可实现大规模可信临床信息提取验证的多阶段框架。
在919,783份临床笔记上验证了框架的有效性，展示了高一致性和预测效度。
analysis.experiments: 在11种物质类别的物质使用障碍诊断提取任务上，使用919,783份临床笔记进行实验。规则过滤和语义基础去除14.59%的阳性提取；法官LLM与专家审查一致（AC1=0.80）；主LLM在宽松匹配下F1=0.80；LLM提取诊断预测后续护理AUC=0.80。
limitations: 可能依赖特定领域的提示和规则设计，泛化性需进一步验证。
法官LLM的评估质量可能受其自身能力限制。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多阶段验证框架，在弱监督下实现大规模临床信息提取的可信评估，无需大量人工标注。

papers.title: CritBench: A Framework for Evaluating Cybersecurity Capabilities of Large Language Models in IEC 61850 Digital Substation Environments
papers.abstract: The advancement of Large Language Models (LLMs) has raised concerns regarding their dual-use potential in cybersecurity. Existing evaluation frameworks overwhelmingly focus on Information Technology (IT) environments, failing to capture the constraints, and specialized protocols of Operational Technology (OT). To address this gap, we introduce CritBench, a novel framework designed to evaluate the cybersecurity capabilities of LLM agents within IEC 61850 Digital Substation environments. We assess five state-of-the-art models, including OpenAI's GPT-5 suite and open-weight models, across a corpus of 81 domain-specific tasks spanning static configuration analysis, network traffic reconnaissance, and live virtual machine interaction. To facilitate industrial protocol interaction, we develop a domain-specific tool scaffold. Our empirical results show that agents reliably execute static structured-file analysis and single-tool network enumeration, but their performance degrades on dynamic tasks. Despite demonstrating explicit, internalized knowledge of the IEC 61850 standards terminology, current models struggle with the persistent sequential reasoning and state tracking required to manipulate live systems without specialized tools. Equipping agents with our domain-specific tool scaffold significantly mitigates this operational bottleneck. Code and evaluation scripts are available at: https://github.com/GKeppler/CritBench

analysis.tldr: 提出CritBench框架，评估LLM在IEC 61850数字变电站环境中的网络安全能力，发现模型在动态任务中表现不佳，但专用工具可缓解瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM网络安全评估框架主要针对IT环境，无法捕捉OT环境的约束和专用协议，存在评估空白。
analysis.problem: 缺乏针对OT环境（如IEC 61850数字变电站）的LLM网络安全能力评估框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在静态结构化文件分析和单工具网络枚举上表现可靠，但在动态任务中性能下降；尽管模型内化IEC 61850标准术语知识，但在缺乏专用工具时难以进行持续顺序推理和状态跟踪。
analysis.method: 提出CritBench框架，包含81个领域特定任务（静态配置分析、网络流量侦察、实时虚拟机交互），并开发领域特定工具脚手架以支持工业协议交互。
contributions: 提出CritBench，首个针对IEC 61850数字变电站环境的LLM网络安全评估框架。
通过81个任务评估5个前沿模型，揭示模型在动态任务中的局限性。
开发领域特定工具脚手架，显著缓解操作瓶颈。
analysis.experiments: 评估了5个模型（包括GPT-5套件和开源模型）在81个任务上的表现，并验证了工具脚手架的有效性。
limitations: 仅针对IEC 61850协议，可能不直接适用于其他OT协议。
任务数量有限（81个），可能无法覆盖所有实际场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CritBench框架，评估LLM在IEC 61850数字变电站环境中的网络安全能力，发现模型在动态任务中表现不佳，但专用工具可缓解瓶颈。

papers.title: Governance and Regulation of Artificial Intelligence in Developing Countries: A Case Study of Nigeria
papers.abstract: This study examines the perception of legal professionals on the governance of AI in developing countries, using Nigeria as a case study. The study focused on ethical risks, regulatory gaps, and institutional readiness. The study adopted a qualitative case study design. Data were collected through 27 semi-structured interviews with legal practitioners in Nigeria. A focus group discussion was also held with seven additional legal practitioners across sectors such as finance, insurance, and corporate law. Thematic analysis was employed to identify key patterns in participant responses. Findings showed that there were concerns about data privacy risks and the lack of enforceable legal frameworks. Participants expressed limited confidence in institutional capacity and emphasized the need for locally adapted governance models rather than direct adoption of foreign frameworks. While some expressed optimism about AI's potential, this was conditional on the presence of strong legal oversight and public accountability. The study contributes to the growing discourse on AI governance in developing countries by focusing on the perspectives of legal professionals. It highlights the importance of regulatory approaches that are context-specific, inclusive, and capable of bridging the gap between global ethical principles and local realities. These insights offer practical guidance for policymakers, regulators, and scholars working to shape responsible AI governance in similar environments.

analysis.tldr: 以尼日利亚为例，研究法律专业人士对发展中国家AI治理的看法，强调本地化监管框架的重要性。
analysis.research_motivation: 发展中国家在AI治理方面面临独特挑战，如监管空白和机构能力不足，但现有研究多聚焦发达国家，缺乏对发展中国家法律专业人士视角的深入分析。
analysis.problem: 探讨发展中国家（以尼日利亚为例）法律专业人士对AI治理的认知，包括伦理风险、监管差距和机构准备度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用定性案例研究设计，通过27次半结构化访谈和一次焦点小组讨论收集数据，运用主题分析法识别关键模式。
contributions: 揭示了法律专业人士对数据隐私风险和缺乏可执行法律框架的担忧。
强调了本地化治理模型的重要性，而非直接采用外国框架。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 样本仅限于尼日利亚法律专业人士，可能不具广泛代表性。
定性研究设计可能受研究者主观影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 以尼日利亚为例，研究法律专业人士对发展中国家AI治理的看法，强调本地化监管框架的重要性。

papers.title: Toward Aristotelian Medical Representations: Backpropagation-Free Layer-wise Analysis for Interpretable Generalized Metric Learning on MedMNIST
papers.abstract: While deep learning has achieved remarkable success in medical imaging, the "black-box" nature of backpropagation-based models remains a significant barrier to clinical adoption. To bridge this gap, we propose Aristotelian Rapid Object Modeling (A-ROM), a framework built upon the Platonic Representation Hypothesis (PRH). This hypothesis posits that models trained on vast, diverse datasets converge toward a universal and objective representation of reality. By leveraging the generalizable metric space of pretrained Vision Transformers (ViTs), A-ROM enables the rapid modeling of novel medical concepts without the computational burden or opacity of further gradient-based fine-tuning. We replace traditional, opaque decision layers with a human-readable concept dictionary and a k-Nearest Neighbors (kNN) classifier to ensure the model's logic remains interpretable. Experiments on the MedMNIST v2 suite demonstrate that A-ROM delivers performance competitive with standard benchmarks while providing a simple and scalable, "few-shot" solution that meets the rigorous transparency demands of modern clinical environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需反向传播的层分析框架，在MedMNIST上实现可解释的少样本医学图像分类。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度学习在医学影像中表现优异，但其黑箱特性阻碍了临床采用，需要可解释且高效的模型。
analysis.problem: 解决基于反向传播的深度学习模型在医学影像中缺乏可解释性且计算负担重的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于柏拉图表征假说，利用预训练ViT的通用度量空间，构建人类可读的概念字典和kNN分类器，无需梯度微调。
contributions: 提出A-ROM框架，实现无需反向传播的可解释医学图像分类
在MedMNIST v2上达到与标准基准竞争的性能，同时提供少样本和透明性
analysis.experiments: 在MedMNIST v2套件上进行实验，性能与标准基准相当。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练ViT的通用性，在特定领域数据上泛化能力未知
概念字典的构建可能需要领域专家知识
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需反向传播的层分析框架，在MedMNIST上实现可解释的少样本医学图像分类。

papers.title: How LLMs Follow Instructions: Skillful Coordination, Not a Universal Mechanism
papers.abstract: Instruction tuning is commonly assumed to endow language models with a domain-general ability to follow instructions, yet the underlying mechanism remains poorly understood. Does instruction-following rely on a universal mechanism or compositional skill deployment? We investigate this through diagnostic probing across nine diverse tasks in three instruction-tuned models. Our analysis provides converging evidence against a universal mechanism. First, general probes trained across all tasks consistently underperform task-specific specialists, indicating limited representational sharing. Second, cross-task transfer is weak and clustered by skill similarity. Third, causal ablation reveals sparse asymmetric dependencies rather than shared representations. Tasks also stratify by complexity across layers, with structural constraints emerging early and semantic tasks emerging late. Finally, temporal analysis shows constraint satisfaction operates as dynamic monitoring during generation rather than pre-generation planning. These findings indicate that instruction-following is better characterized as skillful coordination of diverse linguistic capabilities rather than deployment of a single abstract constraint-checking process.

analysis.tldr: 指令遵循并非通用机制，而是多种语言技能的协调组合。
analysis.research_motivation: 指令微调被广泛用于赋予模型指令遵循能力，但其底层机制尚不明确，理解这一机制有助于改进训练方法。
analysis.problem: 探究指令遵循是依赖一个通用机制还是组合式技能部署。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 跨任务通用探针性能低于任务专用探针；跨任务迁移弱且按技能相似性聚类；因果消融显示稀疏非对称依赖而非共享表征；任务按复杂度分层；时间分析显示约束满足是生成过程中的动态监控而非预生成规划。
analysis.method: 通过诊断探针、跨任务迁移实验、因果消融、层次分析和时间分析，在三个指令微调模型的九个任务上进行系统性研究。
contributions: 提供收敛证据表明指令遵循并非通用机制，而是技能协调。
揭示任务按复杂度分层、约束满足为动态监控等新发现。
analysis.experiments: 在三个指令微调模型（未具体说明）的九个不同任务上进行探针、迁移、消融、层次和时间分析实验。
limitations: 仅分析三个模型，可能不具广泛代表性。
任务类型有限，未涵盖所有指令遵循场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 指令遵循并非通用机制，而是多种语言技能的协调组合。

papers.title: Multi-Granularity Reasoning for Image Quality Assessment via Attribute-Aware Reinforcement Learning to Rank
papers.abstract: Recent advances in reasoning-induced image quality assessment (IQA) have demonstrated the power of reinforcement learning to rank (RL2R) for training vision-language models (VLMs) to assess perceptual quality. However, existing approaches operate at a single granularity, predicting only an overall quality score, while overlooking the multi-dimensional nature of human quality perception, which encompasses attributes such as sharpness, color fidelity, noise level, and compositional aesthetics. In this paper, we propose MG-IQA (Multi-Granularity IQA), a multi-granularity reasoning framework that extends RL2R to jointly assess overall image quality and fine-grained quality attributes within a single inference pass. Our approach introduces three key innovations: (1) an attribute-aware prompting strategy that elicits structured multi-attribute reasoning from VLMs; (2) a multi-dimensional Thurstone reward model that computes attribute-specific fidelity rewards for group relative policy optimization; and (3) a cross-domain alignment mechanism that enables stable joint training across synthetic distortion, authentic distortion, and AI-generated image datasets without perceptual scale re-alignment. Extensive experiments on eight IQA benchmarks demonstrate that MG-IQA consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both overall quality prediction (average SRCC improvement of 2.1\%) and attribute-level assessment, while generating interpretable, human-aligned quality descriptions.

analysis.tldr: 提出多粒度推理框架MG-IQA，通过属性感知强化学习排序联合评估图像整体质量与细粒度属性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于强化学习排序的IQA方法仅预测单一整体质量分数，忽略了人类感知的多维度属性（如清晰度、色彩、噪声、构图美学），无法提供细粒度解释。
analysis.problem: 如何让VLM在单次推理中同时预测图像整体质量与多个细粒度质量属性，并实现跨域稳定训练。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MG-IQA框架，包含：(1) 属性感知提示策略引导VLM进行结构化多属性推理；(2) 多维Thurstone奖励模型计算属性特定保真度奖励用于组相对策略优化；(3) 跨域对齐机制实现合成失真、真实失真和AI生成图像数据集的联合训练。
contributions: 首次将强化学习排序扩展到多粒度IQA，同时预测整体质量与细粒度属性。
提出属性感知提示、多维Thurstone奖励模型和跨域对齐机制三项技术创新。
analysis.experiments: 在8个IQA基准上，MG-IQA在整体质量预测（平均SRCC提升2.1%）和属性级评估上均优于现有方法，并生成可解释、对齐人类的质量描述。
limitations: 可能依赖特定VLM架构，泛化性需验证。
多属性推理的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多粒度推理框架MG-IQA，通过属性感知强化学习排序联合评估图像整体质量与细粒度属性。

papers.title: Epistemic Blinding: An Inference-Time Protocol for Auditing Prior Contamination in LLM-Assisted Analysis
papers.abstract: This paper presents epistemic blinding in the context of an agentic system that uses large language models to reason across multiple biological datasets for drug target prioritization. During development, it became apparent that LLM outputs silently blend data-driven inference with memorized priors about named entities - and the blend is invisible: there is no way to determine, from a single output, how much came from the data on the page and how much came from the model's training memory. Epistemic blinding is a simple inference-time protocol that replaces entity identifiers with anonymous codes before prompting, then compares outputs against an unblinded control. The protocol does not make LLM reasoning deterministic, but it restores one critical axis of auditability: measuring how much of an output came from the supplied data versus the model's parametric knowledge. The complete target identification system is described - including LLM-guided evolutionary optimization of scoring functions and blinded agentic reasoning for target rationalization - with demonstration that both stages operate without access to entity identity. In oncology drug target prioritization across four cancer types, blinding changes 16% of top-20 predictions while preserving identical recovery of validated targets. The contamination problem is shown to generalize beyond biology: in S&P 500 equity screening, brand-recognition bias reshapes 30-40% of top-20 rankings across five random seeds. To lower the barrier to adoption, the protocol is released as an open-source tool and as a Claude Code skill that enables one-command epistemic blinding within agentic workflows. The claim is not that blinded analysis produces better results, but that without blinding, there is no way to know to what degree the agent is adhering to the analytical process the researcher designed.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种推理时协议，通过匿名化实体标识来审计LLM在数据分析中是否混入训练记忆中的先验知识。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在数据分析时会无声地混合数据驱动推理和记忆中的先验知识，且这种混合不可见，无法从单次输出判断结果来源，导致分析过程缺乏可审计性。
analysis.problem: 如何检测和量化LLM辅助分析中输出结果来自提供数据与模型参数知识的比例。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM输出会无声地混合数据推理和记忆先验，这种混合不可见；在药物靶点优先级排序中，盲化改变了16%的top-20预测；在股票筛选中，品牌识别偏差重塑了30-40%的top-20排名。
analysis.method: 提出认知盲化协议：在提示前用匿名代码替换实体标识符，然后与未盲化对照比较输出差异，从而测量输出中来自数据与参数知识的比例。
contributions: 提出认知盲化协议，一种推理时审计方法，可量化LLM输出中数据与先验知识的贡献
在药物靶点优先级排序和股票筛选两个领域验证了协议的有效性
开源了工具和Claude Code技能，降低采用门槛
analysis.experiments: 在四种癌症类型的肿瘤药物靶点优先级排序中，盲化改变了16%的top-20预测，但保留了已验证靶点的完全恢复；在S&P 500股票筛选中，品牌识别偏差重塑了30-40%的top-20排名。
limitations: 协议不能使LLM推理确定化，仅恢复可审计性
可能不适用于所有类型的LLM辅助分析任务
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种推理时协议，通过匿名化实体标识来审计LLM在数据分析中是否混入训练记忆中的先验知识。

papers.title: OmniCamera: A Unified Framework for Multi-task Video Generation with Arbitrary Camera Control
papers.abstract: Video fundamentally intertwines two crucial axes: the dynamic content of a scene and the camera motion through which it is observed. However, existing generation models often entangle these factors, limiting independent control. In this work, we introduce OmniCamera, a unified framework designed to explicitly disentangle and command these two dimensions. This compositional approach enables flexible video generation by allowing arbitrary pairings of camera and content conditions, unlocking unprecedented creative control. To overcome the fundamental challenges of modality conflict and data scarcity inherent in such a system, we present two key innovations. First, we construct OmniCAM, a novel hybrid dataset combining curated real-world videos with synthetic data that provides diverse paired examples for robust multi-task learning. Second, we propose a Dual-level Curriculum Co-Training strategy that mitigates modality interference and synergistically learns from diverse data sources. This strategy operates on two levels: first, it progressively introduces control modalities by difficulties (condition-level), and second, trains for precise control on synthetic data before adapting to real data for photorealism (data-level). As a result, OmniCamera achieves state-of-the-art performance, enabling flexible control for complex camera movements while maintaining superior visual quality.

analysis.tldr: OmniCamera 提出统一框架，通过解耦场景动态与相机运动实现任意相机控制的视频生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频生成模型常将场景动态与相机运动纠缠，缺乏独立控制能力，限制了创意表达。
analysis.problem: 如何解耦视频生成中的场景内容与相机运动，实现任意配对下的灵活控制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出模态冲突和数据稀缺是主要挑战，但未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建混合数据集 OmniCAM（真实+合成），提出双层级课程协同训练策略（条件级难度渐进+数据级合成到真实迁移）。
contributions: 提出 OmniCamera 统一框架，实现场景内容与相机运动的解耦和任意组合控制。
构建 OmniCAM 混合数据集，缓解数据稀缺问题。
提出双层级课程协同训练策略，克服模态冲突并提升性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅声称达到 SOTA。
limitations: 可能依赖合成数据质量，真实场景泛化性待验证。
复杂相机运动控制的精度可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: OmniCamera 提出统一框架，通过解耦场景动态与相机运动实现任意相机控制的视频生成。

papers.title: The Model Agreed, But Didn't Learn: Diagnosing Surface Compliance in Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) internalize vast world knowledge as parametric memory, yet inevitably inherit the staleness and errors of their source corpora. Consequently, ensuring the reliability and malleability of these internal representations is imperative for trustworthy real-world deployment. Knowledge editing offers a pivotal paradigm for surgically modifying memory without retraining. However, while recent editors demonstrate high success rates on standard benchmarks, it remains questionable whether current evaluation frameworks that rely on assessing output under specific prompting conditions can reliably authenticate genuine memory modification. In this work, we introduce a simple diagnostic framework that subjects models to discriminative self-assessment under in-context learning (ICL) settings that better reflect real-world application environments, specifically designed to scrutinize the subtle behavioral nuances induced by memory modifications. This probing reveals a pervasive phenomenon of Surface Compliance, where editors achieve high benchmark scores by merely mimicking target outputs without structurally overwriting internal beliefs. Moreover, we find that recursive modifications accumulate representational residues, triggering cognitive instability and permanently diminishing the reversibility of the model's memory state. These insights underscore the risks of current editing paradigms and highlight the pivotal role of robust memory modification in building trustworthy, long-term sustainable LLM systems. Code is available at https://github.com/XiaojieGu/SA-MCQ.

analysis.tldr: 知识编辑可能只让模型表面服从，而未真正修改内部信念，导致评估虚高。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM 内部知识存在过时和错误，知识编辑旨在修正，但现有评估仅依赖特定提示下的输出，可能无法反映真实记忆修改，威胁模型可信部署。
analysis.problem: 当前知识编辑评估框架无法区分模型是真正修改了内部信念还是仅表面服从（Surface Compliance）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现表面服从现象：编辑器通过模仿目标输出获得高基准分数，但未结构性覆盖内部信念；递归修改会积累表征残留，引发认知不稳定并降低记忆可逆性。
analysis.method: 提出诊断框架，在上下文学习（ICL）设置下对模型进行判别性自我评估，以揭示记忆修改带来的细微行为变化。
contributions: 揭示知识编辑中普遍存在的表面服从现象，即模型仅模仿输出而未修改内部信念。
发现递归修改导致表征残留和认知不稳定，永久降低记忆可逆性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 诊断框架可能仅适用于特定 ICL 设置，泛化性待验证。
未讨论如何缓解表面服从或改进编辑方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 知识编辑可能只让模型表面服从，而未真正修改内部信念，导致评估虚高。

papers.title: Flowr -- Scaling Up Retail Supply Chain Operations Through Agentic AI in Large Scale Supermarket Chains
papers.abstract: Retail supply chain operations in supermarket chains involve continuous, high-volume manual workflows spanning demand forecasting, procurement, supplier coordination, and inventory replenishment, processes that are repetitive, decision-intensive, and difficult to scale without significant human effort. Despite growing investment in data analytics, the decision-making and coordination layers of these workflows remain predominantly manual, reactive, and fragmented across outlets, distribution centers, and supplier networks. This paper introduces Flowr, a novel agentic AI framework for automating end-to-end retail supply chain workflows in large-scale supermarket operations. Flowr systematically decomposes manual supply chain operations into specialized AI agents, each responsible for a clearly defined cognitive role, enabling automation of processes previously dependent on continuous human coordination. To ensure task accuracy and adherence to responsible AI principles, the framework employs a consortium of fine-tuned, domain-specialized large language models coordinated by a central reasoning LLM. Central to the framework is a human-in-the-loop orchestration model in which supply chain managers supervise and intervene across workflow stages via a Model Context Protocol (MCP)-enabled interface, preserving accountability and organizational control. Evaluation demonstrates that Flowr significantly reduces manual coordination overhead, improves demand-supply alignment, and enables proactive exception handling at a scale unachievable through manual processes. The framework was validated in collaboration with a large-scale supermarket chain and is domain-independent, offering a generalizable blueprint for agentic AI-driven supply chain automation across large-scale enterprise settings.

analysis.tldr: Flowr 是一个基于多智能体 AI 的零售供应链自动化框架，通过领域专用 LLM 和人在环控制实现端到端流程优化。
analysis.research_motivation: 零售供应链运营依赖大量重复、决策密集的人工流程，现有数据分析投资未能解决决策与协调层的自动化和可扩展性问题。
analysis.problem: 如何自动化大型超市供应链中需求预测、采购、供应商协调和库存补货等端到端工作流，同时保持准确性和组织控制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 Flowr 框架，将供应链操作分解为多个专门 AI 智能体，每个负责特定认知角色；使用微调领域专用 LLM 组成的联盟，由中央推理 LLM 协调；通过 MCP 接口实现人在环监督与干预。
contributions: 提出首个端到端 agentic AI 框架 Flowr，用于自动化大型超市零售供应链操作。
设计领域专用 LLM 联盟与中央推理 LLM 协调机制，结合人在环控制，确保准确性和责任性。
analysis.experiments: 与大型超市链合作验证，显示显著减少人工协调开销、改善供需匹配、实现主动异常处理。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量领域专用 LLM 微调数据。
人在环模式可能引入延迟，影响完全自动化效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Flowr 是一个基于多智能体 AI 的零售供应链自动化框架，通过领域专用 LLM 和人在环控制实现端到端流程优化。

papers.title: Is CLIP Cross-Eyed? Revealing and Mitigating Center Bias in the CLIP Family
papers.abstract: Recent research has shown that contrastive vision-language models such as CLIP often lack fine-grained understanding of visual content. While a growing body of work has sought to address this limitation, we identify a distinct failure mode in the CLIP family, which we term center bias, that persists even in recent model variants. Specifically, CLIP tends to disproportionately focus on the central region of an image, overlooking important objects located near the boundaries. This limitation is fundamental as failure to recognize relevant objects makes it difficult to perform any sophisticated tasks that depend on those objects. To understand the underlying causes of the limitation, we conduct analyses from both representation and attention perspectives. Using interpretability methods, i.e., embedding decomposition and attention map analysis, we find that relevant concepts especially those associated with off-center objects vanish from the model's embedding in the final representation due to information loss during the aggregation of visual embeddings, particularly the reliance on pooling mechanisms. Finally, we show that this bias can be alleviated with training-free strategies such as visual prompting and attention redistribution by redirecting models' attention to off-center regions.

analysis.tldr: CLIP模型存在中心偏差，即过度关注图像中心区域而忽略边界物体，本文通过表征和注意力分析揭示其成因并提出无训练缓解策略。
analysis.research_motivation: CLIP等对比视觉语言模型在细粒度视觉理解上存在不足，但已有工作未关注到中心偏差这一特定失败模式，该偏差限制了模型对边界物体的识别，进而影响依赖这些物体的复杂任务。
analysis.problem: CLIP模型存在中心偏差，导致对图像边界区域的重要物体识别不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过嵌入分解和注意力图分析发现，中心偏差源于视觉嵌入聚合过程中的信息丢失，特别是池化机制导致离中心物体的相关概念在最终表征中消失。
analysis.method: 提出两种无训练缓解策略：视觉提示（visual prompting）和注意力重分配（attention redistribution），通过引导模型关注离中心区域来减轻偏差。
contributions: 首次识别并命名CLIP家族中的中心偏差现象，并系统分析其成因。
提出两种无需重新训练的有效缓解策略，即视觉提示和注意力重分配。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 缓解策略可能无法完全消除中心偏差，尤其在极端布局下。
方法仅在CLIP家族上验证，对其他视觉语言模型的泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CLIP模型存在中心偏差，即过度关注图像中心区域而忽略边界物体，本文通过表征和注意力分析揭示其成因并提出无训练缓解策略。

papers.title: A Formal Security Framework for MCP-Based AI Agents: Threat Taxonomy, Verification Models, and Defense Mechanisms
papers.abstract: The Model Context Protocol (MCP), introduced by Anthropic in November 2024 and now governed by the Linux Foundation's Agentic AI Foundation, has rapidly become the de facto standard for connecting large language model (LLM)-based agents to external tools and data sources, with over 97 million monthly SDK downloads and more than 177000 registered tools. However, this explosive adoption has exposed a critical gap: the absence of a unified, formal security framework capable of systematically characterizing, analyzing, and mitigating the diverse threats facing MCP-based agent ecosystems. Existing security research remains fragmented across individual attack papers, isolated benchmarks, and point defense mechanisms. This paper presents MCPSHIELD, a comprehensive formal security framework for MCP-based AI agents. We make four principal contributions: (1) a hierarchical threat taxonomy comprising 7 threat categories and 23 distinct attack vectors organized across four attack surfaces, grounded in the analysis of over 177000 MCP tools; (2) a formal verification model based on labeled transition systems with trust boundary annotations that enables static and runtime analysis of MCP tool interaction chains; (3) a systematic comparative evaluation of 12 existing defense mechanisms, identifying coverage gaps across our threat taxonomy; and (4) a defense in depth reference architecture integrating capability based access control, cryptographic tool attestation, information flow tracking, and runtime policy enforcement. Our analysis reveals that no existing single defense covers more than 34 percent of the identified threat landscape, whereas MCPSHIELD's integrated architecture achieves theoretical coverage of 91 percent. We further identify seven open research challenges that must be addressed to secure the next generation of agentic AI systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个针对MCP协议AI Agent的正式安全框架MCPSHIELD，包含威胁分类、形式化验证模型和纵深防御架构。
analysis.research_motivation: MCP协议已成为LLM Agent连接外部工具的事实标准，月SDK下载量超9700万，注册工具超17.7万，但缺乏统一的安全框架，现有研究碎片化。
analysis.problem: 缺乏系统性的安全框架来分类、分析和缓解MCP Agent生态系统中的多样化威胁。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有防御机制覆盖不足，单一防御最多覆盖34%的威胁面，而MCPSHIELD集成架构理论覆盖率达91%。
analysis.method: 提出MCPSHIELD框架，包括：基于17.7万工具分析的7类23种攻击向量的层次化威胁分类；基于带信任边界标注的标签转移系统的形式化验证模型；12种现有防御机制的系统比较；基于能力访问控制、密码学工具认证、信息流追踪和运行时策略执行的纵深防御架构。
contributions: 提出首个针对MCP Agent的正式安全框架MCPSHIELD
构建了包含7类23种攻击向量的层次化威胁分类体系
设计了基于标签转移系统的形式化验证模型
提出了集成纵深防御架构，理论覆盖率达91%
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及对12种现有防御机制的系统比较和覆盖分析。
limitations: 理论覆盖率91%可能在实际部署中因环境差异而降低
框架的验证模型可能面临可扩展性挑战
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个针对MCP协议AI Agent的正式安全框架MCPSHIELD，包含威胁分类、形式化验证模型和纵深防御架构。

papers.title: Beyond Compromise: Pareto-Lenient Consensus for Efficient Multi-Preference LLM Alignment
papers.abstract: Transcending the single-preference paradigm, aligning LLMs with diverse human values is pivotal for robust deployment. Contemporary Multi-Objective Preference Alignment (MPA) approaches predominantly rely on static linear scalarization or rigid gradient projection to navigate these trade-offs. However, by enforcing strict conflict avoidance or simultaneous descent, these paradigms often prematurely converge to local stationary points. While mathematically stable, these points represent a conservative compromise where the model sacrifices potential global Pareto improvements to avoid transient local trade-offs. To break this deadlock, we propose Pareto-Lenient Consensus (PLC), a game-theoretic framework that reimagines alignment as a dynamic negotiation process. Unlike rigid approaches, PLC introduces consensus-driven lenient gradient rectification, which dynamically tolerates local degradation provided there is a sufficient dominant coalition surplus, thereby empowering the optimization trajectory to escape local suboptimal equilibrium and explore the distal Pareto-optimal frontier. Theoretical analysis validates PLC can facilitate stalemate escape and asymptotically converge to a Pareto consensus equilibrium. Moreover, extensive experiments show that PLC surpasses baselines in both fixed-preference alignment and global Pareto frontier quality. This work highlights the potential of negotiation-driven alignment as a promising avenue for MPA. Our codes are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/aaa-6BB8.

analysis.tldr: 提出博弈论框架PLC，通过动态容忍局部退化实现多偏好LLM对齐的帕累托前沿探索。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MPA方法依赖静态线性标量化或刚性梯度投影，易陷入局部驻点，无法探索全局帕累托最优前沿。
analysis.problem: 解决多偏好LLM对齐中因严格冲突避免导致的局部最优困境。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出静态方法强制避免冲突或同时下降，导致模型牺牲潜在全局帕累托改进以规避局部权衡。
analysis.method: 提出Pareto-Lenient Consensus (PLC)，一种基于博弈论的动态协商框架，通过共识驱动的宽容梯度修正，在存在主导联盟盈余时动态容忍局部退化，从而逃离局部次优均衡。
contributions: 提出PLC框架，将多偏好对齐重新构想为动态协商过程。
理论证明PLC能促进僵局逃离并渐近收敛到帕累托共识均衡。
实验表明PLC在固定偏好对齐和全局帕累托前沿质量上均超越基线。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到在固定偏好对齐和全局帕累托前沿质量上超越基线，但未提供具体数据集或指标。
limitations: 可能对联盟盈余阈值敏感，需要调参。
理论分析假设理想化条件，实际收敛性可能受噪声影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出博弈论框架PLC，通过动态容忍局部退化实现多偏好LLM对齐的帕累托前沿探索。

papers.title: TalkLoRA: Communication-Aware Mixture of Low-Rank Adaptation for Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) enables parameter-efficient fine-tuning of Large Language Models (LLMs), and recent Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) extensions further enhance flexibility by dynamically combining multiple LoRA experts. However, existing MoE-augmented LoRA methods assume that experts operate independently, often leading to unstable routing, expert dominance. In this paper, we propose \textbf{TalkLoRA}, a communication-aware MoELoRA framework that relaxes this independence assumption by introducing expert-level communication prior to routing. TalkLoRA equips low-rank experts with a lightweight Talking Module that enables controlled information exchange across expert subspaces, producing a more robust global signal for routing. Theoretically, we show that expert communication smooths routing dynamics by mitigating perturbation amplification while strictly generalizing existing MoELoRA architectures. Empirically, TalkLoRA consistently outperforms vanilla LoRA and MoELoRA across diverse language understanding and generation tasks, achieving higher parameter efficiency and more balanced expert routing under comparable parameter budgets. These results highlight structured expert communication as a principled and effective enhancement for MoE-based parameter-efficient adaptation. Code is available at https://github.com/why0129/TalkLoRA.

analysis.tldr: TalkLoRA 通过引入专家级通信模块，改进了 MoE-LoRA 的路由稳定性和参数效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 MoE 增强的 LoRA 方法假设专家独立运行，导致路由不稳定和专家主导问题，限制了参数高效微调的性能。
analysis.problem: 解决 MoE-LoRA 中专家独立假设带来的路由不稳定和专家主导问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出独立专家假设会导致不稳定路由和专家主导，而专家通信可平滑路由动态并缓解扰动放大。
analysis.method: 提出 TalkLoRA，在低秩专家中引入轻量级 Talking Module，在路由前实现专家间的受控信息交换，生成更鲁棒的全局路由信号。
contributions: 提出 TalkLoRA，一种通信感知的 MoE-LoRA 框架，通过专家级通信提升路由稳定性。
理论证明专家通信可平滑路由动态并泛化现有 MoE-LoRA 架构。
实验表明 TalkLoRA 在多种语言任务上优于 LoRA 和 MoE-LoRA，实现更高参数效率和更均衡路由。
analysis.experiments: 在多种语言理解和生成任务上评估，与 vanilla LoRA 和 MoE-LoRA 对比，显示一致优势。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能增加额外计算开销，尽管 Talking Module 是轻量级的。
理论分析可能限于特定假设，实际泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TalkLoRA 通过引入专家级通信模块，改进了 MoE-LoRA 的路由稳定性和参数效率。

papers.title: HumANDiff: Articulated Noise Diffusion for Motion-Consistent Human Video Generation
papers.abstract: Despite tremendous recent progress in human video generation, generative video diffusion models still struggle to capture the dynamics and physics of human motions faithfully. In this paper, we propose a new framework for human video generation, HumANDiff, which enhances the human motion control with three key designs: 1) Articulated motion-consistent noise sampling that correlates the spatiotemporal distribution of latent noise and replaces the unstructured random Gaussian noise with 3D articulated noise sampled on the dense surface manifold of a statistical human body template. It inherits body topology priors for spatially and temporally consistent noise sampling. 2) Joint appearance-motion learning that enhances the standard training objective of video diffusion models by jointly predicting pixel appearances and corresponding physical motions from the articulated noises. It enables high-fidelity human video synthesis, e.g., capturing motion-dependent clothing wrinkles. 3) Geometric motion consistency learning that enforces physical motion consistency across frames via a novel geometric motion consistency loss defined in the articulated noise space. HumANDiff enables scalable controllable human video generation by fine-tuning video diffusion models with articulated noise sampling. Consequently, our method is agnostic to diffusion model design, and requires no modifications to the model architecture. During inference, HumANDiff enables image-to-video generation within a single framework, achieving intrinsic motion control without requiring additional motion modules. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in rendering motion-consistent, high-fidelity humans with diverse clothing styles. Project page: https://taohuumd.github.io/projects/HumANDiff/

analysis.tldr: HumANDiff通过3D人体模板的关节噪声采样和联合外观-运动学习，实现运动一致的高保真人体视频生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频扩散模型难以忠实捕捉人体运动的动态和物理特性，导致生成的人体视频存在运动不一致、细节失真等问题。
analysis.problem: 如何生成运动一致、高保真且具有多样服装风格的人体视频。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出HumANDiff框架，包含三个关键设计：1) 关节运动一致噪声采样，利用统计人体模板的稠密表面流形生成3D关节噪声；2) 联合外观-运动学习，在标准扩散训练目标中联合预测像素外观和物理运动；3) 几何运动一致性学习，在关节噪声空间中定义几何运动一致性损失。
contributions: 提出关节运动一致噪声采样方法，将结构化3D噪声引入视频扩散模型，增强时空一致性。
设计联合外观-运动学习框架，实现高保真人体视频合成，捕捉运动依赖的服装褶皱。
引入几何运动一致性损失，确保帧间物理运动一致性，无需修改模型架构。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但声称在渲染运动一致、高保真且具有多样服装风格的人体方面达到最先进性能。
limitations: 可能依赖统计人体模板，对非标准体型或复杂姿态的泛化能力有限。
未提及对长视频生成或实时推理的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HumANDiff通过3D人体模板的关节噪声采样和联合外观-运动学习，实现运动一致的高保真人体视频生成。

papers.title: Multi-Modal Landslide Detection from Sentinel-1 SAR and Sentinel-2 Optical Imagery Using Multi-Encoder Vision Transformers and Ensemble Learning
papers.abstract: Landslides represent a major geohazard with severe impacts on human life, infrastructure, and ecosystems, underscoring the need for accurate and timely detection approaches to support disaster risk reduction. This study proposes a modular, multi-model framework that fuses Sentinel-2 optical imagery with Sentinel-1 Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) data, for robust landslide detection. The methodology leverages multi-encoder vision transformers, where each data modality is processed through separate lightweight pretrained encoders, achieving strong performance in landslide detection. In addition, the integration of multiple models, particularly the combination of neural networks and gradient boosting models (LightGBM and XGBoost), demonstrates the power of ensemble learning to further enhance accuracy and robustness. Derived spectral indices, such as NDVI, are integrated alongside original bands to enhance sensitivity to vegetation and surface changes. The proposed methodology achieves a state-of-the-art F1 score of 0.919 on landslide detection, addressing a patch-based classification task rather than pixel-level segmentation and operating without pre-event Sentinel-2 data, highlighting its effectiveness in a non-classical change detection setting. It also demonstrated top performance in a machine learning competition, achieving a strong balance between precision and recall and highlighting the advantages of explicitly leveraging the complementary strengths of optical and radar data. The conducted experiments and research also emphasize scalability and operational applicability, enabling flexible configurations with optical-only, SAR-only, or combined inputs, and offering a transferable framework for broader natural hazard monitoring and environmental change applications. Full training and inference code can be found in https://github.com/IoannisNasios/sentinel-landslide-cls.

analysis.tldr: 融合 Sentinel-1 SAR 和 Sentinel-2 光学影像的多编码器视觉 Transformer 与集成学习框架，在滑坡检测任务上达到 F1 0.919。
analysis.research_motivation: 滑坡对生命、基础设施和生态系统造成严重影响，需要准确及时的检测方法以支持减灾，但现有方法在融合多模态遥感数据方面仍有提升空间。
analysis.problem: 如何有效融合 Sentinel-1 SAR 和 Sentinel-2 光学影像进行鲁棒的滑坡检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出模块化多模型框架，使用多编码器视觉 Transformer 分别处理各模态数据，并集成神经网络与梯度提升模型（LightGBM、XGBoost），同时融入 NDVI 等光谱指数。
contributions: 提出融合 SAR 和光学影像的多编码器视觉 Transformer 框架，实现高精度滑坡检测。
通过集成学习（神经网络+梯度提升）进一步提升准确性和鲁棒性。
在无需灾前 Sentinel-2 数据的非经典变化检测设定下达到 SOTA 性能（F1 0.919）。
analysis.experiments: 在滑坡检测任务上达到 F1 0.919，并在机器学习竞赛中表现最佳，实现了精度与召回率的良好平衡。
limitations: 基于 patch 分类而非像素级分割，可能限制空间细节。
依赖 Sentinel-1 和 Sentinel-2 数据，对数据可用性有要求。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 融合 Sentinel-1 SAR 和 Sentinel-2 光学影像的多编码器视觉 Transformer 与集成学习框架，在滑坡检测任务上达到 F1 0.919。

papers.title: Does Pass Rate Tell the Whole Story? Evaluating Design Constraint Compliance in LLM-based Issue Resolution
papers.abstract: Repository-level issue resolution benchmarks have become a standard testbed for evaluating LLM-based agents, yet success is still predominantly measured by test pass rates. In practice, however, acceptable patches must also comply with project-specific design constraints, such as architectural conventions, error-handling policies, and maintainability requirements, which are rarely encoded in tests and are often documented only implicitly in code review discussions. This paper introduces \textit{design-aware issue resolution} and presents \bench{}, a benchmark that makes such implicit design constraints explicit and measurable. \bench{} is constructed by mining and validating design constraints from real-world pull requests, linking them to issue instances, and automatically checking patch compliance using an LLM-based verifier, yielding 495 issues and 1,787 validated constraints across six repositories, aligned with SWE-bench-Verified and SWE-bench-Pro. Experiments with state-of-the-art agents show that test-based correctness substantially overestimates patch quality: fewer than half of resolved issues are fully design-satisfying, design violations are widespread, and functional correctness exhibits negligible statistical association with design satisfaction. While providing issue-specific design guidance reduces violations, substantial non-compliance remains, highlighting a fundamental gap in current agent capabilities and motivating design-aware evaluation beyond functional correctness.

analysis.tldr: 测试通过率高估了LLM修复补丁的质量，设计约束合规性才是关键。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准仅用测试通过率衡量LLM代理的代码修复质量，忽略了实际项目中必须遵守的设计约束（如架构约定、错误处理策略等），导致评估不全面。
analysis.problem: 如何显式化并量化评估LLM代理在仓库级问题修复中对设计约束的合规性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 测试通过率与设计约束合规性之间统计关联极弱，超过一半的测试通过补丁存在设计违规。
analysis.method: 构建DesignBench基准：从真实PR中挖掘并验证设计约束，链接到问题实例，使用LLM验证器自动检查补丁合规性。
contributions: 提出设计感知问题修复概念，并构建包含495个问题和1787个约束的基准DesignBench。
实验证明测试通过率严重高估补丁质量，设计违规普遍存在，且功能正确性与设计满意度无显著关联。
analysis.experiments: 在六个仓库上使用最先进代理进行实验，测试通过率与设计合规性对比分析。
limitations: 设计约束的挖掘和验证依赖人工，可能遗漏部分约束。
LLM验证器的准确性可能影响合规性判断。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 测试通过率高估了LLM修复补丁的质量，设计约束合规性才是关键。

papers.title: Polynomial-Time Algorithm for Thiele Voting Rules with Voter Interval Preferences
papers.abstract: We present a polynomial-time algorithm for computing an optimal committee of size $k$ under any given Thiele voting rule for elections on the Voter Interval domain (i.e., when voters can be ordered so that each candidate is approved by a consecutive voters). Our result extends to the Generalized Thiele rule, in which each voter has an individual weight (scoring) sequence. This resolves a 10-year-old open problem that was originally posed for Proportional Approval Voting and later extended to every Thiele rule (Elkind and Lackner, IJCAI 2015; Peters, AAAI 2018). Our main technical ingredient is a new structural result -- a concavity theorem for families of intervals. It shows that, given two solutions of different sizes, one can construct a solution of any intermediate size whose score is at least the corresponding linear interpolation of the two scores. As a consequence, on Voter Interval profiles, the optimal total Thiele score is a concave function of the committee size. We exploit this concavity within an optimization framework based on a Lagrangian relaxation of a natural integer linear program formulation, obtained by moving the cardinality constraint into the objective. On Voter Interval profiles, the resulting constraint matrix is totally unimodular, so it can be solved in polynomial time. Our main algorithm and its proof were obtained via human--AI collaboration. In particular, a slightly simplified version of the main structural theorem used by the algorithm was obtained in a single call to Gemini Deep Think.

analysis.tldr: 提出多项式时间算法解决Thiele投票规则在选民区间偏好下的最优委员会选择问题，解决了10年未解难题。
analysis.research_motivation: Thiele投票规则（如比例批准投票）在计算最优委员会时通常为NP难问题，但在选民区间偏好（每个候选人被连续选民批准）下是否存在多项式时间算法是长期悬而未决的问题，具有理论意义和实际应用价值。
analysis.problem: 给定选民区间偏好，在Thiele投票规则（包括广义Thiele规则）下计算大小为k的最优委员会。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出区间族的凹性定理，证明最优Thiele得分是委员会大小的凹函数；利用拉格朗日松弛将基数约束移入目标函数，得到整数线性规划，其约束矩阵在选民区间偏好下是完全幺模的，从而可在多项式时间内求解。
contributions: 解决了Thiele投票规则在选民区间偏好下的多项式时间可计算性问题，该问题已开放10年。
证明了区间族的凹性定理，并利用该性质设计基于拉格朗日松弛的多项式时间算法。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 算法仅适用于选民区间偏好域，对一般偏好域可能不适用。
未讨论实际运行效率或大规模实例的可行性。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多项式时间算法解决Thiele投票规则在选民区间偏好下的最优委员会选择问题，解决了10年未解难题。
