papers.title: Towards Trustworthy Report Generation: A Deep Research Agent with Progressive Confidence Estimation and Calibration
papers.abstract: As agent-based systems continue to evolve, deep research agents are capable of automatically generating research-style reports across diverse domains. While these agents promise to streamline information synthesis and knowledge exploration, existing evaluation frameworks-typically based on subjective dimensions-fail to capture a critical aspect of report quality: trustworthiness. In open-ended research scenarios where ground-truth answers are unavailable, current evaluation methods cannot effectively measure the epistemic confidence of generated content, making calibration difficult and leaving users susceptible to misleading or hallucinated information. To address this limitation, we propose a novel deep research agent that incorporates progressive confidence estimation and calibration within the report generation pipeline. Our system leverages a deliberative search model, featuring deep retrieval and multi-hop reasoning to ground outputs in verifiable evidence while assigning confidence scores to individual claims. Combined with a carefully designed workflow, this approach produces trustworthy reports with enhanced transparency. Experimental results and case studies demonstrate that our method substantially improves interpretability and significantly increases user trust.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种带有渐进式置信度估计与校准的深度研究智能体，用于生成更可信的研究报告。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于主观维度的评估框架无法捕捉报告的可信度，尤其在开放场景下缺乏对生成内容认知置信度的有效度量，导致校准困难，用户易受误导或幻觉信息影响。
analysis.problem: 如何让深度研究智能体在生成报告时提供可验证的置信度估计，并实现校准，从而提升报告的可信度和透明度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一种深度研究智能体，包含渐进式置信度估计与校准机制；采用深思熟虑的搜索模型，结合深度检索和多跳推理，将输出锚定于可验证证据，并为每个声明分配置信度分数；配合精心设计的工作流。
contributions: 提出一种新的深度研究智能体，将渐进式置信度估计与校准集成到报告生成流程中。
通过实验和案例研究证明该方法显著提升了可解释性和用户信任。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到实验和案例研究表明方法提升了可解释性和用户信任，但未提供具体实验设置或结果。
limitations: 可能依赖检索质量，在低资源领域证据不足时置信度估计可能不准确。
渐进式校准的计算开销可能较大，影响实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种带有渐进式置信度估计与校准的深度研究智能体，用于生成更可信的研究报告。

papers.title: Mixture-of-Modality-Experts with Holistic Token Learning for Fine-Grained Multimodal Visual Analytics in Driver Action Recognition
papers.abstract: Robust multimodal visual analytics remains challenging when heterogeneous modalities provide complementary but input-dependent evidence for decision-making.Existing multimodal learning methods mainly rely on fixed fusion modules or predefined cross-modal interactions, which are often insufficient to adapt to changing modality reliability and to capture fine-grained action cues. To address this issue, we propose a Mixture-of-Modality-Experts (MoME) framework with a Holistic Token Learning (HTL) strategy. MoME enables adaptive collaboration among modality-specific experts, while HTL improves both intra-expert refinement and inter-expert knowledge transfer through class tokens and spatio-temporal tokens. In this way, our method forms a knowledge-centric multimodal learning framework that improves expert specialization while reducing ambiguity in multimodal fusion.We validate the proposed framework on driver action recognition as a representative multimodal understanding taskThe experimental results on the public benchmark show that the proposed MoME framework and the HTL strategy jointly outperform representative single-modal and multimodal baselines. Additional ablation, validation, and visualization results further verify that the proposed HTL strategy improves subtle multimodal understanding and offers better interpretability.

analysis.tldr: 提出MoME框架与HTL策略，通过模态专家混合与整体令牌学习提升细粒度多模态驾驶动作识别。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有多模态学习方法依赖固定融合模块或预定义跨模态交互，难以适应模态可靠性变化并捕捉细粒度动作线索。
analysis.problem: 如何实现自适应多模态融合以提升细粒度驾驶动作识别的鲁棒性和准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MoME框架，包含模态特定专家的自适应协作；HTL策略通过类令牌和时空令牌改进专家内部细化与专家间知识迁移。
contributions: 提出MoME框架实现模态专家的自适应协作
提出HTL策略提升细粒度多模态理解与可解释性
analysis.experiments: 在公开驾驶动作识别基准上，MoME与HTL联合优于单模态和多模态基线；消融、验证和可视化结果进一步验证了HTL的有效性。
limitations: 可能仅在驾驶动作识别场景验证，泛化性未知
计算开销可能因专家数量增加而增大
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MoME框架与HTL策略，通过模态专家混合与整体令牌学习提升细粒度多模态驾驶动作识别。

papers.title: MARL-GPT: Foundation Model for Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Recent advances in multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) have demonstrated success in numerous challenging domains and environments, but typically require specialized models for each task. In this work, we propose a coherent methodology that makes it possible for a single GPT-based model to learn and perform well across diverse MARL environments and tasks, including StarCraft Multi-Agent Challenge, Google Research Football and POGEMA. Our method, MARL-GPT, applies offline reinforcement learning to train at scale on the expert trajectories (400M for SMACv2, 100M for GRF, and 1B for POGEMA) combined with a single transformer-based observation encoder that requires no task-specific tuning. Experiments show that MARL-GPT achieves competitive performance compared to specialized baselines in all tested environments. Thus, our findings suggest that it is, indeed, possible to build a multi-task transformer-based model for a wide variety of (significantly different) multi-agent problems paving the way to the fundamental MARL model (akin to ChatGPT, Llama, Mistral etc. in natural language modeling).

analysis.tldr: 提出MARL-GPT，一个基于GPT的多智能体强化学习基础模型，在多个异构环境中实现多任务泛化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MARL方法通常需要为每个任务设计专用模型，缺乏跨任务泛化能力，限制了基础模型在MARL领域的发展。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个单一模型，使其能够在多个不同的多智能体强化学习环境中均取得良好表现，而无需任务特定的调优。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用离线强化学习，在大规模专家轨迹数据（SMACv2 4亿、GRF 1亿、POGEMA 10亿）上训练一个GPT架构的模型，并使用统一的Transformer观察编码器，无需任务特定调优。
contributions: 提出MARL-GPT，首个基于GPT的多智能体强化学习基础模型，支持多任务学习。
在三个异构MARL环境（SMACv2、GRF、POGEMA）上验证了单模型跨任务泛化的可行性。
analysis.experiments: 在StarCraft Multi-Agent Challenge、Google Research Football和POGEMA三个环境中进行实验，与专用基线相比取得有竞争力的性能。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模专家轨迹数据，数据收集成本高。
未提及在更广泛或未见环境中的零样本泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MARL-GPT，一个基于GPT的多智能体强化学习基础模型，在多个异构环境中实现多任务泛化。

papers.title: Context-Value-Action Architecture for Value-Driven Large Language Model Agents
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown promise in simulating human behavior, yet existing agents often exhibit behavioral rigidity, a flaw frequently masked by the self-referential bias of current "LLM-as-a-judge" evaluations. By evaluating against empirical ground truth, we reveal a counter-intuitive phenomenon: increasing the intensity of prompt-driven reasoning does not enhance fidelity but rather exacerbates value polarization, collapsing population diversity. To address this, we propose the Context-Value-Action (CVA) architecture, grounded in the Stimulus-Organism-Response (S-O-R) model and Schwartz's Theory of Basic Human Values. Unlike methods relying on self-verification, CVA decouples action generation from cognitive reasoning via a novel Value Verifier trained on authentic human data to explicitly model dynamic value activation. Experiments on CVABench, which comprises over 1.1 million real-world interaction traces, demonstrate that CVA significantly outperforms baselines. Our approach effectively mitigates polarization while offering superior behavioral fidelity and interpretability.

analysis.tldr: 提出Context-Value-Action架构，通过显式建模动态价值激活提升LLM Agent行为保真度并缓解极化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM Agent模拟人类行为时存在行为僵化问题，且当前'LLM-as-a-judge'评估存在自我参照偏差，掩盖了这一问题。
analysis.problem: 如何提升LLM Agent行为模拟的保真度，同时避免价值极化并保持群体多样性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要揭示了一个反直觉现象：增加提示驱动的推理强度反而加剧价值极化，降低群体多样性。
analysis.method: 提出Context-Value-Action (CVA)架构，基于S-O-R模型和Schwartz基本人类价值理论，通过价值验证器（Value Verifier）显式建模动态价值激活，将动作生成与认知推理解耦。
contributions: 揭示了提示驱动推理强度增加反而导致价值极化的反直觉现象
提出了CVA架构，通过显式价值建模提升行为保真度和可解释性
analysis.experiments: 在包含超过110万真实交互轨迹的CVABench上，CVA显著优于基线方法。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的人类价值标注数据
价值验证器的泛化能力可能受限于训练数据分布
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Context-Value-Action架构，通过显式建模动态价值激活提升LLM Agent行为保真度并缓解极化。

papers.title: Leveraging Image Editing Foundation Models for Data-Efficient CT Metal Artifact Reduction
papers.abstract: Metal artifacts from high-attenuation implants severely degrade CT image quality, obscuring critical anatomical structures and posing a challenge for standard deep learning methods that require extensive paired training data. We propose a paradigm shift: reframing artifact reduction as an in-context reasoning task by adapting a general-purpose vision-language diffusion foundation model via parameter-efficient Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA). By leveraging rich visual priors, our approach achieves effective artifact suppression with only 16 to 128 paired training examples reducing data requirements by two orders of magnitude. Crucially, we demonstrate that domain adaptation is essential for hallucination mitigation; without it, foundation models interpret streak artifacts as erroneous natural objects (e.g., waffles or petri dishes). To ground the restoration, we propose a multi-reference conditioning strategy where clean anatomical exemplars from unrelated subjects are provided alongside the corrupted input, enabling the model to exploit category-specific context to infer uncorrupted anatomy. Extensive evaluation on the AAPM CT-MAR benchmark demonstrates that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on perceptual and radiological-feature metrics . This work establishes that foundation models, when appropriately adapted, offer a scalable alternative for interpretable, data-efficient medical image reconstruction. Code is available at https://github.com/ahmetemirdagi/CT-EditMAR.

analysis.tldr: 利用图像编辑基础模型通过LoRA微调，仅需少量配对数据即可实现CT金属伪影去除。
analysis.research_motivation: CT金属伪影严重降低图像质量，传统深度学习方法需要大量配对训练数据，获取成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何利用预训练基础模型实现数据高效的CT金属伪影去除。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 直接使用基础模型会产生幻觉，将伪影误识别为自然物体（如华夫饼、培养皿），表明领域适应至关重要。
analysis.method: 将伪影去除重构为上下文推理任务，使用LoRA微调通用视觉-语言扩散模型，并提出多参考条件策略，利用无关受试者的干净解剖样本提供类别上下文。
contributions: 提出将CT金属伪影去除转化为上下文推理任务的新范式，利用图像编辑基础模型。
通过LoRA微调实现数据高效（仅需16-128对样本），性能达到SOTA。
揭示基础模型在医学图像上的幻觉问题，并证明领域适应的必要性。
提出多参考条件策略，利用干净解剖样本引导恢复。
analysis.experiments: 在AAPM CT-MAR基准上评估，在感知和放射学特征指标上达到SOTA。
limitations: 可能依赖参考样本的质量和代表性。
仅针对CT金属伪影，泛化到其他伪影类型需验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用图像编辑基础模型通过LoRA微调，仅需少量配对数据即可实现CT金属伪影去除。

papers.title: A High-Accuracy Optical Music Recognition Method Based on Bottleneck Residual Convolutions
papers.abstract: Optical Music Recognition (OMR) aims to convert printed or handwritten music score images into editable symbolic representations. This paper presents an end-to-end OMR framework that combines residual bottleneck convolutions with bidirectional gated recurrent unit (BiGRU)-based sequence modeling. A convolutional neural network with ResNet-v2-style residual bottleneck blocks and multi-scale dilated convolutions is used to extract features that encode both fine-grained symbol details and global staff-line structures. The extracted feature sequences are then fed into a BiGRU network to model temporal dependencies among musical symbols. The model is trained using the Connectionist Temporal Classification loss, enabling end-to-end prediction without explicit alignment annotations. Experimental results on the Camera-PrIMuS and PrIMuS datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework. On Camera-PrIMuS, the proposed method achieves a sequence error rate (SeER) of $7.52\%$ and a symbol error rate (SyER) of $0.45\%$, with pitch, type, and note accuracies of $99.33\%$, $99.60\%$, and $99.28\%$, respectively. The average training time is 1.74~s per epoch, demonstrating high computational efficiency while maintaining strong recognition performance. On PrIMuS, the method achieves a SeER of $8.11\%$ and a SyER of $0.49\%$, with pitch, type, and note accuracies of $99.27\%$, $99.58\%$, and $99.21\%$, respectively. A fine-grained error analysis further confirms the effectiveness of the proposed model.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种结合瓶颈残差卷积与BiGRU的高精度光学乐谱识别方法，在Camera-PrIMuS和PrIMuS数据集上取得低错误率。
analysis.research_motivation: 光学乐谱识别（OMR）旨在将乐谱图像转换为可编辑符号表示，但现有方法在细粒度符号细节与全局谱线结构建模上存在不足，且需要显式对齐标注，限制了实用性。
analysis.problem: 如何设计端到端的OMR框架，在无需对齐标注的情况下同时捕捉乐谱的局部符号细节和全局结构信息，并实现高精度识别。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用ResNet-v2风格的瓶颈残差块和多尺度空洞卷积提取特征，然后通过BiGRU网络建模符号间的时序依赖，最后用CTC损失进行端到端训练。
contributions: 提出结合瓶颈残差卷积与BiGRU的端到端OMR框架，无需显式对齐标注。
在Camera-PrIMuS和PrIMuS数据集上取得领先的序列错误率和符号错误率，且训练效率高。
analysis.experiments: 在Camera-PrIMuS和PrIMuS数据集上评估，Camera-PrIMuS上SeER为7.52%，SyER为0.45%，音高、类型和音符准确率分别为99.33%、99.60%、99.28%；PrIMuS上SeER为8.11%，SyER为0.49%，对应准确率为99.27%、99.58%、99.21%。平均每epoch训练时间1.74秒。
limitations: 可能对复杂手写乐谱的泛化能力有限。
未在更多样化的数据集上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种结合瓶颈残差卷积与BiGRU的高精度光学乐谱识别方法，在Camera-PrIMuS和PrIMuS数据集上取得低错误率。

papers.title: SonoSelect: Efficient Ultrasound Perception via Active Probe Exploration
papers.abstract: Ultrasound perception typically requires multiple scan views through probe movement to reduce diagnostic ambiguity, mitigate acoustic occlusions, and improve anatomical coverage. However, not all probe views are equally informative. Exhaustively acquiring a large number of views can introduce substantial redundancy, increase scanning and processing costs. To address this, we define an active view exploration task for ultrasound and propose SonoSelect, an ultrasound-specific method that adaptively guides probe movement based on current observations. Specifically, we cast ultrasound active view exploration as a sequential decision-making problem. Each new 2D ultrasound view is fused into a 3D spatial memory of the observed anatomy, which guides the next probe position. On top of this formulation, we propose an ultrasound-specific objective that favors probe movements with greater organ coverage, lower reconstruction uncertainty, and less redundant scanning. Experiments on the ultrasound simulator show that SonoSelect achieves promising multi-view organ classification accuracy using only 2 out of N views. Furthermore, for a more difficult kidney cyst detection task, it reaches 54.56% kidney coverage and 35.13% cyst coverage, with short trajectories consistently centered on the target cyst.

analysis.tldr: SonoSelect通过主动探头探索策略，仅用少量超声视图即可实现高效器官感知。
analysis.research_motivation: 超声感知通常需要多个扫描视图来减少诊断歧义和声学遮挡，但大量视图存在冗余，增加成本。
analysis.problem: 如何自适应地选择最有效的超声探头位置，以最少视图完成器官覆盖和诊断任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将主动视图探索建模为序列决策问题，融合2D视图到3D空间记忆，并设计超声专用目标函数平衡器官覆盖、重建不确定性和冗余扫描。
contributions: 定义了超声主动视图探索任务
提出SonoSelect方法，将问题转化为序列决策并设计专用目标函数
analysis.experiments: 在超声模拟器上实验，多视图器官分类仅用2/N视图达到良好精度；肾囊肿检测任务达到54.56%肾脏覆盖和35.13%囊肿覆盖。
limitations: 仅在模拟器上验证，真实超声环境效果未知
目标函数中权重可能需手动调整
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SonoSelect通过主动探头探索策略，仅用少量超声视图即可实现高效器官感知。

papers.title: Saliency-Guided Representation with Consistency Policy Learning for Visual Unsupervised Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Zero-shot unsupervised reinforcement learning (URL) offers a promising direction for building generalist agents capable of generalizing to unseen tasks without additional supervision. Among existing approaches, successor representations (SR) have emerged as a prominent paradigm due to their effectiveness in structured, low-dimensional settings. However, SR methods struggle to scale to high-dimensional visual environments. Through empirical analysis, we identify two key limitations of SR in visual URL: (1) SR objectives often lead to suboptimal representations that attend to dynamics-irrelevant regions, resulting in inaccurate successor measures and degraded task generalization; and (2) these flawed representations hinder SR policies from modeling multi-modal skill-conditioned action distributions and ensuring skill controllability. To address these limitations, we propose Saliency-Guided Representation with Consistency Policy Learning (SRCP), a novel framework that improves zero-shot generalization of SR methods in visual URL. SRCP decouples representation learning from successor training by introducing a saliency-guided dynamics task to capture dynamics-relevant representations, thereby improving successor measure and task generalization. Moreover, it integrates a fast-sampling consistency policy with URL-specific classifier-free guidance and tailored training objectives to improve skill-conditioned policy modeling and controllability. Extensive experiments on 16 tasks across 4 datasets from the ExORL benchmark demonstrate that SRCP achieves state-of-the-art zero-shot generalization in visual URL and is compatible with various SR methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出SRCP框架，通过显著性引导表征和一致性策略学习提升视觉无监督强化学习的零样本泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 零样本无监督强化学习旨在构建无需额外监督即可泛化到未见任务的通用智能体，但现有后继表征方法在高维视觉环境中表现不佳，限制了其实际应用。
analysis.problem: 后继表征方法在视觉无监督强化学习中存在两个关键局限：表征关注与动力学无关区域导致后继度量不准确和任务泛化下降，以及策略难以建模多模态技能条件动作分布并确保技能可控性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过实证分析指出，后继表征目标常导致次优表征，关注与动力学无关的区域，从而影响后继度量和任务泛化；同时这些有缺陷的表征阻碍了策略建模多模态技能条件动作分布和技能可控性。
analysis.method: 提出SRCP框架，解耦表征学习与后继训练，引入显著性引导动力学任务以捕获与动力学相关的表征，并集成快速采样一致性策略与URL特定的无分类器引导和定制训练目标。
contributions: 提出显著性引导表征学习，通过动力学任务改善后继度量与任务泛化。
设计快速采样一致性策略，结合无分类器引导提升技能条件策略建模与可控性。
在ExORL基准的16个任务上取得最先进零样本泛化性能，并兼容多种后继表征方法。
analysis.experiments: 在ExORL基准的4个数据集共16个任务上进行实验，结果表明SRCP在视觉无监督强化学习中实现了最先进的零样本泛化，并兼容多种后继表征方法。
limitations: 摘要未提及对计算资源或训练效率的讨论。
方法可能依赖显著性引导的质量，在复杂场景下可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SRCP框架，通过显著性引导表征和一致性策略学习提升视觉无监督强化学习的零样本泛化能力。

papers.title: "I See What You Did There": Can Large Vision-Language Models Understand Multimodal Puns?
papers.abstract: Puns are a common form of rhetorical wordplay that exploits polysemy and phonetic similarity to create humor. In multimodal puns, visual and textual elements synergize to ground the literal sense and evoke the figurative meaning simultaneously. Although Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are widely used in multimodal understanding and generation, their ability to understand puns has not been systematically studied due to a scarcity of rigorous benchmarks. To address this, we first propose a multimodal pun generation pipeline. We then introduce MultiPun, a dataset comprising diverse types of puns alongside adversarial non-pun distractors. Our evaluation reveals that most models struggle to distinguish genuine puns from these distractors. Moreover, we propose both prompt-level and model-level strategies to enhance pun comprehension, with an average improvement of 16.5% in F1 scores. Our findings provide valuable insights for developing future VLMs that master the subtleties of human-like humor via cross-modal reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 提出多模态双关语数据集MultiPun，评估发现VLM难以区分双关与非双关，并提出提示级和模型级策略提升理解。
analysis.research_motivation: 双关语是常见的修辞手法，多模态双关语结合视觉和文本元素创造幽默，但现有VLM对双关语的理解能力缺乏系统研究，且缺乏严格基准。
analysis.problem: 系统评估和提升大型视觉语言模型对多模态双关语的理解能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 大多数VLM难以区分真正的双关语与对抗性非双关干扰项。
analysis.method: 提出多模态双关语生成流程，构建MultiPun数据集（包含多种双关类型和对抗性非双关干扰项），并设计提示级和模型级策略增强双关理解。
contributions: 提出多模态双关语生成流程并构建MultiPun数据集。
系统评估VLM在双关语理解上的表现，发现大多数模型难以区分双关与非双关。
提出提示级和模型级策略，平均F1提升16.5%。
analysis.experiments: 在MultiPun数据集上评估多个VLM，并验证所提策略的有效性，F1平均提升16.5%。
limitations: 数据集规模可能有限，未提及具体数量。
策略的泛化性未在更多模型上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多模态双关语数据集MultiPun，评估发现VLM难以区分双关与非双关，并提出提示级和模型级策略提升理解。

papers.title: ReLU Networks for Exact Generation of Similar Graphs
papers.abstract: Generation of graphs constrained by a specified graph edit distance from a source graph is important in applications such as cheminformatics, network anomaly synthesis, and structured data augmentation. Despite the growing demand for such constrained generative models in areas including molecule design and network perturbation analysis, the neural architectures required to provably generate graphs within a bounded graph edit distance remain largely unexplored. In addition, existing graph generative models are predominantly data-driven and depend heavily on the availability and quality of training data, which may result in generated graphs that do not satisfy the desired edit distance constraints. In this paper, we address these challenges by theoretically characterizing ReLU neural networks capable of generating graphs within a prescribed graph edit distance from a given graph. In particular, we show the existence of constant depth and O(n^2 d) size ReLU networks that deterministically generate graphs within edit distance d from a given input graph with n vertices, eliminating reliance on training data while guaranteeing validity of the generated graphs. Experimental evaluations demonstrate that the proposed network successfully generates valid graphs for instances with up to 1400 vertices and edit distance bounds up to 140, whereas baseline generative models fail to generate graphs with the desired edit distance. These results provide a theoretical foundation for constructing compact generative models with guaranteed validity.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种ReLU网络架构，能在保证图编辑距离约束下确定性地生成相似图，无需训练数据。
analysis.research_motivation: 在化学信息学、网络异常合成等应用中，需要生成与源图具有指定编辑距离的图，但现有生成模型依赖数据驱动，无法保证编辑距离约束。
analysis.problem: 如何设计神经网络架构，使其能确定性地生成与给定图在指定编辑距离内的图，且不依赖训练数据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 理论构造恒定深度、O(n^2 d)大小的ReLU网络，通过确定性计算生成满足编辑距离约束的图。
contributions: 理论上证明了存在恒定深度、多项式大小的ReLU网络可精确生成指定编辑距离内的图。
实验验证了网络在多达1400个顶点和编辑距离140的实例上有效，而基线模型失败。
analysis.experiments: 在多达1400个顶点和编辑距离140的实例上测试，成功生成有效图，基线模型无法满足编辑距离约束。
limitations: 仅针对图编辑距离约束，未考虑其他图属性。
网络规模随顶点数平方增长，可能限制可扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种ReLU网络架构，能在保证图编辑距离约束下确定性地生成相似图，无需训练数据。

papers.title: Appearance Decomposition Gaussian Splatting for Multi-Traversal Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Multi-traversal scene reconstruction is important for high-fidelity autonomous driving simulation and digital twin construction. This task involves integrating multiple sequences captured from the same geographical area at different times. In this context, a primary challenge is the significant appearance inconsistency across traversals caused by varying illumination and environmental conditions, despite the shared underlying geometry. This paper presents ADM-GS (Appearance Decomposition Gaussian Splatting for Multi-Traversal Reconstruction), a framework that applies an explicit appearance decomposition to the static background to alleviate appearance entanglement across traversals. For the static background, we decompose the appearance into traversal-invariant material, representing intrinsic material properties, and traversal-dependent illumination, capturing lighting variations. Specifically, we propose a neural light field that utilizes a frequency-separated hybrid encoding strategy. By incorporating surface normals and explicit reflection vectors, this design separately captures low-frequency diffuse illumination and high-frequency specular reflections. Quantitative evaluations on the Argoverse 2 and Waymo Open datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of ADM-GS. In multi-traversal experiments, our method achieves a +0.98 dB PSNR improvement over existing latent-based baselines while producing more consistent appearance across traversals. Code will be available at https://github.com/IRMVLab/ADM-GS.

analysis.tldr: 提出ADM-GS框架，通过显式外观分解解决多遍历场景重建中的外观不一致问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 多遍历场景重建对高保真自动驾驶仿真和数字孪生构建至关重要，但不同时间捕获的序列因光照和环境变化导致外观不一致，现有方法难以处理。
analysis.problem: 多遍历场景重建中，静态背景的外观不一致问题，即不同遍历间光照和环境的差异导致外观纠缠。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出多遍历场景中，尽管几何结构共享，但光照和环境条件变化导致显著的外观不一致，这是主要挑战。
analysis.method: 提出ADM-GS框架，对静态背景进行显式外观分解：分解为遍历不变的材料属性（内在材质）和遍历依赖的照明（光照变化）。具体采用频率分离的混合编码策略的神经光场，结合表面法线和显式反射向量，分别捕获低频漫反射和高频镜面反射。
contributions: 提出ADM-GS框架，通过显式外观分解解决多遍历场景重建中的外观不一致问题。
设计频率分离的混合编码神经光场，有效分离低频漫反射和高频镜面反射。
在Argoverse 2和Waymo Open数据集上验证有效性，PSNR提升0.98 dB。
analysis.experiments: 在Argoverse 2和Waymo Open数据集上进行多遍历实验，与潜在基线方法相比，PSNR提升0.98 dB，且外观更一致。
limitations: 可能仅适用于静态背景，动态物体处理未提及。
神经光场可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ADM-GS框架，通过显式外观分解解决多遍历场景重建中的外观不一致问题。

papers.title: Selective Aggregation of Attention Maps Improves Diffusion-Based Visual Interpretation
papers.abstract: Numerous studies on text-to-image (T2I) generative models have utilized cross-attention maps to boost application performance and interpret model behavior. However, the distinct characteristics of attention maps from different attention heads remain relatively underexplored. In this study, we show that selectively aggregating cross-attention maps from heads most relevant to a target concept can improve visual interpretability. Compared to the diffusion-based segmentation method DAAM, our approach achieves higher mean IoU scores. We also find that the most relevant heads capture concept-specific features more accurately than the least relevant ones, and that selective aggregation helps diagnose prompt misinterpretations. These findings suggest that attention head selection offers a promising direction for improving the interpretability and controllability of T2I generation.

analysis.tldr: 通过选择性地聚合与目标概念最相关的注意力头，提升扩散模型的可视化可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究利用交叉注意力图提升文本到图像生成模型的应用性能和可解释性，但不同注意力头的特性尚未被充分探索，导致可解释性受限。
analysis.problem: 如何有效利用多头注意力中与目标概念最相关的头来提升扩散模型的可视化可解释性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要发现，最相关的注意力头能更准确地捕捉概念特定特征，而选择性聚合有助于诊断提示误解。
analysis.method: 提出一种选择性聚合方法，仅聚合与目标概念最相关的注意力头的交叉注意力图，以提升可视化可解释性。
contributions: 揭示了不同注意力头在概念相关性上的差异，并证明选择性聚合可提升可解释性。
在扩散分割任务上，相比DAAM方法取得了更高的平均IoU分数。
analysis.experiments: 在扩散分割任务上与DAAM方法对比，选择性聚合方法获得更高的平均IoU分数。
limitations: 可能依赖目标概念的定义和头选择策略。
未在多种T2I模型或复杂场景下验证泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过选择性地聚合与目标概念最相关的注意力头，提升扩散模型的可视化可解释性。

papers.title: LLM Biases
papers.abstract: Transformer-based agentic AI is rapidly being deployed on major platforms to help users shop, watch, and navigate content with less effort. While these systems can deliver impressive performance, a key concern is whether they may be less reliable than they appear. We ask a simple but fundamental question: whether the mechanisms that make transformer-based agents effective can also induce systematic biases or distortions? We study this question through a theoretical analysis of transformer-based generative recommenders, in which the next user interaction is generated sequentially from the user history. Focusing on how the model allocates attention across historical evidence, we identify four bias channels: (i) Positional bias: stronger positional encoding shifts influence toward recent history, improving responsiveness but potentially reducing stability and long-term diversity; (ii) Popularity amplification: small frequency differences in data can be magnified into disproportionate exposure, contributing to Matthew effects and echo chambers; (iii) Latent driver bias: when important drivers of user choices are not directly observed, the model can place overly concentrated weight on a small subset of past events, creating overconfident attributions. (iv) Synthetic data bias: when users increasingly follow AI suggestions and platforms retrain on model-shaped synthetic logs, outputs can concentrate over time, and long-tail alternatives can disappear first. Our analysis highlights mechanism-level reliability risks that may not be visible in offline performance metrics. The four bias channels indicate that large-scale deployment may systematically distort exposure and choice. For managers, the immediate implication is to treat these as operational risk factors and to monitor concentration and drift over time, rather than assuming that performance gains alone guarantee reliability.

analysis.tldr: 理论分析揭示Transformer推荐系统存在四种系统性偏差通道，可能导致大规模部署中的曝光与选择扭曲。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于Transformer的智能体AI正被快速部署到主流平台辅助用户购物、浏览等，但其可靠性可能低于表面表现，需要从机制层面理解偏差来源。
analysis.problem: 研究Transformer生成式推荐系统中，模型机制是否会导致系统性偏差或扭曲。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 识别出四种偏差通道：位置偏差（近期历史影响过大）、流行度放大（微小频率差异被放大）、潜在驱动偏差（未观测因素导致过度集中归因）、合成数据偏差（AI建议与重训练导致输出集中化）。
analysis.method: 对基于Transformer的生成式推荐系统进行理论分析，聚焦注意力分配机制，推导四种偏差通道。
contributions: 首次从理论角度系统识别Transformer推荐系统中的四种偏差通道
揭示离线性能指标无法反映的机制级可靠性风险
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论分析缺乏实证验证
未讨论缓解偏差的具体方法
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 理论分析揭示Transformer推荐系统存在四种系统性偏差通道，可能导致大规模部署中的曝光与选择扭曲。

papers.title: AICA-Bench: Holistically Examining the Capabilities of VLMs in Affective Image Content Analysis
papers.abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities in perception, yet holistic Affective Image Content Analysis (AICA), which integrates perception, reasoning, and generation into a unified framework, remains underexplored. To address this gap, we introduce AICA-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark with three core tasks: Emotion Understanding (EU), Emotion Reasoning (ER), and Emotion-Guided Content Generation (EGCG). We evaluate 23 VLMs and identify two major limitations: weak intensity calibration and shallow open-ended descriptions. To address these issues, we propose Grounded Affective Tree (GAT) Prompting, a training-free framework that combines visual scaffolding with hierarchical reasoning. Experiments show that GAT reduces intensity errors and improves descriptive depth, providing a strong baseline for future research on affective multimodal understanding and generation.

analysis.tldr: 提出AICA-Bench基准评估VLM情感图像分析能力，并设计GAT提示方法提升情感强度校准与描述深度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLM在感知任务上表现优异，但整合感知、推理与生成的情感图像内容分析（AICA）尚未被系统研究，缺乏统一基准。
analysis.problem: VLM在情感图像内容分析中存在强度校准弱和开放式描述浅的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 评估23个VLM发现两个主要局限：情感强度校准不准确，以及生成的开放式描述缺乏深度。
analysis.method: 提出Grounded Affective Tree (GAT) Prompting，一种无需训练的框架，结合视觉支架与层次化推理。
contributions: 构建AICA-Bench基准，包含情感理解、情感推理和情感引导内容生成三个核心任务。
提出GAT提示方法，有效减少强度误差并提升描述深度。
analysis.experiments: 在AICA-Bench上评估23个VLM，并验证GAT方法的有效性，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: GAT方法可能依赖特定视觉支架设计，泛化性需进一步验证。
基准任务可能未覆盖所有情感分析场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AICA-Bench基准评估VLM情感图像分析能力，并设计GAT提示方法提升情感强度校准与描述深度。

papers.title: Physics-Aware Video Instance Removal Benchmark
papers.abstract: Video Instance Removal (VIR) requires removing target objects while maintaining background integrity and physical consistency, such as specular reflections and illumination interactions. Despite advancements in text-guided editing, current benchmarks primarily assess visual plausibility, often overlooking the physical causalities, such as lingering shadows, triggered by object removal. We introduce the Physics-Aware Video Instance Removal (PVIR) benchmark, featuring 95 high-quality videos annotated with instance-accurate masks and removal prompts. PVIR is partitioned into Simple and Hard subsets, the latter explicitly targeting complex physical interactions. We evaluate four representative methods, PISCO-Removal, UniVideo, DiffuEraser, and CoCoCo, using a decoupled human evaluation protocol across three dimensions to isolate semantic, visual, and spatial failures: instruction following, rendering quality, and edit exclusivity. Our results show that PISCO-Removal and UniVideo achieve state-of-the-art performance, while DiffuEraser frequently introduces blurring artifacts and CoCoCo struggles significantly with instruction following. The persistent performance drop on the Hard subset highlights the ongoing challenge of recovering complex physical side effects.

analysis.tldr: 提出物理感知视频实例移除基准PVIR，评估现有方法在保持物理一致性方面的不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频实例移除基准主要评估视觉合理性，忽略了物体移除后物理因果效应（如阴影、光照变化）的保持，导致模型在复杂物理交互场景中表现不佳。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个能够评估视频实例移除方法在物理一致性（如镜面反射、光照交互）方面性能的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，在包含复杂物理交互的Hard子集上，所有方法性能均显著下降，表明恢复物理副作用仍是当前方法的瓶颈。
analysis.method: 构建包含95个高质量视频的PVIR基准，分为Simple和Hard子集，并采用解耦的人类评估协议，从指令遵循、渲染质量和编辑排他性三个维度评估方法。
contributions: 提出了首个关注物理一致性的视频实例移除基准PVIR。
通过解耦评估协议揭示了现有方法在物理交互场景中的失败模式。
analysis.experiments: 评估了PISCO-Removal、UniVideo、DiffuEraser和CoCoCo四种方法，结果显示PISCO-Removal和UniVideo达到SOTA，DiffuEraser常引入模糊伪影，CoCoCo在指令遵循上表现差。
limitations: 基准规模有限（95个视频），可能不足以覆盖所有物理交互场景。
评估依赖人类判断，可能引入主观偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出物理感知视频实例移除基准PVIR，评估现有方法在保持物理一致性方面的不足。

papers.title: HybridKV: Hybrid KV Cache Compression for Efficient Multimodal Large Language Model Inference
papers.abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have advanced unified reasoning over text, images, and videos, but their inference is hindered by the rapid growth of key-value (KV) caches. Each visual input expands into thousands of tokens, causing caches to scale linearly with context length and remain resident in GPU memory throughout decoding, which leads to prohibitive memory overhead and latency even on high-end GPUs. A common solution is to compress caches under a fixed allocated budget at different granularities: token-level uniformly discards less important tokens, layer-level varies retention across layers, and head-level redistributes budgets across heads. Yet these approaches stop at allocation and overlook the heterogeneous behaviors of attention heads that require distinct compression strategies. We propose HybridKV, a hybrid KV cache compression framework that integrates complementary strategies in three stages: heads are first classified into static or dynamic types using text-centric attention; then a top-down budget allocation scheme hierarchically assigns KV budgets; finally, static heads are compressed by text-prior pruning and dynamic heads by chunk-wise retrieval. Experiments on 11 multimodal benchmarks with Qwen2.5-VL-7B show that HybridKV reduces KV cache memory by up to $7.9\times$ and achieves $1.52\times$ faster decoding, with almost no performance drop or even higher relative to the full-cache MLLM.

analysis.tldr: 提出混合KV缓存压缩框架HybridKV，通过头部分类、分层预算分配和差异化压缩策略，在MLLM推理中实现7.9倍缓存压缩和1.52倍加速，性能几乎无损。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大模型推理时KV缓存随视觉token数量线性增长，导致高内存开销和延迟，现有压缩方法忽略注意力头的异质性，无法充分利用不同头的特性。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种考虑注意力头异质性的KV缓存压缩方法，在固定预算下最大化压缩比同时保持模型性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到不同注意力头需要不同的压缩策略：静态头适合基于文本重要性的剪枝，动态头适合基于块检索的压缩。
analysis.method: 三阶段混合压缩框架：1) 基于文本中心注意力将头分类为静态或动态；2) 自上而下的分层预算分配；3) 静态头使用文本优先剪枝，动态头使用块检索压缩。
contributions: 提出HybridKV，首个结合头部分类、分层预算和差异化压缩的混合KV缓存压缩框架
在11个多模态基准上验证，实现7.9倍压缩和1.52倍加速，性能与全缓存基线相当或更优
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen2.5-VL-7B模型上，使用11个多模态基准评估，包括文本、图像和视频任务，与全缓存基线对比。
limitations: 仅基于Qwen2.5-VL-7B验证，未在其他架构或更大模型上测试
头部分类依赖文本中心注意力，可能不适用于纯视觉任务
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出混合KV缓存压缩框架HybridKV，通过头部分类、分层预算分配和差异化压缩策略，在MLLM推理中实现7.9倍缓存压缩和1.52倍加速，性能几乎无损。

papers.title: Automatic dental superimposition of 3D intraorals and 2D photographs for human identification
papers.abstract: Dental comparison is considered a primary identification method, at the level of fingerprints and DNA profiling. One crucial but time-consuming step of this method is the morphological comparison. One of the main challenges to apply this method is the lack of ante-mortem medical records, specially on scenarios such as migrant death at the border and/or in countries where there is no universal healthcare. The availability of photos on social media where teeth are visible has led many odontologists to consider morphological comparison using them. However, state-of-the-art proposals have significant limitations, including the lack of proper modeling of perspective distortion and the absence of objective approaches that quantify morphological differences. Our proposal involves a 3D (post-mortem scan) - 2D (ante-mortem photos) approach. Using computer vision and optimization techniques, we replicate the ante-mortem image with the 3D model to perform the morphological comparison. Two automatic approaches have been developed: i) using paired landmarks and ii) using a segmentation of the teeth region to estimate camera parameters. Both are capable of obtaining very promising results over 20,164 cross comparisons from 142 samples, obtaining mean ranking values of 1.6 and 1.5, respectively. These results clearly outperform filtering capabilities of automatic dental chart comparison approaches, while providing an automatic, objective and quantitative score of the morphological correspondence, easily to interpret and analyze by visualizing superimposed images.

analysis.tldr: 提出两种自动方法，通过3D口内扫描与2D照片叠加实现牙齿形态比对，用于人类身份识别。
analysis.research_motivation: 牙齿比对是主要身份识别方法之一，但形态比对耗时且缺乏生前记录，社交媒体照片虽有潜力但现有方法缺乏透视失真建模和客观量化指标。
analysis.problem: 如何自动、客观地将3D死后口内扫描与2D生前照片进行叠加，以量化形态相似度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两种自动方法：1) 基于配对地标点估计相机参数；2) 基于牙齿区域分割估计相机参数，均通过计算机视觉和优化技术实现3D-2D叠加。
contributions: 提出两种自动3D-2D牙齿叠加方法，解决透视失真和客观量化问题。
在142个样本的20,164次交叉比对中取得平均排名1.6和1.5，优于自动牙科图表比对方法。
analysis.experiments: 在142个样本上进行20,164次交叉比对，两种方法分别获得平均排名1.6和1.5。
limitations: 依赖3D口内扫描和2D照片的可用性。
可能受牙齿遮挡或图像质量影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出两种自动方法，通过3D口内扫描与2D照片叠加实现牙齿形态比对，用于人类身份识别。

papers.title: Joint Knowledge Base Completion and Question Answering by Combining Large Language Models and Small Language Models
papers.abstract: Knowledge Bases (KBs) play a key role in various applications. As two representative KB-related tasks, knowledge base completion (KBC) and knowledge base question answering (KBQA) are closely related and inherently complementary with each other. Thus, it will be beneficial to solve the task of joint KBC and KBQA to make them reinforce each other. However, existing studies usually rely on the small language model (SLM) to enhance them jointly, and the large language model (LLM)'s strong reasoning ability is ignored. In this paper, by combining the strengths of the LLM with the SLM, we propose a novel framework JCQL, which can make these two tasks enhance each other in an iterative manner. To make KBC enhance KBQA, we augment the LLM agent-based KBQA model's reasoning paths by incorporating an SLM-trained KBC model as an action of the agent, alleviating the LLM's hallucination and high computational costs issue in KBQA. To make KBQA enhance KBC, we incrementally fine-tune the KBC model by leveraging KBQA's reasoning paths as its supplementary training data, improving the ability of the SLM in KBC. Extensive experiments over two public benchmark data sets demonstrate that JCQL surpasses all baselines for both KBC and KBQA tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出JCQL框架，结合大语言模型和小语言模型，通过迭代增强实现知识库补全与知识库问答的联合提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 知识库补全（KBC）和知识库问答（KBQA）密切相关且互补，但现有研究通常仅依赖小语言模型（SLM）联合增强，忽略了大语言模型（LLM）的强推理能力。
analysis.problem: 如何利用LLM的推理能力与SLM的效率，使KBC和KBQA两个任务相互增强。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM在KBQA中存在幻觉和高计算成本问题；SLM在KBC中能力有限。
analysis.method: 提出JCQL框架，包含两个迭代增强模块：1) KBC增强KBQA：将SLM训练的KBC模型作为LLM agent的一个动作，增强推理路径，缓解幻觉和计算成本；2) KBQA增强KBC：利用KBQA的推理路径作为补充训练数据增量微调KBC模型。
contributions: 首次结合LLM和SLM实现KBC与KBQA的联合增强。
提出迭代框架，使两个任务相互促进，缓解LLM幻觉和计算成本问题。
analysis.experiments: 在两个公开基准数据集上，JCQL在KBC和KBQA任务上均超越所有基线。
limitations: 可能依赖特定LLM和SLM组合，泛化性需进一步验证。
迭代过程可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出JCQL框架，结合大语言模型和小语言模型，通过迭代增强实现知识库补全与知识库问答的联合提升。

papers.title: Swiss-Bench 003: Evaluating LLM Reliability and Adversarial Security for Swiss Regulatory Contexts
papers.abstract: The deployment of large language models (LLMs) in Swiss financial and regulatory contexts demands empirical evidence of both production reliability and adversarial security, dimensions not jointly operationalized in existing Swiss-focused evaluation frameworks. This paper introduces Swiss-Bench 003 (SBP-003), extending the HAAS (Helvetic AI Assessment Score) from six to eight dimensions by adding D7 (Self-Graded Reliability Proxy) and D8 (Adversarial Security). I evaluate ten frontier models across 808 Swiss-specific items in four languages (German, French, Italian, English), comprising seven Swiss-adapted benchmarks (Swiss TruthfulQA, Swiss IFEval, Swiss SimpleQA, Swiss NIAH, Swiss PII-Scope, System Prompt Leakage, and Swiss German Comprehension) targeting FINMA Guidance 08/2024, the revised Federal Act on Data Protection (nDSG), and OWASP Top 10 for LLMs. Self-graded D7 scores (73-94%) exceed externally judged D8 security scores (20-61%) by a wide margin, though these dimensions use non-comparable scoring regimes. System prompt leakage resistance ranges from 24.8% to 88.2%, while PII extraction defense remains weak (14-42%) across all models. Qwen 3.5 Plus achieves the highest self-graded D7 score (94.4%), while GPT-oss 120B achieves the highest D8 score (60.7%) despite being the lowest-cost model evaluated. All evaluations are zero-shot under provider default settings; D7 is self-graded and does not constitute independently validated accuracy. I provide conceptual mapping tables relating benchmark dimensions to FINMA model validation requirements, nDSG data protection obligations, and OWASP LLM risk categories.

analysis.tldr: 针对瑞士监管场景，提出 Swiss-Bench 003 评估框架，发现模型自评可靠性远高于对抗安全性，且 PII 提取防御薄弱。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有瑞士评估框架未同时考虑生产可靠性和对抗安全性，而瑞士金融与监管场景对 LLM 部署有严格要求。
analysis.problem: 缺乏联合评估 LLM 在瑞士监管环境下的生产可靠性和对抗安全性的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 自评可靠性得分（73-94%）远高于外部评判的对抗安全性得分（20-61%）；系统提示泄露抵抗率差异大（24.8%-88.2%）；PII 提取防御普遍薄弱（14-42%）。
analysis.method: 扩展 HAAS 评估维度至八维，新增 D7（自评可靠性代理）和 D8（对抗安全性），构建 808 项瑞士特定测试项，涵盖四种语言和七个基准。
contributions: 提出 Swiss-Bench 003，首个联合评估瑞士监管场景下 LLM 可靠性与安全性的基准。
揭示模型自评可靠性远高于实际对抗安全性，且 PII 防御普遍薄弱。
analysis.experiments: 在十个前沿模型上进行了零样本评估，使用 808 项瑞士特定测试项，涵盖四种语言和七个基准。摘要未提供具体实验结果细节。
limitations: D7 为自评分，非独立验证的准确率。
评估为零样本且使用提供商默认设置，可能不反映实际部署配置。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 针对瑞士监管场景，提出 Swiss-Bench 003 评估框架，发现模型自评可靠性远高于对抗安全性，且 PII 提取防御薄弱。

papers.title: JTON: A Token-Efficient JSON Superset with Zen Grid Tabular Encoding for Large Language Models
papers.abstract: When LLMs process structured data, the serialization format directly affects cost and context utilization. Standard JSON wastes tokens repeating key names in every row of a tabular array--overhead that scales linearly with row count. This paper presents JTON (JSON Tabular Object Notation), a strict JSON superset whose main idea, Zen Grid, factors column headers into a single row and encodes values with semicolons, preserving JSON's type system while cutting redundancy. Across seven real-world domains, Zen Grid reduces token counts by 15-60% versus JSON compact (28.5% average; 32% with bare_strings). Comprehension tests on 10 LLMs show a net +0.3 pp accuracy gain over JSON: four models improve, three hold steady, and three dip slightly. Generation tests on 12 LLMs yield 100% syntactic validity in both few-shot and zero-shot settings. A Rust/PyO3 reference implementation adds SIMD-accelerated parsing at 1.4x the speed of Python's json module. Code, a 683-vector test suite, and all experimental data are publicly available.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种JSON超集JTON，通过Zen Grid表格编码减少LLM处理结构化数据时的token开销，平均节省28.5% token，且保持高解析兼容性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM处理结构化数据时，标准JSON在表格数组中重复键名导致token浪费，成本随行数线性增长，亟需更高效的序列化格式。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种JSON兼容的序列化格式，在减少token冗余的同时保持类型系统和解析兼容性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准JSON在表格数组中每行重复键名，造成大量token浪费；LLM对格式变化敏感，需保证理解和生成能力不下降。
analysis.method: 提出JTON（JSON超集），核心是Zen Grid编码：将列头提取为单行，用分号分隔值，保留JSON类型系统，减少冗余。
contributions: 提出JTON格式及Zen Grid编码，在7个领域平均减少28.5% token（最高60%）。
在10个LLM上验证理解准确率平均提升0.3个百分点，12个LLM上生成语法100%有效。
提供Rust/PyO3参考实现，SIMD加速解析速度达Python json模块的1.4倍，并开源代码、测试套件和数据。
analysis.experiments: 在7个真实领域数据集上测量token压缩率；在10个LLM上进行理解测试（准确率变化）；在12个LLM上进行生成测试（语法有效性）。
limitations: 部分LLM（3个）理解准确率略有下降，可能需进一步适配。
仅针对表格数组优化，对其他嵌套结构可能效果有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种JSON超集JTON，通过Zen Grid表格编码减少LLM处理结构化数据时的token开销，平均节省28.5% token，且保持高解析兼容性。

papers.title: SAND: The Challenge on Speech Analysis for Neurodegenerative Disease Assessment
papers.abstract: Recent advances in Artificial Intelligence (AI) and the exploration of noninvasive, objective biomarkers, such as speech signals, have encouraged the development of algorithms to support the early diagnosis of neurodegenerative diseases, including Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis (ALS). Voice changes in subjects suffering from ALS typically manifest as progressive dysarthria, which is a prominent neurodegenerative symptom because it affects patients as the disease progresses. Since voice signals are complex data, the development and use of advanced AI techniques are fundamental to extracting distinctive patterns from them. Validating AI algorithms for ALS diagnosis and monitoring using voice signals is challenging, particularly due to the lack of annotated reference datasets. In this work, we present the outcome of a collaboration between a multidisciplinary team of clinicians and Machine Learning experts to create both a clinically annotated validation dataset and the "Speech Analysis for Neurodegenerative Diseases" (SAND) challenge based on it. Specifically, by analyzing voice disorders, the SAND challenge provides an opportunity to develop, test, and evaluate AI models for the automatic early identification and prediction of ALS disease progression.

analysis.tldr: SAND挑战赛旨在通过语音分析推动神经退行性疾病（如ALS）的早期诊断，并发布了临床标注数据集。
analysis.research_motivation: 神经退行性疾病（如ALS）的早期诊断缺乏非侵入性客观生物标志物，语音信号作为潜在标志物具有前景，但缺乏标注参考数据集阻碍了AI算法的验证。
analysis.problem: 缺乏用于验证ALS诊断和监测AI算法的临床标注语音数据集，以及统一的评估基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过临床专家与机器学习团队合作，创建临床标注的验证数据集，并组织SAND挑战赛，提供平台开发、测试和评估用于ALS早期识别和进展预测的AI模型。
contributions: 创建了临床标注的语音数据集用于ALS诊断和监测。
组织了SAND挑战赛，为语音分析在神经退行性疾病评估中的应用提供标准化基准。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集规模可能有限，影响模型泛化性。
仅关注ALS，其他神经退行性疾病的适用性未提及。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SAND挑战赛旨在通过语音分析推动神经退行性疾病（如ALS）的早期诊断，并发布了临床标注数据集。

papers.title: Handbook of Rough Set Extensions and Uncertainty Models
papers.abstract: Rough set theory models uncertainty by approximating target concepts through lower and upper sets induced by indiscernibility, or more generally, by granulation relations in data tables. This perspective captures vagueness caused by limited observational resolution and supports set-theoretic reasoning about what can be determined with certainty and what remains only possible. This book is written as a map of models. Rather than developing a single algorithmic pipeline in depth, it provides a systematic survey of the main rough set paradigms and their extension routes. More specifically, representative variants are organized according to (i) the underlying granulation mechanism, such as equivalence-based, tolerance-based, covering-based, neighborhood-based, and probabilistic approximations, and (ii) the uncertainty semantics attached to data and relations, such as crisp, fuzzy, intuitionistic fuzzy, neutrosophic, and plithogenic settings. The book also explains how each choice changes the form of approximations and the interpretation of boundary regions. Throughout the book, small illustrative examples are used to clarify modeling intent and typical use cases in classification and decision support. Finally, an important clarification of scope should be noted. Since the main purpose of this book is to provide a map of models, the Abstract and Introduction should not lead readers to expect that feature reduction and rule induction are primary objectives. Although these topics are central in the rough set literature, they are treated here mainly as motivating applications and as entry points to the broader research landscape. The principal aim of the book is to survey and position rough set models and their extensions in a systematic and coherent manner.

analysis.tldr: 本书系统综述了粗糙集扩展模型与不确定性建模方法，按粒化机制和不确定性语义组织代表性变体。
analysis.research_motivation: 粗糙集理论通过不可区分关系近似目标概念，但现有文献中模型变体繁多、缺乏系统梳理，研究者难以快速定位适合特定场景的模型。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地组织、分类和对比粗糙集的主要扩展模型及其不确定性语义，以提供清晰的模型地图。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象或失败模式。
analysis.method: 按粒化机制（等价、容差、覆盖、邻域、概率近似）和不确定性语义（清晰、模糊、直觉模糊、中智、plithogenic）两个维度对粗糙集扩展模型进行系统分类与综述，辅以小型示例说明建模意图和典型用例。
contributions: 提出了基于粒化机制和不确定性语义的二维分类体系，系统梳理了粗糙集扩展模型。
明确了各模型变体在近似形式与边界区域解释上的差异，为分类与决策支持提供建模指导。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 未深入讨论特征约简和规则归纳等核心应用，仅作为动机和入口。
缺乏大规模实证比较或算法性能评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本书系统综述了粗糙集扩展模型与不确定性建模方法，按粒化机制和不确定性语义组织代表性变体。

papers.title: When Do We Need LLMs? A Diagnostic for Language-Driven Bandits
papers.abstract: We study Contextual Multi-Armed Bandits (CMABs) for non-episodic sequential decision making problems where the context includes both textual and numerical information (e.g., recommendation systems, dynamic portfolio adjustments, offer selection; all frequent problems in finance). While Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly applied to these settings, utilizing LLMs for reasoning at every decision step is computationally expensive and uncertainty estimates are difficult to obtain. To address this, we introduce LLMP-UCB, a bandit algorithm that derives uncertainty estimates from LLMs via repeated inference. However, our experiments demonstrate that lightweight numerical bandits operating on text embeddings (dense or Matryoshka) match or exceed the accuracy of LLM-based solutions at a fraction of their cost. We further show that embedding dimensionality is a practical lever on the exploration-exploitation balance, enabling cost--performance tradeoffs without prompt complexity. Finally, to guide practitioners, we propose a geometric diagnostic based on the arms' embedding to decide when to use LLM-driven reasoning versus a lightweight numerical bandit. Our results provide a principled deployment framework for cost-effective, uncertainty-aware decision systems with broad applicability across AI use cases in financial services.

analysis.tldr: LLM在上下文多臂老虎机中并非必需，轻量数值方法在嵌入上即可匹配其性能，并提出了何时使用LLM的诊断方法。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在非回合制序列决策中计算成本高且不确定性估计困难，而现有方法缺乏何时使用LLM的指导。
analysis.problem: 在包含文本和数值信息的上下文多臂老虎机问题中，如何高效决策并判断何时需要LLM。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验表明，基于文本嵌入的轻量数值老虎机在准确率上匹配甚至超越LLM方案，且成本极低；嵌入维度可调节探索-利用平衡。
analysis.method: 提出LLMP-UCB算法，通过重复推理从LLM获取不确定性估计，并设计基于臂嵌入的几何诊断来决定使用LLM还是轻量数值老虎机。
contributions: 提出LLMP-UCB算法，利用LLM重复推理获得不确定性估计。
发现轻量数值老虎机在文本嵌入上可匹配LLM性能，且嵌入维度可调节成本-性能权衡。
提出几何诊断方法，指导何时使用LLM推理。
analysis.experiments: 在多个非回合制序列决策任务上验证，显示轻量数值方法匹配或超越LLM方案，且成本更低。
limitations: 诊断方法可能依赖特定嵌入空间，泛化性需进一步验证。
未考虑LLM推理的其他潜在优势（如可解释性）。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM在上下文多臂老虎机中并非必需，轻量数值方法在嵌入上即可匹配其性能，并提出了何时使用LLM的诊断方法。

papers.title: Neural Network Pruning via QUBO Optimization
papers.abstract: Neural network pruning can be formulated as a combinatorial optimization problem, yet most existing approaches rely on greedy heuristics that ignore complex interactions between filters. Formal optimization methods such as Quadratic Unconstrained Binary Optimization (QUBO) provide a principled alternative but have so far underperformed due to oversimplified objective formulations based on metrics like the L1-norm. In this work, we propose a unified Hybrid QUBO framework that bridges heuristic importance estimation with global combinatorial optimization. Our formulation integrates gradient-aware sensitivity metrics - specifically first-order Taylor and second-order Fisher information - into the linear term, while utilizing data-driven activation similarity in the quadratic term. This allows the QUBO objective to jointly capture individual filter relevance and inter-filter functional redundancy. We further introduce a dynamic capacity-driven search to strictly enforce target sparsity without distorting the optimization landscape. Finally, we employ a two-stage pipeline featuring a Tensor-Train (TT) Refinement stage - a gradient-free optimizer that fine-tunes the QUBO-derived solution directly against the true evaluation metric. Experiments on the SIDD image denoising dataset demonstrate that the proposed Hybrid QUBO significantly outperforms both greedy Taylor pruning and traditional L1-based QUBO, with TT Refinement providing further consistent gains at appropriate combinatorial scales. This highlights the potential of hybrid combinatorial formulations for robust, scalable, and interpretable neural network compression.

analysis.tldr: 提出混合QUBO框架，结合梯度敏感度与激活相似性，实现优于贪婪方法的神经网络剪枝。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有神经网络剪枝方法多采用贪婪启发式，忽略滤波器间复杂交互；形式化优化方法如QUBO因目标函数过于简化（如基于L1范数）而表现不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个既能捕捉单个滤波器重要性又能建模滤波器间功能冗余的QUBO目标，实现全局最优剪枝。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出混合QUBO框架：线性项使用梯度感知敏感度（一阶泰勒和二阶Fisher信息），二次项使用数据驱动的激活相似性；引入动态容量驱动搜索严格满足目标稀疏度；两阶段流水线包括QUBO求解和Tensor-Train精炼阶段。
contributions: 提出统一混合QUBO框架，将启发式重要性估计与全局组合优化结合。
引入梯度感知敏感度和激活相似性，联合建模滤波器重要性与冗余。
提出动态容量驱动搜索和Tensor-Train精炼阶段，提升剪枝性能。
analysis.experiments: 在SIDD图像去噪数据集上，混合QUBO显著优于贪婪Taylor剪枝和传统L1-based QUBO，TT精炼在适当组合规模下带来持续增益。
limitations: 可能对大规模网络计算开销较高。
TT精炼阶段的有效性依赖于组合规模的选择。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出混合QUBO框架，结合梯度敏感度与激活相似性，实现优于贪婪方法的神经网络剪枝。

papers.title: Deep Researcher Agent: An Autonomous Framework for 24/7 Deep Learning Experimentation with Zero-Cost Monitoring
papers.abstract: We present \textbf{Deep Researcher Agent}, an open-source framework that enables large language model (LLM) agents to autonomously conduct deep learning experiments around the clock. Unlike existing AI research assistants that focus on paper writing or code generation, our system addresses the full experiment lifecycle: hypothesis formation, code implementation, training execution, result analysis, and iterative refinement. The framework introduces three key innovations: (1) \textbf{Zero-Cost Monitoring} -- a monitoring paradigm that incurs zero LLM API costs during model training by relying solely on process-level checks and log file reads; (2) \textbf{Two-Tier Constant-Size Memory} -- a memory architecture capped at $\sim$5K characters regardless of runtime duration, preventing the unbounded context growth that plagues long-running agents; and (3) \textbf{Minimal-Toolset Leader-Worker Architecture} -- a multi-agent design where each worker agent is equipped with only 3--5 tools, reducing per-call token overhead by up to 73\%. In sustained deployments spanning 30+ days, the framework autonomously completed 500+ experiment cycles across four concurrent research projects, achieving a 52\% improvement over baseline metrics in one project through 200+ automated experiments -- all at an average LLM cost of \$0.08 per 24-hour cycle. Code is available at https://github.com/Xiangyue-Zhang/auto-deep-researcher-24x7.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个零成本监控、内存受限的LLM Agent框架，可全天候自主进行深度学习实验。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI研究助手多聚焦于论文写作或代码生成，缺乏覆盖假设形成、实验执行、结果分析到迭代优化的完整实验生命周期自动化系统。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能长时间自主运行、成本可控的深度学习实验Agent，避免上下文无限增长和API调用开销过高的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Deep Researcher Agent框架，包含零成本监控（仅依赖进程检查和日志读取）、两级恒定大小记忆（上限约5K字符）、最小工具集领导者-工作者架构（每个工作者仅3-5个工具）。
contributions: 提出零成本监控范式，在模型训练期间不产生LLM API成本。
设计两级恒定大小记忆架构，防止长期运行中上下文无限增长。
提出最小工具集领导者-工作者架构，减少每次调用的token开销高达73%。
analysis.experiments: 在30天以上的持续部署中，框架在四个并行研究项目中自主完成500+实验周期，其中一个项目通过200+自动化实验实现基线指标提升52%，平均每24小时LLM成本为0.08美元。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的深度学习实验，泛化性未充分验证。
零成本监控可能无法捕获复杂训练动态中的异常。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个零成本监控、内存受限的LLM Agent框架，可全天候自主进行深度学习实验。

papers.title: Reading Between the Pixels: An Inscriptive Jailbreak Attack on Text-to-Image Models
papers.abstract: Modern text-to-image (T2I) models can now render legible, paragraph-length text, enabling a fundamentally new class of misuse. We identify and formalize the inscriptive jailbreak, where an adversary coerces a T2I system into generating images containing harmful textual payloads (e.g., fraudulent documents) embedded within visually benign scenes. Unlike traditional depictive jailbreaks that elicit visually objectionable imagery, inscriptive attacks weaponize the text-rendering capability itself. Because existing jailbreak techniques are designed for coarse visual manipulation, they struggle to bypass multi-stage safety filters while maintaining character-level fidelity. To expose this vulnerability, we propose Etch, a black-box attack framework that decomposes the adversarial prompt into three functionally orthogonal layers: semantic camouflage, visual-spatial anchoring, and typographic encoding. This decomposition reduces joint optimization over the full prompt space to tractable sub-problems, which are iteratively refined through a zero-order loop. In this process, a vision-language model critiques each generated image, localizes failures to specific layers, and prescribes targeted revisions. Extensive evaluations across 7 models on the 2 benchmarks demonstrate that Etch achieves an average attack success rate of 65.57% (peaking at 91.00%), significantly outperforming existing baselines. Our results reveal a critical blind spot in current T2I safety alignments and underscore the urgent need for typography-aware defense multimodal mechanisms.

analysis.tldr: 提出Etch黑盒攻击框架，利用文本渲染能力生成含恶意文本的图像，绕过T2I模型安全过滤。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代T2I模型能渲染清晰长文本，导致新型滥用风险，现有越狱方法无法在保持字符级精度的同时绕过多层安全过滤器。
analysis.problem: 如何生成包含有害文本载荷（如欺诈文档）的图像，同时绕过T2I模型的多阶段安全过滤。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有越狱技术针对粗粒度视觉操纵设计，难以在字符级保真度下绕过安全过滤器；T2I模型的文本渲染能力成为新攻击面。
analysis.method: 提出Etch黑盒攻击框架，将对抗提示分解为语义伪装、视觉空间锚定和排版编码三个正交层，通过零阶优化循环迭代优化，利用VLM批评生成图像并定位失败层。
contributions: 形式化定义并识别了T2I模型的‘文字越狱’攻击新范式
提出Etch黑盒攻击框架，通过分层分解和零阶优化实现高效攻击
在7个模型和2个基准上验证，平均攻击成功率65.57%，最高91.00%
analysis.experiments: 在7个T2I模型和2个基准上评估，Etch平均攻击成功率65.57%（最高91.00%），显著优于现有基线。
limitations: 仅针对黑盒场景，白盒攻击可能更高效
未探讨防御机制的具体实现
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Etch黑盒攻击框架，利用文本渲染能力生成含恶意文本的图像，绕过T2I模型安全过滤。

papers.title: Evaluating Learner Representations for Differentiation Prior to Instructional Outcomes
papers.abstract: Learner representations play a central role in educational AI systems, yet it is often unclear whether they preserve meaningful differences between students when instructional outcomes are unavailable or highly context-dependent. This work examines how to evaluate learner representations based on whether they retain separation between learners under a shared comparison rule. We introduce distinctiveness, a representation-level measure that evaluates how each learner differs from others in the cohort using pairwise distances, without requiring clustering, labels, or task-specific evaluation. Using student-authored questions collected through a conversational AI agent in an online learning environment, we compare representations based on individual questions with representations that aggregate patterns across a student's interactions over time. Results show that learner-level representations yield higher separation, stronger clustering structure, and more reliable pairwise discrimination than interaction-level representations. These findings demonstrate that learner representations can be evaluated independently of instructional outcomes and provide a practical pre-deployment criterion using distinctiveness as a diagnostic metric for assessing whether a representation supports differentiated modeling or personalization.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需标签或任务评估的区分度指标，用于在缺乏教学结果时评价学习者表征的质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 教育AI系统中学习者表征至关重要，但通常难以在缺乏教学结果或上下文依赖时评估其是否保留学生间的有意义差异。
analysis.problem: 如何在没有教学结果或聚类标签的情况下，评估学习者表征是否有效区分不同学生。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出区分度（distinctiveness）指标，基于成对距离计算每个学习者与群体中其他学习者的差异，无需聚类、标签或任务特定评估。
contributions: 提出一种无需教学结果即可评估学习者表征的区分度指标。
通过在线学习环境中的学生问题数据，验证了学习者级表征优于交互级表征。
analysis.experiments: 使用通过对话AI代理收集的学生问题数据，比较基于单个问题的表征与聚合学生交互模式的表征，结果显示学习者级表征具有更高的分离度、更强的聚类结构和更可靠的成对区分。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的学习者数据（如学生问题）。
区分度指标的有效性可能依赖于比较规则的设定。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需标签或任务评估的区分度指标，用于在缺乏教学结果时评价学习者表征的质量。

papers.title: EEG-MFTNet: An Enhanced EEGNet Architecture with Multi-Scale Temporal Convolutions and Transformer Fusion for Cross-Session Motor Imagery Decoding
papers.abstract: Brain-computer interfaces (BCIs) enable direct communication between the brain and external devices, providing critical support for individuals with motor impairments. However, accurate motor imagery (MI) decoding from electroencephalography (EEG) remains challenging due to noise and cross-session variability. This study introduces EEG-MFTNet, a novel deep learning model based on the EEGNet architecture, enhanced with multi-scale temporal convolutions and a Transformer encoder stream. These components are designed to capture both short and long-range temporal dependencies in EEG signals. The model is evaluated on the SHU dataset using a subject-dependent cross-session setup, outperforming baseline models, including EEGNet and its recent derivatives. EEG-MFTNet achieves an average classification accuracy of 58.9% while maintaining low computational complexity and inference latency. The results highlight the model's potential for real-time BCI applications and underscore the importance of architectural innovations in improving MI decoding. This work contributes to the development of more robust and adaptive BCI systems, with implications for assistive technologies and neurorehabilitation.

analysis.tldr: 提出EEG-MFTNet，结合多尺度时间卷积与Transformer融合，提升跨会话运动想象解码准确率至58.9%。
analysis.research_motivation: 脑机接口对运动障碍患者至关重要，但EEG信号噪声和跨会话变异性导致运动想象解码精度不足，现有模型难以同时捕获短程和长程时间依赖。
analysis.problem: 提高跨会话运动想象脑电解码的准确性和鲁棒性，同时保持低计算复杂度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于EEGNet架构，引入多尺度时间卷积捕获不同尺度局部特征，并添加Transformer编码器流建模长程依赖，通过融合模块整合两类特征。
contributions: 提出EEG-MFTNet，融合多尺度时间卷积与Transformer，有效捕获EEG信号的短程和长程时间依赖。
在SHU数据集跨会话设置下达到58.9%平均准确率，优于EEGNet等基线，且计算复杂度低。
analysis.experiments: 在SHU数据集上进行subject-dependent跨会话评估，报告平均分类准确率58.9%，并提及低计算复杂度和推理延迟。
limitations: 准确率58.9%仍有较大提升空间，可能受限于数据集规模或类别不平衡。
仅在单一数据集上验证，泛化性需更多跨数据集实验。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EEG-MFTNet，结合多尺度时间卷积与Transformer融合，提升跨会话运动想象解码准确率至58.9%。

papers.title: Vision-Guided Iterative Refinement for Frontend Code Generation
authors: Gerrit J. J. van den Burg
papers.abstract: Code generation with large language models often relies on multi-stage human-in-the-loop refinement, which is effective but very costly - particularly in domains such as frontend web development where the solution quality depends on rendered visual output. We present a fully automated critic-in-the-loop framework in which a vision-language model serves as a visual critic that provides structured feedback on rendered webpages to guide iterative refinement of generated code. Across real-world user requests from the WebDev Arena dataset, this approach yields consistent improvements in solution quality, achieving up to 17.8% increase in performance over three refinement cycles. Next, we investigate parameter-efficient fine-tuning using LoRA to understand whether the improvements provided by the critic can be internalized by the code-generating LLM. Fine-tuning achieves 25% of the gains from the best critic-in-the-loop solution without a significant increase in token counts. Our findings indicate that automated, VLM-based critique of frontend code generation leads to significantly higher quality solutions than can be achieved through a single LLM inference pass, and highlight the importance of iterative refinement for the complex visual outputs associated with web development.

analysis.tldr: 用视觉语言模型作为自动批评者，迭代优化前端代码生成，性能提升达17.8%。
analysis.research_motivation: 前端代码生成依赖人工迭代优化，成本高昂，且质量取决于渲染后的视觉输出，现有方法缺乏自动化视觉反馈。
analysis.problem: 如何自动化地利用视觉反馈迭代改进前端代码生成质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一个自动化的批评者-在-循环框架，使用视觉语言模型作为视觉批评者，对渲染网页提供结构化反馈，指导代码生成LLM进行迭代优化；并探索使用LoRA进行参数高效微调，使批评者的改进内化到代码生成模型中。
contributions: 提出全自动的视觉引导迭代精炼框架，无需人工干预。
在WebDev Arena数据集上实现高达17.8%的性能提升。
通过LoRA微调，以较低成本内化批评者知识，获得最佳批评者方案25%的增益。
analysis.experiments: 在WebDev Arena数据集的真实用户请求上评估，经过三轮迭代精炼，性能提升达17.8%；LoRA微调获得最佳批评者方案25%的增益，且未显著增加token数。
limitations: 可能依赖视觉语言模型的批评质量。
微调仅获得部分增益，完全内化批评者知识仍有挑战。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用视觉语言模型作为自动批评者，迭代优化前端代码生成，性能提升达17.8%。

papers.title: "OK Aura, Be Fair With Me": Demographics-Agnostic Training for Bias Mitigation in Wake-up Word Detection
papers.abstract: Voice-based interfaces are widely used; however, achieving fair Wake-up Word detection across diverse speaker populations remains a critical challenge due to persistent demographic biases. This study evaluates the effectiveness of demographics-agnostic training techniques in mitigating performance disparities among speakers of varying sex, age, and accent. We utilize the OK Aura database for our experiments, employing a training methodology that excludes demographic labels, which are reserved for evaluation purposes. We explore (i) data augmentation techniques to enhance model generalization and (ii) knowledge distillation of pre-trained foundational speech models. The experimental results indicate that these demographics-agnostic training techniques markedly reduce demographic bias, leading to a more equitable performance profile across different speaker groups. Specifically, one of the evaluated techniques achieves a Predictive Disparity reduction of 39.94\% for sex, 83.65\% for age, and 40.48\% for accent when compared to the baseline. This study highlights the effectiveness of label-agnostic methodologies in fostering fairness in Wake-up Word detection.

analysis.tldr: 通过无人口统计标签的训练技术（数据增强和知识蒸馏）有效减少唤醒词检测中的性别、年龄和口音偏差。
analysis.research_motivation: 语音接口广泛使用，但唤醒词检测在不同说话人群（性别、年龄、口音）中存在性能差异，公平性问题亟待解决。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用人口统计标签的情况下，减少唤醒词检测模型对性别、年龄和口音的偏见。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用无人口统计标签的训练方法，包括数据增强和预训练语音模型的知识蒸馏，仅将人口统计标签用于评估。
contributions: 验证了无人口统计标签的训练技术（数据增强和知识蒸馏）在减少唤醒词检测中人口统计偏差的有效性。
在OK Aura数据库上实现了显著的预测差异降低：性别39.94%，年龄83.65%，口音40.48%。
analysis.experiments: 在OK Aura数据库上评估了数据增强和知识蒸馏两种技术，并与基线比较，报告了预测差异降低百分比。
limitations: 仅针对唤醒词检测任务，可能不适用于其他语音任务。
未探讨多种偏差同时存在时的交互效应。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过无人口统计标签的训练技术（数据增强和知识蒸馏）有效减少唤醒词检测中的性别、年龄和口音偏差。

papers.title: Reciprocal Trust and Distrust in Artificial Intelligence Systems: The Hard Problem of Regulation
papers.abstract: Policy makers, scientists, and the public are increasingly confronted with thorny questions about the regulation of artificial intelligence (AI) systems. A key common thread concerns whether AI can be trusted and the factors that can make it more trustworthy in front of stakeholders and users. This is indeed crucial, as the trustworthiness of AI systems is fundamental for both democratic governance and for the development and deployment of AI. This article advances the discussion by arguing that AI systems should also be recognized, as least to some extent, as artifacts capable of exercising a form of agency, thereby enabling them to engage in relationships of trust or distrust with humans. It further examines the implications of these reciprocal trust dynamics for regulators tasked with overseeing AI systems. The article concludes by identifying key tensions and unresolved dilemmas that these dynamics pose for the future of AI regulation and governance.

analysis.tldr: 探讨AI系统与人类之间的互信与不信任关系及其对监管的挑战。
analysis.research_motivation: AI系统的信任问题对民主治理和AI部署至关重要，但现有讨论多聚焦于人类对AI的信任，忽视了AI作为具有一定能动性的实体与人类之间的互信关系。
analysis.problem: 如何理解AI系统与人类之间的互信与不信任动态，并分析其对AI监管的启示。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 理论分析，论证AI系统应被视为具有一定能动性的实体，从而能够与人类建立信任或不信任关系，并探讨这种互信动态对监管的影响。
contributions: 提出AI系统应被视为具有一定能动性的实体，能够与人类建立互信或不信任关系。
识别了互信动态对AI监管带来的关键张力和未解决的困境。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 缺乏实证支持，主要基于理论论证。
未提供具体的监管框架或解决方案。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 探讨AI系统与人类之间的互信与不信任关系及其对监管的挑战。

papers.title: Learn to Rank: Visual Attribution by Learning Importance Ranking
papers.abstract: Interpreting the decisions of complex computer vision models is crucial to establish trust and accountability, especially in safety-critical domains. An established approach to interpretability is generating visual attribution maps that highlight regions of the input most relevant to the model's prediction. However, existing methods face a three-way trade-off. Propagation-based approaches are efficient, but they can be biased and architecture-specific. Meanwhile, perturbation-based methods are causally grounded, yet they are expensive and for vision transformers often yield coarse, patch-level explanations. Learning-based explainers are fast but usually optimize surrogate objectives or distill from heuristic teachers. We propose a learning scheme that instead optimizes deletion and insertion metrics directly. Since these metrics depend on non-differentiable sorting and ranking, we frame them as permutation learning and replace the hard sorting with a differentiable relaxation using Gumbel-Sinkhorn. This enables end-to-end training through attribution-guided perturbations of the target model. During inference, our method produces dense, pixel-level attributions in a single forward pass with optional, few-step gradient refinement. Our experiments demonstrate consistent quantitative improvements and sharper, boundary-aligned explanations, particularly for transformer-based vision models.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种通过可微排序直接优化删除/插入指标的可解释性方法，生成像素级视觉归因图。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉归因方法在效率、因果性和解释粒度之间存在三难困境：传播法高效但有偏且依赖架构，扰动法因果性强但计算昂贵且解释粗糙，学习法快速但优化代理目标或从启发式教师蒸馏。
analysis.problem: 如何直接优化不可微的删除和插入指标，以生成密集、像素级且边界对齐的视觉归因图。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将删除/插入指标建模为排列学习问题，使用Gumbel-Sinkhorn可微松弛替代硬排序，实现端到端训练；推理时单次前向传播生成密集归因，可选少量梯度步细化。
contributions: 提出一种直接优化删除和插入指标的学习框架，无需代理目标或启发式教师。
利用Gumbel-Sinkhorn可微排序实现端到端训练，生成像素级、边界对齐的归因图。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖Gumbel-Sinkhorn的近似质量，在极端排序场景下松弛误差可能累积。
仅针对视觉模型验证，未讨论对其他模态（如文本、音频）的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种通过可微排序直接优化删除/插入指标的可解释性方法，生成像素级视觉归因图。

papers.title: WikiSeeker: Rethinking the Role of Vision-Language Models in Knowledge-Based Visual Question Answering
papers.abstract: Multi-modal Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has emerged as a highly effective paradigm for Knowledge-Based Visual Question Answering (KB-VQA). Despite recent advancements, prevailing methods still primarily depend on images as the retrieval key, and often overlook or misplace the role of Vision-Language Models (VLMs), thereby failing to leverage their potential fully. In this paper, we introduce WikiSeeker, a novel multi-modal RAG framework that bridges these gaps by proposing a multi-modal retriever and redefining the role of VLMs. Rather than serving merely as answer generators, we assign VLMs two specialized agents: a Refiner and an Inspector. The Refiner utilizes the capability of VLMs to rewrite the textual query according to the input image, significantly improving the performance of the multimodal retriever. The Inspector facilitates a decoupled generation strategy by selectively routing reliable retrieved context to another LLM for answer generation, while relying on the VLM's internal knowledge when retrieval is unreliable. Extensive experiments on EVQA, InfoSeek, and M2KR demonstrate that WikiSeeker achieves state-of-the-art performance, with substantial improvements in both retrieval accuracy and answer quality. Our code will be released on https://github.com/zhuyjan/WikiSeeker.

analysis.tldr: WikiSeeker通过重新定义VLM为精炼器和检查器，在多模态RAG中显著提升知识型VQA的检索与回答质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有KB-VQA方法主要依赖图像作为检索键，未能充分利用视觉语言模型（VLM）的潜力，导致检索和回答质量受限。
analysis.problem: 如何重新设计多模态RAG框架，使VLM超越简单的答案生成器角色，从而提升知识型视觉问答的检索准确性和答案质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前方法将VLM仅用作答案生成器，忽视了其在查询重写和可靠性判断方面的潜力。
analysis.method: 提出WikiSeeker框架，包含多模态检索器，并将VLM分配为两个智能体：Refiner（根据图像重写文本查询）和Inspector（选择性路由可靠上下文至LLM生成答案，否则依赖VLM内部知识）。
contributions: 重新定义了VLM在KB-VQA中的角色，提出Refiner和Inspector两个智能体。
提出多模态检索器，通过查询重写显著提升检索性能。
在EVQA、InfoSeek和M2KR上取得SOTA性能，检索和回答质量均有大幅提升。
analysis.experiments: 在EVQA、InfoSeek和M2KR三个基准上进行了广泛实验，取得了SOTA性能。
limitations: 可能依赖VLM的内部知识质量，当VLM知识不足时Inspector策略可能受限。
框架复杂度较高，需要同时运行VLM和LLM，可能增加推理成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: WikiSeeker通过重新定义VLM为精炼器和检查器，在多模态RAG中显著提升知识型VQA的检索与回答质量。

papers.title: Harnessing Hyperbolic Geometry for Harmful Prompt Detection and Sanitization
papers.abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have become essential for tasks such as image synthesis, captioning, and retrieval by aligning textual and visual information in a shared embedding space. Yet, this flexibility also makes them vulnerable to malicious prompts designed to produce unsafe content, raising critical safety concerns. Existing defenses either rely on blacklist filters, which are easily circumvented, or on heavy classifier-based systems, both of which are costly and fragile under embedding-level attacks. We address these challenges with two complementary components: Hyperbolic Prompt Espial (HyPE) and Hyperbolic Prompt Sanitization (HyPS). HyPE is a lightweight anomaly detector that leverages the structured geometry of hyperbolic space to model benign prompts and detect harmful ones as outliers. HyPS builds on this detection by applying explainable attribution methods to identify and selectively modify harmful words, neutralizing unsafe intent while preserving the original semantics of user prompts. Through extensive experiments across multiple datasets and adversarial scenarios, we prove that our framework consistently outperforms prior defenses in both detection accuracy and robustness. Together, HyPE and HyPS offer an efficient, interpretable, and resilient approach to safeguarding VLMs against malicious prompt misuse.

analysis.tldr: 利用双曲几何检测和净化有害提示，提升VLM安全性。
analysis.research_motivation: VLM易受恶意提示攻击，现有防御方法（黑名单过滤、分类器）成本高、脆弱且易被绕过。
analysis.problem: 如何高效、鲁棒地检测并净化VLM中的有害提示。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出双曲提示检测器HyPE（基于双曲几何的异常检测）和双曲提示净化器HyPS（可解释归因方法识别并修改有害词）。
contributions: 提出HyPE，利用双曲几何结构建模良性提示并检测有害异常。
提出HyPS，通过可解释归因定位并修改有害词，保持语义同时消除恶意。
实验证明框架在检测准确性和鲁棒性上优于现有防御。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集和对抗场景下进行实验，框架在检测准确性和鲁棒性上持续优于先前防御。
limitations: 可能依赖双曲空间的嵌入质量。
对复杂或隐晦的有害提示可能检测不足。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用双曲几何检测和净化有害提示，提升VLM安全性。

papers.title: Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning with Augmented Step-Level Transitions for LLM Agents
papers.abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents have demonstrated strong capabilities in complex interactive decision-making tasks. However, existing LLM agents typically rely on increasingly long interaction histories, resulting in high computational cost and limited scalability. In this paper, we propose STEP-HRL, a hierarchical reinforcement learning (HRL) framework that enables step-level learning by conditioning only on single-step transitions rather than full interaction histories. STEP-HRL structures tasks hierarchically, using completed subtasks to represent global progress of overall task. By introducing a local progress module, it also iteratively and selectively summarizes interaction history within each subtask to produce a compact summary of local progress. Together, these components yield augmented step-level transitions for both high-level and low-level policies. Experimental results on ScienceWorld and ALFWorld benchmarks consistently demonstrate that STEP-HRL substantially outperforms baselines in terms of performance and generalization while reducing token usage. Our code is available at https://github.com/TonyStark042/STEP-HRL.

analysis.tldr: 提出STEP-HRL框架，通过层级强化学习和增强的步骤级转换，提升LLM Agent在复杂任务中的效率和泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM Agent依赖长交互历史，导致计算成本高、可扩展性差，需要更高效的决策机制。
analysis.problem: 如何减少LLM Agent对完整交互历史的依赖，同时保持任务完成性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出STEP-HRL，一种层级强化学习框架，通过单步转换条件化实现步骤级学习，利用子任务表示全局进度，并引入局部进度模块选择性总结子任务内的交互历史，生成增强的步骤级转换。
contributions: 提出STEP-HRL框架，实现层级强化学习与步骤级转换，降低计算成本。
在ScienceWorld和ALFWorld基准上验证了性能提升和泛化能力，同时减少token使用。
analysis.experiments: 在ScienceWorld和ALFWorld基准上，STEP-HRL在性能和泛化方面显著优于基线，并减少了token使用。
limitations: 可能对复杂长程任务中的子任务划分依赖较强。
局部进度模块的总结策略可能引入信息损失。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出STEP-HRL框架，通过层级强化学习和增强的步骤级转换，提升LLM Agent在复杂任务中的效率和泛化能力。

papers.title: EfficientMonoHair: Fast Strand-Level Reconstruction from Monocular Video via Multi-View Direction Fusion
papers.abstract: Strand-level hair geometry reconstruction is a fundamental problem in virtual human modeling and the digitization of hairstyles. However, existing methods still suffer from a significant trade-off between accuracy and efficiency. Implicit neural representations can capture the global hair shape but often fail to preserve fine-grained strand details, while explicit optimization-based approaches achieve high-fidelity reconstructions at the cost of heavy computation and poor scalability. To address this issue, we propose EfficientMonoHair, a fast and accurate framework that combines the implicit neural network with multi-view geometric fusion for strand-level reconstruction from monocular video. Our method introduces a fusion-patch-based multi-view optimization that reduces the number of optimization iterations for point cloud direction, as well as a novel parallel hair-growing strategy that relaxes voxel occupancy constraints, allowing large-scale strand tracing to remain stable and robust even under inaccurate or noisy orientation fields. Extensive experiments on representative real-world hairstyles demonstrate that our method can robustly reconstruct high-fidelity strand geometries with accuracy. On synthetic benchmarks, our method achieves reconstruction quality comparable to state-of-the-art methods, while improving runtime efficiency by nearly an order of magnitude.

analysis.tldr: 提出EfficientMonoHair，通过多视角方向融合实现从单目视频快速重建高保真发丝级头发几何。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有发丝级头发重建方法在精度与效率之间存在显著权衡：隐式神经表示能捕捉全局形状但丢失细节，显式优化方法精度高但计算量大、可扩展性差。
analysis.problem: 如何从单目视频中快速且准确地重建发丝级头发几何，同时保持高保真度和计算效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 隐式神经表示难以保留细粒度发丝细节；显式优化方法计算成本高且难以扩展。
