analysis.method: 结合隐式神经网络与多视角几何融合，提出融合块多视角优化减少点云方向迭代次数，以及并行头发生长策略放松体素占用约束，实现大规模发丝追踪的稳定鲁棒。
contributions: 提出融合块多视角优化，减少点云方向优化迭代次数。
提出并行头发生长策略，放松体素占用约束，提升大规模发丝追踪的稳定性和鲁棒性。
在真实发型和合成基准上实现与SOTA相当的重建质量，同时效率提升近一个数量级。
analysis.experiments: 在代表性真实发型和合成基准上进行实验，重建质量与SOTA相当，运行效率提升近一个数量级。
limitations: 可能对极端复杂发型或严重遮挡场景鲁棒性有限。
依赖多视角融合，单目视频质量可能影响结果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EfficientMonoHair，通过多视角方向融合实现从单目视频快速重建高保真发丝级头发几何。

papers.title: BodhiPromptShield: Pre-Inference Prompt Mediation for Suppressing Privacy Propagation in LLM/VLM Agents
papers.abstract: In LLM/VLM agents, prompt privacy risk propagates beyond a single model call because raw user content can flow into retrieval queries, memory writes, tool calls, and logs. Existing de-identification pipelines address document boundaries but not this cross-stage propagation. We propose BodhiPromptShield, a policy-aware framework that detects sensitive spans, routes them via typed placeholders, semantic abstraction, or secure symbolic mapping, and delays restoration to authorized boundaries. Relative to enterprise redaction, this adds explicit propagation-aware mediation and restoration timing as a security variable. Under controlled evaluation on the Controlled Prompt-Privacy Benchmark (CPPB), stage-wise propagation suppresses from 10.7\% to 7.1\% across retrieval, memory, and tool stages; PER reaches 9.3\% with 0.94 AC and 0.92 TSR, outperforming generic de-identification. These are controlled systems results on CPPB rather than formal privacy guarantees or public-benchmark transfer claims. The project repository is available at https://github.com/mabo1215/BodhiPromptShield.git.

analysis.tldr: 提出BodhiPromptShield框架，在LLM/VLM Agent调用前检测并替换敏感内容，抑制隐私跨阶段传播。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM/VLM Agent中用户原始内容会流入检索、记忆、工具调用和日志等多个阶段，现有去标识化方法只处理文档边界，无法阻止跨阶段隐私传播。
analysis.problem: 解决LLM/VLM Agent中提示隐私跨阶段传播的问题，即敏感信息在检索、记忆、工具调用等阶段被泄露。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出隐私风险会跨阶段传播，现有方法无法处理。
analysis.method: 提出BodhiPromptShield，一个策略感知框架，在推理前检测敏感片段，通过类型化占位符、语义抽象或安全符号映射进行路由，并在授权边界延迟恢复。
contributions: 提出显式的传播感知中介和恢复时机作为安全变量的框架
在CPPB基准上验证了跨阶段隐私传播抑制效果
analysis.experiments: 在Controlled Prompt-Privacy Benchmark (CPPB)上进行受控评估，阶段式传播从10.7%降至7.1%，PER达9.3%，AC 0.94，TSR 0.92，优于通用去标识化。
limitations: 结果基于受控系统实验，非正式隐私保证或公共基准迁移声明
可能依赖特定策略配置，泛化性需进一步验证
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出BodhiPromptShield框架，在LLM/VLM Agent调用前检测并替换敏感内容，抑制隐私跨阶段传播。

papers.title: Sparse Gain Radio Map Reconstruction With Geometry Priors and Uncertainty-Guided Measurement Selection
papers.abstract: Radio maps are important for environment-aware wireless communication, network planning, and radio resource optimization. However, dense radio map construction remains challenging when only a limited number of measurements are available, especially in complex urban environments with strong blockages, irregular geometry, and restricted sensing accessibility. Existing methods have explored interpolation, low-rank cartography, deep completion, and channel knowledge map (CKM) construction, but many of these methods insufficiently exploit explicit geometric priors or overlook the value of predictive uncertainty for subsequent sensing. In this paper, we study sparse gain radio map reconstruction from a geometry-aware and active sensing perspective. We first construct \textbf{UrbanRT-RM}, a controllable ray-tracing benchmark with diverse urban layouts, multiple base-station deployments, and multiple sparse sampling modes. We then propose \textbf{GeoUQ-GFNet}, a lightweight network that jointly predicts a dense gain radio map and a spatial uncertainty map from sparse measurements and structured scene priors. The predicted uncertainty is further used to guide active measurement selection under limited sensing budgets. Extensive experiments show that our proposed GeoUQ-GFNet method achieves strong and consistent reconstruction performance across different scenes and transmitter placements generated using UrbanRT-RM. Moreover, uncertainty-guided querying provides more effective reconstruction improvement than non-adaptive sampling under the same additional measurement budget. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of combining geometry-aware learning, uncertainty estimation, and benchmark-driven evaluation for sparse radio map reconstruction in complex urban environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出几何先验与不确定性引导的稀疏增益无线电地图重建方法，在复杂城市环境中实现高效重建与主动测量选择。
analysis.research_motivation: 无线电地图对无线通信、网络规划等至关重要，但复杂城市环境中稀疏测量下密集重建困难，现有方法未充分利用几何先验或预测不确定性。
analysis.problem: 在有限测量下，如何利用几何先验和不确定性估计实现稀疏增益无线电地图的准确重建，并主动选择测量位置以提升重建效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建UrbanRT-RM可控射线追踪基准，提出GeoUQ-GFNet轻量网络，联合预测密集增益无线电地图和空间不确定性图，并利用不确定性指导主动测量选择。
contributions: 构建UrbanRT-RM基准，包含多样城市布局、多基站部署和稀疏采样模式。
提出GeoUQ-GFNet，结合几何先验和不确定性估计实现稀疏重建与主动测量选择。
analysis.experiments: 在UrbanRT-RM基准上，GeoUQ-GFNet在不同场景和发射器位置下均取得强且一致的重建性能；不确定性引导的查询在相同额外测量预算下比非自适应采样更有效。
limitations: 可能依赖射线追踪基准的仿真环境，真实场景泛化性待验证。
轻量网络设计可能在大规模或高分辨率地图上性能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出几何先验与不确定性引导的稀疏增益无线电地图重建方法，在复杂城市环境中实现高效重建与主动测量选择。

papers.title: ClawLess: A Security Model of AI Agents
papers.abstract: Autonomous AI agents powered by Large Language Models can reason, plan, and execute complex tasks, but their ability to autonomously retrieve information and run code introduces significant security risks. Existing approaches attempt to regulate agent behavior through training or prompting, which does not offer fundamental security guarantees. We present ClawLess, a security framework that enforces formally verified policies on AI agents under a worst-case threat model where the agent itself may be adversarial. ClawLess formalizes a fine-grained security model over system entities, trust scopes, and permissions to express dynamic policies that adapt to agents' runtime behavior. These policies are translated into concrete security rules and enforced through a user-space kernel augmented with BPF-based syscall interception. This approach bridges the formal security model with practical enforcement, ensuring security regardless of the agent's internal design.

analysis.tldr: ClawLess 通过形式化验证的安全策略和 BPF 系统调用拦截，为 AI Agent 提供底层安全保障。
analysis.research_motivation: 自主 AI Agent 在推理、规划和执行任务时，其自主检索信息和运行代码的能力带来了严重安全风险，现有方法（训练或提示）无法提供根本性安全保障。
analysis.problem: 如何在最坏威胁模型（Agent 本身可能为恶意）下，为 AI Agent 提供形式化验证的安全保障。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: ClawLess 框架：形式化细粒度安全模型（系统实体、信任范围、权限），将动态策略转化为具体安全规则，并通过基于 BPF 系统调用拦截的用户态内核进行强制实施。
contributions: 提出 ClawLess 安全框架，在形式化安全模型与实际执行之间建立桥梁。
在 Agent 可能为敌对的威胁模型下，通过 BPF 拦截实现策略强制，确保安全不依赖于 Agent 内部设计。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能引入性能开销，BPF 拦截对系统调用频率敏感。
策略表达和验证的复杂性可能限制其可扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ClawLess 通过形式化验证的安全策略和 BPF 系统调用拦截，为 AI Agent 提供底层安全保障。

papers.title: RHVI-FDD: A Hierarchical Decoupling Framework for Low-Light Image Enhancement
papers.abstract: Low-light images often suffer from severe noise, detail loss, and color distortion, which hinder downstream multimedia analysis and retrieval tasks. The degradation in low-light images is complex: luminance and chrominance are coupled, while within the chrominance, noise and details are deeply entangled, preventing existing methods from simultaneously correcting color distortion, suppressing noise, and preserving fine details. To tackle the above challenges, we propose a novel hierarchical decoupling framework (RHVI-FDD). At the macro level, we introduce the RHVI transform, which mitigates the estimation bias caused by input noise and enables robust luminance-chrominance decoupling. At the micro level, we design a Frequency-Domain Decoupling (FDD) module with three branches for further feature separation. Using the Discrete Cosine Transform, we decompose chrominance features into low, mid, and high-frequency bands that predominantly represent global tone, local details, and noise components, which are then processed by tailored expert networks in a divide-and-conquer manner and fused via an adaptive gating module for content-aware fusion. Extensive experiments on multiple low-light datasets demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms existing state-of-the-art approaches in both objective metrics and subjective visual quality.

analysis.tldr: 提出分层解耦框架RHVI-FDD，通过宏微观解耦实现低光图像增强，在多个数据集上超越SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 低光图像存在噪声、细节丢失和颜色失真，且亮度与色度耦合、色度内噪声与细节纠缠，现有方法无法同时校正颜色、抑制噪声和保留细节。
analysis.problem: 低光图像增强中亮度-色度耦合以及色度内噪声与细节的深度纠缠问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 低光图像退化复杂：亮度与色度耦合，色度内噪声和细节深度纠缠，导致现有方法无法同时校正颜色、抑制噪声和保留细节。
analysis.method: 提出分层解耦框架RHVI-FDD：宏观层通过RHVI变换实现鲁棒的亮度-色度解耦；微观层设计频域解耦模块，利用DCT将色度特征分解为低、中、高频带，分别由专家网络处理并通过自适应门控融合。
contributions: 提出RHVI变换，缓解输入噪声导致的估计偏差，实现鲁棒的亮度-色度解耦。
设计频域解耦模块，通过DCT分解和分治专家网络实现噪声、细节和色调的分离与增强。
analysis.experiments: 在多个低光数据集上进行了实验，客观指标和主观视觉质量均优于现有SOTA方法。
limitations: 可能对极端低光场景的泛化能力有限。
频域分解的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出分层解耦框架RHVI-FDD，通过宏微观解耦实现低光图像增强，在多个数据集上超越SOTA。

papers.title: Sparsity-Aware Voxel Attention and Foreground Modulation for 3D Semantic Scene Completion
papers.abstract: Monocular Semantic Scene Completion (SSC) aims to reconstruct complete 3D semantic scenes from a single RGB image, offering a cost-effective solution for autonomous driving and robotics. However, the inherently imbalanced nature of voxel distributions, where over 93% of voxels are empty and foreground classes are rare, poses significant challenges. Existing methods often suffer from redundant emphasis on uninformative voxels and poor generalization to long-tailed categories. To address these issues, we propose VoxSAMNet (Voxel Sparsity-Aware Modulation Network), a unified framework that explicitly models voxel sparsity and semantic imbalance. Our approach introduces: (1) a Dummy Shortcut for Feature Refinement (DSFR) module that bypasses empty voxels via a shared dummy node while refining occupied ones with deformable attention; and (2) a Foreground Modulation Strategy combining Foreground Dropout (FD) and Text-Guided Image Filter (TGIF) to alleviate overfitting and enhance class-relevant features. Extensive experiments on the public benchmarks SemanticKITTI and SSCBench-KITTI-360 demonstrate that VoxSAMNet achieves state-of-the-art performance, surpassing prior monocular and stereo baselines with mIoU scores of 18.2% and 20.2%, respectively. Our results highlight the importance of sparsity-aware and semantics-guided design for efficient and accurate 3D scene completion, offering a promising direction for future research.

analysis.tldr: 提出VoxSAMNet，通过稀疏感知体素注意力和前景调制策略，在单目语义场景补全任务上实现SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 单目语义场景补全（SSC）对自动驾驶和机器人至关重要，但体素分布极度不平衡（>93%为空），现有方法对无信息体素冗余关注且对长尾类别泛化差。
analysis.problem: 解决体素稀疏性和语义类别不平衡导致的模型效率低和长尾类别性能差问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 超过93%的体素为空，前景类别稀少，导致模型对无信息体素过度关注，长尾类别泛化能力弱。
analysis.method: 提出VoxSAMNet，包含两个核心模块：(1) Dummy Shortcut for Feature Refinement (DSFR) 通过共享哑节点绕过空体素，并用可变形注意力细化占用体素；(2) Foreground Modulation Strategy 结合前景丢弃（FD）和文本引导图像滤波（TGIF）缓解过拟合并增强类别相关特征。
contributions: 提出DSFR模块，利用哑节点和可变形注意力高效处理稀疏体素。
提出前景调制策略（FD+TGIF），缓解类别不平衡并提升长尾类别性能。
在SemanticKITTI和SSCBench-KITTI-360上取得SOTA，mIoU分别达18.2%和20.2%。
analysis.experiments: 在SemanticKITTI和SSCBench-KITTI-360基准上评估，与单目和立体基线对比，mIoU分别达18.2%和20.2%，达到SOTA。
limitations: 可能对极端稀疏场景或未见类别泛化有限。
文本引导图像滤波依赖预训练视觉-语言模型，可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VoxSAMNet，通过稀疏感知体素注意力和前景调制策略，在单目语义场景补全任务上实现SOTA。

papers.title: What Models Know, How Well They Know It: Knowledge-Weighted Fine-Tuning for Learning When to Say "I Don't Know"
papers.abstract: While large language models (LLMs) demonstrate strong capabilities across diverse user queries, they still suffer from hallucinations, often arising from knowledge misalignment between pre-training and fine-tuning. To address this misalignment, we reliably estimate a fine-grained, instance-level knowledge score via multi-sampled inference. Using the knowledge score, we scale the learning signal according to the model's existing knowledge, while encouraging explicit "I don't know" responses for out-of-scope queries. Experimental results show that this approach allows the model to explicitly express uncertainty when it lacks knowledge, while maintaining accuracy on questions it can answer. Furthermore, we propose evaluation metrics for uncertainty, showing that accurate discrimination between known and unknown instances consistently improves performance.

analysis.tldr: 通过知识加权微调让LLM学会在不确定时回答“我不知道”，减少幻觉。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在预训练和微调之间存在知识错位，导致幻觉问题，需要让模型在缺乏知识时明确表达不确定性。
analysis.problem: 如何可靠估计模型对每个实例的知识水平，并据此调整学习信号，使模型在未知问题上回答“我不知道”而不影响已知问题的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过多次采样推理估计细粒度的实例级知识分数，然后利用该分数缩放学习信号，对已知知识加强学习，对超出范围的问题鼓励模型输出“我不知道”。
contributions: 提出一种知识加权微调方法，利用多采样推理估计知识分数来调整学习信号。
引入新的不确定性评估指标，证明准确区分已知和未知实例能持续提升性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 多采样推理可能增加计算开销。
知识分数的估计依赖于采样策略，可能不适用于所有场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过知识加权微调让LLM学会在不确定时回答“我不知道”，减少幻觉。

papers.title: Emergent social transmission of model-based representations without inference
papers.abstract: How do people acquire rich, flexible knowledge about their environment from others despite limited cognitive capacity? Humans are often thought to rely on computationally costly mentalizing, such as inferring others' beliefs. In contrast, cultural evolution emphasizes that behavioral transmission can be supported by simple social cues. Using reinforcement learning simulations, we show how minimal social learning can indirectly transmit higher-level representations. We simulate a naïve agent searching for rewards in a reconfigurable environment, learning either alone or by observing an expert - crucially, without inferring mental states. Instead, the learner heuristically selects actions or boosts value representations based on observed actions. Our results demonstrate that these cues bias the learner's experience, causing its representation to converge toward the expert's. Model-based learners benefit most from social exposure, showing faster learning and more expert-like representations. These findings show how cultural transmission can arise from simple, non-mentalizing processes exploiting asocial learning mechanisms.

analysis.tldr: 通过强化学习模拟，展示简单社会线索如何无需心智推理即可传递模型化表征。
analysis.research_motivation: 人类如何从他人处获取丰富知识，但心智推理计算成本高，而文化进化表明简单社会线索可支持行为传播，需探索其机制。
analysis.problem: 研究无需心智推理的简单社会学习能否以及如何传递高级表征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模拟发现，简单社会线索（如选择动作或提升价值表征）能偏置学习者的经验，使其表征趋近专家；基于模型的受益最大。
analysis.method: 使用强化学习模拟，比较独自学习与观察专家（无心智推理）的智能体，采用启发式动作选择或价值提升。
contributions: 证明无需心智推理的简单社会学习可间接传递模型化表征。
揭示基于模型的学习者从社会暴露中获益最多，学习更快且表征更接近专家。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 模拟环境可能简化了真实社会交互的复杂性。
未考虑心智推理可能带来的额外优势。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过强化学习模拟，展示简单社会线索如何无需心智推理即可传递模型化表征。

papers.title: PDMP: Rethinking Balanced Multimodal Learning via Performance-Dominant Modality Prioritization
papers.abstract: Multimodal learning has attracted increasing attention due to its practicality. However, it often suffers from insufficient optimization, where the multimodal model underperforms even compared to its unimodal counterparts. Existing methods attribute this problem to the imbalanced learning between modalities and solve it by gradient modulation. This paper argues that balanced learning is not the optimal setting for multimodal learning. On the contrary, imbalanced learning driven by the performance-dominant modality that has superior unimodal performance can contribute to better multimodal performance. And the under-optimization problem is caused by insufficient learning of the performance-dominant modality. To this end, we propose the Performance-Dominant Modality Prioritization (PDMP) strategy to assist multimodal learning. Specifically, PDMP firstly mines the performance-dominant modality via the performance ranking of the independently trained unimodal model. Then PDMP introduces asymmetric coefficients to modulate the gradients of each modality, enabling the performance-dominant modality to dominate the optimization. Since PDMP only relies on the unimodal performance ranking, it is independent of the structures and fusion methods of the multimodal model and has great potential for practical scenarios. Finally, extensive experiments on various datasets validate the superiority of PDMP.

analysis.tldr: 提出性能主导模态优先策略，通过非对称梯度调制让强模态主导优化，提升多模态学习效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态学习常因模态间优化不平衡导致模型性能甚至不如单模态，现有方法通过梯度调制追求平衡学习，但本文认为平衡并非最优。
analysis.problem: 多模态学习中性能主导模态学习不足导致的欠优化问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出平衡学习不是最优设置，性能主导模态驱动的非平衡学习能带来更好多模态性能，欠优化源于主导模态学习不充分。
analysis.method: 提出性能主导模态优先策略（PDMP），先通过独立训练的单模态模型性能排序挖掘主导模态，再引入非对称系数调制各模态梯度，使主导模态主导优化。
contributions: 挑战了多模态学习中平衡学习的传统观点，提出非平衡学习由性能主导模态驱动更优。
提出PDMP策略，仅依赖单模态性能排序，与模型结构和融合方法无关，实用性强。
analysis.experiments: 在多种数据集上进行了广泛实验，验证了PDMP的优越性。
limitations: 依赖独立训练的单模态模型性能排序，可能增加计算开销。
未讨论主导模态选择错误时的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出性能主导模态优先策略，通过非对称梯度调制让强模态主导优化，提升多模态学习效果。

papers.title: Beyond the Beep: Scalable Collision Anticipation and Real-Time Explainability with BADAS-2.0
papers.abstract: We present BADAS-2.0, the second generation of our collision anticipation system, building on BADAS-1.0, which showed that fine-tuning V-JEPA2 on large-scale ego-centric dashcam data outperforms both academic baselines and production ADAS systems. BADAS-2.0 advances the state of the art along three axes. (i) Long-tail benchmark and accuracy: We introduce a 10-group long-tail benchmark targeting rare and safety-critical scenarios. To construct it, BADAS-1.0 is used as an active oracle to score millions of unlabeled drives and surface high-risk candidates for annotation. Combined with Nexar's Atlas platform for targeted data collection, this expands the dataset from 40k to 178,500 labeled videos (~2M clips), yielding consistent gains across all subgroups, with the largest improvements on the hardest long-tail cases. (ii) Knowledge distillation to edge: Domain-specific self-supervised pre-training on 2.25M unlabeled driving videos enables distillation into compact models, BADAS-2.0-Flash (86M) and BADAS-2.0-Flash-Lite (22M), achieving 7-12x speedup with near-parity accuracy, enabling real-time edge deployment. (iii) Explainability: BADAS-2.0 produces real-time object-centric attention heatmaps that localize the evidence behind predictions. BADAS-Reason extends this with a vision-language model that consumes the last frame and heatmap to generate driver actions and structured textual reasoning. Inference code and evaluation benchmarks are publicly available.

analysis.tldr: BADAS-2.0 通过长尾基准、知识蒸馏和可解释性，实现了可扩展的碰撞预测与实时边缘部署。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有碰撞预警系统在罕见安全关键场景下性能不足，且缺乏可解释性和边缘部署能力。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个可扩展、高精度、可解释且适合边缘部署的碰撞预测系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于 V-JEPA2 微调，引入长尾基准和主动学习数据扩充，通过自监督预训练蒸馏为轻量模型，并利用视觉语言模型生成推理和注意力热图。
contributions: 提出包含10组罕见安全场景的长尾基准，并通过主动学习将数据集从4万扩展到17.85万标注视频。
通过知识蒸馏得到86M和22M的紧凑模型，实现7-12倍加速且精度接近，支持实时边缘部署。
BADAS-Reason 结合视觉语言模型生成驾驶员动作和结构化文本推理，BADAS-2.0 输出实时对象中心注意力热图。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到在长尾基准上所有子组均有一致提升，最难长尾案例改进最大，但未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能未在真实驾驶环境中进行大规模验证。
可解释性部分可能仅针对特定场景有效。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: BADAS-2.0 通过长尾基准、知识蒸馏和可解释性，实现了可扩展的碰撞预测与实时边缘部署。

papers.title: Improving Controllable Generation: Faster Training and Better Performance via $x_0$-Supervision
papers.abstract: Text-to-Image (T2I) diffusion/flow models have recently achieved remarkable progress in visual fidelity and text alignment. However, they remain limited when users need to precisely control image layouts, something that natural language alone cannot reliably express. Controllable generation methods augment the initial T2I model with additional conditions that more easily describe the scene. Prior works straightforwardly train the augmented network with the same loss as the initial network. Although natural at first glance, this can lead to very long training times in some cases before convergence. In this work, we revisit the training objective of controllable diffusion models through a detailed analysis of their denoising dynamics. We show that direct supervision on the clean target image, dubbed $x_0$-supervision, or an equivalent re-weighting of the diffusion loss, yields faster convergence. Experiments on multiple control settings demonstrate that our formulation accelerates convergence by up to 2$\times$ according to our novel metric (mean Area Under the Convergence Curve - mAUCC), while also improving both visual quality and conditioning accuracy. Our code is available at https://github.com/CEA-LIST/x0-supervision

analysis.tldr: 通过引入x0监督或等效损失重加权，加速可控扩散模型训练并提升生成质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有可控生成方法直接沿用原始扩散模型的训练损失，导致训练收敛缓慢，限制了实际应用效率。
analysis.problem: 可控扩散模型训练收敛慢，需要更高效的训练目标。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 直接使用原始扩散损失训练可控模型会导致收敛缓慢，而引入x0监督或等效损失重加权可加速收敛。
analysis.method: 提出x0监督（对干净目标图像的直接监督）或等效的扩散损失重加权，作为可控扩散模型的训练目标。
contributions: 通过分析去噪动力学，揭示了可控扩散模型训练收敛慢的原因，并提出x0监督作为解决方案。
提出新的收敛度量指标mAUCC，实验表明所提方法加速收敛达2倍，同时提升视觉质量和条件准确性。
analysis.experiments: 在多种控制设置下进行实验，使用新提出的mAUCC指标评估收敛速度，并报告了视觉质量和条件准确性的提升。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的可控条件，未在极端复杂场景下验证。
x0监督的理论分析可能依赖于特定假设，泛化性需进一步研究。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过引入x0监督或等效损失重加权，加速可控扩散模型训练并提升生成质量。

papers.title: CAKE: Cloud Architecture Knowledge Evaluation of Large Language Models
papers.abstract: In today's software architecture, large language models (LLMs) serve as software architecture co-pilots. However, no benchmark currently exists to evaluate large language models' actual understanding of cloud-native software architecture. For this reason we present a benchmark called CAKE, which consists of 188 expert-validated questions covering four cognitive levels of Bloom's revised taxonomy -- recall, analyze, design, and implement -- and five cloud-native topics. Evaluation is conducted on 22 model configurations (0.5B--70B parameters) across four LLM families, using three-run majority voting for multiple-choice questions (MCQs) and LLM-as-a-judge scoring for free-responses (FR). Based on this evaluation, four notable findings were identified. First, MCQ accuracy plateaus above 3B parameters, with the best model reaching 99.2\%. Second, free-response scores scale steadily across all cognitive levels. Third, the two formats capture different facets of knowledge, as the MCQ accuracy approaches a ceiling while free-responses continue to differentiate models. Finally, reasoning augmentation (+think) improves free-response quality, while tool augmentation (+tool) degrades performance for small models. These results suggest that the evaluation format fundamentally shapes how we measure architectural knowledge in LLMs.

analysis.tldr: CAKE 基准评估 LLM 云架构知识，发现 MCQ 准确率在 3B 参数以上饱和，而自由回答分数持续提升。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM 被用作软件架构副驾驶，但缺乏评估其对云原生架构理解的基准。
analysis.problem: 评估 LLM 对云原生软件架构的实际理解能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: MCQ 准确率在 3B 参数以上饱和，自由回答分数随模型规模提升；两种格式捕获不同知识维度；推理增强提升自由回答质量，工具增强降低小模型性能。
analysis.method: 构建包含 188 个专家验证问题的 CAKE 基准，覆盖 Bloom 认知层次和云原生主题，使用多数投票和 LLM-as-a-judge 评分。
contributions: 提出首个评估 LLM 云架构知识的基准 CAKE
发现 MCQ 和自由回答格式测量不同知识维度
analysis.experiments: 在 22 个模型配置（0.5B-70B）上评估，使用三回合多数投票和 LLM-as-a-judge 评分。
limitations: 基准规模较小（188 题）
仅评估云原生主题，可能不泛化到其他架构领域
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CAKE 基准评估 LLM 云架构知识，发现 MCQ 准确率在 3B 参数以上饱和，而自由回答分数持续提升。

papers.title: SVC 2026: the Second Multimodal Deception Detection Challenge and the First Domain Generalized Remote Physiological Measurement Challenge
papers.abstract: Subtle visual signals, although difficult to perceive with the naked eye, contain important information that can reveal hidden patterns in visual data. These signals play a key role in many applications, including biometric security, multimedia forensics, medical diagnosis, industrial inspection, and affective computing. With the rapid development of computer vision and representation learning techniques, detecting and interpreting such subtle signals has become an emerging research direction. However, existing studies often focus on specific tasks or modalities, and models still face challenges in robustness, representation ability, and generalization when handling subtle and weak signals in real-world environments. To promote research in this area, we organize the Subtle visual Challenge, which aims to learn robust representations for subtle visual signals. The challenge includes two tasks: cross-domain multimodal deception detection and remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) estimation. We hope that this challenge will encourage the development of more robust and generalizable models for subtle visual understanding, and further advance research in computer vision and multimodal learning. A total of 22 teams submitted their final results to this workshop competition, and the corresponding baseline models have been released on the \href{https://sites.google.com/view/svc-cvpr26}{MMDD2026 platform}\footnote{https://sites.google.com/view/svc-cvpr26}

analysis.tldr: SVC 2026挑战赛聚焦跨域多模态欺骗检测和远程生理测量，旨在推动微弱视觉信号的鲁棒表征学习。
analysis.research_motivation: 微弱视觉信号在生物识别、多媒体取证、医疗诊断等领域至关重要，但现有模型在真实环境下的鲁棒性、表征能力和泛化性不足，亟需系统性的挑战赛来推动研究。
analysis.problem: 如何提升模型对微弱视觉信号的鲁棒表征能力，特别是在跨域多模态欺骗检测和远程光电容积描记（rPPG）估计两个任务上。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 组织挑战赛，设置两个任务（跨域多模态欺骗检测和rPPG估计），提供基线模型和平台，吸引22支队伍提交结果。
contributions: 发起SVC 2026挑战赛，聚焦微弱视觉信号的鲁棒表征学习。
设立跨域多模态欺骗检测和rPPG估计两个任务，并发布基线模型。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 挑战赛结果可能受限于参赛队伍的方法多样性。
未提供基线模型的具体性能指标。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SVC 2026挑战赛聚焦跨域多模态欺骗检测和远程生理测量，旨在推动微弱视觉信号的鲁棒表征学习。

papers.title: On the Robustness of Diffusion-Based Image Compression to Bit-Flip Errors
papers.abstract: Modern image compression methods are typically optimized for the rate--distortion--perception trade-off, whereas their robustness to bit-level corruption is rarely examined. We show that diffusion-based compressors built on the Reverse Channel Coding (RCC) paradigm are substantially more robust to bit flips than classical and learned codecs. We further introduce a more robust variant of Turbo-DDCM that significantly improves robustness while only minimally affecting the rate--distortion--perception trade-off. Our findings suggest that RCC-based compression can yield more resilient compressed representations, potentially reducing reliance on error-correcting codes in highly noisy environments.

analysis.tldr: 扩散模型图像压缩对比特翻转错误具有显著鲁棒性，且可通过改进变体进一步提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代图像压缩方法通常优化率-失真-感知权衡，但很少考虑对比特级损坏的鲁棒性，而实际传输中比特翻转错误常见。
analysis.problem: 研究扩散模型图像压缩方法对比特翻转错误的鲁棒性，并改进其鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 基于反向信道编码（RCC）的扩散压缩器比经典和学习的编解码器对比特翻转更鲁棒。
analysis.method: 提出Turbo-DDCM的鲁棒变体，在几乎不影响率-失真-感知权衡的情况下显著提升鲁棒性。
contributions: 首次系统评估扩散图像压缩对比特翻转的鲁棒性
提出改进的Turbo-DDCM变体，增强鲁棒性且保持压缩性能
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定比特翻转模型，未考虑其他错误类型
改进变体可能增加计算复杂度
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 扩散模型图像压缩对比特翻转错误具有显著鲁棒性，且可通过改进变体进一步提升。

papers.title: ASSR-Net: Anisotropic Structure-Aware and Spectrally Recalibrated Network for Hyperspectral Image Fusion
papers.abstract: Hyperspectral image fusion aims to reconstruct high-spatial-resolution hyperspectral images (HR-HSI) by integrating complementary information from multi-source inputs. Despite recent progress, existing methods still face two critical challenges: (1) inadequate reconstruction of anisotropic spatial structures, resulting in blurred details and compromised spatial quality; and (2) spectral distortion during fusion, which hinders fine-grained spectral representation. To address these issues, we propose \textbf{ASSR-Net}: an Anisotropic Structure-Aware and Spectrally Recalibrated Network for Hyperspectral Image Fusion. ASSR-Net adopts a two-stage fusion strategy comprising anisotropic structure-aware spatial enhancement (ASSE) and hierarchical prior-guided spectral calibration (HPSC). In the first stage, a directional perception fusion module adaptively captures structural features along multiple orientations, effectively reconstructing anisotropic spatial patterns. In the second stage, a spectral recalibration module leverages the original low-resolution HSI as a spectral prior to explicitly correct spectral deviations in the fused results, thereby enhancing spectral fidelity. Extensive experiments on various benchmark datasets demonstrate that ASSR-Net consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, achieving superior spatial detail preservation and spectral consistency.

analysis.tldr: 提出ASSR-Net，通过各向异性结构感知和光谱重校准实现高光谱图像融合，在空间细节和光谱保真度上超越现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 高光谱图像融合中现有方法难以重建各向异性空间结构导致细节模糊，且融合过程存在光谱失真影响精细光谱表示。
analysis.problem: 如何同时提升高光谱图像融合的空间分辨率（尤其是各向异性结构）和光谱保真度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法在重建各向异性空间结构时效果不佳，导致细节模糊；光谱失真问题阻碍了精细光谱特征的保留。
analysis.method: 提出两阶段融合策略：第一阶段通过方向感知融合模块沿多方向自适应捕获结构特征重建各向异性空间模式；第二阶段利用原始低分辨率HSI作为光谱先验，通过光谱重校准模块显式校正融合结果中的光谱偏差。
contributions: 提出各向异性结构感知空间增强模块，有效重建各向异性空间模式。
设计层次先验引导的光谱校准模块，利用低分辨率HSI作为先验提升光谱保真度。
在多个基准数据集上达到最优性能，兼顾空间细节和光谱一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准数据集上与最先进方法比较，ASSR-Net在空间细节保留和光谱一致性上均表现更优。
limitations: 可能依赖特定传感器或数据配准质量。
两阶段策略可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ASSR-Net，通过各向异性结构感知和光谱重校准实现高光谱图像融合，在空间细节和光谱保真度上超越现有方法。

papers.title: FoleyDesigner: Immersive Stereo Foley Generation with Precise Spatio-Temporal Alignment for Film Clips
papers.abstract: Foley art plays a pivotal role in enhancing immersive auditory experiences in film, yet manual creation of spatio-temporally aligned audio remains labor-intensive. We propose FoleyDesigner, a novel framework inspired by professional Foley workflows, integrating film clip analysis, spatio-temporally controllable Foley generation, and professional audio mixing capabilities. FoleyDesigner employs a multi-agent architecture for precise spatio-temporal analysis. It achieves spatio-temporal alignment through latent diffusion models trained on spatio-temporal cues extracted from video frames, combined with large language model (LLM)-driven hybrid mechanisms that emulate post-production practices in film industry. To address the lack of high-quality stereo audio datasets in film, we introduce FilmStereo, the first professional stereo audio dataset containing spatial metadata, precise timestamps, and semantic annotations for eight common Foley categories. For applications, the framework supports interactive user control while maintaining seamless integration with professional pipelines, including 5.1-channel Dolby Atmos systems compliant with ITU-R BS.775 standards, thereby offering extensive creative flexibility. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves superior spatio-temporal alignment compared to existing baselines, with seamless compatibility with professional film production standards. The project page is available at https://gekiii996.github.io/FoleyDesigner/ .

analysis.tldr: 提出FoleyDesigner框架，通过多智能体分析和扩散模型实现电影片段中立体声Foley音效的精准时空对齐生成。
analysis.research_motivation: Foley音效对电影沉浸感至关重要，但手动创建时空对齐的音频耗时费力，现有方法缺乏对专业工作流的模拟和高质量立体声数据集。
analysis.problem: 如何自动生成与电影片段时空精确对齐的立体声Foley音效，并兼容专业后期制作流程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出FoleyDesigner框架，包含多智能体架构进行时空分析，利用基于视频帧时空线索训练的潜在扩散模型实现对齐，结合LLM驱动的混合机制模拟后期制作实践；同时构建FilmStereo数据集。
contributions: 提出FoleyDesigner框架，实现时空可控的立体声Foley生成，兼容专业音频标准。
构建FilmStereo数据集，包含空间元数据、精确时间戳和语义标注的八类常见Foley音效。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明方法在时空对齐上优于现有基线，并与专业电影制作标准无缝兼容。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量视频输入，对低质量视频鲁棒性未知。
数据集仅覆盖八类Foley，泛化到更多类别需扩展。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出FoleyDesigner框架，通过多智能体分析和扩散模型实现电影片段中立体声Foley音效的精准时空对齐生成。

papers.title: Single-Stage Signal Attenuation Diffusion Model for Low-Light Image Enhancement and Denoising
papers.abstract: Diffusion models excel at image restoration via probabilistic modeling of forward noise addition and reverse denoising, and their ability to handle complex noise while preserving fine details makes them well-suited for Low-Light Image Enhancement (LLIE). Mainstream diffusion based LLIE methods either adopt a two-stage pipeline or an auxiliary correction network to refine U-Net outputs, which severs the intrinsic link between enhancement and denoising and leads to suboptimal performance owing to inconsistent optimization objectives. To address these issues, we propose the Signal Attenuation Diffusion Model (SADM), a novel diffusion process that integrates the signal attenuation mechanism into the diffusion pipeline, enabling simultaneous brightness adjustment and noise suppression in a single stage. Specifically, the signal attenuation coefficient simulates the inherent signal attenuation of low-light degradation in the forward noise addition process, encoding the physical priors of low-light degradation to explicitly guide reverse denoising toward the concurrent optimization of brightness recovery and noise suppression, thereby eliminating the need for extra correction modules or staged training relied on by existing methods. We validate that our design maintains consistency with Denoising Diffusion Implicit Models(DDIM) via multi-scale pyramid sampling, balancing interpretability, restoration quality, and computational efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 提出信号衰减扩散模型(SADM)，通过将信号衰减机制融入扩散过程，实现单阶段低光图像增强与去噪。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有扩散模型用于低光图像增强时，常采用两阶段流程或辅助校正网络，割裂了增强与去噪的内在联系，导致优化目标不一致，性能次优。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个单阶段扩散模型，同时实现亮度调整和噪声抑制，避免两阶段或辅助校正网络的缺陷。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出信号衰减扩散模型(SADM)，在前向加噪过程中引入信号衰减系数模拟低光退化，编码物理先验，引导反向去噪同时优化亮度恢复和噪声抑制，并通过多尺度金字塔采样保持与DDIM的一致性。
contributions: 提出信号衰减扩散模型(SADM)，将信号衰减机制融入扩散管道，实现单阶段低光图像增强与去噪。
通过多尺度金字塔采样验证了设计保持与DDIM的一致性，平衡了解释性、恢复质量和计算效率。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅在特定低光场景下验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
多尺度金字塔采样的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出信号衰减扩散模型(SADM)，通过将信号衰减机制融入扩散过程，实现单阶段低光图像增强与去噪。

papers.title: Beyond Semantics: Disentangling Information Scope in Sparse Autoencoders for CLIP
papers.abstract: Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) have emerged as a powerful tool for interpreting the internal representations of CLIP vision encoders, yet existing analyses largely focus on the semantic meaning of individual features. We introduce information scope as a complementary dimension of interpretability that characterizes how broadly an SAE feature aggregates visual evidence, ranging from localized, patch-specific cues to global, image-level signals. We observe that some SAE features respond consistently across spatial perturbations, while others shift unpredictably with minor input changes, indicating a fundamental distinction in their underlying scope. To quantify this, we propose the Contextual Dependency Score (CDS), which separates positionally stable local scope features from positionally variant global scope features. Our experiments show that features of different information scopes exert systematically different influences on CLIP's predictions and confidence. These findings establish information scope as a critical new axis for understanding CLIP representations and provide a deeper diagnostic view of SAE-derived features.

analysis.tldr: 提出信息范围作为CLIP稀疏自编码器特征可解释性的新维度，并设计上下文依赖分数（CDS）来量化特征的空间聚合范围。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有稀疏自编码器（SAE）分析主要关注特征的语义含义，忽略了特征在空间上聚合视觉信息的范围这一重要维度，限制了我们对CLIP内部表征的全面理解。
analysis.problem: 如何定义和量化SAE特征的信息范围，并揭示不同范围特征对CLIP预测行为的影响差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到部分SAE特征在空间扰动下响应一致（局部范围），而另一些特征随输入微小变化而不可预测地偏移（全局范围），表明存在根本性的范围差异。
analysis.method: 提出上下文依赖分数（CDS），通过测量特征对空间扰动的稳定性来区分位置稳定的局部范围特征和位置变化的全局范围特征。
contributions: 引入信息范围作为SAE特征可解释性的互补维度，超越传统语义分析。
提出CDS指标量化特征的空间聚合范围，并实验验证不同范围特征对CLIP预测和置信度的系统性影响。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: CDS可能依赖于特定的空间扰动方式，泛化性需进一步验证。
未探讨信息范围与语义含义之间的交互关系。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出信息范围作为CLIP稀疏自编码器特征可解释性的新维度，并设计上下文依赖分数（CDS）来量化特征的空间聚合范围。

papers.title: GaussianGrow: Geometry-aware Gaussian Growing from 3D Point Clouds with Text Guidance
papers.abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting has demonstrated superior performance in rendering efficiency and quality, yet the generation of 3D Gaussians still remains a challenge without proper geometric priors. Existing methods have explored predicting point maps as geometric references for inferring Gaussian primitives, while the unreliable estimated geometries may lead to poor generations. In this work, we introduce GaussianGrow, a novel approach that generates 3D Gaussians by learning to grow them from easily accessible 3D point clouds, naturally enforcing geometric accuracy in Gaussian generation. Specifically, we design a text-guided Gaussian growing scheme that leverages a multi-view diffusion model to synthesize consistent appearances from input point clouds for supervision. To mitigate artifacts caused by fusing neighboring views, we constrain novel views generated at non-preset camera poses identified in overlapping regions across different views. For completing the hard-to-observe regions, we propose to iteratively detect the camera pose by observing the largest un-grown regions in point clouds and inpainting them by inpainting the rendered view with a pretrained 2D diffusion model. The process continues until complete Gaussians are generated. We extensively evaluate GaussianGrow on text-guided Gaussian generation from synthetic and even real-scanned point clouds. Project Page: https://weiqi-zhang.github.io/GaussianGrow

analysis.tldr: 从3D点云出发，通过多视图扩散模型和迭代修补逐步生成几何准确的3D高斯体。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D高斯泼溅在渲染效率和质量上表现优异，但现有方法依赖不可靠的几何先验（如预测点图）来生成高斯体，导致生成质量差。
analysis.problem: 如何从易获取的3D点云出发，生成几何准确且外观一致的3D高斯体，避免因几何估计不准导致的生成缺陷。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 设计文本引导的高斯生长方案：利用多视图扩散模型从输入点云合成一致外观作为监督；通过约束非预设视角的生成视图来减轻相邻视图融合伪影；迭代检测点云中最大未生长区域并利用预训练2D扩散模型修补渲染视图，直至生成完整高斯体。
contributions: 提出GaussianGrow，一种从3D点云学习生长3D高斯体的新方法，天然保证几何准确性。
设计文本引导的高斯生长方案，结合多视图扩散模型和迭代修补策略，实现从合成和真实扫描点云生成完整高斯体。
analysis.experiments: 在文本引导的3D高斯生成任务上，对合成和真实扫描点云进行了广泛评估。
limitations: 依赖多视图扩散模型和2D扩散模型，可能受限于预训练模型的泛化能力。
迭代修补过程可能计算开销较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 从3D点云出发，通过多视图扩散模型和迭代修补逐步生成几何准确的3D高斯体。

papers.title: Hackers or Hallucinators? A Comprehensive Analysis of LLM-Based Automated Penetration Testing
papers.abstract: The rapid advancement of Large Language Models (LLMs) has created new opportunities for Automated Penetration Testing (AutoPT), spawning numerous frameworks aimed at achieving end-to-end autonomous attacks. However, despite the proliferation of related studies, existing research generally lacks systematic architectural analysis and large-scale empirical comparisons under a unified benchmark. Therefore, this paper presents the first Systematization of Knowledge (SoK) focusing on the architectural design and comprehensive empirical evaluation of current LLM-based AutoPT frameworks. At systematization level, we comprehensively review existing framework designs across six dimensions: agent architecture, agent plan, agent memory, agent execution, external knowledge, and benchmarks. At empirical level, we conduct large-scale experiments on 13 representative open-source AutoPT frameworks and 2 baseline frameworks utilizing a unified benchmark. The experiments consumed over 10 billion tokens in total and generated more than 1,500 execution logs, which were manually reviewed and analyzed over four months by a panel of more than 15 researchers with expertise in cybersecurity. By investigating the latest progress in this rapidly developing field, we provide researchers with a structured taxonomy to understand existing LLM-based AutoPT frameworks and a large-scale empirical benchmark, along with promising directions for future research.

analysis.tldr: 首个系统化梳理LLM自动化渗透测试框架的SoK论文，通过大规模统一基准实验揭示现有框架的架构差异与性能瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM驱动的自动化渗透测试（AutoPT）研究快速增长，但缺乏统一的架构分析和大规模实证比较，导致难以评估不同框架的真实能力与局限性。
analysis.problem: 现有LLM-based AutoPT研究缺乏系统化的架构分类和标准化基准下的实证评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，仅指出当前研究缺乏系统性架构分析和统一基准下的实证比较。
analysis.method: 提出首个系统化知识（SoK），从代理架构、规划、记忆、执行、外部知识和基准六个维度对现有框架进行分类，并在统一基准上对13个开源AutoPT框架和2个基线框架进行大规模实验（消耗超100亿token，生成1500+执行日志，由15+网络安全专家人工审查）。
contributions: 首次对LLM-based AutoPT框架进行系统化知识梳理，提出六维分类法。
构建大规模统一基准并完成实证评估，提供结构化分类法和未来研究方向。
analysis.experiments: 在统一基准上对13个开源AutoPT框架和2个基线框架进行实验，总token消耗超100亿，生成1500+执行日志，由15+网络安全专家人工审查分析。
limitations: 实验仅覆盖开源框架，可能未包含商业或未公开的框架。
基准环境可能无法完全代表真实渗透测试场景的复杂性。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个系统化梳理LLM自动化渗透测试框架的SoK论文，通过大规模统一基准实验揭示现有框架的架构差异与性能瓶颈。

papers.title: MPM: Mutual Pair Merging for Efficient Vision Transformers
papers.abstract: Decreasing sequence length is a common way to accelerate transformers, but prior token reduction work often targets classification and reports proxy metrics rather than end-to-end latency. For semantic segmentation, token reduction is further constrained by the need to reconstruct dense, pixel-aligned features, and on modern accelerators the overhead of computing merge maps can erase expected gains. We propose Mutual Pair Merging (MPM), a training-free token aggregation module that forms mutual nearest-neighbor pairs in cosine space, averages each pair, and records a merge map enabling a gather-based reconstruction before the decoder so that existing segmentation heads can be used unchanged. MPM introduces no learned parameters and no continuous compression knob (no keep-rate or threshold). The speed-accuracy trade-off is set by a discrete insertion schedule. We benchmark end-to-end latency on an NVIDIA H100 GPU (with and without FlashAttention-2) and a Raspberry Pi 5 across standard segmentation datasets. On ADE20K, MPM reduces per-image latency by up to 60% for ViT-Tiny on Raspberry Pi 5, and increases throughput by up to 20% on H100 with FlashAttention-2 while keeping the mIoU drop below 3%. These results suggest that simple, reconstruction-aware, training-free token merging can translate into practical wall-clock gains for segmentation when overhead is explicitly accounted for.

analysis.tldr: 提出无训练、无参数的互对合并模块，通过余弦空间最近邻配对与合并加速视觉Transformer语义分割，在保持精度下降<3%的同时实现最高60%延迟降低。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有token缩减方法多针对分类任务，且常报告代理指标而非端到端延迟；语义分割需要重建密集像素对齐特征，且合并图计算开销可能抵消加速收益。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种训练无关、无参数、低开销的token合并方法，在语义分割中实现实际端到端加速并保持高精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Mutual Pair Merging (MPM)，在余弦空间中形成互最近邻对，平均每对token并记录合并图，解码器前通过gather操作重建特征，无需学习参数和连续压缩旋钮，通过离散插入调度控制速度-精度权衡。
contributions: 提出MPM，一种训练无关、无参数、重建感知的token合并模块，可直接加速现有语义分割模型。
在多种硬件（H100、Raspberry Pi 5）和数据集上验证端到端延迟收益，显示实际加速效果。
analysis.experiments: 在ADE20K等标准分割数据集上，使用NVIDIA H100（含FlashAttention-2）和Raspberry Pi 5进行端到端延迟基准测试。ViT-Tiny在Raspberry Pi 5上每张图像延迟降低高达60%，在H100+FlashAttention-2上吞吐量提升高达20%，mIoU下降低于3%。
limitations: 仅适用于语义分割任务，未验证在其他密集预测任务（如检测、实例分割）上的效果。
合并策略基于余弦相似度，可能对特征分布敏感，未讨论极端情况下的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无训练、无参数的互对合并模块，通过余弦空间最近邻配对与合并加速视觉Transformer语义分割，在保持精度下降<3%的同时实现最高60%延迟降低。

papers.title: Can Large Language Models Reinvent Foundational Algorithms?
papers.abstract: LLMs have shown strong potential to advance scientific discovery. Whether they possess the capacity for foundational innovation, however, remains an open question. In this work, we focus on a prerequisite for foundational innovation: can LLMs reinvent foundational algorithms in computer science? Our \textit{Unlearn-and-Reinvent} pipeline applies LLM unlearning to remove a specific foundational algorithm, such as Dijkstra's or Euclid's algorithm, from an LLM's pretrained knowledge, and then tests whether the model can reinvent it in a controlled environment. To enable effective unlearning, we adopt a GRPO-based, on-policy unlearning method. Across 10 target algorithms, 3 strong open-weight models, and 3 hint levels, our experiments demonstrate that (1) the strongest model Qwen3-4B-Thinking-2507 successfully reinvents 50% of the algorithms with no hint, 70% at hint level 1, and 90% at hint level 2; (2) a few high-level hints can enhance the reinvention success rate, but even step-by-step hints fail for those complicated algorithms; and (3) test-time reinforcement learning enables successful reinvention for the Strassen algorithm at hint level 2. Through analyses of output trajectories and ablation studies, we find that generative verifier in the reinvention phase plays a critical role in sustaining models' reasoning strength, helping to avoid the ``thought collapse'' phenomenon. These findings offer insights into both the potential and current limits of LLMs' innovative thinking.

analysis.tldr: LLM能否在遗忘后重新发明基础算法？实验表明最强模型在无提示下成功率达50%。
analysis.research_motivation: 探索LLM是否具备基础创新能力，这对科学发现至关重要，但现有研究尚未明确。
analysis.problem: 评估LLM在遗忘特定基础算法后，能否在受控环境中重新发明该算法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：1) 最强模型Qwen3-4B-Thinking-2507在无提示下成功重新发明50%的算法，提示级别提高成功率提升；2) 即使逐步提示，复杂算法仍失败；3) 测试时强化学习帮助Strassen算法在提示级别2成功；4) 生成验证器在重新发明阶段防止“思维崩溃”。
analysis.method: 提出Unlearn-and-Reinvent流程：先用基于GRPO的在线策略遗忘方法从LLM中移除特定算法知识，再在受控环境中测试模型能否重新发明该算法。
contributions: 提出Unlearn-and-Reinvent评估框架，用于测试LLM的基础算法创新能力。
通过10种算法、3个模型和3个提示级别的实验，揭示了LLM创新能力的潜力与当前局限。
analysis.experiments: 在10种目标算法、3个强开源模型和3个提示级别上进行实验，报告了成功率等结果。
limitations: 仅测试了基础算法，未涉及更复杂的创新任务。
遗忘方法可能不完全，残留知识影响评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM能否在遗忘后重新发明基础算法？实验表明最强模型在无提示下成功率达50%。

papers.title: In Depth We Trust: Reliable Monocular Depth Supervision for Gaussian Splatting
papers.abstract: Using accurate depth priors in 3D Gaussian Splatting helps mitigate artifacts caused by sparse training data and textureless surfaces. However, acquiring accurate depth maps requires specialized acquisition systems. Foundation monocular depth estimation models offer a cost-effective alternative, but they suffer from scale ambiguity, multi-view inconsistency, and local geometric inaccuracies, which can degrade rendering performance when applied naively. This paper addresses the challenge of reliably leveraging monocular depth priors for Gaussian Splatting (GS) rendering enhancement. To this end, we introduce a training framework integrating scale-ambiguous and noisy depth priors into geometric supervision. We highlight the importance of learning from weakly aligned depth variations. We introduce a method to isolate ill-posed geometry for selective monocular depth regularization, restricting the propagation of depth inaccuracies into well-reconstructed 3D structures. Extensive experiments across diverse datasets show consistent improvements in geometric accuracy, leading to more faithful depth estimation and higher rendering quality across different GS variants and monocular depth backbones tested.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种可靠利用单目深度先验的3D高斯泼溅训练框架，通过选择性正则化提升几何精度与渲染质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D高斯泼溅依赖精确深度先验来缓解稀疏数据和无纹理表面的伪影，但获取精确深度图需要专用采集系统，成本高；单目深度估计模型虽廉价但存在尺度模糊、多视角不一致和局部几何不准确等问题，直接使用会降低渲染性能。
analysis.problem: 如何可靠地将尺度模糊且有噪声的单目深度先验集成到高斯泼溅的几何监督中，以提升渲染质量而不引入伪影。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出单目深度先验存在尺度模糊、多视角不一致和局部几何不准确，直接使用会降低渲染性能；同时强调学习弱对齐深度变化的重要性。
analysis.method: 提出一个训练框架，通过选择性正则化隔离病态几何区域，仅对难以重建的区域施加单目深度约束，从而防止深度误差传播到已良好重建的3D结构。
contributions: 提出一种可靠利用单目深度先验的高斯泼溅训练框架，通过选择性正则化提升几何精度。
在多个数据集上验证了该方法在不同GS变体和单目深度骨干网络下的一致改进。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上进行广泛实验，显示几何精度和渲染质量的一致提升。
limitations: 可能依赖单目深度估计模型的泛化能力，在极端场景下仍可能引入误差。
选择性正则化的阈值或策略可能需要针对不同场景调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种可靠利用单目深度先验的3D高斯泼溅训练框架，通过选择性正则化提升几何精度与渲染质量。

papers.title: SemLink: A Semantic-Aware Automated Test Oracle for Hyperlink Verification using Siamese Sentence-BERT
papers.abstract: Web applications rely heavily on hyperlinks to connect disparate information resources. However, the dynamic nature of the web leads to link rot, where targets become unavailable, and more insidiously, semantic drift, where a valid HTTP 200 connection exists, but the target content no longer aligns with the source context. Traditional verification tools, which primarily function as crash oracles by checking HTTP status codes, often fail to detect semantic inconsistencies, thereby compromising web integrity and user experience. While Large Language Models (LLMs) offer semantic understanding, they suffer from high latency, privacy concerns, and prohibitive costs for large-scale regression testing. In this paper, we propose SemLink, a novel automated test oracle for semantic hyperlink verification. SemLink leverages a Siamese Neural Network architecture powered by a pre-trained Sentence-BERT (SBERT) backbone to compute the semantic coherence between a hyperlink's source context (anchor text, surrounding DOM elements, and visual features) and its target page content. To train and evaluate our model, we introduce the Hyperlink-Webpage Positive Pairs (HWPPs) dataset, a rigorously constructed corpus of over 60,000 semantic pairs. Our evaluation demonstrates that SemLink achieves a Recall of 96.00%, comparable to state-of-the-art LLMs (GPT-5.2), while operating approximately 47.5 times faster and requiring significantly fewer computational resources. This work bridges the gap between traditional syntactic checkers and expensive generative AI, offering a robust and efficient solution for automated web quality assurance.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于Sentence-BERT的语义感知超链接验证工具SemLink，比LLM快47.5倍且召回率相当。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统超链接验证仅检查HTTP状态码，无法检测语义漂移（链接有效但内容不匹配），而LLM虽能理解语义但延迟高、成本大、有隐私风险，不适合大规模回归测试。
analysis.problem: 如何高效、低成本地自动检测超链接的语义一致性（源上下文与目标页面内容是否对齐）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用Siamese神经网络架构，以预训练Sentence-BERT为骨干，计算超链接源上下文（锚文本、周围DOM元素、视觉特征）与目标页面内容的语义相似度。
contributions: 提出SemLink，首个语义感知的超链接自动测试预言，兼顾效率与准确性。
构建HWPPs数据集，包含超过6万对语义配对，用于训练和评估。
analysis.experiments: 在HWPPs数据集上评估，SemLink召回率达96.00%，与GPT-5.2相当，但速度快约47.5倍且计算资源需求更低。
limitations: 可能依赖特定网页结构（DOM、视觉特征），对动态或复杂页面泛化性待验证。
仅评估了召回率，未报告精确率或F1分数，可能存在误报。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于Sentence-BERT的语义感知超链接验证工具SemLink，比LLM快47.5倍且召回率相当。

papers.title: DosimeTron: Automating Personalized Monte Carlo Radiation Dosimetry in PET/CT with Agentic AI
papers.abstract: Purpose: To develop and evaluate DosimeTron, an agentic AI system for automated patient-specific MC internal radiation dosimetry in PET/CT examinations. Materials and Methods: In this retrospective study, DosimeTron was evaluated on a publicly available PSMA-PET/CT dataset comprising 597 studies from 378 male patients acquired on three scanner models (18-F, n = 369; 68-Ga, n = 228). The system uses GPT-5.2 as its reasoning engine and 23 tools exposed via four Model Context Protocol servers, automating DICOM metadata extraction, image preprocessing, MC simulation, organ segmentation, and dosimetric reporting through natural-language interaction. Agentic performance was assessed using diverse prompt templates spanning single-turn instructions of varying specificity and multi-turn conversational exchanges, monitored via OpenTelemetry traces. Dosimetric accuracy was validated against OpenDose3D across 114 cases and 22 organs using Pearson's r, Lin's concordance correlation coefficient (CCC), and Bland-Altman analysis. Results: Across all prompt templates and all runs, no execution failures, pipeline errors, or hallucinated outputs were observed. Pearson's r ranged from 0.965 to 1.000 (median 0.997; all p < 0.001) and CCC from 0.963 to 1.000 (median 0.996). Mean absolute percentage difference was below 5% for 19 of 22 organs (median 2.5%). Total per-study processing time (SD) was 32.3 (6.0) minutes. Conclusion: DosimeTron autonomously executed complex dosimetry pipelines across diverse prompt configurations and achieved high dosimetric agreement with OpenDose3D at clinically acceptable processing times, demonstrating the feasibility of agentic AI for patient-specific Monte Carlo dosimetry in PET/CT.

analysis.tldr: 提出DosimeTron，一个基于Agent AI的自动化PET/CT患者特异性蒙特卡罗辐射剂量测定系统，在公开数据集上验证了高精度和临床可接受的处理时间。
analysis.research_motivation: 患者特异性内部辐射剂量测定在PET/CT中至关重要，但传统蒙特卡罗模拟需要大量手动操作和专业知识，自动化程度低，限制了临床广泛应用。
analysis.problem: 如何利用Agent AI自动完成PET/CT检查中患者特异性蒙特卡罗辐射剂量测定的全流程，包括DICOM元数据提取、图像预处理、MC模拟、器官分割和剂量报告生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: DosimeTron系统以GPT-5.2为推理引擎，通过四个Model Context Protocol服务器暴露23个工具，实现自然语言交互驱动的自动化剂量测定流程。
contributions: 首次将Agent AI应用于PET/CT患者特异性蒙特卡罗辐射剂量测定，实现全流程自动化。
在597例PSMA-PET/CT数据集上验证了系统的高准确性（Pearson's r中位数0.997）和鲁棒性（无执行失败或幻觉输出）。
analysis.experiments: 在公开PSMA-PET/CT数据集（597例，378名患者）上评估，使用多种提示模板（单轮和多轮对话），与OpenDose3D在114例22个器官上对比，Pearson's r 0.965-1.000，CCC 0.963-1.000，平均绝对百分比差异中位数2.5%，每例处理时间32.3分钟。
limitations: 仅基于单一数据集（PSMA-PET/CT）和特定放射性示踪剂（18-F, 68-Ga），泛化性需进一步验证。
依赖GPT-5.2作为推理引擎，可能受限于模型更新和API可用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DosimeTron，一个基于Agent AI的自动化PET/CT患者特异性蒙特卡罗辐射剂量测定系统，在公开数据集上验证了高精度和临床可接受的处理时间。

papers.title: QA-MoE: Towards a Continuous Reliability Spectrum with Quality-Aware Mixture of Experts for Robust Multimodal Sentiment Analysis
papers.abstract: Multimodal Sentiment Analysis (MSA) aims to infer human sentiment from textual, acoustic, and visual signals. In real-world scenarios, however, multimodal inputs are often compromised by dynamic noise or modality missingness. Existing methods typically treat these imperfections as discrete cases or assume fixed corruption ratios, which limits their adaptability to continuously varying reliability conditions. To address this, we first introduce a Continuous Reliability Spectrum to unify missingness and quality degradation into a single framework. Building on this, we propose QA-MoE, a Quality-Aware Mixture-of-Experts framework that quantifies modality reliability via self-supervised aleatoric uncertainty. This mechanism explicitly guides expert routing, enabling the model to suppress error propagation from unreliable signals while preserving task-relevant information. Extensive experiments indicate that QA-MoE achieves competitive or state-of-the-art performance across diverse degradation scenarios and exhibits a promising One-Checkpoint-for-All property in practice.

analysis.tldr: 提出QA-MoE框架，通过自监督偶然不确定性量化模态可靠性，实现多模态情感分析在动态噪声和缺失下的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态情感分析中，真实场景的输入常受动态噪声或模态缺失影响，现有方法将这些问题视为离散情况或假设固定损坏比例，难以适应连续变化的可靠性条件。
analysis.problem: 如何统一处理多模态输入中连续变化的噪声和缺失，并动态抑制不可靠信号传播。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出连续可靠性谱（Continuous Reliability Spectrum）统一缺失和质量退化，基于此构建QA-MoE框架，通过自监督偶然不确定性量化模态可靠性，并显式指导专家路由。
contributions: 引入连续可靠性谱，统一处理模态缺失和质量退化。
提出QA-MoE框架，利用自监督偶然不确定性量化可靠性并指导专家路由。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模态的预训练特征。
在极端噪声下不确定性估计可能不准确。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出QA-MoE框架，通过自监督偶然不确定性量化模态可靠性，实现多模态情感分析在动态噪声和缺失下的鲁棒性。

papers.title: CareGuardAI: Context-Aware Multi-Agent Guardrails for Clinical Safety & Hallucination Mitigation in Patient-Facing LLMs
papers.abstract: Integrating large language models (LLMs) into patient-facing healthcare systems offers significant potential to improve access to medical information. However, ensuring clinical safety and factual reliability remains a critical challenge. In practice, AI-generated responses may be conditionally correct yet medically inappropriate, as models often fail to interpret patient context and tend to produce agreeable responses rather than challenge unsafe assumptions. Unlike clinicians, who infer risk from incomplete information, LLMs frequently lack contextual awareness. Moreover, real-world patient interactions are open-ended and underspecified, unlike structured benchmark settings. We present CareGuardAI, a risk-aware safety framework for patient-facing medical question answering that addresses two key failure modes: clinical safety risk and hallucination risk. The framework introduces Clinical Safety Risk Assessment (SRA), inspired by ISO 14971, and Hallucination Risk Assessment (HRA) to evaluate medical risk and factual reliability. At inference time, CareGuardAI employs a multi-stage pipeline consisting of a controller agent, safety-constrained generation, and dual risk evaluation, followed by iterative refinement when necessary. Responses are released only when both SRA and HRA are less than or equal to 2, ensuring clinically acceptable outputs with bounded latency. We evaluate CareGuardAI on PatientSafeBench, MedSafetyBench, and MedHallu, covering both safety and hallucination detection. Across these benchmarks, the framework consistently outperforms strong baseline models, including GPT-4o-mini, demonstrating the importance of context-aware, risk-based, inference-time safety mechanisms for reliable deployment in healthcare.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个面向患者的医疗LLM安全框架，通过上下文感知的多智能体护栏降低临床安全和幻觉风险。
analysis.research_motivation: 将LLM集成到面向患者的医疗系统中有望改善医疗信息获取，但临床安全性和事实可靠性是关键挑战；现有模型缺乏上下文感知，容易生成条件正确但医学上不合适的回答。
analysis.problem: 解决患者面对LLM时的临床安全风险和幻觉风险，确保输出在临床可接受范围内。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出LLM生成的回答可能条件正确但医学上不合适，模型常无法解释患者上下文，倾向于生成同意性回答而非挑战不安全假设，且真实患者交互是开放式的，与结构化基准不同。
analysis.method: 提出CareGuardAI框架，包含临床安全风险评估（SRA）和幻觉风险评估（HRA），采用多阶段流水线：控制器智能体、安全约束生成、双重风险评估，必要时迭代优化，仅当SRA和HRA均≤2时释放响应。
contributions: 提出面向患者的医疗问答风险感知安全框架CareGuardAI，同时处理临床安全和幻觉风险。
引入基于ISO 14971的临床安全风险评估和幻觉风险评估机制，实现推理时安全约束。
analysis.experiments: 在PatientSafeBench、MedSafetyBench和MedHallu三个基准上评估，覆盖安全和幻觉检测，框架一致优于GPT-4o-mini等强基线模型。
limitations: 摘要未提及对罕见病或复杂病例的泛化能力。
可能依赖高质量的风险评估模型，其准确性影响整体性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个面向患者的医疗LLM安全框架，通过上下文感知的多智能体护栏降低临床安全和幻觉风险。

papers.title: Let Geometry GUIDE: Layer-wise Unrolling of Geometric Priors in Multimodal LLMs
papers.abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable progress in 2D visual tasks but still exhibit limited physical spatial awareness when processing real-world visual streams. Recently, feed-forward geometric foundation models, which implicitly extract geometric priors, have provided a new pathway to address this issue. However, existing geometry-aware MLLMs are predominantly constrained by the paradigm of single deep-layer extraction and input-level fusion. This flattened fusion leads to the loss of local geometric details and causes semantic mismatches in the early layers. To break this bottleneck, we propose GUIDE (Geometric Unrolling Inside MLLM Early-layers), a progressive geometric priors injection framework. GUIDE performs multi-level sampling within the geometric encoder, comprehensively capturing multi-granularity features ranging from local edges to global topologies. Subsequently, we rigorously align and fuse these multi-level geometric priors step-by-step with the early layers of the MLLM. Building upon the injection of multi-granularity geometric information, this design guides the model to progressively learn the 2D-to-3D transitional process. Furthermore, we introduce a context-aware gating that enables the model to fetch requisite spatial cues based on current semantics, thereby maximizing the utilization efficiency of spatial priors and effectively suppressing redundant geometric noise. Extensive experiments demonstrate that GUIDE significantly outperforms existing baselines on multiple complex spatial reasoning and perception tasks, establishing a novel paradigm for integrating 3D geometric priors into large models.

analysis.tldr: 提出渐进式几何先验注入框架GUIDE，通过多层展开融合多粒度几何特征，提升多模态大模型的空间感知能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MLLM在2D视觉任务中表现优异，但处理真实世界视觉流时物理空间感知有限；现有几何感知MLLM受限于单层深度提取和输入级融合范式，导致局部几何细节丢失和早期层语义不匹配。
analysis.problem: 如何有效将多粒度几何先验逐步注入MLLM早期层，以增强模型的空间推理和感知能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出单层深度提取和输入级融合导致局部几何细节丢失和早期层语义不匹配，说明现有融合方式存在信息损失和语义冲突。
analysis.method: 提出GUIDE框架，包含：1) 在几何编码器内进行多级采样，捕获从局部边缘到全局拓扑的多粒度特征；2) 将这些多级几何先验与MLLM早期层逐步对齐和融合；3) 引入上下文感知门控，根据当前语义获取所需空间线索，抑制冗余几何噪声。
contributions: 提出渐进式几何先验注入框架GUIDE，突破单层深度提取和输入级融合的局限。
设计多级采样和逐步对齐融合机制，使模型渐进学习2D到3D的转换过程。
引入上下文感知门控，提高空间先验利用效率并抑制噪声。
analysis.experiments: 在多个复杂空间推理和感知任务上，GUIDE显著优于现有基线。摘要未提供具体实验细节。
limitations: 可能依赖特定几何编码器，泛化性需验证。
渐进式融合可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出渐进式几何先验注入框架GUIDE，通过多层展开融合多粒度几何特征，提升多模态大模型的空间感知能力。

papers.title: CRFT: Consistent-Recurrent Feature Flow Transformer for Cross-Modal Image Registration
papers.abstract: We present Consistent-Recurrent Feature Flow Transformer (CRFT), a unified coarse-to-fine framework based on feature flow learning for robust cross-modal image registration. CRFT learns a modality-independent feature flow representation within a transformer-based architecture that jointly performs feature alignment and flow estimation. The coarse stage establishes global correspondences through multi-scale feature correlation, while the fine stage refines local details via hierarchical feature fusion and adaptive spatial reasoning. To enhance geometric adaptability, an iterative discrepancy-guided attention mechanism with a Spatial Geometric Transform (SGT) recurrently refines the flow field, progressively capturing subtle spatial inconsistencies and enforcing feature-level consistency. This design enables accurate alignment under large affine and scale variations while maintaining structural coherence across modalities. Extensive experiments on diverse cross-modal datasets demonstrate that CRFT consistently outperforms state-of-the-art registration methods in both accuracy and robustness. Beyond registration, CRFT provides a generalizable paradigm for multimodal spatial correspondence, offering broad applicability to remote sensing, autonomous navigation, and medical imaging. Code and datasets are publicly available at https://github.com/NEU-Liuxuecong/CRFT.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于特征流学习的统一粗到细框架CRFT，用于鲁棒的跨模态图像配准。
analysis.research_motivation: 跨模态图像配准面临模态差异、几何形变和尺度变化等挑战，现有方法在准确性和鲁棒性上仍有不足。
analysis.problem: 解决跨模态图像配准中特征对齐和流估计的联合优化问题，提升大仿射和尺度变化下的配准精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于Transformer的粗到细框架，粗阶段通过多尺度特征相关建立全局对应，细阶段通过层次特征融合和自适应空间推理细化局部细节，并引入迭代差异引导注意力机制和空间几何变换（SGT）循环优化流场。
contributions: 提出CRFT，一种基于特征流学习的统一粗到细跨模态图像配准框架。
设计迭代差异引导注意力机制和空间几何变换模块，增强几何适应性并保持特征一致性。
在多个跨模态数据集上取得优于现有方法的配准精度和鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个跨模态数据集上进行了实验，CRFT在准确性和鲁棒性上持续优于最先进方法。
limitations: 可能对极端大形变或严重模态差异的配准仍有挑战。
计算复杂度可能较高，影响实时应用。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于特征流学习的统一粗到细框架CRFT，用于鲁棒的跨模态图像配准。

papers.title: Attention Editing: A Versatile Framework for Cross-Architecture Attention Conversion
papers.abstract: Key-Value (KV) cache memory and bandwidth increasingly dominate large language model inference cost in long-context and long-generation regimes. Architectures such as multi-head latent attention (MLA) and hybrid sliding-window attention (SWA) can alleviate this bound, but integrating them into existing models remains difficult. Prior methods impose fine-grained structural requirements on both source and target attention modules, which cannot meet the feasible requirement in practical deployment. We present Attention Editing, a practical framework for converting already-trained large language models (LLMs) with new attention architectures without re-pretraining from scratch. Attention editing replaces the original attention with a learnable target module and trains it using progressive distillation, consisting of (1) layer-wise teacher-forced optimization with intermediate activation supervision to prevent cold-start error accumulation, and (2) model-level distillation on next-token distributions, optionally regularized by weak feature matching. We instantiate the framework on two different target--MLA and GateSWA, a gated hybrid SWA design, and apply it to Qwen3-8B and Qwen3-30B-A3B. The resulting models maintain competitive performance while delivering substantial efficiency improvements, demonstrating that large-scale attention conversion is both feasible and robust. Notably, experiments are conducted on an Ascend 910B clusters, offering a practical training case study on domestic hardware.

analysis.tldr: 提出Attention Editing框架，通过渐进蒸馏将预训练LLM的注意力架构转换为MLA或混合SWA，无需从头预训练。
analysis.research_motivation: 长上下文和长生成场景下KV缓存成为LLM推理瓶颈，MLA和混合SWA等高效架构难以直接集成到现有模型中，现有方法对源和目标注意力模块有细粒度结构要求，实际部署困难。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重新预训练的情况下，将已训练的LLM的注意力模块转换为新的高效架构（如MLA、混合SWA）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Attention Editing框架，用可学习的目标注意力模块替换原始注意力，通过渐进蒸馏训练：1）逐层教师强制优化，使用中间激活监督防止冷启动误差累积；2）模型级蒸馏优化下一个token分布，可选弱特征匹配正则化。
contributions: 提出Attention Editing框架，实现跨架构注意力转换，无需重新预训练。
在Qwen3-8B和Qwen3-30B-A3B上成功转换为MLA和GateSWA架构，保持竞争力并提升效率。
analysis.experiments: 在Ascend 910B集群上对Qwen3-8B和Qwen3-30B-A3B进行实验，转换为MLA和GateSWA架构，模型保持竞争力并显著提升效率。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定架构转换，泛化性需进一步验证。
渐进蒸馏的训练成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Attention Editing框架，通过渐进蒸馏将预训练LLM的注意力架构转换为MLA或混合SWA，无需从头预训练。

papers.title: 3D Smoke Scene Reconstruction Guided by Vision Priors from Multimodal Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Reconstructing 3D scenes from smoke-degraded multi-view images is particularly difficult because smoke introduces strong scattering effects, view-dependent appearance changes, and severe degradation of cross-view consistency. To address these issues, we propose a framework that integrates visual priors with efficient 3D scene modeling. We employ Nano-Banana-Pro to enhance smoke-degraded images and provide clearer visual observations for reconstruction and develop Smoke-GS, a medium-aware 3D Gaussian Splatting framework for smoke scene reconstruction and restoration-oriented novel view synthesis. Smoke-GS models the scene using explicit 3D Gaussians and introduces a lightweight view-dependent medium branch to capture direction-dependent appearance variations caused by smoke. Our method preserves the rendering efficiency of 3D Gaussian Splatting while improving robustness to smoke-induced degradation. Results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method for generating consistent and visually clear novel views in challenging smoke environments.

analysis.tldr: 利用多模态大模型的视觉先验和3D高斯泼溅实现烟雾场景重建与新视角合成。
analysis.research_motivation: 烟雾导致多视角图像出现散射、视角依赖外观变化和跨视角一致性退化，传统方法难以重建清晰一致的3D场景。
analysis.problem: 从烟雾退化的多视角图像中重建3D场景并生成清晰的新视角视图。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 烟雾引入强散射效应、视角依赖外观变化和跨视角一致性严重退化。
analysis.method: 使用Nano-Banana-Pro增强烟雾退化图像，提出Smoke-GS框架，该框架基于3D高斯泼溅并引入轻量级视角依赖介质分支建模烟雾引起的外观变化。
contributions: 提出结合视觉先验与高效3D场景建模的烟雾场景重建框架。
设计Smoke-GS，一种介质感知的3D高斯泼溅方法，实现烟雾场景重建与恢复导向的新视角合成。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖Nano-Banana-Pro的增强效果，在极端烟雾条件下性能未知。
轻量级介质分支可能无法处理复杂动态烟雾。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用多模态大模型的视觉先验和3D高斯泼溅实现烟雾场景重建与新视角合成。

papers.title: LUDOBENCH: Evaluating LLM Behavioural Decision-Making Through Spot-Based Board Game Scenarios in Ludo
papers.abstract: We introduce LudoBench, a benchmark for evaluating LLM strategic reasoning in Ludo, a stochastic multi-agent board game whose dice mechanics, piece capture, safe-square navigation, and home-path progression introduce meaningful planning complexity. LudoBench comprises 480 handcrafted spot scenarios across 12 behaviorally distinct decision categories, each isolating a specific strategic choice. We additionally contribute a fully functional 4-player Ludo simulator supporting Random, Heuristic, Game-Theory, and LLM agents. The game-theory agent uses Expectiminimax search with depth-limited lookahead to provide a principled strategic ceiling beyond greedy heuristics. Evaluating six models spanning four model families, we find that all models agree with the game-theory baseline only 40-46% of the time. Models split into distinct behavioral archetypes: finishers that complete pieces but neglect development, and builders that develop but never finish. Each archetype captures only half of the game theory strategy. Models also display measurable behavioral shifts under history-conditioned grudge framing on identical board states, revealing prompt-sensitivity as a key vulnerability. LudoBench provides a lightweight and interpretable framework for benchmarking LLM strategic reasoning under uncertainty. All code, the spot dataset (480 entries) and model outputs are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/LudoBench-5CBF/

analysis.tldr: LudoBench通过480个Ludo棋局场景评估LLM的博弈决策，发现模型与博弈论基线仅40-46%一致，并存在完成者/建设者两种行为原型。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM推理评测多聚焦于静态知识或简单问答，缺乏对多智能体随机环境中战略决策能力的系统评估。Ludo作为包含随机性、对抗性和路径规划的棋盘游戏，为评测LLM在不确定性下的规划与适应能力提供了理想场景。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个轻量、可解释的基准，系统评估LLM在随机多智能体博弈中的战略决策行为，并揭示其与最优策略的差距及行为模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 所有模型与博弈论基线（Expectiminimax）的决策一致性仅40-46%；模型分为两种行为原型：完成者（优先推进棋子回家但忽视全局发展）和建设者（优先布局但难以完成）；在相同棋盘状态下，历史条件（grudge framing）会显著改变模型决策，暴露出提示敏感性。
analysis.method: 构建包含480个手工设计场景的LudoBench，覆盖12种行为决策类别；开发4人Ludo模拟器，支持随机、启发式、博弈论（Expectiminimax）和LLM智能体；通过决策一致性、行为原型分析和提示敏感性测试评估LLM。
contributions: 提出LudoBench，首个基于Ludo棋局的LLM战略决策评测基准，包含480个场景和12个决策类别。
开发完整4人Ludo模拟器，集成博弈论智能体作为战略上限。
揭示LLM在随机博弈中的行为原型（完成者/建设者）和提示敏感性缺陷。
analysis.experiments: 评估了6个模型（来自4个模型家族），与博弈论基线对比决策一致性，并分析行为原型和提示敏感性。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅基于Ludo单一游戏，结论泛化性有限。
博弈论基线（深度受限Expectiminimax）可能并非绝对最优。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LudoBench通过480个Ludo棋局场景评估LLM的博弈决策，发现模型与博弈论基线仅40-46%一致，并存在完成者/建设者两种行为原型。

papers.title: From Incomplete Architecture to Quantified Risk: Multimodal LLM-Driven Security Assessment for Cyber-Physical Systems
papers.abstract: Cyber-physical systems often contend with incomplete architectural documentation or outdated information resulting from legacy technologies, knowledge management gaps, and the complexity of integrating diverse subsystems over extended operational lifecycles. This architectural incompleteness impedes reliable security assessment, as inaccurate or missing architectural knowledge limits the identification of system dependencies, attack surfaces, and risk propagation pathways. To address this foundational challenge, this paper introduces ASTRAL (Architecture-Centric Security Threat Risk Assessment using LLMs), an architecture-centric security assessment technique implemented in a prototype tool powered by multimodal LLMs. The proposed approach assists practitioners in reconstructing and analysing CPS architectures when documentation is fragmented or absent. By leveraging prompt chaining, few-shot learning, and architectural reasoning, ASTRAL extracts and synthesises system representations from disparate data sources. By integrating LLM reasoning with architectural modelling, our approach supports adaptive threat identification and quantitative risk estimation for cyber-physical systems. We evaluated the approach through an ablation study across multiple CPS case studies and an expert evaluation involving 14 experienced cybersecurity practitioners. Practitioner feedback suggests that ASTRAL is useful and reliable for supporting architecture-centric security assessment. Overall, the results indicate that the approach can support more informed cyber risk management decisions.

analysis.tldr: 提出ASTRAL方法，利用多模态大语言模型从碎片化文档重建CPS架构并量化安全风险。
analysis.research_motivation: CPS常因遗留技术、知识管理缺口和子系统集成复杂性导致架构文档不完整或过时，阻碍可靠的安全评估。
analysis.problem: 如何在架构文档不完整或缺失的情况下，重建CPS架构并进行威胁识别与定量风险评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: ASTRAL方法：结合多模态LLM、提示链、少样本学习和架构推理，从分散数据源提取并综合系统表示，支持自适应威胁识别和定量风险估计。
contributions: 提出ASTRAL，一种基于多模态LLM的架构中心安全评估技术。
通过消融研究和14名专家评估验证了方法的有效性和可靠性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个CPS案例上进行消融研究，并邀请14名网络安全从业者进行专家评估。
limitations: 依赖LLM的推理能力，可能受限于模型幻觉。
专家评估样本量较小，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ASTRAL方法，利用多模态大语言模型从碎片化文档重建CPS架构并量化安全风险。

papers.title: Rectified Schrödinger Bridge Matching for Few-Step Visual Navigation
papers.abstract: Visual navigation is a core challenge in Embodied AI, requiring autonomous agents to translate high-dimensional sensory observations into continuous, long-horizon action trajectories. While generative policies based on diffusion models and Schrödinger Bridges (SB) effectively capture multimodal action distributions, they require dozens of integration steps due to high-variance stochastic transport, posing a critical barrier for real-time robotic control. We propose Rectified Schrödinger Bridge Matching (RSBM), a framework that exploits a shared velocity-field structure between standard Schrödinger Bridges ($\varepsilon=1$, maximum-entropy transport) and deterministic Optimal Transport ($\varepsilon\to 0$, as in Conditional Flow Matching), controlled by a single entropic regularization parameter $\varepsilon$. We prove two key results: (1) the conditional velocity field's functional form is invariant across the entire $\varepsilon$-spectrum (Velocity Structure Invariance), enabling a single network to serve all regularization strengths; and (2) reducing $\varepsilon$ linearly decreases the conditional velocity variance, enabling more stable coarse-step ODE integration. Anchored to a learned conditional prior that shortens transport distance, RSBM operates at an intermediate $\varepsilon$ that balances multimodal coverage and path straightness. Empirically, while standard bridges require $\geq 10$ steps to converge, RSBM achieves over 94% cosine similarity and 92% success rate in merely 3 integration steps -- without distillation or multi-stage training -- substantially narrowing the gap between high-fidelity generative policies and the low-latency demands of Embodied AI.

analysis.tldr: 提出Rectified Schrödinger Bridge Matching (RSBM)，通过共享速度场结构和熵正则化参数，将生成式导航策略的推理步数从数十步降至3步，同时保持高成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉导航中，基于扩散模型和Schrödinger Bridge的生成式策略需要大量积分步数，无法满足具身AI实时控制需求。
analysis.problem: 如何减少生成式导航策略的推理步数，同时保持多模态动作分布覆盖和高成功率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准Schrödinger Bridge因高方差随机传输需要数十步；而RSBM发现条件速度场函数形式在熵正则化谱上不变，且降低ε可线性减小方差，从而支持粗步长ODE积分。
analysis.method: RSBM利用标准SB（ε=1）与确定性最优传输（ε→0）之间的共享速度场结构，通过单一网络服务所有正则化强度，并锚定到学习到的条件先验以缩短传输距离，在中间ε值平衡多模态覆盖与路径平直性。
contributions: 证明了条件速度场函数形式在整个ε谱上不变（速度结构不变性），允许单一网络覆盖所有正则化强度。
证明降低ε线性减小条件速度方差，实现更稳定的粗步长ODE积分。
提出RSBM框架，在3步积分内达到94%余弦相似度和92%成功率，无需蒸馏或多阶段训练。
analysis.experiments: 在视觉导航任务上，标准桥需要≥10步收敛，而RSBM在3步内达到94%余弦相似度和92%成功率。
limitations: 摘要未提及在更复杂场景或高维动作空间上的表现。
可能对条件先验的质量敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Rectified Schrödinger Bridge Matching (RSBM)，通过共享速度场结构和熵正则化参数，将生成式导航策略的推理步数从数十步降至3步，同时保持高成功率。

papers.title: CuraLight: Debate-Guided Data Curation for LLM-Centered Traffic Signal Control
papers.abstract: Traffic signal control (TSC) is a core component of intelligent transportation systems (ITS), aiming to reduce congestion, emissions, and travel time. Recent approaches based on reinforcement learning (RL) and large language models (LLMs) have improved adaptivity, but still suffer from limited interpretability, insufficient interaction data, and weak generalization to heterogeneous intersections. This paper proposes CuraLight, an LLM-centered framework where an RL agent assists the fine-tuning of an LLM-based traffic signal controller. The RL agent explores traffic environments and generates high-quality interaction trajectories, which are converted into prompt-response pairs for imitation fine-tuning. A multi-LLM ensemble deliberation system further evaluates candidate signal timing actions through structured debate, providing preference-aware supervision signals for training. Experiments conducted in SUMO across heterogeneous real-world networks from Jinan, Hangzhou, and Yizhuang demonstrate that CuraLight consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, reducing average travel time by 5.34 percent, average queue length by 5.14 percent, and average waiting time by 7.02 percent. The results highlight the effectiveness of combining RL-assisted exploration with deliberation-based data curation for scalable and interpretable traffic signal control.

analysis.tldr: CuraLight 利用 RL 辅助探索和多 LLM 辩论生成高质量数据，微调 LLM 交通信号控制器，在多个真实路网中显著降低旅行时间、排队长度和等待时间。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于 RL 和 LLM 的交通信号控制方法可解释性有限、交互数据不足、泛化到异构交叉口能力弱，亟需一种可扩展且可解释的框架。
analysis.problem: 如何结合 RL 的探索能力和 LLM 的推理能力，通过高质量数据微调实现可解释、泛化性强的交通信号控制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出 RL 和 LLM 方法存在可解释性差、数据不足、泛化弱等瓶颈。
analysis.method: CuraLight 框架：RL 代理探索环境生成高质量交互轨迹，转换为提示-响应对用于模仿微调；多 LLM 集成辩论系统评估候选信号时序动作，提供偏好感知监督信号。
contributions: 提出 LLM 为中心的交通信号控制框架，结合 RL 辅助探索与辩论引导的数据筛选。
设计多 LLM 辩论系统提供偏好感知监督信号，提升训练数据质量。
在多个真实路网数据集上验证，显著优于现有基线。
analysis.experiments: 在 SUMO 模拟器上使用济南、杭州、亦庄的异构真实路网数据，与多个 SOTA 基线对比，平均旅行时间降低 5.34%，平均排队长度降低 5.14%，平均等待时间降低 7.02%。
limitations: 依赖多个 LLM 进行辩论，计算开销可能较大。
仅在模拟环境中验证，实际部署效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CuraLight 利用 RL 辅助探索和多 LLM 辩论生成高质量数据，微调 LLM 交通信号控制器，在多个真实路网中显著降低旅行时间、排队长度和等待时间。

papers.title: Plasma GraphRAG: Physics-Grounded Parameter Selection for Gyrokinetic Simulations
papers.abstract: Accurate parameter selection is fundamental to gyrokinetic plasma simulations, yet current practices rely heavily on manual literature reviews, leading to inefficiencies and inconsistencies. We introduce Plasma GraphRAG, a novel framework that integrates Graph Retrieval-Augmented Generation (GraphRAG) with large language models (LLMs) for automated, physics-grounded parameter range identification. By constructing a domain-specific knowledge graph from curated plasma literature and enabling structured retrieval over graph-anchored entities and relations, Plasma GraphRAG enables LLMs to generate accurate, context-aware recommendations. Extensive evaluations across five metrics, comprehensiveness, diversity, grounding, hallucination, and empowerment, demonstrate that Plasma GraphRAG outperforms vanilla RAG by over $10\%$ in overall quality and reduces hallucination rates by up to $25\%$. {Beyond enhancing simulation reliability, Plasma GraphRAG offers a methodology for accelerating scientific discovery across complex, data-rich domains.

analysis.tldr: Plasma GraphRAG 通过图检索增强生成与知识图谱结合，自动为回旋动理学模拟提供物理驱动的参数选择，显著提升质量并降低幻觉。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前回旋动理学等离子体模拟的参数选择依赖人工文献综述，效率低且不一致，亟需自动化、物理驱动的参数推荐方法。
