analysis.problem: 如何自动、准确且物理一致地为回旋动理学模拟选择参数范围。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建领域特定知识图谱，结合图检索增强生成（GraphRAG）与大语言模型，实现结构化检索和上下文感知的参数推荐。
contributions: 提出 Plasma GraphRAG 框架，将 GraphRAG 与 LLM 集成用于等离子体模拟参数选择。
在五个指标上全面评估，证明该方法在质量和幻觉率上优于传统 RAG。
analysis.experiments: 在五个指标（全面性、多样性、基础性、幻觉率、赋能性）上评估，Plasma GraphRAG 整体质量优于 vanilla RAG 超过 10%，幻觉率降低高达 25%。
limitations: 依赖领域知识图谱的构建质量，可能受限于文献覆盖范围。
未在真实模拟任务中验证参数推荐的实际效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Plasma GraphRAG 通过图检索增强生成与知识图谱结合，自动为回旋动理学模拟提供物理驱动的参数选择，显著提升质量并降低幻觉。

papers.title: SnapFlow: One-Step Action Generation for Flow-Matching VLAs via Progressive Self-Distillation
papers.abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models based on flow matching -- such as pi0, pi0.5, and SmolVLA -- achieve state-of-the-art generalist robotic manipulation, yet their iterative denoising, typically 10 ODE steps, introduces substantial latency: on a modern GPU, denoising alone accounts for 80% of end-to-end inference time. Naively reducing the step count is unreliable, degrading success on most tasks due to the velocity field being uncalibrated for single-step jumps. We present SnapFlow, a plug-and-play self-distillation method that compresses multi-step denoising into a single forward pass (1-NFE) for flow-matching VLAs. SnapFlow mixes standard flow-matching samples with consistency samples whose targets are two-step Euler shortcut velocities computed from the model's own marginal velocity predictions, avoiding the trajectory drift caused by conditional velocities, as we analyze theoretically. A zero-initialized target-time embedding lets the network switch between local velocity estimation and global one-step generation within a single architecture. SnapFlow requires no external teacher, no architecture changes, and trains in ~12h on a single GPU. We validate on two VLA architectures spanning a 6x parameter range, with identical hyperparameters: on pi0.5 (3B) across four LIBERO suites (40 tasks, 400 episodes), SnapFlow achieves 98.75% average success -- matching the 10-step teacher at 97.75% and slightly exceeding it -- with 9.6x denoising speedup and end-to-end latency reduced from 274ms to 83ms; on SmolVLA (500M), it reduces MSE by 8.3% with 3.56x end-to-end acceleration. An action-step sweep on long-horizon tasks reveals that SnapFlow maintains its advantage across execution horizons, achieving 93% at n_act=5 where the baseline reaches only 90%. SnapFlow is orthogonal to layer-distillation and token-pruning approaches, enabling compositional speedups.

analysis.tldr: SnapFlow通过渐进式自蒸馏将流匹配VLA的多步去噪压缩为单步生成，在保持或提升成功率的同时实现近10倍加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于流匹配的VLA模型（如pi0、SmolVLA）在机器人操作中表现优异，但其迭代去噪过程（通常10步）导致高延迟，单GPU上仅去噪就占端到端推理时间的80%，限制了实时应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲任务成功率的前提下，将流匹配VLA的多步去噪压缩为单步前向生成，以大幅降低推理延迟。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，简单减少去噪步数不可靠，因为速度场未针对单步跳跃进行校准，导致大多数任务成功率下降。
analysis.method: SnapFlow是一种即插即用的自蒸馏方法，混合标准流匹配样本与一致性样本（目标为模型自身边际速度预测的两步欧拉捷径速度），并通过零初始化的目标时间嵌入使网络在同一架构内切换局部速度估计和全局单步生成。
contributions: 提出SnapFlow，首个将流匹配VLA多步去噪压缩为单步生成的自蒸馏方法，无需外部教师或架构修改。
理论分析条件速度导致的轨迹漂移，并设计基于边际速度的两步欧拉捷径速度作为一致性目标。
在pi0.5（3B）和SmolVLA（500M）两个架构上验证，实现9.6倍去噪加速和端到端延迟从274ms降至83ms，成功率持平或提升。
analysis.experiments: 在pi0.5（3B）上使用LIBERO四个套件（40任务，400 episode）评估，SnapFlow平均成功率98.75%，匹配10步教师（97.75%）并略有超出；在SmolVLA（500M）上MSE降低8.3%，端到端加速3.56倍。长时域任务上，n_act=5时SnapFlow达93%，基线仅90%。
limitations: 摘要未提及在更复杂或未见任务上的泛化能力。
方法依赖模型自身的边际速度预测，可能受限于预测质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SnapFlow通过渐进式自蒸馏将流匹配VLA的多步去噪压缩为单步生成，在保持或提升成功率的同时实现近10倍加速。

papers.title: LLM Reasoning as Trajectories: Step-Specific Representation Geometry and Correctness Signals
papers.abstract: This work characterizes large language models' chain-of-thought generation as a structured trajectory through representation space. We show that mathematical reasoning traverses functionally ordered, step-specific subspaces that become increasingly separable with layer depth. This structure already exists in base models, while reasoning training primarily accelerates convergence toward termination-related subspaces rather than introducing new representational organization. While early reasoning steps follow similar trajectories, correct and incorrect solutions diverge systematically at late stages. This late-stage divergence enables mid-reasoning prediction of final-answer correctness with ROC-AUC up to 0.87. Furthermore, we introduce trajectory-based steering, an inference-time intervention framework that enables reasoning correction and length control based on derived ideal trajectories. Together, these results establish reasoning trajectories as a geometric lens for interpreting, predicting, and controlling LLM reasoning behavior.

analysis.tldr: 将LLM的思维链生成建模为表示空间中的结构化轨迹，发现正确与错误推理在后期阶段系统性分叉，并据此实现推理正确性预测与干预。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解大语言模型推理过程的内部机制对于提升其可靠性和可控性至关重要，但现有研究缺乏对推理过程中表示空间几何结构的系统刻画。
analysis.problem: 如何从表示几何的角度解释、预测和控制LLM的链式推理行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 数学推理遍历功能有序、步骤特定的子空间，且随层深增加可分离性增强；该结构在基座模型中已存在，推理训练主要加速收敛至终止相关子空间；正确与错误解在后期阶段系统性分叉。
analysis.method: 提出轨迹表示几何分析框架，包括步骤特定子空间分析、正确性预测（基于后期分叉）以及轨迹引导的推理干预（推理校正和长度控制）。
contributions: 揭示了LLM推理过程中表示空间的几何结构及其与正确性的关联
提出了基于轨迹的推理正确性预测方法（ROC-AUC达0.87）和推理干预框架
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及ROC-AUC达0.87。
limitations: 可能仅适用于数学推理任务，泛化性未知
干预框架的实际效果和鲁棒性需进一步验证
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将LLM的思维链生成建模为表示空间中的结构化轨迹，发现正确与错误推理在后期阶段系统性分叉，并据此实现推理正确性预测与干预。

papers.title: Multiscale Physics-Informed Neural Network for Complex Fluid Flows with Long-Range Dependencies
papers.abstract: Fluid flows are governed by the nonlinear Navier-Stokes equations, which can manifest multiscale dynamics even from predictable initial conditions. Predicting such phenomena remains a formidable challenge in scientific machine learning, particularly regarding convergence speed, data requirements, and solution accuracy. In complex fluid flows, these challenges are exacerbated by long-range spatial dependencies arising from distant boundary conditions, which typically necessitate extensive supervision data to achieve acceptable results. We propose the Domain-Decomposed and Shifted Physics-Informed Neural Network (DDS-PINN), a framework designed to resolve such multiscale interactions with minimal supervision. By utilizing localized networks with a unified global loss, DDS-PINN captures global dependencies while maintaining local precision. The robustness of the approach is demonstrated across a suite of benchmarks, including a multiscale linear differential equation, the nonlinear Burgers' equation, and data-free Navier-Stokes simulations of flat-plate boundary layers. Finally, DDS-PINN is applied to the computationally challenging backward-facing step (BFS) problem; for laminar regimes (Re = 100), the model yields results comparable to computational fluid dynamics (CFD) without the need for any data, accurately predicting boundary layer thickness, separation, and reattachment lengths. For turbulent BFS flow at Re = 10,000, the framework achieves convergence to O(10^-4) using only 500 random supervision points (< 0.3 % of the total domain), outperforming established methods like Residual-based Attention-PINN in accuracy. This approach demonstrates strong potential for the super-resolution of complex turbulent flows from sparse experimental measurements.

analysis.tldr: 提出域分解与移位物理信息神经网络（DDS-PINN），以少量监督数据高效求解具有长程依赖的多尺度复杂流体流动问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 复杂流体流动受非线性Navier-Stokes方程控制，存在多尺度动力学和长程空间依赖，传统科学机器学习方法收敛慢、数据需求大、精度不足。
analysis.problem: 如何以极少的监督数据准确预测具有长程依赖的多尺度复杂流体流动。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出域分解与移位物理信息神经网络（DDS-PINN），使用局部网络结合统一全局损失，捕获全局依赖同时保持局部精度。
contributions: 提出DDS-PINN框架，有效处理多尺度相互作用和长程依赖。
在多个基准上验证鲁棒性，包括无数据Navier-Stokes模拟和湍流后向台阶流问题，仅用500个随机监督点（<0.3%域）即达到O(10^-4)收敛精度。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上测试，包括多尺度线性微分方程、非线性Burgers方程、平板边界层无数据Navier-Stokes模拟，以及层流（Re=100）和湍流（Re=10,000）后向台阶流问题。层流结果与CFD相当，湍流精度优于Residual-based Attention-PINN。
limitations: 可能对极度复杂的三维湍流问题仍需更多验证。
域分解策略的自动优化未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出域分解与移位物理信息神经网络（DDS-PINN），以少量监督数据高效求解具有长程依赖的多尺度复杂流体流动问题。

papers.title: Probing Intrinsic Medical Task Relationships: A Contrastive Learning Perspective
papers.abstract: While much of the medical computer vision community has focused on advancing performance for specific tasks, the underlying relationships between tasks, i.e., how they relate, overlap, or differ on a representational level, remain largely unexplored. Our work explores these intrinsic relationships between medical vision tasks, specifically, we investigate 30 tasks, such as semantic tasks (e.g., segmentation and detection), image generative tasks (e.g., denoising, inpainting, or colorization), and image transformation tasks (e.g., geometric transformations). Our goal is to probe whether a data-driven representation space can capture an underlying structure of tasks across a variety of 39 datasets from wildly different medical imaging modalities, including computed tomography, magnetic resonance, electron microscopy, X-ray ultrasound and more. By revealing how tasks relate to one another, we aim to provide insights into their fundamental properties and interconnectedness. To this end, we introduce Task-Contrastive Learning (TaCo), a contrastive learning framework designed to embed tasks into a shared representation space. Through TaCo, we map these heterogeneous tasks from different modalities into a joint space and analyze their properties: identifying which tasks are distinctly represented, which blend together, and how iterative alterations to tasks are reflected in the embedding space. Our work provides a foundation for understanding the intrinsic structure of medical vision tasks, offering a deeper understanding of task similarities and their interconnected properties in embedding spaces.

analysis.tldr: 提出TaCo对比学习框架，将30种医学视觉任务嵌入共享空间，揭示任务间内在关系。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学计算机视觉领域大多专注于提升特定任务性能，但任务间的内在关系（如表示层面的重叠或差异）尚未被探索，理解这些关系有助于揭示任务的基本属性和相互联系。
analysis.problem: 如何通过数据驱动的表示空间捕捉医学视觉任务（如分割、检测、去噪、几何变换等）之间的内在结构关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Task-Contrastive Learning (TaCo)框架，利用对比学习将来自不同模态和数据集的任务嵌入到共享表示空间，并通过分析嵌入空间来研究任务间的相似性和差异性。
contributions: 首次系统性地探索30种医学视觉任务在表示层面的内在关系，涵盖39个数据集和多种成像模态。
提出TaCo对比学习框架，能够将异构任务映射到联合嵌入空间，并分析任务的可区分性、融合性及迭代变化的影响。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能未涉及任务关系对下游性能的直接影响。
对比学习框架的泛化性可能受限于任务和数据集的选择。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TaCo对比学习框架，将30种医学视觉任务嵌入共享空间，揭示任务间内在关系。

papers.title: Analogical Reasoning as a Doctor: A Foundation Model for Gastrointestinal Endoscopy Diagnosis
papers.abstract: Gastrointestinal diseases impose a growing global health burden, and endoscopy is a primary tool for early diagnosis. However, routine endoscopic image interpretation still suffers from missed lesions and limited efficiency. Although AI-assisted diagnosis has shown promise, existing models often lack generalizability, adaptability, robustness, and scalability because of limited medical data, domain shift, and heterogeneous annotations. To address these challenges, we develop RATNet, a foundation model for gastrointestinal endoscopy imaging based on analogical reasoning. RATNet acquires and transfers knowledge from heterogeneous expert annotations across five gastrointestinal endoscopy datasets through a cyclic pre-training strategy. Its architecture consists of an encoder, a relevance-knowledge acquisition and transfer (RAT) module, a projector, and a multi-task head, and supports fine-tuning, linear probing, and zero-shot transfer. Evaluations show that RATNet outperforms existing foundation models, including GastroNet and GastroVision, across six scenarios: diagnosis of common gastrointestinal diseases, few-shot learning for rare diseases, zero-shot transfer to new medical sites, robustness under long-tailed disease distributions, adaptation to novel diseases, and privacy-preserving deployment via federated learning. Its advantage comes from an analogical reasoning mechanism that matches image-derived posterior knowledge to a learned prior knowledge base and transfers relative knowledge to guide diagnosis, improving generalization and resistance to bias. RATNet is open and cost-effective, supports automatic integration of heterogeneous annotations without manual label unification, and reduces data acquisition costs, making it a practical foundation for intelligent gastrointestinal diagnosis, especially in resource-limited settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于类比推理的RATNet基础模型，通过循环预训练整合异构标注，在胃肠内镜诊断中超越现有基础模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 胃肠疾病负担重，内镜是早期诊断关键，但AI辅助诊断因数据有限、域偏移和标注异构而缺乏泛化性、适应性和鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 现有AI模型在胃肠内镜图像诊断中泛化性、适应性、鲁棒性和可扩展性不足，难以处理异构标注和域偏移。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出RATNet，包含编码器、类比推理模块（RAT）、投影器和多任务头，通过循环预训练从五个数据集的异构专家标注中获取和迁移知识，支持微调、线性探测和零样本迁移。
contributions: 提出基于类比推理的RATNet基础模型，通过循环预训练整合异构标注，提升泛化性和抗偏能力。
在六种场景（常见病诊断、少样本罕见病、零样本新站点、长尾分布鲁棒性、新病适应、联邦学习隐私部署）中超越现有基础模型。
analysis.experiments: 在五个胃肠内镜数据集上评估，涵盖六种场景，与GastroNet和GastroVision对比，RATNet表现更优。
limitations: 可能依赖特定内镜图像域，跨模态泛化性未验证。
类比推理机制的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于类比推理的RATNet基础模型，通过循环预训练整合异构标注，在胃肠内镜诊断中超越现有基础模型。

papers.title: LLM Psychosis: A Theoretical and Diagnostic Framework for Reality-Boundary Failures in Large Language Models
papers.abstract: The deployment of large language models (LLMs) as interactive agents has exposed a category of behavioral failure that prevailing terminology, principally hallucination, fails to adequately characterize. This paper introduces LLM Psychosis as a structured theoretical framework for pathological breakdowns in model cognition that exhibit functional resemblance to clinically recognized psychotic disorders. Five hallmark features define the framework: reality-boundary dissolution, persistence of injected false beliefs, logical incoherence under impossible constraints, self-model instability, and epistemic overconfidence. We argue these constitute a qualitatively distinct failure mode rather than a mere intensification of ordinary factual error. To operationalize the framework, we propose the LLM Cognitive Integrity Scale (LCIS), a five-axis diagnostic instrument organized around Environmental Reality Interface (ERI), Premise Arbitration Integrity (PAI), Logical Constraint Recognition (LCR), Self-Model Integrity (SMI), and Epistemic Calibration Integrity (ECI). We administer a targeted adversarial probe battery to ChatGPT 5 (GPT-5, OpenAI) and report empirical findings for each axis, documenting both intact-integrity baseline responses and the specific psychosis-like failure signatures elicited under adversarial escalation. Results support a three-tier severity taxonomy: Type I (Confabulatory), Type II (Delusional), and Type III (Dissociative). We further formalize the delusional gradient, a self-reinforcing dynamic in which correction pressure intensifies rather than resolves psychosis-like states, as the most consequential failure mode for deployed systems. Implications for safety evaluation, high-stakes deployment screening, and mechanistic interpretability research are discussed.

analysis.tldr: 提出LLM精神病理论框架，将幻觉等失败模式类比为临床精神病，并设计五轴诊断量表LCIS进行实证评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有术语（如幻觉）无法充分描述LLM作为交互智能体时出现的系统性认知崩溃行为，亟需更精确的理论框架来识别和评估这类高风险失败模式。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地定义、分类和诊断LLM中类似精神病的认知边界失效行为（如现实边界溶解、逻辑不一致、自我模型不稳定等）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到LLM在对抗性压力下会表现出与临床精神病功能相似的失败模式，且纠正压力可能加剧而非缓解这些状态（即妄想梯度）。
analysis.method: 提出LLM精神病理论框架（五个核心特征）和LLM认知完整性量表（LCIS，五轴诊断工具），并通过针对性对抗探针实验对GPT-5进行实证评估。
contributions: 首次将LLM的病理行为系统类比为临床精神病，提出包含五个核心特征的理论框架。
设计并验证了五轴诊断量表LCIS，可量化评估LLM的认知完整性。
通过对抗探针实验揭示了三种严重程度类型（I型虚构、II型妄想、III型解离）和妄想梯度动态。
analysis.experiments: 对GPT-5进行针对性对抗探针实验，报告了每个轴上的基线完整响应和精神病样失败特征，支持了三层严重程度分类。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅测试了GPT-5一个模型，泛化性未知。
对抗探针的设计可能无法覆盖所有现实场景中的失败模式。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LLM精神病理论框架，将幻觉等失败模式类比为临床精神病，并设计五轴诊断量表LCIS进行实证评估。

papers.title: SkillGraph: Graph Foundation Priors for LLM Agent Tool Sequence Recommendation
papers.abstract: LLM agents must select tools from large API libraries and order them correctly. Existing methods use semantic similarity for both retrieval and ordering, but ordering depends on inter-tool data dependencies that are absent from tool descriptions. As a result, semantic-only methods can produce negative Kendall-$τ$ in structured workflow domains. We introduce SkillGraph, a directed weighted execution-transition graph mined from 49,831 successful LLM agent trajectories, which encodes workflow-precedence regularities as a reusable graph foundation prior. Building on this graph foundation prior, we propose a two-stage decoupled framework: GS-Hybrid retrieval for candidate selection and a learned pairwise reranker for ordering. On ToolBench (9,965 test instances; ~16,000 tools), the method reaches Set-F1 = 0.271 and Kendall-$τ$ = 0.096; on API-Bank, Kendall-$τ$ improves from -0.433 to +0.613. Under identical Stage-1 inputs, the learned reranker also outperforms LLaMA-3.1-8B Stage-2 rerankers.

analysis.tldr: 提出SkillGraph，从成功轨迹中挖掘工具依赖图先验，用于LLM Agent工具序列推荐。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法仅依赖语义相似度进行工具检索和排序，忽略了工具间的数据依赖关系，导致在结构化工作流中排序效果差。
analysis.problem: 如何利用工具间的执行依赖关系改进LLM Agent的工具序列推荐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 语义相似度方法在结构化工作流中可能产生负的Kendall-τ，说明仅靠语义无法捕捉工具间的正确顺序。
analysis.method: 从大量成功轨迹中挖掘有向加权执行转移图作为图基础先验，并采用两阶段解耦框架：GS-Hybrid检索候选工具，学习型成对重排序器确定顺序。
contributions: 提出SkillGraph，一种从轨迹中挖掘的图基础先验，编码工作流前置规律。
设计两阶段解耦框架，结合图先验进行检索和排序，显著提升排序一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在ToolBench（9965个测试实例，约16000个工具）上达到Set-F1=0.271，Kendall-τ=0.096；在API-Bank上Kendall-τ从-0.433提升至+0.613。在相同第一阶段输入下，学习型重排序器优于LLaMA-3.1-8B第二阶段重排序器。
limitations: 图先验依赖成功轨迹的质量和数量。
方法可能不适用于工具间依赖关系极少的场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SkillGraph，从成功轨迹中挖掘工具依赖图先验，用于LLM Agent工具序列推荐。

papers.title: PanopticQuery: Unified Query-Time Reasoning for 4D Scenes
papers.abstract: Understanding dynamic 4D environments through natural language queries requires not only accurate scene reconstruction but also robust semantic grounding across space, time, and viewpoints. While recent methods using neural representations have advanced 4D reconstruction, they remain limited in contextual reasoning, especially for complex semantics such as interactions, temporal actions, and spatial relations. A key challenge lies in transforming noisy, view-dependent predictions into globally consistent 4D interpretations. We introduce PanopticQuery, a framework for unified query-time reasoning in 4D scenes. Our approach builds on 4D Gaussian Splatting for high-fidelity dynamic reconstruction and introduces a multi-view semantic consensus mechanism that grounds natural language queries by aggregating 2D semantic predictions across multiple views and time frames. This process filters inconsistent outputs, enforces geometric consistency, and lifts 2D semantics into structured 4D groundings via neural field optimization. To support evaluation, we present Panoptic-L4D, a new benchmark for language-based querying in dynamic scenes. Experiments demonstrate that PanopticQuery sets a new state of the art on complex language queries, effectively handling attributes, actions, spatial relationships, and multi-object interactions. A video demonstration is available in the supplementary materials.

analysis.tldr: 提出PanopticQuery框架，通过多视图语义共识机制实现4D场景的统一查询时推理，并引入Panoptic-L4D基准。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有4D场景理解方法在复杂语义推理（如交互、时间动作、空间关系）方面存在局限，难以将噪声、视角依赖的预测转化为全局一致的4D解释。
analysis.problem: 如何实现动态4D场景中自然语言查询的鲁棒语义推理，包括空间、时间和跨视角的一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于4D高斯泼溅进行动态重建，引入多视图语义共识机制，聚合多视角和时间帧的2D语义预测，通过神经场优化将2D语义提升为结构化4D语义。
contributions: 提出PanopticQuery框架，实现4D场景的统一查询时推理。
引入Panoptic-L4D基准，用于评估动态场景中的语言查询。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明PanopticQuery在复杂语言查询上达到新SOTA，有效处理属性、动作、空间关系和多对象交互。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的多视图输入。
神经场优化计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PanopticQuery框架，通过多视图语义共识机制实现4D场景的统一查询时推理，并引入Panoptic-L4D基准。

papers.title: UGAF-ITS: A Standards Harmonization Framework and Validation Tool for Multi-Framework AI Governance in Distributed Intelligent Transportation Systems
papers.abstract: Organizations deploying AI-enabled Intelligent Transportation Systems face fragmented governance: ISO/IEC 42001 demands a certifiable management system, the EU AI Act imposes binding high-risk obligations from August 2026, and the NIST AI Risk Management Framework structures voluntary practice. Each instrument is internally coherent, yet they drive different control vocabularies, evidence expectations, and audit rhythms. In distributed ITS deployments where vehicle manufacturers, roadside integrators, and cloud operators each hold partial evidence and partial accountability, this fragmentation multiplies compliance effort and obscures incident traceability. This paper introduces UGAF-ITS, a standards harmonization framework that consolidates 154 source obligations from the three instruments into 12 unified controls across eight governance domains through a reproducible five-phase crosswalk methodology. A three-tier operating model allocates each control to the vehicle, edge, or cloud tier where enforcement and defensible evidence production are feasible. An evidence backbone of 20 versioned artifacts supports a single audit package across all three frameworks without duplicating content. We validate UGAF-ITS through an open-source governance engine evaluated across four architecturally distinct ITS deployment scenarios. The engine encodes the complete crosswalk catalog and executes eight compliance computations. Three-tier deployments achieve 91.7% average framework coverage with 45.9% evidence reduction, complete bidirectional traceability, and 80% of artifacts serving all three frameworks simultaneously. Partial deployments degrade gracefully: coverage and reduction scale with architectural complexity. The tool, scenarios, and all reported results are publicly available for independent replication.

analysis.tldr: 提出UGAF-ITS框架，将ISO/IEC 42001、EU AI Act和NIST AI RMF三大AI治理标准统一为12项控制措施，在分布式智能交通系统中实现91.7%覆盖率和45.9%证据缩减。
analysis.research_motivation: 组织在部署AI赋能的智能交通系统时面临碎片化的治理标准，不同标准要求不同的控制词汇、证据期望和审计节奏，导致合规工作倍增且事故可追溯性模糊。
analysis.problem: 如何将多个AI治理标准（ISO/IEC 42001、EU AI Act、NIST AI RMF）统一为一个协调框架，以减少分布式智能交通系统中的合规负担并提高可追溯性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出UGAF-ITS框架，通过可复现的五阶段交叉映射方法将154项源义务整合为12项统一控制措施，并设计三层运营模型（车辆、边缘、云）分配控制责任，以及20个版本化工件组成的证据主干支持单一审计包。
contributions: 提出UGAF-ITS框架，实现三大AI治理标准的统一协调。
开发开源治理引擎，在四种分布式ITS场景中验证框架有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在四种架构不同的ITS部署场景中评估开源治理引擎，三层部署实现91.7%平均框架覆盖率、45.9%证据缩减、完全双向可追溯性，80%工件同时服务于所有三个框架。
limitations: 框架可能不适用于非ITS领域的AI治理。
验证仅基于四种场景，可能无法覆盖所有实际部署情况。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出UGAF-ITS框架，将ISO/IEC 42001、EU AI Act和NIST AI RMF三大AI治理标准统一为12项控制措施，在分布式智能交通系统中实现91.7%覆盖率和45.9%证据缩减。

papers.title: Towards Athlete Fatigue Assessment from Association Football Videos
papers.abstract: Fatigue monitoring is central in association football due to its links with injury risk and tactical performance. However, objective fatigue-related indicators are commonly derived from subjective self-reported metrics, biomarkers derived from laboratory tests, or, more recently, intrusive sensors such as heart monitors or GPS tracking data. This paper studies whether monocular broadcast videos can provide spatio-temporal signals of sufficient quality to support fatigue-oriented analysis. Building on state-of-the-art Game State Reconstruction methods, we extract player trajectories in pitch coordinates and propose a novel kinematics processing algorithm to obtain temporally consistent speed and acceleration estimates from reconstructed tracks. We then construct acceleration--speed (A-S) profiles from these signals and analyze their behavior as fatigue-related performance indicators. We evaluate the full pipeline on the public SoccerNet-GSR benchmark, considering both 30-second clips and a complete 45-minute half to examine short-term reliability and longer-term temporal consistency. Our results indicate that monocular GSR can recover kinematic patterns that are compatible with A-S profiling while also revealing sensitivity to trajectory noise, calibration errors, and temporal discontinuities inherent to broadcast footage. These findings support monocular broadcast video as a low-cost basis for fatigue analysis and delineate the methodological challenges for future research.

analysis.tldr: 利用单目广播视频重建球员轨迹并提取加速度-速度剖面，初步验证了其用于足球疲劳评估的可行性。
analysis.research_motivation: 疲劳监测对足球运动损伤风险和战术表现至关重要，但现有客观指标依赖主观报告、实验室测试或侵入式传感器，成本高且不便捷。
analysis.problem: 能否从单目广播视频中提取足够质量的时空信号以支持疲劳分析。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于Game State Reconstruction方法提取球员轨迹，提出运动学处理算法获得一致的速度和加速度估计，并构建加速度-速度剖面作为疲劳指标。
contributions: 提出从单目广播视频中提取运动学信号并构建A-S剖面的方法。
在公开基准上验证了该方法的短期可靠性和长期一致性，并指出了轨迹噪声、标定误差等挑战。
analysis.experiments: 在SoccerNet-GSR基准上评估，包括30秒片段和45分钟半场。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 对轨迹噪声、标定误差和时间不连续性敏感。
仅基于单目视频，可能受遮挡和视角限制。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用单目广播视频重建球员轨迹并提取加速度-速度剖面，初步验证了其用于足球疲劳评估的可行性。

papers.title: PECKER: A Precisely Efficient Critical Knowledge Erasure Recipe For Machine Unlearning in Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: Machine unlearning (MU) has become a critical technique for GenAI models' safe and compliant operation. While existing MU methods are effective, most impose prohibitive training time and computational overhead. Our analysis suggests the root cause lies in poorly directed gradient updates, which reduce training efficiency and destabilize convergence. To mitigate these issues, we propose PECKER, an efficient MU approach that matches or outperforms prevailing methods. Within a distillation framework, PECKER introduces a saliency mask to prioritize updates to parameters that contribute most to forgetting the targeted data, thereby reducing unnecessary gradient computation and shortening overall training time without sacrificing unlearning efficacy. Our method generates samples that unlearn related class or concept more quickly, while closely aligning with the true image distribution on CIFAR-10 and STL-10 datasets, achieving shorter training times for both class forgetting and concept forgetting.

analysis.tldr: 提出PECKER方法，通过显著性掩码优先更新关键参数，在扩散模型机器遗忘中实现高效训练且不牺牲遗忘效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有机器遗忘方法训练时间和计算开销大，根源在于梯度更新方向不明确，导致训练效率低和收敛不稳定。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲遗忘效果的前提下，减少扩散模型机器遗忘的训练时间和计算开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有方法梯度更新方向不明确，导致训练效率低和收敛不稳定。
analysis.method: 在蒸馏框架中引入显著性掩码，优先更新对遗忘目标数据贡献最大的参数，减少不必要的梯度计算。
contributions: 提出PECKER方法，通过显著性掩码实现高效机器遗忘。
在CIFAR-10和STL-10数据集上，类遗忘和概念遗忘任务均实现更短训练时间，且生成图像分布与真实分布一致。
analysis.experiments: 在CIFAR-10和STL-10数据集上评估类遗忘和概念遗忘任务，与现有方法比较训练时间和生成质量。
limitations: 可能仅适用于扩散模型，其他生成模型未验证。
显著性掩码的计算可能引入额外开销，但摘要未提及。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PECKER方法，通过显著性掩码优先更新关键参数，在扩散模型机器遗忘中实现高效训练且不牺牲遗忘效果。

papers.title: SGANet: Semantic and Geometric Alignment for Multimodal Multi-view Anomaly Detection
papers.abstract: Multi-view anomaly detection aims to identify surface defects on complex objects using observations captured from multiple viewpoints. However, existing unsupervised methods often suffer from feature inconsistency arising from viewpoint variations and modality discrepancies. To address these challenges, we propose a Semantic and Geometric Alignment Network (SGANet), a unified framework for multimodal multi-view anomaly detection that effectively combines semantic and geometric alignment to learn physically coherent feature representations across viewpoints and modalities. SGANet consists of three key components. The Selective Cross-view Feature Refinement Module (SCFRM) selectively aggregates informative patch features from adjacent views to enhance cross-view feature interaction. The Semantic-Structural Patch Alignment (SSPA) enforces semantic alignment across modalities while maintaining structural consistency under viewpoint transformations. The Multi-View Geometric Alignment (MVGA) further aligns geometrically corresponding patches across viewpoints. By jointly modeling feature interaction, semantic and structural consistency, and global geometric correspondence, SGANet effectively enhances anomaly detection performance in multimodal multi-view settings. Extensive experiments on the SiM3D and Eyecandies datasets demonstrate that SGANet achieves state-of-the-art performance in both anomaly detection and localization, validating its effectiveness in realistic industrial scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出语义与几何对齐网络SGANet，统一多模态多视角异常检测框架，通过跨视角特征交互、语义对齐和几何对齐提升检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 多视角异常检测中，现有无监督方法因视角变化和模态差异导致特征不一致，影响检测效果。
analysis.problem: 如何有效融合多视角和多模态信息，学习物理一致的特征表示以提升异常检测与定位性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SGANet，包含选择性跨视角特征精炼模块(SCFRM)、语义-结构补丁对齐(SSPA)和多视角几何对齐(MVGA)，分别实现跨视角特征交互、跨模态语义对齐和几何对应。
contributions: 提出统一的多模态多视角异常检测框架SGANet，同时利用语义和几何对齐。
设计三个核心模块：SCFRM、SSPA和MVGA，有效处理特征不一致问题。
在SiM3D和Eyecandies数据集上达到最先进性能。
analysis.experiments: 在SiM3D和Eyecandies数据集上进行实验，异常检测和定位均取得最优结果。
limitations: 可能依赖多视角数据的精确几何对应，对视角变化敏感。
计算复杂度可能较高，需进一步优化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出语义与几何对齐网络SGANet，统一多模态多视角异常检测框架，通过跨视角特征交互、语义对齐和几何对齐提升检测性能。

papers.title: Beyond Behavior: Why AI Evaluation Needs a Cognitive Revolution
papers.abstract: In 1950, Alan Turing proposed replacing the question "Can machines think?" with a behavioral test: if a machine's outputs are indistinguishable from those of a thinking being, the question of whether it truly thinks can be set aside. This paper argues that Turing's move was not only a pragmatic simplification but also an epistemological commitment, a decision about what kind of evidence counts as relevant to intelligence attribution, and that this commitment has quietly constrained AI research for seven decades. We trace how Turing's behavioral epistemology became embedded in the field's evaluative infrastructure, rendering unaskable a class of questions about process, mechanism, and internal organization that cognitive psychology, neuroscience, and related disciplines learned to ask. We draw a structural parallel to the behaviorist-to-cognitivist transition in psychology: just as psychology's commitment to studying only observable behavior prevented it from asking productive questions about internal mental processes until that commitment was abandoned, AI's commitment to behavioral evaluation prevents it from distinguishing between systems that achieve identical outputs through fundamentally different computational processes, a distinction on which intelligence attribution depends. We argue that the field requires an epistemological transition comparable to the cognitive revolution: not an abandonment of behavioral evidence, but a recognition that behavioral evidence alone is insufficient for the construct claims the field wishes to make. We articulate what a post-behaviorist epistemology for AI would involve and identify the specific questions it would make askable that the field currently has no way to ask.

analysis.tldr: 本文呼吁AI评估从行为主义转向认知主义，借鉴心理学中的认知革命，强调仅靠行为证据不足以判断智能。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前AI评估受图灵行为主义影响，只关注输出行为，忽略了内部过程和机制，限制了智能归因的深度和准确性。
analysis.problem: AI评估领域缺乏能够区分不同内部计算过程但产生相同行为输出的评估方法，导致无法回答关于智能本质的关键问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，AI领域的行为主义评估范式使得关于过程、机制和内部组织的问题无法被提出，类似于心理学中行为主义到认知主义的转变。
analysis.method: 提出后行为主义认识论框架，借鉴心理学认知革命，强调行为证据与内部过程证据的结合。
contributions: 揭示图灵行为主义对AI评估的长期约束及其认识论根源
提出AI评估需要经历类似心理学认知革命的认识论转变
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 未提供具体可操作的评估方法或实验验证
可能面临实施上的挑战，如如何定义和测量内部过程
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文呼吁AI评估从行为主义转向认知主义，借鉴心理学中的认知革命，强调仅靠行为证据不足以判断智能。

papers.title: A Unified Foundation Model for All-in-One Multi-Modal Remote Sensing Image Restoration and Fusion with Language Prompting
papers.abstract: Remote sensing imagery suffers from clouds, haze, noise, resolution limits, and sensor heterogeneity. Existing restoration and fusion approaches train separate models per degradation type. In this work, we present Language-conditioned Large-scale Remote Sensing restoration model (LLaRS), the first unified foundation model for multi-modal and multi-task remote sensing low-level vision. LLaRS employs Sinkhorn-Knopp optimal transport to align heterogeneous bands into semantically matched slots, routes features through three complementary mixture-of-experts layers (convolutional experts for spatial patterns, channel-mixing experts for spectral fidelity, and attention experts with low-rank adapters for global context), and stabilizes joint training via step-level dynamic weight adjustment. To train LLaRS, we construct LLaRS1M, a million-scale multi-task dataset spanning eleven restoration and enhancement tasks, integrating real paired observations and controlled synthetic degradations with diverse natural language prompts. Experiments show LLaRS consistently outperforms seven competitive models, and parameter-efficient finetuning experiments demonstrate strong transfer capability and adaptation efficiency on unseen data. Repo: https://github.com/yc-cui/LLaRS

analysis.tldr: 首个统一多模态遥感图像修复与融合基础模型，利用语言提示和混合专家架构。
analysis.research_motivation: 遥感图像受云、雾、噪声、分辨率限制和传感器异构性影响，现有方法针对每种退化类型训练独立模型，缺乏统一解决方案。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个统一的基础模型，能够处理多种遥感图像修复与融合任务，并利用语言提示实现灵活控制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出LLaRS模型，采用Sinkhorn-Knopp最优传输对齐异构波段，通过三种混合专家层（卷积、通道混合、注意力）处理特征，并利用步骤级动态权重调整稳定联合训练。
contributions: 首个统一多模态遥感图像修复与融合基础模型LLaRS。
构建百万级多任务数据集LLaRS1M，涵盖11种任务并集成自然语言提示。
analysis.experiments: 在多个任务上优于七种竞争模型，参数高效微调实验展示了强迁移能力和适应效率。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模数据集和计算资源。
语言提示的泛化性可能受限于训练数据分布。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个统一多模态遥感图像修复与融合基础模型，利用语言提示和混合专家架构。

papers.title: DetailVerifyBench: A Benchmark for Dense Hallucination Localization in Long Image Captions
papers.abstract: Accurately detecting and localizing hallucinations is a critical task for ensuring high reliability of image captions. In the era of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), captions have evolved from brief sentences into comprehensive narratives, often spanning hundreds of words. This shift exponentially increases the challenge: models must now pinpoint specific erroneous spans or words within extensive contexts, rather than merely flag response-level inconsistencies. However, existing benchmarks lack the fine granularity and domain diversity required to evaluate this capability. To bridge this gap, we introduce DetailVerifyBench, a rigorous benchmark comprising 1,000 high-quality images across five distinct domains. With an average caption length of over 200 words and dense, token-level annotations of multiple hallucination types, it stands as the most challenging benchmark for precise hallucination localization in the field of long image captioning to date. Our benchmark is available at https://zyx-hhnkh.github.io/DetailVerifyBench/.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个用于长图像描述中密集幻觉定位的基准数据集。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准缺乏细粒度和领域多样性，无法评估多模态大模型在长描述中精确定位幻觉词句的能力。
analysis.problem: 需要构建一个包含细粒度、多领域、长文本描述的幻觉定位基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含1000张高质量图像、5个领域、平均描述长度超200词、具有词级幻觉标注的基准数据集。
contributions: 提出DetailVerifyBench，首个针对长图像描述中密集幻觉定位的基准。
提供1000张图像、5个领域、词级标注的多样化数据集。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅覆盖5个领域，泛化性待验证。
未提及基线模型评估结果。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个用于长图像描述中密集幻觉定位的基准数据集。

papers.title: FunRec: Reconstructing Functional 3D Scenes from Egocentric Interaction Videos
papers.abstract: We present FunRec, a method for reconstructing functional 3D digital twins of indoor scenes directly from egocentric RGB-D interaction videos. Unlike existing methods on articulated reconstruction, which rely on controlled setups, multi-state captures, or CAD priors, FunRec operates directly on in-the-wild human interaction sequences to recover interactable 3D scenes. It automatically discovers articulated parts, estimates their kinematic parameters, tracks their 3D motion, and reconstructs static and moving geometry in canonical space, yielding simulation-compatible meshes. Across new real and simulated benchmarks, FunRec surpasses prior work by a large margin, achieving up to +50 mIoU improvement in part segmentation, 5-10 times lower articulation and pose errors, and significantly higher reconstruction accuracy. We further demonstrate applications on URDF/USD export for simulation, hand-guided affordance mapping and robot-scene interaction.

analysis.tldr: 从第一人称交互视频中重建功能3D场景，实现可交互数字孪生。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有铰接重建方法依赖受控设置、多状态捕获或CAD先验，无法处理真实世界的人机交互视频，限制了数字孪生的可交互性。
analysis.problem: 如何从无约束的第一人称RGB-D交互视频中自动发现铰接部件、估计运动学参数、跟踪3D运动并重建静态与动态几何，生成仿真兼容的网格。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: FunRec：从第一人称交互视频中自动发现铰接部件、估计运动学参数、跟踪3D运动，并在规范空间中重建静态与动态几何，输出仿真兼容的网格。
contributions: 提出首个从第一人称交互视频重建功能3D场景的方法，无需受控设置或CAD先验。
在部件分割、铰接参数估计和重建精度上大幅超越现有方法（+50 mIoU，5-10倍误差降低）。
analysis.experiments: 在真实和模拟基准上评估，FunRec在部件分割上提升+50 mIoU，铰接和姿态误差降低5-10倍，重建精度显著更高。
limitations: 可能依赖RGB-D输入，对纯RGB视频的泛化性未知。
复杂场景中部件发现和跟踪的鲁棒性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 从第一人称交互视频中重建功能3D场景，实现可交互数字孪生。

papers.title: Semantic-Topological Graph Reasoning for Language-Guided Pulmonary Screening
papers.abstract: Medical image segmentation driven by free-text clinical instructions is a critical frontier in computer-aided diagnosis. However, existing multimodal and foundation models struggle with the semantic ambiguity of clinical reports and fail to disambiguate complex anatomical overlaps in low-contrast scans. Furthermore, fully fine-tuning these massive architectures on limited medical datasets invariably leads to severe overfitting. To address these challenges, we propose a novel Semantic-Topological Graph Reasoning (STGR) framework for language-guided pulmonary screening. Our approach elegantly synergizes the reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLaMA-3-V) with the zero-shot delineation of vision foundation models (MedSAM). Specifically, we introduce a Text-to-Vision Intent Distillation (TVID) module to extract precise diagnostic guidance. To resolve anatomical ambiguity, we formulate mask selection as a dynamic graph reasoning problem, where candidate lesions are modeled as nodes and edges capture spatial and semantic affinities. To ensure deployment feasibility, we introduce a Selective Asymmetric Fine-Tuning (SAFT) strategy that updates less than 1% of the parameters. Rigorous 5-fold cross-validation on the LIDC-IDRI and LNDb datasets demonstrates that our framework establishes a new state-of-the-art. Notably, it achieves an 81.5% Dice Similarity Coefficient (DSC) on LIDC-IDRI, outperforming leading LLM-based tools like LISA by over 5%. Crucially, our SAFT strategy acts as a powerful regularizer, yielding exceptional cross-fold stability (0.6% DSC variance) and paving the way for robust, context-aware clinical deployment.

analysis.tldr: 提出语义-拓扑图推理框架，结合LLM和视觉基础模型实现语言引导的肺部分割，仅微调<1%参数即达SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有多模态和基础模型在临床报告语义模糊、低对比度扫描中解剖重叠复杂时表现不佳，且全量微调易过拟合。
analysis.problem: 如何利用自由文本临床指令实现精确的医学图像分割，同时避免大规模模型在有限数据上的过拟合。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出STGR框架，包含Text-to-Vision Intent Distillation模块提取诊断指导，将掩码选择建模为动态图推理问题，以及Selective Asymmetric Fine-Tuning策略更新<1%参数。
contributions: 提出STGR框架，结合LLM和视觉基础模型实现语言引导的肺部分割。
引入TVID模块和动态图推理解决语义模糊和解剖重叠。
提出SAFT策略仅微调<1%参数，有效防止过拟合并提升稳定性。
analysis.experiments: 在LIDC-IDRI和LNDb数据集上进行5折交叉验证，LIDC-IDRI上DSC达81.5%，优于LISA超5%，且SAFT策略使DSC方差仅0.6%。
limitations: 可能依赖特定LLM和视觉模型，泛化性需验证。
仅针对肺部筛查，其他器官或任务需进一步适配。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出语义-拓扑图推理框架，结合LLM和视觉基础模型实现语言引导的肺部分割，仅微调<1%参数即达SOTA。

papers.title: Evaluation of Randomization through Style Transfer for Enhanced Domain Generalization
papers.abstract: Deep learning models for computer vision often suffer from poor generalization when deployed in real-world settings, especially when trained on synthetic data due to the well-known Sim2Real gap. Despite the growing popularity of style transfer as a data augmentation strategy for domain generalization, the literature contains unresolved contradictions regarding three key design axes: the diversity of the style pool, the role of texture complexity, and the choice of style source. We present a systematic empirical study that isolates and evaluates each of these factors for driving scene understanding, resolving inconsistencies in prior work. Our findings show that (i) expanding the style pool yields larger gains than repeated augmentation with few styles, (ii) texture complexity has no significant effect when the pool is sufficiently large, and (iii) diverse artistic styles outperform domain-aligned alternatives. Guided by these insights, we derive StyleMixDG (Style-Mixing for Domain Generalization), a lightweight, model-agnostic augmentation recipe that requires no architectural modifications or additional losses. Evaluated on the GTAV $\rightarrow$ {BDD100k, Cityscapes, Mapillary Vistas} benchmark, StyleMixDG demonstrates consistent improvements over strong baselines, confirming that the empirically identified design principles translate into practical gains. The code will be released on GitHub.

analysis.tldr: 通过系统实验揭示风格迁移中风格池多样性、纹理复杂度和风格来源对域泛化的影响，并提出轻量级增强方法StyleMixDG。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度学习模型在真实场景中泛化能力差，尤其是合成数据训练时存在Sim2Real差距，而风格迁移作为数据增强策略在域泛化中虽有应用，但关键设计轴（风格池多样性、纹理复杂度、风格来源）存在矛盾结论，亟需系统研究。
analysis.problem: 解决风格迁移用于域泛化时三个关键设计轴（风格池多样性、纹理复杂度、风格来源）的争议，并基于实证结果提出有效的增强策略。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现：(i) 扩大风格池比重复使用少量风格带来更大增益；(ii) 当风格池足够大时，纹理复杂度无显著影响；(iii) 多样化艺术风格优于域对齐风格。
analysis.method: StyleMixDG：一种轻量级、模型无关的数据增强方法，基于风格混合，无需修改架构或添加额外损失。
contributions: 系统实证研究，澄清了风格迁移用于域泛化中三个关键设计轴的矛盾结论。
提出StyleMixDG方法，在GTAV→{BDD100k, Cityscapes, Mapillary Vistas}基准上持续优于强基线。
analysis.experiments: 在GTAV→{BDD100k, Cityscapes, Mapillary Vistas}基准上评估，StyleMixDG相比强基线有一致提升。
limitations: 仅基于合成到真实场景的迁移，未验证其他域泛化场景。
风格池的构建可能依赖外部数据集，增加额外成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过系统实验揭示风格迁移中风格池多样性、纹理复杂度和风格来源对域泛化的影响，并提出轻量级增强方法StyleMixDG。

papers.title: INTERACT: An AI-Driven Extended Reality Framework for Accesible Communication Featuring Real-Time Sign Language Interpretation and Emotion Recognition
papers.abstract: Video conferencing has become central to professional collaboration, yet most platforms offer limited support for deaf, hard-of-hearing, and multilingual users. The World Health Organisation estimates that over 430 million people worldwide require rehabilitation for disabling hearing loss, a figure projected to exceed 700 million by 2050. Conventional accessibility measures remain constrained by high costs, limited availability, and logistical barriers, while Extended Reality (XR) technologies open new possibilities for immersive and inclusive communication. This paper presents INTERACT (Inclusive Networking for Translation and Embodied Real-Time Augmented Communication Tool), an AI-driven XR platform that integrates real-time speech-to-text conversion, International Sign Language (ISL) rendering through 3D avatars, multilingual translation, and emotion recognition within an immersive virtual environment. Built on the CORTEX2 framework and deployed on Meta Quest 3 headsets, INTERACT combines Whisper for speech recognition, NLLB for multilingual translation, RoBERTa for emotion classification, and Google MediaPipe for gesture extraction. Pilot evaluations were conducted in two phases, first with technical experts from academia and industry, and subsequently with members of the deaf community. The trials reported 92% user satisfaction, transcription accuracy above 85%, and 90% emotion-detection precision, with a mean overall experience rating of 4.6 out of 5.0 and 90% of participants willing to take part in further testing. The results highlight strong potential for advancing accessibility across educational, cultural, and professional settings. An extended version of this work, including full pilot data and implementation details, has been published as an Open Research Europe article [Tantaroudas et al., 2026a].

analysis.tldr: 提出一个AI驱动的扩展现实框架，集成手语翻译、情感识别等功能，提升听障人士的沟通无障碍性。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频会议平台对听障和多语言用户支持有限，传统无障碍措施成本高、可用性差，XR技术为沉浸式包容通信提供了新可能。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个集成实时手语翻译、情感识别和多语言翻译的XR系统，以改善听障人士的远程沟通体验。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于CORTEX2框架，在Meta Quest 3头显上集成Whisper（语音识别）、NLLB（多语言翻译）、RoBERTa（情感分类）和Google MediaPipe（手势提取），实现实时语音转文字、国际手语3D化身渲染、多语言翻译和情感识别。
contributions: 提出INTERACT框架，首个集成实时手语翻译和情感识别的AI驱动XR通信系统。
通过两阶段试点评估（技术专家和听障社区），验证了系统的高用户满意度（92%）和良好性能（转录准确率>85%，情感检测精度90%）。
analysis.experiments: 两阶段试点评估：第一阶段由学术界和工业界技术专家进行，第二阶段由听障社区成员参与。结果：92%用户满意度，转录准确率>85%，情感检测精度90%，平均体验评分4.6/5.0，90%参与者愿意继续测试。
limitations: 试点规模可能较小，未提供具体参与者数量。
系统依赖特定硬件（Meta Quest 3），可能限制普及性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个AI驱动的扩展现实框架，集成手语翻译、情感识别等功能，提升听障人士的沟通无障碍性。

papers.title: ID-Selection: Importance-Diversity Based Visual Token Selection for Efficient LVLM Inference
papers.abstract: Recent advances have explored visual token pruning to accelerate the inference of large vision-language models (LVLMs). However, existing methods often struggle to balance token importance and diversity: importance-based methods tend to retain redundant tokens, whereas diversity-based methods may overlook informative ones. This trade-off becomes especially problematic under high reduction ratios, where preserving only a small subset of visual tokens is critical. To address this issue, we propose ID-Selection, a simple yet effective token selection strategy for efficient LVLM inference. The key idea is to couple importance estimation with diversity-aware iterative selection: each token is first assigned an importance score, after which high-scoring tokens are selected one by one while the scores of similar tokens are progressively suppressed. In this way, ID-Selection preserves informative tokens while reducing redundancy in a unified selection process. Extensive experiments across 5 LVLM backbones and 16 main benchmarks demonstrate that ID-Selection consistently achieves superior performance and efficiency, especially under extreme pruning ratios. For example, on LLaVA-1.5-7B, ID-Selection prunes 97.2% of visual tokens, retaining only 16 tokens, while reducing inference FLOPs by over 97% and preserving 91.8% of the original performance, all without additional training.

analysis.tldr: 提出ID-Selection方法，通过重要性-多样性联合选择视觉令牌，在极高压缩比下仍保持LVLM性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉令牌剪枝方法难以平衡重要性和多样性，导致高压缩比下性能严重下降。
analysis.problem: 如何在高压缩比下同时保留信息丰富且多样化的视觉令牌，以加速LVLM推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 重要性方法保留冗余令牌，多样性方法可能忽略信息令牌，高压缩比下矛盾加剧。
analysis.method: 先为每个令牌分配重要性分数，然后迭代选择高分令牌并抑制相似令牌的分数，实现重要性-多样性联合选择。
contributions: 提出ID-Selection，一种简单有效的视觉令牌选择策略，统一了重要性和多样性。
在5个LVLM骨干和16个基准上验证了优越性能，尤其在极端剪枝率下。
analysis.experiments: 在5个LVLM骨干和16个基准上进行实验，例如LLaVA-1.5-7B上剪枝97.2%令牌（仅保留16个），推理FLOPs减少97%以上，保持91.8%原始性能，无需额外训练。
limitations: 可能依赖重要性评分质量，未讨论评分方法泛化性。
仅针对视觉令牌，未扩展到其他模态。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ID-Selection方法，通过重要性-多样性联合选择视觉令牌，在极高压缩比下仍保持LVLM性能。

papers.title: Uncovering Linguistic Fragility in Vision-Language-Action Models via Diversity-Aware Red Teaming
papers.abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have achieved remarkable success in robotic manipulation. However, their robustness to linguistic nuances remains a critical, under-explored safety concern, posing a significant safety risk to real-world deployment. Red teaming, or identifying environmental scenarios that elicit catastrophic behaviors, is an important step in ensuring the safe deployment of embodied AI agents. Reinforcement learning (RL) has emerged as a promising approach in automated red teaming that aims to uncover these vulnerabilities. However, standard RL-based adversaries often suffer from severe mode collapse due to their reward-maximizing nature, which tends to converge to a narrow set of trivial or repetitive failure patterns, failing to reveal the comprehensive landscape of meaningful risks. To bridge this gap, we propose a novel \textbf{D}iversity-\textbf{A}ware \textbf{E}mbodied \textbf{R}ed \textbf{T}eaming (\textbf{DAERT}) framework, to expose the vulnerabilities of VLAs against linguistic variations. Our design is based on evaluating a uniform policy, which is able to generate a diverse set of challenging instructions while ensuring its attack effectiveness, measured by execution failures in a physical simulator. We conduct extensive experiments across different robotic benchmarks against two state-of-the-art VLAs, including $π_0$ and OpenVLA. Our method consistently discovers a wider range of more effective adversarial instructions that reduce the average task success rate from 93.33\% to 5.85\%, demonstrating a scalable approach to stress-testing VLA agents and exposing critical safety blind spots before real-world deployment.

analysis.tldr: 提出多样性感知的红队测试框架DAERT，系统暴露VLA模型对语言变化的脆弱性，将任务成功率从93.33%降至5.85%。
analysis.research_motivation: VLA模型在机器人操作中表现优异，但对语言细微变化的鲁棒性不足，构成实际部署的安全隐患；现有基于RL的红队测试方法因奖励最大化导致模式坍缩，只能发现重复的失败模式，无法全面暴露风险。
analysis.problem: 如何高效、全面地发现VLA模型在面对多样化语言指令时的脆弱性，避免红队测试中的模式坍缩问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准RL红队测试因追求奖励最大化而收敛到狭窄的失败模式，无法揭示有意义的多样化风险。
analysis.method: 提出DAERT框架，基于均匀策略生成多样化且有效的对抗指令，在物理模拟器中以执行失败为攻击效果度量，系统测试VLA模型的语言脆弱性。
contributions: 提出DAERT框架，首次将多样性感知引入VLA红队测试，解决模式坍缩问题。
在多个机器人基准上对π0和OpenVLA进行实验，将平均任务成功率从93.33%降至5.85%，证明方法的有效性和可扩展性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个机器人基准上对两种最先进的VLA模型（π0和OpenVLA）进行实验，使用物理模拟器评估攻击效果。
limitations: 仅关注语言指令的多样性，未考虑其他模态（如视觉）的对抗扰动。
实验仅在模拟器中进行，真实世界部署效果有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多样性感知的红队测试框架DAERT，系统暴露VLA模型对语言变化的脆弱性，将任务成功率从93.33%降至5.85%。

papers.title: RABC-Net: Reliability-Aware Annotation-Free Skin Lesion Segmentation for Low-Resource Dermoscopy
papers.abstract: Pixel-level annotation is costly in low-resource dermoscopy. We present RABC-Net, a reliability-aware annotation-free segmentation system that combines pseudo-label reliability learning, restricted target-domain adaptation, and Reliability-Adaptive Boundary Calibration (RABC). The system decouples reliability learning from deployment: uncertainty-aware pseudo-label interaction shapes robust representations during training, while the image-only inference path is preserved and RABC performs local logit-space calibration from boundary confidence, uncertainty, and foreground probability. No manual masks are used for training or target-domain adaptation; validation labels, when available, are used only for final operating-point selection. Across ISIC-2017, ISIC-2018, and PH2, RABC-Net achieves macro-average DICE/JAC of 86.58\%/79.47\% and consistent matched-protocol results. Controlled within-study analyses show that RABC provides localized gains over nonlearned boundary correction, while the overall result comes from the full reliability-aware system. Adaptation updates only 3.50\% of model parameters, image-only inference runs at 87.4 FPS, and the selected operating points use $σ=0$ on all three datasets, indicating that learned calibration avoids extra smoothing at deployment.

analysis.tldr: 提出RABC-Net，一种无需像素级标注的皮肤病变分割方法，通过伪标签可靠性学习和边界校准实现低资源场景下的高效分割。
analysis.research_motivation: 低资源皮肤镜图像中像素级标注成本高昂，现有无监督方法性能有限，需要一种无需人工标注的可靠分割方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在无像素级标注的情况下，实现低资源皮肤镜图像中皮肤病变的准确分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合伪标签可靠性学习、受限目标域自适应和可靠性自适应边界校准（RABC），在训练时通过不确定性感知的伪标签交互学习鲁棒表示，推理时仅需图像输入，RABC利用边界置信度、不确定性和前景概率进行局部logit空间校准。
contributions: 提出RABC-Net，一种无需像素级标注的皮肤病变分割系统，结合伪标签可靠性学习和边界校准。
在ISIC-2017、ISIC-2018和PH2数据集上取得有竞争力的分割性能，且推理速度快（87.4 FPS），仅更新3.50%模型参数。
analysis.experiments: 在ISIC-2017、ISIC-2018和PH2数据集上进行实验，宏平均DICE/JAC为86.58%/79.47%，且一致匹配协议结果。
limitations: 方法依赖伪标签质量，可能受噪声影响。
仅在皮肤镜数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RABC-Net，一种无需像素级标注的皮肤病变分割方法，通过伪标签可靠性学习和边界校准实现低资源场景下的高效分割。

papers.title: Label Effects: Shared Heuristic Reliance in Trust Assessment by Humans and LLM-as-a-Judge
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used as automated evaluators (LLM-as-a-Judge). This work challenges its reliability by showing that trust judgments by LLMs are biased by disclosed source labels. Using a counterfactual design, we find that both humans and LLM judges assign higher trust to information labeled as human-authored than to the same content labeled as AI-generated. Eye-tracking data reveal that humans rely heavily on source labels as heuristic cues for judgments. We analyze LLM internal states during judgment. Across label conditions, models allocate denser attention to the label region than the content region, and this label dominance is stronger under Human labels than AI labels, consistent with the human gaze patterns. Besides, decision uncertainty measured by logits is higher under AI labels than Human labels. These results indicate that the source label is a salient heuristic cue for both humans and LLMs. It raises validity concerns for label-sensitive LLM-as-a-Judge evaluation, and we cautiously raise that aligning models with human preferences may propagate human heuristic reliance into models, motivating debiased evaluation and alignment.

analysis.tldr: LLM作为评判者时，会像人类一样依赖来源标签（如“人类撰写”或“AI生成”）作为启发式线索，导致信任判断偏差。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM-as-a-Judge被广泛使用，但其可靠性未充分验证；人类判断易受标签影响，而LLM是否也存在类似偏差尚不清楚。
analysis.problem: 揭示LLM在信任评估中是否受来源标签的启发式偏差影响，并比较其与人类行为的异同。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 人类和LLM均对标记为“人类撰写”的内容给予更高信任，即使内容相同；眼动数据表明人类依赖标签区域，LLM内部注意力也集中在标签区域，且“人类标签”下标签主导性更强；AI标签下决策不确定性更高。
analysis.method: 采用反事实设计，控制内容相同仅改变来源标签；收集人类眼动数据并分析LLM内部注意力（如注意力权重）和logits不确定性。
contributions: 发现LLM-as-a-Judge存在标签偏差，与人类启发式依赖一致
通过眼动和内部状态分析，揭示标签作为启发式线索的机制
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及眼动数据和LLM内部状态分析。
limitations: 仅针对信任评估任务，可能不适用于其他评判维度
未提出具体去偏方法
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM作为评判者时，会像人类一样依赖来源标签（如“人类撰写”或“AI生成”）作为启发式线索，导致信任判断偏差。

papers.title: Identity-Aware U-Net: Fine-grained Cell Segmentation via Identity-Aware Representation Learning
papers.abstract: Precise segmentation of objects with highly similar shapes remains a challenging problem in dense prediction, especially in scenarios with ambiguous boundaries, overlapping instances, and weak inter-instance visual differences. While conventional segmentation models are effective at localizing object regions, they often lack the discriminative capacity required to reliably distinguish a target object from morphologically similar distractors. In this work, we study fine-grained object segmentation from an identity-aware perspective and propose Identity-Aware U-Net (IAU-Net), a unified framework that jointly models spatial localization and instance discrimination. Built upon a U-Net-style encoder-decoder architecture, our method augments the segmentation backbone with an auxiliary embedding branch that learns discriminative identity representations from high-level features, while the main branch predicts pixel-accurate masks. To enhance robustness in distinguishing objects with near-identical contours or textures, we further incorporate triplet-based metric learning, which pulls target-consistent embeddings together and separates them from hard negatives with similar morphology. This design enables the model to move beyond category-level segmentation and acquire a stronger capability for precise discrimination among visually similar objects. Experiments on benchmarks including cell segmentation demonstrate promising results, particularly in challenging cases involving similar contours, dense layouts, and ambiguous boundaries.

analysis.tldr: 提出身份感知U-Net，通过身份感知表征学习实现细粒度细胞分割。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统分割模型在区分形态相似、边界模糊或重叠的物体时缺乏判别能力，难以可靠区分目标与干扰物。
analysis.problem: 解决高度相似形状物体的精细分割问题，特别是在弱实例间视觉差异、重叠和模糊边界场景下。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在U-Net架构上增加辅助嵌入分支，通过三元组度量学习学习判别性身份表征，主分支预测像素级掩码。
contributions: 提出身份感知U-Net框架，联合建模空间定位和实例判别。
引入三元组度量学习增强对形态相似物体的区分能力。
analysis.experiments: 在细胞分割等基准上进行了实验，在相似轮廓、密集布局和模糊边界等挑战性案例中取得有希望的结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量三元组采样策略。
在极端重叠或严重遮挡场景下性能可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出身份感知U-Net，通过身份感知表征学习实现细粒度细胞分割。

papers.title: AI-Driven Modular Services for Accessible Multilingual Education in Immersive Extended Reality Settings: Integrating Speech Processing, Translation, and Sign Language Rendering
papers.abstract: This work introduces a modular platform that brings together six AI services, automatic speech recognition via OpenAI Whisper, multilingual translation through Meta NLLB, speech synthesis using AWS Polly, emotion classification with RoBERTa, dialogue summarisation via flan t5 base samsum, and International Sign (IS) rendering through Google MediaPipe. A corpus of IS gesture recordings was processed to derive hand landmark coordinates, which were subsequently mapped onto three dimensional avatar animations inside a virtual reality (VR) environment. Validation comprised technical benchmarking of each AI component, including comparative assessments of speech synthesis providers and multilingual translation models (NLLB 200 and EuroLLM 1.7B variants). Technical evaluations confirmed the suitability of the platform for real time XR deployment. Speech synthesis benchmarking established that AWS Polly delivers the lowest latency at a competitive price point. The EuroLLM 1.7B Instruct variant attained a higher BLEU score, surpassing NLLB. These findings establish the viability of orchestrating cross modal AI services within XR settings for accessible, multilingual language instruction. The modular design permits independent scaling and adaptation to varied educational contexts, providing a foundation for equitable learning solutions aligned with European Union digital accessibility goals.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个模块化平台，集成语音识别、翻译、情感分类、摘要和手语渲染六种AI服务，用于扩展现实中的多语言无障碍教育。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩展现实（XR）环境中的多语言教育面临技术集成和实时性挑战，现有方案缺乏模块化、可扩展的跨模态AI服务整合。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个模块化平台，在XR环境中实时集成语音识别、翻译、情感分析、摘要和手语渲染，以实现无障碍多语言教育。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建模块化平台，集成六个AI服务：OpenAI Whisper（语音识别）、Meta NLLB（翻译）、AWS Polly（语音合成）、RoBERTa（情感分类）、flan-t5-base-samsum（对话摘要）、Google MediaPipe（国际手语渲染）。通过手语手势记录提取关键点坐标，映射到VR环境中的3D虚拟人动画。
contributions: 提出一个集成六种AI服务的模块化平台，用于XR环境中的无障碍多语言教育。
通过技术基准测试验证各组件性能，包括语音合成延迟和翻译BLEU分数比较。
analysis.experiments: 对每个AI组件进行技术基准测试，包括语音合成提供商比较（AWS Polly延迟最低）和多语言翻译模型比较（EuroLLM 1.7B Instruct BLEU分数高于NLLB 200）。
limitations: 摘要未提及手语渲染的准确性和用户评估。
平台在真实教育场景中的长期效果未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个模块化平台，集成语音识别、翻译、情感分类、摘要和手语渲染六种AI服务，用于扩展现实中的多语言无障碍教育。

papers.title: Foundations for Agentic AI Investigations from the Forensic Analysis of OpenClaw
papers.abstract: Agentic Al systems are increasingly deployed as personal assistants and are likely to become a common object of digital investigations. However, little is known about how their internal state and actions can be reconstructed during forensic analysis. Despite growing popularity, systematic forensic approaches for such systems remain largely unexplored. This paper presents an empirical study of OpenClaw a widely used single-agent assistant. We examine OpenClaw's technical design via static code analysis and apply differential forensic analysis to identify recoverable traces across stages of the agent interaction loop. We classify and correlate these traces to assess their investigative value in a systematic way. Based on these observations, we propose an agent artifact taxonomy that captures recurring investigative patterns. Finally, we highlight a foundational challenge for agentic Al forensics: agent-mediated execution introduces an additional layer of abstraction and substantial nondeterminism in trace generation. The large language model (LLM), the execution environment, and the evolving context can influence tool choice and state transitions in ways that are largely absent from rule-based software. Overall, our results provide an initial foundation for the systematic investigation of agentic Al and outline implications for digital forensic practice and future research.

analysis.tldr: 通过分析OpenClaw单智能体助手的取证痕迹，提出智能体AI取证的基础框架与挑战。
analysis.research_motivation: 智能体AI系统作为个人助手日益普及，但数字取证领域缺乏对其内部状态和行为的系统性重建方法。
analysis.problem: 如何通过取证分析重建智能体AI系统的内部状态和动作轨迹。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 智能体执行引入额外抽象层和大量非确定性，LLM、执行环境和上下文影响工具选择和状态转换，与传统规则软件不同。
analysis.method: 对OpenClaw进行静态代码分析和差分取证分析，识别交互循环各阶段的可恢复痕迹，分类并关联痕迹以评估调查价值，提出智能体工件分类法。
contributions: 首次对单智能体助手OpenClaw进行系统性取证分析，识别可恢复痕迹并评估其调查价值。
提出智能体工件分类法，捕捉重复出现的调查模式，并指出智能体AI取证的基础性挑战。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对单智能体助手OpenClaw，可能不适用于多智能体或更复杂的系统。
未提供定量实验评估痕迹恢复的准确性和完整性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过分析OpenClaw单智能体助手的取证痕迹，提出智能体AI取证的基础框架与挑战。

papers.title: ResearchEVO: An End-to-End Framework for Automated Scientific Discovery and Documentation
papers.abstract: An important recurring pattern in scientific breakthroughs is a two-stage process: an initial phase of undirected experimentation that yields an unexpected finding, followed by a retrospective phase that explains why the finding works and situates it within existing theory. We present ResearchEVO, an end-to-end framework that computationally instantiates this discover-then-explain paradigm. The Evolution Phase employs LLM-guided bi-dimensional co-evolution -- simultaneously optimizing both algorithmic logic and overall architecture -- to search the space of code implementations purely by fitness, without requiring any understanding of the solutions it produces. The Writing Phase then takes the best-performing algorithm and autonomously generates a complete, publication-ready research paper through sentence-level retrieval-augmented generation with explicit anti-hallucination verification and automated experiment design. To our knowledge, ResearchEVO is the first system to cover this full pipeline end to end: no prior work jointly performs principled algorithm evolution and literature-grounded scientific documentation. We validate the framework on two cross-disciplinary scientific problems -- Quantum Error Correction using real Google quantum hardware data, and Physics-Informed Neural Networks -- where the Evolution Phase discovered human-interpretable algorithmic mechanisms that had not been previously proposed in the respective domain literatures. In both cases, the Writing Phase autonomously produced compilable LaTeX manuscripts that correctly grounded these blind discoveries in existing theory via RAG, with zero fabricated citations.

analysis.tldr: 提出端到端自动化科学发现与论文撰写框架，通过进化搜索算法空间并用RAG生成可发表论文。
analysis.research_motivation: 科学发现常遵循先意外发现后理论解释的模式，但现有自动化方法要么只做发现要么只做文档，缺乏端到端系统。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个从零开始自动进行算法发现并生成完整、可发表研究论文的端到端框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架：进化阶段使用LLM引导的双维协同进化（同时优化算法逻辑和整体架构）搜索代码空间；写作阶段通过句子级RAG和反幻觉验证自动生成论文。
contributions: 首个端到端覆盖算法发现与科学文档生成的框架
在量子纠错和物理信息神经网络两个跨学科问题上验证了框架有效性，进化阶段发现了文献中未提出的人类可解释算法机制
analysis.experiments: 在量子纠错（使用真实Google量子硬件数据）和物理信息神经网络两个问题上验证，写作阶段自动生成了可编译的LaTeX手稿，零虚假引用。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM的生成质量，进化搜索空间有限
仅验证了两个领域，泛化性待进一步检验
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出端到端自动化科学发现与论文撰写框架，通过进化搜索算法空间并用RAG生成可发表论文。

papers.title: PASTA: Vision Transformer Patch Aggregation for Weakly Supervised Target and Anomaly Segmentation
papers.abstract: Detecting unseen anomalies in unstructured environments presents a critical challenge for industrial and agricultural applications such as material recycling and weeding. Existing perception systems frequently fail to satisfy the strict operational requirements of these domains, specifically real-time processing, pixel-level segmentation precision, and robust accuracy, due to their reliance on exhaustively annotated datasets. To address these limitations, we propose a weakly supervised pipeline for object segmentation and classification using weak image-level supervision called 'Patch Aggregation for Segmentation of Targets and Anomalies' (PASTA). By comparing an observed scene with a nominal reference, PASTA identifies Target and Anomaly objects through distribution analysis in self-supervised Vision Transformer (ViT) feature spaces. Our pipeline utilizes semantic text-prompts via the Segment Anything Model 3 to guide zero-shot object segmentation. Evaluations on a custom steel scrap recycling dataset and a plant dataset demonstrate a 75.8% training time reduction of our approach to domain-specific baselines. While being domain-agnostic, our method achieves superior Target (up to 88.3% IoU) and Anomaly (up to 63.5% IoU) segmentation performance in the industrial and agricultural domain.

analysis.tldr: 提出弱监督ViT补丁聚合方法PASTA，利用图像级标签实现目标与异常分割，在工业/农业数据集上训练时间减少75.8%。
analysis.research_motivation: 工业与农业应用（如材料回收、除草）中，现有感知系统依赖详尽标注数据集，难以同时满足实时处理、像素级分割精度和鲁棒准确性的要求。
analysis.problem: 如何在弱图像级监督下实现高效、准确的目标与异常分割，且无需领域特定标注。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PASTA管道：通过自监督ViT特征空间的分布分析，比较观测场景与名义参考，识别目标和异常；利用SAM 3的语义文本提示引导零样本分割。
contributions: 提出弱监督ViT补丁聚合方法PASTA，仅需图像级标签即可实现像素级分割。
在工业（废钢回收）和农业（植物）数据集上验证，训练时间减少75.8%，目标IoU达88.3%，异常IoU达63.5%。
analysis.experiments: 在自定义废钢回收数据集和植物数据集上评估，与领域特定基线相比训练时间减少75.8%，目标分割IoU最高88.3%，异常分割IoU最高63.5%。
limitations: 可能依赖参考场景的可用性，在动态环境中参考获取困难。
异常分割性能（63.5% IoU）仍有提升空间。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出弱监督ViT补丁聚合方法PASTA，利用图像级标签实现目标与异常分割，在工业/农业数据集上训练时间减少75.8%。

papers.title: Purify-then-Align: Towards Robust Human Sensing under Modality Missing with Knowledge Distillation from Noisy Multimodal Teacher
papers.abstract: Robust multimodal human sensing must overcome the critical challenge of missing modalities. Two principal barriers are the Representation Gap between heterogeneous data and the Contamination Effect from low-quality modalities. These barriers are causally linked, as the corruption introduced by contamination fundamentally impedes the reduction of representation disparities. In this paper, we propose PTA, a novel "Purify-then-Align" framework that solves this causal dependency through a synergistic integration of meta-learning and knowledge diffusion. To purify the knowledge source, PTA first employs a meta-learning-driven weighting mechanism that dynamically learns to down-weight the influence of noisy, low-contributing modalities. Subsequently, to align different modalities, PTA introduces a diffusion-based knowledge distillation paradigm in which an information-rich clean teacher, formed from this purified consensus, refines the features of each student modality. The ultimate payoff of this "Purify-then-Align" strategy is the creation of exceptionally powerful single-modality encoders imbued with cross-modal knowledge. Comprehensive experiments on the large-scale MM-Fi and XRF55 datasets, under pronounced Representation Gap and Contamination Effect, demonstrate that PTA achieves state-of-the-art performance and significantly improves the robustness of single-modality models in diverse missing-modality scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出“先净化后对齐”框架，通过元学习与扩散知识蒸馏解决多模态缺失下的表征差距与污染效应，提升单模态鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态人体感知中模态缺失是核心挑战，现有方法受困于异质数据间的表征差距和低质量模态的污染效应，且两者存在因果关联，亟需联合解决方案。
analysis.problem: 如何同时缓解多模态缺失场景下的表征差距与污染效应，提升单模态编码器的鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出表征差距与污染效应存在因果关联：污染引入的噪声从根本上阻碍了表征差异的缩小。
analysis.method: 提出PTA框架，包含两个阶段：1）净化阶段：利用元学习驱动的加权机制动态降低噪声低贡献模态的影响；2）对齐阶段：基于扩散的知识蒸馏，用净化后的共识形成信息丰富的干净教师，精炼每个学生模态的特征。
contributions: 揭示了多模态缺失中表征差距与污染效应的因果关联，并据此设计了解耦方案。
提出PTA框架，融合元学习加权与扩散知识蒸馏，实现先净化后对齐。
在MM-Fi和XRF55数据集上取得SOTA，显著提升单模态模型在多种缺失场景下的鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在MM-Fi和XRF55大规模数据集上，针对表征差距和污染效应进行综合实验，结果表明PTA达到SOTA性能。
limitations: 可能依赖元学习训练的计算开销。
扩散蒸馏的推理速度可能较慢。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出“先净化后对齐”框架，通过元学习与扩散知识蒸馏解决多模态缺失下的表征差距与污染效应，提升单模态鲁棒性。

papers.title: WRF4CIR: Weight-Regularized Fine-Tuning Network for Composed Image Retrieval
papers.abstract: Composed Image Retrieval (CIR) task aims to retrieve target images based on reference images and modification texts. Current CIR methods primarily rely on fine-tuning vision-language pre-trained models. However, we find that these approaches commonly suffer from severe overfitting, posing challenges for CIR with limited triplet data. To better understand this issue, we present a systematic study of overfitting in VLP-based CIR, revealing a significant and previously overlooked generalization gap across different models and datasets. Motivated by these findings, we introduce WRF4CIR, a Weight-Regularized Fine-tuning network for CIR. Specifically, during the fine-tuning process, we apply adversarial perturbations to the model weights for regularization, where these perturbations are generated in the opposite direction of gradient descent. Intuitively, WRF4CIR increases the difficulty of fitting the training data, which helps mitigate overfitting in CIR under limited triplet supervision. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate that WRF4CIR significantly narrows the generalization gap and achieves substantial improvements over existing methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出权重正则化微调网络WRF4CIR，通过对抗扰动缓解组合图像检索中的过拟合问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有CIR方法在有限三元组数据上严重过拟合，导致泛化差距，这一问题此前未被系统研究。
analysis.problem: 解决基于视觉-语言预训练模型的组合图像检索在有限数据下的过拟合问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 系统研究发现不同模型和数据集上存在显著且被忽视的泛化差距，即过拟合现象。
analysis.method: 在微调过程中对模型权重施加对抗扰动（沿梯度下降反方向生成）作为正则化，增加训练数据拟合难度。
contributions: 首次系统研究VLP-based CIR中的过拟合问题，揭示泛化差距。
提出权重正则化微调网络WRF4CIR，通过对抗权重扰动缓解过拟合。
analysis.experiments: 在基准数据集上实验表明WRF4CIR显著缩小泛化差距并超越现有方法。
limitations: 可能对扰动幅度敏感，需要调参。
仅针对CIR任务验证，泛化性待检验。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出权重正则化微调网络WRF4CIR，通过对抗扰动缓解组合图像检索中的过拟合问题。

papers.title: High-Resolution Single-Shot Polarimetric Imaging Made Easy
papers.abstract: Polarization-based vision has gained increasing attention for providing richer physical cues beyond RGB images. While achieving single-shot capture is highly desirable for practical applications, existing Division-of-Focal-Plane (DoFP) sensors inherently suffer from reduced spatial resolution and artifacts due to their spatial multiplexing mechanism. To overcome these limitations without sacrificing the snapshot capability, we propose EasyPolar, a multi-view polarimetric imaging framework. Our system is grounded in the physical insight that three independent intensity measurements are sufficient to fully characterize linear polarization. Guided by this, we design a triple-camera setup consisting of three synchronized RGB cameras that capture one unpolarized view and two polarized views with distinct orientations. Building upon this hardware design, we further propose a confidence-guided polarization reconstruction network to address the potential misalignment in multi-view fusion. The network performs multi-modal feature fusion under a confidence-aware physical guidance mechanism, which effectively suppresses warping-induced artifacts and enforces explicit geometric constraints on the solution space. Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves high-quality results and benefits various downstream tasks.

analysis.tldr: EasyPolar通过三相机多视角设置和置信度引导网络，实现高质量单次偏振成像。
analysis.research_motivation: 偏振成像能提供RGB图像之外的物理信息，但现有DoFP传感器因空间复用导致分辨率下降和伪影，且单次拍摄需求在应用中至关重要。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持单次拍摄能力的同时，克服DoFP传感器空间分辨率损失和伪影问题，实现高质量偏振成像。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出EasyPolar框架：基于线性偏振仅需三个独立强度测量的物理原理，设计三相机同步系统（一个非偏振视图+两个不同取向偏振视图）；并设计置信度引导偏振重建网络，通过置信度感知物理引导机制进行多模态特征融合，抑制融合伪影并施加几何约束。
contributions: 提出基于三相机多视角的偏振成像硬件设计，利用物理原理减少所需测量数。
设计置信度引导偏振重建网络，解决多视角融合中的对齐问题和伪影。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明方法能获得高质量结果并有益于多种下游任务，但摘要未提供具体数值或基准对比。
limitations: 硬件设置需要三个同步相机，可能增加成本和校准复杂度。
方法依赖物理假设（线性偏振），对圆偏振等场景可能不适用。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EasyPolar通过三相机多视角设置和置信度引导网络，实现高质量单次偏振成像。

papers.title: Weakly Supervised Distillation of Hallucination Signals into Transformer Representations
papers.abstract: Existing hallucination detection methods for large language models (LLMs) rely on external verification at inference time, requiring gold answers, retrieval systems, or auxiliary judge models. We ask whether this external supervision can instead be distilled into the model's own representations during training, enabling hallucination detection from internal activations alone at inference time. We introduce a weak supervision framework that combines three complementary grounding signals: substring matching, sentence embedding similarity, and an LLM as a judge verdict to label generated responses as grounded or hallucinated without human annotation. Using this framework, we construct a 15000-sample dataset from SQuAD v2 (10500 train/development samples and a separate 5000-sample test set), where each example pairs a LLaMA-2-7B generated answer with its full per-layer hidden states and structured hallucination labels. We then train five probing classifiers: ProbeMLP (M0), LayerWiseMLP (M1), CrossLayerTransformer (M2), HierarchicalTransformer (M3), and CrossLayerAttentionTransformerV2 (M4), directly on these hidden states, treating external grounding signals as training-time supervision only. Our central hypothesis is that hallucination detection signals can be distilled into transformer representations, enabling internal detection without any external verification at inference time. Results support this hypothesis. Transformer-based probes achieve the strongest discrimination, with M2 performing best on 5-fold average AUC/F1, and M3 performing best on both single-fold validation and held-out test evaluation. We also benchmark inference efficiency: probe latency ranges from 0.15 to 5.62 ms (batched) and 1.55 to 6.66 ms (single sample), while end-to-end generation plus probe throughput remains approximately 0.231 queries per second, indicating negligible practical overhead.

analysis.tldr: 将幻觉检测信号蒸馏到LLM内部表征中，实现无需外部验证的推理时检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM幻觉检测依赖推理时的外部验证（如金标准答案、检索系统或辅助评判模型），成本高且不灵活。
analysis.problem: 如何将外部监督信号蒸馏到模型内部表征，使得仅通过内部激活即可检测幻觉。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出弱监督框架，结合子串匹配、句子嵌入相似度和LLM评判三种信号自动标注生成回答，构建15000样本数据集，训练五种探针分类器（ProbeMLP, LayerWiseMLP, CrossLayerTransformer, HierarchicalTransformer, CrossLayerAttentionTransformerV2）直接基于隐藏状态进行幻觉检测。
contributions: 提出将外部幻觉检测信号蒸馏到LLM内部表征的弱监督框架。
构建了包含15000样本的幻觉标注数据集及五种探针分类器，实验表明基于Transformer的探针在AUC/F1上表现最佳。
analysis.experiments: 在SQuAD v2数据集上使用LLaMA-2-7B生成回答，进行5折交叉验证和独立测试集评估，并测量了探针延迟和吞吐量。
limitations: 仅基于SQuAD v2数据集，泛化性未知。
探针性能可能受限于弱监督标签质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将幻觉检测信号蒸馏到LLM内部表征中，实现无需外部验证的推理时检测。

papers.title: Physics-Aligned Spectral Mamba: Decoupling Semantics and Dynamics for Few-Shot Hyperspectral Target Detection
papers.abstract: Meta-learning facilitates few-shot hyperspectral target detection (HTD), but adapting deep backbones remains challenging. Full-parameter fine-tuning is inefficient and prone to overfitting, and existing methods largely ignore the frequency-domain structure and spectral band continuity of hyperspectral data, limiting spectral adaptation and cross-domain generalization.To address these challenges, we propose SpecMamba, a parameter-efficient and frequency-aware framework that decouples stable semantic representation from agile spectral adaptation. Specifically, we introduce a Discrete Cosine Transform Mamba Adapter (DCTMA) on top of frozen Transformer representations. By projecting spectral features into the frequency domain via DCT and leveraging Mamba's linear-complexity state-space recursion, DCTMA explicitly captures global spectral dependencies and band continuity while avoiding the redundancy of full fine-tuning. Furthermore, to address prototype drift caused by limited sample sizes, we design a Prior-Guided Tri-Encoder (PGTE) that allows laboratory spectral priors to guide the optimization of the learnable adapter without disrupting the stable semantic feature space. Finally, a Self-Supervised Pseudo-Label Mapping (SSPLM) strategy is developed for test-time adaptation, enabling efficient decision boundary refinement through uncertainty-aware sampling and dual-path consistency constraints. Extensive experiments on multiple public datasets demonstrate that SpecMamba consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods in detection accuracy and cross-domain generalization.

analysis.tldr: 提出SpecMamba，通过频域Mamba适配器和先验引导编码器实现高光谱目标检测的小样本高效适应。
analysis.research_motivation: 小样本高光谱目标检测中，全参数微调效率低且易过拟合，现有方法忽略频域结构和光谱连续性，限制了光谱适应和跨域泛化。
analysis.problem: 如何在小样本场景下高效适应深度骨干网络，同时利用高光谱数据的频域结构和光谱连续性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SpecMamba框架，包含离散余弦变换Mamba适配器（DCTMA）捕获全局光谱依赖，先验引导三编码器（PGTE）利用实验室光谱先验指导优化，以及自监督伪标签映射（SSPLM）实现测试时自适应。
contributions: 提出参数高效的频域感知框架SpecMamba，解耦语义表示与光谱适应。
设计DCTMA模块，利用DCT和Mamba高效捕获光谱连续性和全局依赖。
提出PGTE和SSPLM策略，分别解决原型漂移和测试时自适应问题。
analysis.experiments: 在多个公开数据集上，SpecMamba在检测精度和跨域泛化方面持续优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖实验室光谱先验的质量和可用性。
Mamba的线性复杂度优势在极长序列下可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SpecMamba，通过频域Mamba适配器和先验引导编码器实现高光谱目标检测的小样本高效适应。

papers.title: Structural Regularities of Cinema SDR-to-HDR Mapping in a Controlled Mastering Workflow: A Pixel-wise Case Study on ASC StEM2
papers.abstract: We present an empirical case study of cinema SDR-to-HDR mapping using ASC StEM2, a rare common-source dataset containing EXR scene-referred images and matched SDR/HDR cinema release masters from the same ACES-based mastering workflow.
