Based on pixel-wise statistics over all 18,580 frames of the test film, we construct a three-domain comparison involving EXR source data, SDR release masters, and HDR release masters to characterize their luminance and color structural relationships within this controlled workflow. In the luminance dimension, SDR and HDR masters exhibit a highly stable global monotonic correspondence, with geometric structure remaining largely consistent overall; sparse and structured deviations appear in self-luminous highlights and specific material regions. In the color dimension, the two masters remain largely consistent in hue, with saturation exhibiting a redistribution pattern of shadow suppression, midtone expansion, and highlight convergence. Using EXR as a scene-referred anchor, we further define a pixel-level decision map that operationally separates EXR-closer recovery regions from content-adaptive adjustment regions. Under this operational definition, 82.4% of sampled image regions are classified as EXR-closer recovery, while the remainder require localized adaptive adjustment. Rather than claiming a universal law for all cinema mastering pipelines, the study provides an interpretable quantitative baseline for structure-aware SDR-to-HDR analysis and for designing learning-based models under shared-source mastering conditions.

analysis.tldr: 基于ASC StEM2数据集，通过像素级统计分析揭示了受控工作流中SDR到HDR映射的亮度与颜色结构规律。
analysis.research_motivation: SDR到HDR映射在电影制作中至关重要，但缺乏基于真实工作流数据的系统性结构分析，现有方法多依赖经验或黑盒模型。
analysis.problem: 在受控的ACES工作流中，定量刻画SDR与HDR母版之间的亮度与颜色结构关系，并定义像素级决策区域。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: SDR和HDR母版在亮度上呈现高度稳定的全局单调对应，几何结构基本一致；仅在自发光高亮和特定材质区域出现稀疏的结构性偏差。颜色上色调基本一致，饱和度呈现阴影抑制、中间调扩展和高光收敛的重分布模式。
analysis.method: 基于ASC StEM2数据集的EXR场景参考图像、SDR和HDR母版，进行像素级三域统计对比，定义EXR-接近恢复区域与内容自适应调整区域的决策图。
contributions: 提供了受控电影工作流中SDR到HDR映射的像素级定量基线。
揭示了亮度与颜色的结构规律，并定义了操作性的区域分类（82.4%为EXR-接近恢复区域）。
analysis.experiments: 在ASC StEM2测试影片的18,580帧上进行了像素级统计分析，未提供具体实验结果数值。
limitations: 仅基于单一数据集ASC StEM2，可能不适用于其他工作流。
未提出具体的映射模型或算法，仅为分析性研究。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于ASC StEM2数据集，通过像素级统计分析揭示了受控工作流中SDR到HDR映射的亮度与颜色结构规律。

papers.title: Evaluation Before Generation: A Paradigm for Robust Multimodal Sentiment Analysis with Missing Modalities
papers.abstract: The missing modality problem poses a fundamental challenge in multimodal sentiment analysis, significantly degrading model accuracy and generalization in real world scenarios. Existing approaches primarily improve robustness through prompt learning and pre trained models. However, two limitations remain. First, the necessity of generating missing modalities lacks rigorous evaluation. Second, the structural dependencies among multimodal prompts and their global coherence are insufficiently explored. To address these issues, a Prompt based Missing Modality Adaptation framework is proposed. A Missing Modality Evaluator is introduced at the input stage to dynamically assess the importance of missing modalities using pretrained models and pseudo labels, thereby avoiding low quality data imputation. Building on this, a Modality invariant Prompt Disentanglement module decomposes shared prompts into modality specific private prompts to capture intrinsic local correlations and improve representation quality. In addition, a Dynamic Prompt Weighting module computes mutual information based weights from cross attention outputs to adaptively suppress interference from missing modalities. To enhance global consistency, a Multi level Prompt Dynamic Connection module integrates shared prompts with self attention outputs through residual connections, leveraging global prompt priors to strengthen key guidance features. Extensive experiments on three public benchmarks, including CMU MOSI, CMU MOSEI, and CH SIMS, demonstrate that the proposed framework achieves state of the art performance and stable results under diverse missing modality settings. The implementation is available at https://github.com/rongfei-chen/ProMMA

analysis.tldr: 提出ProMMA框架，通过缺失模态评估器和提示解耦模块，在缺失模态下实现鲁棒的多模态情感分析。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态情感分析中缺失模态问题严重降低模型准确性和泛化能力，现有方法缺乏对生成缺失模态必要性的严格评估，且多模态提示的结构依赖性和全局一致性探索不足。
analysis.problem: 解决多模态情感分析中缺失模态导致的性能下降问题，避免低质量数据填充，并增强提示的全局一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出基于提示的缺失模态适应框架（ProMMA），包含缺失模态评估器、模态不变提示解耦模块、动态提示加权模块和多层提示动态连接模块。
contributions: 提出缺失模态评估器，在输入阶段动态评估缺失模态重要性，避免低质量数据填充。
设计模态不变提示解耦模块和动态提示加权模块，增强表示质量并自适应抑制缺失模态干扰。
引入多层提示动态连接模块，利用全局提示先验增强关键引导特征，提升全局一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在CMU MOSI、CMU MOSEI和CH-SIMS三个公开基准上，在多种缺失模态设置下达到最先进性能。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练模型的质量和伪标签的准确性。
框架复杂度较高，可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ProMMA框架，通过缺失模态评估器和提示解耦模块，在缺失模态下实现鲁棒的多模态情感分析。

papers.title: Context-Agent: Dynamic Discourse Trees for Non-Linear Dialogue
papers.abstract: Large Language Models demonstrate outstanding performance in many language tasks but still face fundamental challenges in managing the non-linear flow of human conversation. The prevalent approach of treating dialogue history as a flat, linear sequence is misaligned with the intrinsically hierarchical and branching structure of natural discourse, leading to inefficient context utilization and a loss of coherence during extended interactions involving topic shifts or instruction refinements. To address this limitation, we introduce Context-Agent, a novel framework that models multi-turn dialogue history as a dynamic tree structure. This approach mirrors the inherent non-linearity of conversation, enabling the model to maintain and navigate multiple dialogue branches corresponding to different topics. Furthermore, to facilitate robust evaluation, we introduce the Non-linear Task Multi-turn Dialogue (NTM) benchmark, specifically designed to assess model performance in long-horizon, non-linear scenarios. Our experiments demonstrate that Context-Agent enhances task completion rates and improves token efficiency across various LLMs, underscoring the value of structured context management for complex, dynamic dialogues. The dataset and code is available at GitHub.

analysis.tldr: 提出动态对话树结构Context-Agent，解决大模型在非线性对话中的上下文管理问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法将对话历史视为线性序列，无法处理人类对话固有的层次化和分支结构，导致长对话中上下文利用低效、连贯性丢失。
analysis.problem: 如何建模多轮对话中的非线性结构（如主题切换、指令细化），以提升长对话的上下文管理效率和任务完成率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出线性序列建模与自然对话的分支结构不匹配，导致长对话中上下文利用低效和连贯性丢失。
analysis.method: 提出Context-Agent框架，将多轮对话历史建模为动态树结构，支持多个对话分支的维护和导航。
contributions: 提出Context-Agent框架，用动态树结构建模非线性对话历史。
构建NTM基准数据集，专门评估长程非线性对话场景。
analysis.experiments: 在多种LLM上实验，Context-Agent提升了任务完成率和token效率。
limitations: 摘要未提及树结构构建的具体算法复杂度。
可能对极长对话或高度动态分支的扩展性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出动态对话树结构Context-Agent，解决大模型在非线性对话中的上下文管理问题。

papers.title: FastDiSS: Few-step Match Many-step Diffusion Language Model on Sequence-to-Sequence Generation--Full Version
papers.abstract: Self-conditioning has been central to the success of continuous diffusion language models, as it allows models to correct previous errors. Yet its ability degrades precisely in the regime where diffusion is most attractive for deployment: few-step sampling for fast inference. In this study, we show that when models only have a few denoising steps, inaccurate self-conditioning induces a substantial approximation gap; this mistake compounds across denoising steps and ultimately dominate the sample quality. To address this, we propose a novel training framework that handles these errors during learning by perturbing the self-conditioning signal to match inference noise, improving robustness to prior estimation errors. In addition, we introduce a token-level noise-awareness mechanism that prevents training from saturation, hence improving optimization. Extensive experiments across conditional generation benchmarks demonstrate that our framework surpasses standard continuous diffusion models while providing up to 400x faster inference speed, and remains competitive against other one-step diffusion frameworks.

analysis.tldr: 通过扰动自条件信号匹配推理噪声，实现少步扩散语言模型的高效序列生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 连续扩散语言模型在少步采样时自条件能力退化，导致推理速度与生成质量难以兼得。
analysis.problem: 少步去噪中不准确的自条件信号导致近似误差累积，影响生成质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 少步采样时，自条件信号不准确，误差随去噪步骤累积，最终主导样本质量。
analysis.method: 提出训练框架，通过扰动自条件信号匹配推理噪声，并引入token级噪声感知机制防止训练饱和。
contributions: 揭示了少步扩散语言模型中自条件信号误差累积的问题
提出扰动自条件信号和token级噪声感知的训练框架，提升少步生成质量
analysis.experiments: 在条件生成基准上，方法超越标准连续扩散模型，推理速度提升400倍，且与其他一步扩散框架竞争力相当。
limitations: 可能仅适用于连续扩散语言模型，对其他类型扩散模型效果未知
token级噪声感知机制可能增加训练复杂度
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过扰动自条件信号匹配推理噪声，实现少步扩散语言模型的高效序列生成。

papers.title: Pretrain-then-Adapt: Uncertainty-Aware Test-Time Adaptation for Text-based Person Search
papers.abstract: Text-based person search faces inherent limitations due to data scarcity, driven by stringent privacy constraints and the high cost of manual annotation. To mitigate this, existing methods usually rely on a Pretrain-then-Finetune paradigm, where models are first pretrained on synthetic person-caption data to establish cross-modal alignment, followed by fine-tuning on labeled real-world datasets. However, this paradigm lacks practicality in real-world deployment scenarios, where large-scale annotated target-domain data is typically inaccessible. In this work, we propose a new Pretrain-then-Adapt paradigm that eliminates reliance on extensive target-domain supervision through an offline test-time adaptation manner, enabling dynamic model adaptation using only unlabeled test data with minimal post-train time cost. To mitigate overconfidence with false positives of previous entropy-based test-time adaptation, we propose an Uncertainty-Aware Test-Time Adaptation (UATTA) framework, which introduces a bidirectional retrieval disagreement mechanism to estimate uncertainty, i.e., low uncertainty is assigned when an image-text pair ranks highly in both image-to-text and text-to-image retrieval, indicating high alignment; otherwise, high uncertainty is detected. This indicator drives offline test-time model recalibration without labels, effectively mitigating domain shift. We validate UATTA on four benchmarks, i.e., CUHK-PEDES, ICFG-PEDES, RSTPReid, and PAB, showing consistent improvements across both CLIP-based (one-stage) and XVLM-based (two-stage) frameworks. Ablation studies confirm that UATTA outperforms existing offline test-time adaptation strategies, establishing a new benchmark for label-efficient, deployable person search systems. Our code is available at https://github.com/nkuzjh/UATTA.

analysis.tldr: 提出不确定性感知的测试时自适应框架UATTA，用于文本行人搜索，仅用无标签测试数据实现模型自适应。
analysis.research_motivation: 文本行人搜索面临数据稀缺问题，现有预训练-微调范式依赖大量标注目标域数据，实际部署中难以获取。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用目标域标注数据的情况下，利用无标签测试数据动态调整模型以缓解域偏移。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 基于熵的测试时自适应方法对假阳性过于自信，导致过适应。
analysis.method: 提出UATTA框架，通过双向检索不一致性机制估计不确定性（图像-文本对在双向检索中排名均高则不确定性低），并驱动离线测试时模型重校准。
contributions: 提出Pretrain-then-Adapt范式，消除对大规模目标域标注的依赖。
设计不确定性感知的测试时自适应方法UATTA，利用双向检索不一致性估计不确定性并重校准模型。
analysis.experiments: 在CUHK-PEDES、ICFG-PEDES、RSTPReid和PAB四个基准上验证，基于CLIP和XVLM框架均取得一致改进，消融实验表明优于现有离线测试时自适应策略。
limitations: 可能对极端域偏移场景适应性有限。
双向检索不一致性计算可能增加推理开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出不确定性感知的测试时自适应框架UATTA，用于文本行人搜索，仅用无标签测试数据实现模型自适应。

papers.title: COSMO-Agent: Tool-Augmented Agent for Closed-loop Optimization,Simulation,and Modeling Orchestration
papers.abstract: Iterative industrial design-simulation optimization is bottlenecked by the CAD-CAE semantic gap: translating simulation feedback into valid geometric edits under diverse, coupled constraints. To fill this gap, we propose COSMO-Agent (Closed-loop Optimization, Simulation, and Modeling Orchestration), a tool-augmented reinforcement learning (RL) framework that teaches LLMs to complete the closed-loop CAD-CAE process. Specifically, we cast CAD generation, CAE solving, result parsing, and geometry revision as an interactive RL environment, where an LLM learns to orchestrate external tools and revise parametric geometries until constraints are satisfied. To make this learning stable and industrially usable, we design a multi-constraint reward that jointly encourages feasibility, toolchain robustness, and structured output validity. In addition, we contribute an industry-aligned dataset that covers 25 component categories with executable CAD-CAE tasks to support realistic training and evaluation. Experiments show that COSMO-Agent training substantially improves small open-source LLMs for constraint-driven design, exceeding large open-source and strong closed-source models in feasibility, efficiency, and stability.

analysis.tldr: 提出COSMO-Agent框架，通过强化学习训练LLM在闭环中编排CAD-CAE工具，实现约束驱动的工业设计优化。
analysis.research_motivation: 工业设计-仿真迭代优化受限于CAD-CAE语义鸿沟：将仿真反馈转化为有效的几何编辑面临多样且耦合的约束，现有方法难以自动完成闭环。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM学会在闭环中编排CAD生成、CAE求解、结果解析和几何修订等外部工具，以满足多约束设计目标。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将CAD-CAE闭环过程建模为交互式RL环境，LLM学习编排外部工具并修订参数化几何；设计多约束奖励函数联合鼓励可行性、工具链鲁棒性和结构化输出有效性；构建包含25个组件类别的工业对齐数据集。
contributions: 提出COSMO-Agent框架，将CAD-CAE闭环优化形式化为RL问题，使LLM能学习工具编排与几何修订。
设计多约束奖励函数，确保训练稳定性和工业可用性。
贡献一个包含25个组件类别的工业对齐数据集，支持真实训练与评估。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明COSMO-Agent训练显著提升了小型开源LLM在约束驱动设计上的性能，在可行性、效率和稳定性上超越大型开源和强闭源模型。
limitations: 可能依赖特定CAD-CAE工具链，泛化性需进一步验证。
数据集覆盖25个类别，但工业场景多样性可能仍有局限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出COSMO-Agent框架，通过强化学习训练LLM在闭环中编排CAD-CAE工具，实现约束驱动的工业设计优化。

papers.title: Referring-Aware Visuomotor Policy Learning for Closed-Loop Manipulation
papers.abstract: This paper addresses a fundamental problem of visuomotor policy learning for robotic manipulation: how to enhance robustness in out-of-distribution execution errors or dynamically re-routing trajectories, where the model relies solely on the original expert demonstrations for training. We introduce the Referring-Aware Visuomotor Policy (ReV), a closed-loop framework that can adapt to unforeseen circumstances by instantly incorporating sparse referring points provided by a human or a high-level reasoning planner. Specifically, ReV leverages the coupled diffusion heads to preserve standard task execution patterns while seamlessly integrating sparse referring via a trajectory-steering strategy. Upon receiving a specific referring point, the global diffusion head firstly generates a sequence of globally consistent yet temporally sparse action anchors, while identifies the precise temporal position for the referring point within this sequence. Subsequently, the local diffusion head adaptively interpolates adjacent anchors based on the current temporal position for specific tasks. This closed-loop process repeats at every execution step, enabling real-time trajectory replanning in response to dynamic changes in the scene. In practice, rather than relying on elaborate annotations, ReV is trained only by applying targeted perturbations to expert demonstrations. Without any additional data or fine-tuning scheme, ReV achieve higher success rates across challenging simulated and real-world tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于稀疏参考点的闭环视觉运动策略，通过耦合扩散头实现实时轨迹重规划，提升机器人操作在分布外误差下的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉运动策略在遇到分布外执行错误或动态路径重规划时鲁棒性不足，且依赖大量专家演示数据，难以适应未知场景。
analysis.problem: 如何仅利用原始专家演示训练，使模型在闭环操作中能通过稀疏参考点实时适应动态变化和异常情况。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Referring-Aware Visuomotor Policy (ReV)，包含全局扩散头和局部扩散头：全局头生成全局一致但时间稀疏的动作锚点，并定位参考点的时间位置；局部头根据当前时间位置自适应插值相邻锚点，实现实时轨迹重规划。训练时仅对专家演示施加目标扰动，无需额外数据或微调。
contributions: 提出ReV框架，通过稀疏参考点实现闭环操作中的实时轨迹重规划。
设计耦合扩散头结构，在保持标准任务执行模式的同时无缝集成参考点。
仅需对专家演示施加扰动训练，无需额外数据或微调，在模拟和真实任务中取得更高成功率。
analysis.experiments: 在挑战性模拟和真实世界任务中评估，ReV相比基线方法取得更高成功率。
limitations: 依赖外部参考点提供者（人类或高层规划器），可能引入延迟或错误。
训练时仅使用专家演示扰动，可能无法覆盖所有分布外场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于稀疏参考点的闭环视觉运动策略，通过耦合扩散头实现实时轨迹重规划，提升机器人操作在分布外误差下的鲁棒性。

papers.title: EchoAgent: Towards Reliable Echocardiography Interpretation with "Eyes","Hands" and "Minds"
papers.abstract: Reliable interpretation of echocardiography (Echo) is crucial for assessing cardiac function, which demands clinicians to synchronously orchestrate multiple capabilities, including visual observation (eyes), manual measurement (hands), and expert knowledge learning and reasoning (minds). While current task-specific deep-learning approaches and multimodal large language models have demonstrated promise in assisting Echo analysis through automated segmentation or reasoning, they remain focused on restricted skills, i.e., eyes-hands or eyes-minds, thereby limiting clinical reliability and utility. To address these issues, we propose EchoAgent, an agentic system tailored for end-to-end Echo interpretation, which achieves a fully coordinated eyes-hands-minds workflow that learns, observes, operates, and reasons like a cardiac sonographer. First, we introduce an expertise-driven cognition engine where our agent can automatically assimilate credible Echo guidelines into a structured knowledge base, thus constructing an Echo-customized mind. Second, we devise a hierarchical collaboration toolkit to endow EchoAgent with eyes-hands, which can automatically parse Echo video streams, identify cardiac views, perform anatomical segmentation, and quantitative measurement. Third, we integrate the perceived multimodal evidence with the exclusive knowledge base into an orchestrated reasoning hub to conduct explainable inferences. We evaluate EchoAgent on CAMUS and MIMIC-EchoQA datasets, which cover 48 distinct echocardiographic views spanning 14 cardiac anatomical regions. Experimental results show that EchoAgent achieves optimal performance across diverse structure analyses, yielding overall accuracy of up to 80.00%. Importantly, EchoAgent empowers a single system with abilities to learn, observe, operate and reason like an echocardiologist, which holds great promise for reliable Echo interpretation.

analysis.tldr: EchoAgent 是一个端到端超声心动图解读智能体系统，通过整合视觉观察、手动测量和专家知识推理实现可靠的心脏功能评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前超声心动图分析方法仅聚焦于单一技能（如视觉-手动或视觉-推理），缺乏临床所需的完整协调能力，限制了可靠性和实用性。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能像心脏超声医生一样同步学习、观察、操作和推理的端到端超声心动图解读系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法仅覆盖部分技能组合（如眼睛-手或眼睛-思维），无法实现全流程协调，导致临床可靠性不足。
analysis.method: 提出 EchoAgent，包含三个核心组件：1）专家驱动认知引擎，自动吸收可信指南构建结构化知识库；2）分层协作工具包，实现视频流解析、视图识别、解剖分割和定量测量；3）推理中枢，融合多模态证据与知识库进行可解释推理。
contributions: 提出首个端到端超声心动图解读智能体系统，实现眼睛-手-思维全流程协调。
设计专家驱动认知引擎和分层协作工具包，使系统能像心脏超声医生一样学习、观察、操作和推理。
analysis.experiments: 在 CAMUS 和 MIMIC-EchoQA 数据集上评估，覆盖 48 种超声视图和 14 个心脏解剖区域，总体准确率达 80.00%。
limitations: 摘要未提及跨中心泛化能力或真实临床环境验证。
可能依赖高质量指南和标注数据，对低资源场景适应性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EchoAgent 是一个端到端超声心动图解读智能体系统，通过整合视觉观察、手动测量和专家知识推理实现可靠的心脏功能评估。

papers.title: From Large Language Model Predicates to Logic Tensor Networks: Neurosymbolic Offer Validation in Regulated Procurement
papers.abstract: We present a neurosymbolic approach, i.e., combining symbolic and subsymbolic artificial intelligence, to validating offer documents in regulated public institutions. We employ a language model to extract information and then aggregate with an LTN (Logic Tensor Network) to make an auditable decision. In regulated public institutions, decisions must be made in a manner that is both factually correct and legally verifiable. Our neurosymbolic approach allows existing domain-specific knowledge to be linked to the semantic text understanding of language models. The decisions resulting from our pipeline can be justified by predicate values, rule truth values, and corresponding text passages, which enables rule checking based on a real corpus of offer documents. Our experiments on a real corpus show that the proposed pipeline achieves performance comparable to existing models, while its key advantage lies in its interpretability, modular predicate extraction, and explicit support for XAI (Explainable AI).

analysis.tldr: 结合LLM与逻辑张量网络实现可审计的采购文档验证。
analysis.research_motivation: 受监管的公共机构需要既事实正确又法律可验证的决策，现有方法难以同时满足准确性和可解释性。

papers.title: A canonical generalization of OBDD
papers.abstract: We introduce Tree Decision Diagrams (TDD) as a model for Boolean functions that generalizes OBDD. They can be seen as a restriction of structured d-DNNF; that is, d-DNNF that respect a vtree $T$. We show that TDDs enjoy the same tractability properties as OBDD, such as model counting, enumeration, conditioning, and apply, and are more succinct. In particular, we show that CNF formulas of treewidth $k$ can be represented by TDDs of FPT size, which is known to be impossible for OBDD. We study the complexity of compiling CNF formulas into deterministic TDDs via bottom-up compilation and relate the complexity of this approach with the notion of factor width introduced by Bova and Szeider.

analysis.tldr: 提出树决策图（TDD）作为OBDD的规范推广，在保持可处理性的同时更具简洁性。
analysis.research_motivation: OBDD是布尔函数的重要表示，但存在表达能力限制，例如无法高效表示树宽有界的CNF公式。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种比OBDD更简洁且保持可处理性的布尔函数表示模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 引入树决策图（TDD），作为结构化d-DNNF在vtree T下的限制，并研究其编译与推理性质。
contributions: 提出TDD模型，证明其保持OBDD的可处理性（模型计数、枚举、条件化、apply操作）。
证明树宽k的CNF公式可用FPT大小的TDD表示，而OBDD无法实现。

papers.title: Turbulence-like 5/3 spectral scaling in contextual representations of language as a complex system
papers.abstract: Natural language is a complex system that exhibits robust statistical regularities. Here, we represent text as a trajectory in a high-dimensional embedding space generated by transformer-based language models, and quantify scale-dependent fluctuations along the token sequence using an embedding-step signal. Across multiple languages and corpora, the resulting power spectrum exhibits a robust power law with an exponent close to $5/3$ over an extended frequency range. This scaling is observed consistently in contextual embeddings from both human-written and AI-generated text, but is absent in static word embeddings and is disrupted by randomization of token order. These results show that the observed scaling reflects multiscale, context-dependent organization rather than lexical statistics alone. By analogy with the Kolmogorov spectrum in turbulence, our findings suggest that semantic information is integrated in a scale-free, self-similar manner across linguistic scales, and provide a quantitative, model-agnostic benchmark for studying complex structure in language representations.

analysis.tldr: 语言模型上下文表征的功率谱呈现类似湍流的5/3标度律，反映语言的多尺度自相似组织。
analysis.research_motivation: 自然语言作为复杂系统具有统计规律，但现有研究缺乏从连续表征空间量化其多尺度结构的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何从语言模型上下文嵌入中提取并验证语言的多尺度自相似标度律。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 上下文嵌入的功率谱在宽频率范围内呈现接近5/3的幂律标度，该现象在人类和AI文本中一致出现，但在静态词嵌入和随机化词序中消失。
analysis.method: 将文本表示为Transformer语言模型高维嵌入空间中的轨迹，沿词序列计算嵌入步信号并分析其功率谱。
contributions: 发现语言模型上下文表征的功率谱呈现5/3标度律，类比湍流中的Kolmogorov谱

papers.title: SignalClaw: LLM-Guided Evolutionary Synthesis of Interpretable Traffic Signal Control Skills
papers.abstract: Traffic signal control TSC requires strategies that are both effective and interpretable for deployment, yet reinforcement learning produces opaque neural policies while program synthesis depends on restrictive domain-specific languages. We present SIGNALCLAW, a framework that uses large language models LLMs as evolutionary skill generators to synthesize and refine interpretable control skills for adaptive TSC. Each skill includes rationale, selection guidance, and executable code, making policies human-inspectable and self-documenting. At each generation, evolution signals from simulation metrics such as queue percentiles, delay trends, and stagnation are translated into natural language feedback to guide improvement. SignalClaw also introduces event-driven compositional evolution: an event detector identifies emergency vehicles, transit priority, incidents, and congestion via TraCI, and a priority dispatcher selects specialized skills. Each skill is evolved independently, and a priority chain enables runtime composition without retraining. We evaluate SignalClaw on routine and event-injected SUMO scenarios against four baselines. On routine scenarios, it achieves average delay of 7.8 to 9.2 seconds, within 3 to 10 percent of the best method, with low variance across random seeds. Under event scenarios, it yields the lowest emergency delay 11.2 to 18.5 seconds versus 42.3 to 72.3 for MaxPressure and 78.5 to 95.3 for DQN, and the lowest transit person delay 9.8 to 11.5 seconds versus 38.7 to 45.2 for MaxPressure. In mixed events, the dispatcher composes skills effectively while maintaining stable overall delay. The evolved skills progress from simple linear rules to conditional strategies with multi-feature interactions, while remaining fully interpretable and directly modifiable by traffic engineers.

analysis.tldr: SignalClaw利用LLM作为进化技能生成器，合成可解释的交通信号控制策略，在事件场景下显著优于强化学习基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 交通信号控制需要既有效又可解释的策略，但强化学习产生不透明的神经策略，而程序合成依赖受限的领域特定语言。

limitations: 可能依赖SUMO仿真环境，实际部署效果需进一步验证。

papers.title: Experience Transfer for Multimodal LLM Agents in Minecraft Game
papers.abstract: Multimodal LLM agents operating in complex game environments must continually reuse past experience to solve new tasks efficiently. In this work, we propose Echo, a transfer-oriented memory framework that enables agents to derive actionable knowledge from prior interactions rather than treating memory as a passive repository of static records. To make transfer explicit, Echo decomposes reusable knowledge into five dimensions: structure, attribute, process, function, and interaction. This formulation allows the agent to identify recurring patterns shared across different tasks and infer what prior experience remains applicable in new situations. Building on this formulation, Echo leverages In-Context Analogy Learning (ICAL) to retrieve relevant experiences and adapt them to unseen tasks through contextual examples. Experiments in Minecraft show that, under a from-scratch learning setting, Echo achieves a 1.3x to 1.7x speed-up on object-unlocking tasks. Moreover, Echo exhibits a burst-like chain-unlocking phenomenon, rapidly unlocking multiple similar items within a short time interval after acquiring transferable experience. These results suggest that experience transfer is a promising direction for improving the efficiency and adaptability of multimodal LLM agents in complex interactive environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出Echo框架，通过五维知识分解和上下文类比学习实现多模态LLM智能体在Minecraft中的经验迁移，加速任务解锁。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态LLM智能体在复杂游戏环境中需要持续复用过往经验以高效解决新任务，但现有记忆系统通常只是被动存储静态记录，缺乏主动迁移能力。
analysis.problem: 如何让多模态LLM智能体从历史交互中提取可迁移知识，并有效应用于新任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Echo在Minecraft中展现出爆发式链式解锁现象：获得可迁移经验后，能在短时间内快速解锁多个相似物品。
analysis.method: 提出Echo框架，包含五维知识分解（结构、属性、过程、功能、交互）和上下文类比学习（ICAL），通过检索相关经验并生成上下文示例来适应新任务。
contributions: 提出面向迁移的记忆框架Echo，将可复用知识分解为五个维度。
引入上下文类比学习（ICAL）机制，实现经验检索与任务适应。
在Minecraft实验中验证了1.3x-1.7x的加速效果和爆发式链式解锁现象。
analysis.experiments: 在Minecraft游戏中进行实验，从零学习设置下，Echo在物品解锁任务上实现1.3倍至1.7倍加速，并观察到爆发式链式解锁现象。
limitations: 实验仅在Minecraft单一环境中进行，泛化性有待验证。

papers.title: Towards the Development of an LLM-Based Methodology for Automated Security Profiling in Compliance with Ukrainian Cybersecurity Regulations
papers.abstract: In recent years, the pace of development of information technology in various areas has increased drastically, forcing cybersecurity specialists to constantly review existing processes in order to prevent unauthorized access to confidential information. Using Ukraine as a primary case study, this paper explores the integration of international best practices, specifically ISO/IEC 27001 and the NIST Cybersecurity Framework, into national regulatory systems. A focus is placed on the transition from traditional compliance models to risk-based approaches, exemplified by the recent adoption of the Ukrainian normative documents. Furthermore, we propose a methodology for automating the development of target security profiles using Large Language Models (LLMs) enhanced by RetrievalAugmented Generation (RAG). By integrating a vector database of national regulations and organizational policies, the proposed RAG-based advisor reduces manual complexity, minimizes human error, and ensures alignment between technical controls and legal requirements. This study contributes to the field by providing a structured workflow for AI-assisted cybersecurity management in environments characterized by high-intensity hybrid threats.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于LLM和RAG的自动化安全配置文件生成方法，以符合乌克兰网络安全法规。

papers.title: Inventory of the 12 007 Low-Dimensional Pseudo-Boolean Landscapes Invariant to Rank, Translation, and Rotation
papers.abstract: Many randomized optimization algorithms are rank-invariant, relying solely on the relative ordering of solutions rather than absolute fitness values. We introduce a stronger notion of rank landscape invariance: two problems are equivalent if their ranking, but also their neighborhood structure and symmetries (translation and rotation), induce identical landscapes. This motivates the study of rank landscapes rather than individual functions. While prior work analyzed the rankings of injective function classes in isolation, we provide an exhaustive inventory of the invariant landscape classes for pseudo-Boolean functions of dimensions 1, 2, and 3, including non-injective cases. Our analysis reveals 12,007 classes in total, a significant reduction compared to rank-invariance alone. We find that non-injective functions yield far more invariant landscape classes than injective ones. In addition, complex combinations of topological landscape properties and algorithm behaviors emerge, particularly regarding deceptiveness, neutrality, and the performance of hill-climbing strategies. The inventory serves as a resource for pedagogical purposes and benchmark design, offering a foundation for constructing larger problems with controlled hardness and advancing our understanding of landscape difficulty and algorithm performance.

analysis.tldr: 对低维伪布尔函数在秩、平移和旋转不变性下的景观类别进行了穷举编目，发现12,007个不变景观类，并分析了非单射函数对景观多样性和算法行为的影响。
analysis.research_motivation: 许多随机优化算法仅依赖解的相对排序（秩不变），但现有研究通常孤立分析单射函数类的排序，缺乏对更广泛不变性（如平移和旋转）下景观类别的系统理解，限制了算法性能分析和基准设计。
analysis.problem: 对伪布尔函数在秩、平移和旋转不变性下的景观类别进行穷举编目，并分析非单射函数的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 非单射函数产生的不变景观类别远多于单射函数；拓扑景观属性与算法行为（如欺骗性、中性、爬山策略性能）之间存在复杂组合。
analysis.method: 通过数学分类方法，对维度1、2、3的伪布尔函数在秩、平移和旋转不变性下进行穷举编目，得到12,007个不变景观类。
contributions: 首次对伪布尔函数在秩、平移和旋转不变性下的景观类别进行穷举编目，涵盖非单射情况。
发现非单射函数显著增加不变景观类数量，并揭示了景观属性与算法行为的复杂关系。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅涵盖低维（1-3维）情况，高维扩展性未知。
未提供实际算法性能验证，仅基于理论编目。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 对低维伪布尔函数在秩、平移和旋转不变性下的景观类别进行了穷举编目，发现12,007个不变景观类，并分析了非单射函数对景观多样性和算法行为的影响。

papers.title: ActivityEditor: Learning to Synthesize Physically Valid Human Mobility
papers.abstract: Human mobility modeling is indispensable for diverse urban applications. However, existing data-driven methods often suffer from data scarcity, limiting their applicability in regions where historical trajectories are unavailable or restricted. To bridge this gap, we propose \textbf{ActivityEditor}, a novel dual-LLM-agent framework designed for zero-shot cross-regional trajectory generation. Our framework decomposes the complex synthesis task into two collaborative stages. Specifically, an intention-based agent, which leverages demographic-driven priors to generate structured human intentions and coarse activity chains to ensure high-level socio-semantic coherence. These outputs are then refined by editor agent to obtain mobility trajectories through iteratively revisions that enforces human mobility law. This capability is acquired through reinforcement learning with multiple rewards grounded in real-world physical constraints, allowing the agent to internalize mobility regularities and ensure high-fidelity trajectory generation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that \textbf{ActivityEditor} achieves superior zero-shot performance when transferred across diverse urban contexts. It maintains high statistical fidelity and physical validity, providing a robust and highly generalizable solution for mobility simulation in data-scarce scenarios. Our code is available at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/ActivityEditor-066B.

analysis.tldr: 提出双LLM智能体框架ActivityEditor，通过意图生成与编辑修正实现零样本跨区域轨迹生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有数据驱动的人类移动性建模方法受限于数据稀缺，在缺乏历史轨迹的区域难以应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在没有目标区域历史轨迹的情况下，生成物理有效且统计保真的人类移动轨迹。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 双LLM智能体框架：意图智能体基于人口统计先验生成结构化意图和粗活动链，编辑智能体通过强化学习（基于物理约束的多重奖励）迭代修正轨迹以符合人类移动规律。
contributions: 提出零样本跨区域轨迹生成任务及双LLM智能体框架ActivityEditor。
利用强化学习结合物理约束奖励使智能体内化移动规律，生成高保真轨迹。
analysis.experiments: 在多个城市数据集上验证零样本迁移性能，保持高统计保真度和物理有效性。
limitations: 可能依赖人口统计先验的准确性。
强化学习奖励设计可能无法覆盖所有物理约束。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双LLM智能体框架ActivityEditor，通过意图生成与编辑修正实现零样本跨区域轨迹生成。

papers.title: Prior-guided Fusion of Multimodal Features for Change Detection from Optical-SAR Images
papers.abstract: Multimodal change detection (MMCD) identifies changed areas in multimodal remote sensing (RS) data, demonstrating significant application value in land use monitoring, disaster assessment, and urban sustainable development. However, literature MMCD approaches exhibit limitations in cross-modal interaction and exploiting modality-specific characteristics. This leads to insufficient modeling of fine-grained change information, thus hindering the precise detection of semantic changes in multimodal data. To address the above problems, we propose STSF-Net, a framework designed for MMCD between optical and SAR images. STSF-Net jointly models modality-specific and spatio-temporal common features to enhance change representations. Specifically, modality-specific features are exploited to capture genuine semantic change signals, while spatio-temporal common features are embedded to suppress pseudo-changes caused by differences in imaging mechanisms. Furthermore, we introduce an optical and SAR feature fusion strategy that adaptively adjusts feature importance based on semantic priors obtained from pre-trained foundational models, enabling semantic-guided adaptive fusion of multi-modal information. In addition, we introduce the Delta-SN6 dataset, the first openly-accessible multiclass MMCD benchmark consisting of very-high-resolution (VHR) fully polarimetric SAR and optical images. Experimental results on Delta-SN6, BRIGHT, and Wuhan-Het datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art (SOTA) by 3.21%, 1.08%, and 1.32% in mIoU, respectively. The associated code and Delta-SN6 dataset will be released at: https://github.com/liuxuanguang/STSF-Net.

analysis.tldr: 提出STSF-Net，通过模态特定与时空共性特征联合建模及语义先验引导融合，提升光学-SAR图像变化检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态变化检测在土地利用监测、灾害评估等领域有重要应用，但现有方法在跨模态交互和利用模态特定特征方面存在局限，导致细粒度变化信息建模不足，难以精确检测语义变化。
analysis.problem: 如何有效融合光学和SAR图像的多模态特征，抑制成像机制差异引起的伪变化，并增强真实语义变化的检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出STSF-Net框架，联合建模模态特定特征和时空共性特征，并引入基于预训练基础模型语义先验的自适应融合策略。
contributions: 提出STSF-Net，联合建模模态特定与时空共性特征以增强变化表示。
引入语义先验引导的光学-SAR特征融合策略，自适应调整特征重要性。
发布首个公开的多类多模态变化检测基准数据集Delta-SN6。
analysis.experiments: 在Delta-SN6、BRIGHT和Wuhan-Het三个数据集上，方法在mIoU上分别超过SOTA 3.21%、1.08%和1.32%。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练基础模型的语义先验质量。
未提及在极端光照或噪声条件下的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出STSF-Net，通过模态特定与时空共性特征联合建模及语义先验引导融合，提升光学-SAR图像变化检测性能。

papers.title: Controllable Singing Style Conversion with Boundary-Aware Information Bottleneck
papers.abstract: This paper presents the submission of the S4 team to the Singing Voice Conversion Challenge 2025 (SVCC2025)-a novel singing style conversion system that advances fine-grained style conversion and control within in-domain settings. To address the critical challenges of style leakage, dynamic rendering, and high-fidelity generation with limited data, we introduce three key innovations: a boundary-aware Whisper bottleneck that pools phoneme-span representations to suppress residual source style while preserving linguistic content; an explicit frame-level technique matrix, enhanced by targeted F0 processing during inference, for stable and distinct dynamic style rendering; and a perceptually motivated high-frequency band completion strategy that leverages an auxiliary standard 48kHz SVC model to augment the high-frequency spectrum, thereby overcoming data scarcity without overfitting. In the official SVCC2025 subjective evaluation, our system achieves the best naturalness performance among all submissions while maintaining competitive results in speaker similarity and technique control, despite using significantly less extra singing data than other top-performing systems. Audio samples are available online.

analysis.tldr: 提出边界感知信息瓶颈的歌唱风格转换系统，在SVCC2025挑战赛中取得最佳自然度。
analysis.research_motivation: 歌唱风格转换面临风格泄露、动态渲染困难以及有限数据下高保真生成等挑战，现有方法难以兼顾细粒度控制与自然度。
analysis.problem: 如何在域内场景下实现细粒度的歌唱风格转换与控制，同时抑制源风格泄露、实现稳定动态渲染并克服数据稀缺问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出边界感知Whisper瓶颈池化音素跨度表示以抑制残留源风格；显式帧级技术矩阵结合F0处理实现稳定动态渲染；感知驱动的高频带补全策略利用辅助SVC模型增强高频频谱。
contributions: 提出边界感知信息瓶颈方法有效抑制风格泄露并保留语言内容
设计显式帧级技术矩阵与F0处理实现可控动态风格渲染
提出高频带补全策略缓解数据稀缺问题，提升高保真生成质量
analysis.experiments: 在SVCC2025官方主观评测中，系统在自然度上取得最佳成绩，同时在说话人相似度和技术控制上保持竞争力，且使用的额外歌唱数据远少于其他顶级系统。
limitations: 方法仅在域内设置下验证，跨域泛化能力未知
依赖辅助SVC模型可能引入额外计算开销
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出边界感知信息瓶颈的歌唱风格转换系统，在SVCC2025挑战赛中取得最佳自然度。

papers.title: Cross-Resolution Diffusion Models via Network Pruning
papers.abstract: Diffusion models have demonstrated impressive image synthesis performance, yet many UNet-based models are trained at certain fixed resolutions. Their quality tends to degrade when generating images at out-of-training resolutions. We trace this issue to resolution-dependent parameter behaviors, where weights that function well at the default resolution can become adverse when spatial scales shift, weakening semantic alignment and causing structural instability in the UNet architecture. Based on this analysis, this paper introduces CR-Diff, a novel method that improves the cross-resolution visual consistency by pruning some parameters of the diffusion model. Specifically, CR-Diff has two stages. It first performs block-wise pruning to selectively eliminate adverse weights. Then, a pruned output amplification is conducted to further purify the pruned predictions. Empirically, extensive experiments suggest that CR-Diff can improve perceptual fidelity and semantic coherence across various diffusion backbones and unseen resolutions, while largely preserving the performance at default resolutions. Additionally, CR-Diff supports prompt-specific refinement, enabling quality enhancement on demand.

analysis.tldr: 通过剪枝扩散模型中分辨率依赖的不良参数，提升跨分辨率图像生成的一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有扩散模型通常在固定分辨率下训练，生成其他分辨率图像时质量下降，限制了实际应用中的灵活性。
analysis.problem: 扩散模型在跨分辨率图像生成时，因参数行为随分辨率变化导致语义对齐弱化和结构不稳定。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到UNet架构中，在默认分辨率下有效的权重在空间尺度变化时可能变得有害，导致生成质量下降。
analysis.method: 提出CR-Diff方法，包含两阶段：先进行块级剪枝选择性移除有害权重，再通过剪枝输出放大进一步净化预测结果。
contributions: 揭示了扩散模型中分辨率依赖的参数行为问题
提出基于网络剪枝的跨分辨率扩散模型方法CR-Diff
analysis.experiments: 在多种扩散骨干和未见分辨率上验证，CR-Diff能提升感知保真度和语义一致性，同时保持默认分辨率性能。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定UNet架构
剪枝策略的通用性有待进一步验证
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过剪枝扩散模型中分辨率依赖的不良参数，提升跨分辨率图像生成的一致性。

papers.title: Market-Bench: Benchmarking Large Language Models on Economic and Trade Competition
papers.abstract: The ability of large language models (LLMs) to manage and acquire economic resources remains unclear. In this paper, we introduce \textbf{Market-Bench}, a comprehensive benchmark that evaluates the capabilities of LLMs in economically-relevant tasks through economic and trade competition. Specifically, we construct a configurable multi-agent supply chain economic model where LLMs act as retailer agents responsible for procuring and retailing merchandise. In the \textbf{procurement} stage, LLMs bid for limited inventory in budget-constrained auctions. In the \textbf{retail} stage, LLMs set retail prices, generate marketing slogans, and provide them to buyers through a role-based attention mechanism for purchase. Market-Bench logs complete trajectories of bids, prices, slogans, sales, and balance-sheet states, enabling automatic evaluation with economic, operational, and semantic metrics. Benchmarking on 20 open- and closed-source LLM agents reveals significant performance disparities and winner-take-most phenomenon, \textit{i.e.}, only a small subset of LLM retailers can consistently achieve capital appreciation, while many hover around the break-even point despite similar semantic matching scores. Market-Bench provides a reproducible testbed for studying how LLMs interact in competitive markets.

analysis.tldr: Market-Bench 通过多智能体供应链经济模型评估 LLM 在经济与贸易竞争中的能力，发现显著性能差异和赢家通吃现象。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM 在经济资源管理和获取方面的能力尚不明确，缺乏系统性的评估基准。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个可复现的基准来评估 LLM 在竞争性市场中的经济决策能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到赢家通吃现象：仅少数 LLM 零售商能持续实现资本增值，多数仅接近盈亏平衡点，尽管语义匹配分数相似。
analysis.method: 构建可配置的多智能体供应链经济模型，包含采购和零售阶段，LLM 作为零售商代理，通过拍卖竞价、定价、生成营销口号等任务进行交互，并记录完整轨迹用于自动评估。
contributions: 提出 Market-Bench，一个评估 LLM 在经济相关任务中能力的综合基准。
通过 20 个开源和闭源 LLM 代理的基准测试，揭示了显著的性能差异和赢家通吃现象。
analysis.experiments: 在 20 个开源和闭源 LLM 代理上进行了基准测试，使用经济、运营和语义指标进行评估。
limitations: 摘要未提及模型规模或具体版本对结果的影响。
可能未涵盖所有经济场景或更复杂的市场动态。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Market-Bench 通过多智能体供应链经济模型评估 LLM 在经济与贸易竞争中的能力，发现显著性能差异和赢家通吃现象。

papers.title: Learned Elevation Models as a Lightweight Alternative to LiDAR for Radio Environment Map Estimation
papers.abstract: Next-generation wireless systems such as 6G operate at higher frequency bands, making signal propagation highly sensitive to environmental factors such as buildings and vege- tation. Accurate Radio Environment Map (REM) estimation is therefore increasingly important for effective network planning and operation. Existing methods, from ray-tracing simulators to deep learning generative models, achieve promising results but require detailed 3D environment data such as LiDAR-derived point clouds, which are costly to acquire, several gigabytes per km2 in size, and quickly outdated in dynamic environments. We propose a two-stage framework that eliminates the need for 3D data at inference time: in the first stage, a learned estimator predicts elevation maps directly from satellite RGB imagery, which are then fed alongside antenna parameters into the REM estimator in the second stage. Across existing CNN- based REM estimation architectures, the proposed approach improves RMSE by up to 7.8% over image-only baselines, while operating on the same input feature space and requiring no 3D data during inference, offering a practical alternative for scalable radio environment modelling.

analysis.tldr: 提出两阶段框架，用卫星图像预测高程图替代LiDAR进行无线电环境地图估计，提升精度且无需3D数据。
analysis.research_motivation: 6G等下一代无线系统使用更高频段，信号传播对建筑物和植被等环境因素高度敏感，需要精确的无线电环境地图（REM）进行网络规划。现有方法依赖LiDAR点云等3D数据，成本高、体积大（每平方公里数GB）且易过时，限制了可扩展性。
analysis.problem: 如何在推理时无需3D环境数据（如LiDAR点云）的情况下，实现准确的REM估计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段用学习型估计器从卫星RGB图像预测高程图；第二阶段将高程图与天线参数输入REM估计器。
contributions: 提出一种轻量级替代方案，在推理时无需LiDAR等3D数据，仅需卫星图像即可进行REM估计。
在现有CNN-based REM估计架构上，相比仅用图像基线，RMSE提升高达7.8%。
analysis.experiments: 在现有CNN-based REM估计架构上评估，与仅用图像基线对比，RMSE提升高达7.8%。摘要未提供更多实验细节。
limitations: 可能依赖卫星图像的质量和可用性。
高程图预测的误差可能影响最终REM估计精度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出两阶段框架，用卫星图像预测高程图替代LiDAR进行无线电环境地图估计，提升精度且无需3D数据。

papers.title: UniCreative: Unifying Long-form Logic and Short-form Sparkle via Reference-Free Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: A fundamental challenge in creative writing lies in reconciling the inherent tension between maintaining global coherence in long-form narratives and preserving local expressiveness in short-form texts. While long-context generation necessitates explicit macroscopic planning, short-form creativity often demands spontaneous, constraint-free expression. Existing alignment paradigms, however, typically employ static reward signals and rely heavily on high-quality supervised data, which is costly and difficult to scale. To address this, we propose \textbf{UniCreative}, a unified reference-free reinforcement learning framework. We first introduce \textbf{AC-GenRM}, an adaptive constraint-aware reward model that dynamically synthesizes query-specific criteria to provide fine-grained preference judgments. Leveraging these signals, we propose \textbf{ACPO}, a policy optimization algorithm that aligns models with human preferences across both content quality and structural paradigms without supervised fine-tuning and ground-truth references. Empirical results demonstrate that AC-GenRM aligns closely with expert evaluations, while ACPO significantly enhances performance across diverse writing tasks. Crucially, our analysis reveals an emergent meta-cognitive ability: the model learns to autonomously differentiate between tasks requiring rigorous planning and those favoring direct generation, validating the effectiveness of our direct alignment approach.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一参考无关强化学习框架UniCreative，通过自适应约束感知奖励模型和策略优化算法，同时提升长文本逻辑连贯性与短文本表达灵动性。
analysis.research_motivation: 创意写作中长文本全局连贯性与短文本局部表现力之间存在固有矛盾，现有对齐范式依赖静态奖励信号和高成本监督数据，难以扩展。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖监督微调和真实参考的情况下，统一优化模型在长文本逻辑规划与短文本自由生成上的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出UniCreative框架，包含AC-GenRM自适应约束感知奖励模型（动态合成查询特定标准提供细粒度偏好判断）和ACPO策略优化算法（无需监督微调和真实参考，对齐内容质量与结构范式）。
contributions: 提出AC-GenRM，一种自适应约束感知奖励模型，可动态生成查询特定标准进行偏好判断。
提出ACPO，一种无需监督微调和真实参考的策略优化算法，对齐内容质量与结构范式。
实验表明AC-GenRM与专家评估高度一致，ACPO显著提升多种写作任务性能，并涌现元认知能力（自主区分需规划与直接生成的任务）。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅在特定写作任务上验证，泛化性待考察。
元认知能力的涌现机制未深入分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一参考无关强化学习框架UniCreative，通过自适应约束感知奖励模型和策略优化算法，同时提升长文本逻辑连贯性与短文本表达灵动性。

papers.title: Geometrical Cross-Attention and Nonvoid Voxelization for Efficient 3D Medical Image Segmentation
papers.abstract: Accurate segmentation of 3D medical scans is crucial for clinical diagnostics and treatment planning, yet existing methods often fail to achieve both high accuracy and computational efficiency across diverse anatomies and imaging modalities. To address these challenges, we propose GCNV-Net, a novel 3D medical segmentation framework that integrates a Tri-directional Dynamic Nonvoid Voxel Transformer (3DNVT), a Geometrical Cross-Attention module (GCA), and Nonvoid Voxelization. The 3DNVT dynamically partitions relevant voxels along the three orthogonal anatomical planes, namely the transverse, sagittal, and coronal planes, enabling effective modeling of complex 3D spatial dependencies. The GCA mechanism explicitly incorporates geometric positional information during multi-scale feature fusion, significantly enhancing fine-grained anatomical segmentation accuracy. Meanwhile, Nonvoid Voxelization processes only informative regions, greatly reducing redundant computation without compromising segmentation quality, and achieves a 56.13% reduction in FLOPs and a 68.49% reduction in inference latency compared to conventional voxelization. We evaluate GCNV-Net on multiple widely used benchmarks: BraTS2021, ACDC, MSD Prostate, MSD Pancreas, and AMOS2022. Our method achieves state-of-the-art segmentation performance across all datasets, outperforming the best existing methods by 0.65% on Dice, 0.63% on IoU, 1% on NSD, and relatively 14.5% on HD95. All results demonstrate that GCNV-Net effectively balances accuracy and efficiency, and its robustness across diverse organs, disease conditions, and imaging modalities highlights strong potential for clinical deployment.

analysis.tldr: 提出GCNV-Net，通过几何交叉注意力和非空体素化实现高效3D医学图像分割，在多个基准上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D医学图像分割方法难以同时实现高精度和高计算效率，且在不同解剖结构和成像模态下泛化能力不足。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个既能保持高分割精度又能显著降低计算开销的3D医学图像分割框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统体素化处理大量冗余空体素导致计算浪费；多尺度特征融合缺乏几何位置信息限制细粒度分割精度。
analysis.method: 提出GCNV-Net，包含三方向动态非空体素Transformer (3DNVT)、几何交叉注意力模块 (GCA) 和非空体素化。3DNVT沿三个正交解剖平面动态划分相关体素；GCA在多尺度特征融合中显式融入几何位置信息；非空体素化仅处理信息区域。
contributions: 提出GCNV-Net框架，集成三方向动态非空体素Transformer、几何交叉注意力和非空体素化。
非空体素化减少56.13% FLOPs和68.49%推理延迟，同时保持分割质量。
在BraTS2021、ACDC、MSD Prostate、MSD Pancreas、AMOS2022五个基准上达到SOTA，Dice提升0.65%，IoU提升0.63%，NSD提升1%，HD95相对降低14.5%。
analysis.experiments: 在BraTS2021、ACDC、MSD Prostate、MSD Pancreas、AMOS2022五个公开基准上评估，与现有最优方法比较，所有指标均取得提升。
limitations: 可能对极端稀疏或噪声较大的体素数据敏感。
非空体素化策略在高度各向异性数据上的泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GCNV-Net，通过几何交叉注意力和非空体素化实现高效3D医学图像分割，在多个基准上达到SOTA。

papers.title: OmniDiagram: Advancing Unified Diagram Code Generation via Visual Interrogation Reward
papers.abstract: The paradigm of programmable diagram generation is evolving rapidly, playing a crucial role in structured visualization. However, most existing studies are confined to a narrow range of task formulations and language support, constraining their applicability to diverse diagram types. In this work, we propose OmniDiagram, a unified framework that incorporates diverse diagram code languages and task definitions. To address the challenge of aligning code logic with visual fidelity in Reinforcement Learning (RL), we introduce a novel visual feedback strategy named Visual Interrogation Verifies All (\textsc{Viva}). Unlike brittle syntax-based rules or pixel-level matching, \textsc{Viva} rewards the visual structure of rendered diagrams through a generative approach. Specifically, \textsc{Viva} actively generates targeted visual inquiries to scrutinize diagram visual fidelity and provides fine-grained feedback for optimization. This mechanism facilitates a self-evolving training process, effectively obviating the need for manually annotated ground truth code. Furthermore, we construct M3$^2$Diagram, the first large-scale diagram code generation dataset, containing over 196k high-quality instances. Experimental results confirm that the combination of SFT and our \textsc{Viva}-based RL allows OmniDiagram to establish a new state-of-the-art (SOTA) across diagram code generation benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一图表代码生成框架OmniDiagram，通过视觉询问奖励机制Viva实现无需人工标注的强化学习对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图表代码生成方法局限于特定任务和语言，缺乏对视觉保真度的有效对齐，且依赖人工标注真值代码。
analysis.problem: 如何统一多种图表代码语言和任务定义，并在强化学习中实现代码逻辑与视觉保真度的对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出OmniDiagram统一框架，包含Viva视觉反馈策略：通过生成视觉询问来评估渲染图表的视觉结构，提供细粒度奖励，实现自进化训练，无需人工标注。同时构建大规模数据集M3$^2$Diagram。
contributions: 提出OmniDiagram统一框架，支持多种图表代码语言和任务定义。
提出Viva视觉询问奖励机制，实现无需人工标注的RL对齐。
构建首个大规模图表代码生成数据集M3$^2$Diagram（196k+实例）。
analysis.experiments: 在图表代码生成基准上，SFT结合Viva-based RL达到新SOTA。
limitations: 可能依赖生成式视觉询问的质量。
数据集覆盖的图表类型可能有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一图表代码生成框架OmniDiagram，通过视觉询问奖励机制Viva实现无需人工标注的强化学习对齐。

papers.title: Benchmarking Vision-Language Models under Contradictory Virtual Content Attacks in Augmented Reality
papers.abstract: Augmented reality (AR) has rapidly expanded over the past decade. As AR becomes increasingly integrated into daily life, its security and reliability emerge as critical challenges. Among various threats, contradictory virtual content attacks, where malicious or inconsistent virtual elements are introduced into the user's view, pose a unique risk by misleading users, creating semantic confusion, or delivering harmful information. In this work, we systematically model such attacks and present ContrAR, a novel benchmark for evaluating the robustness of vision-language models (VLMs) against virtual content manipulation and contradiction in AR. ContrAR contains 312 real-world AR videos validated by 10 human participants. We further benchmark 11 VLMs, including both commercial and open-source models. Experimental results reveal that while current VLMs exhibit reasonable understanding of contradictory virtual content, room still remains for improvement in detecting and reasoning about adversarial content manipulations in AR environments. Moreover, balancing detection accuracy and latency remains challenging.

analysis.tldr: 构建ContrAR基准测试，评估VLM在AR中对抗矛盾虚拟内容攻击的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: AR技术日益普及，但恶意或矛盾的虚拟内容可能误导用户、造成语义混乱或传递有害信息，现有VLM在AR环境下的安全性和鲁棒性缺乏系统评估。
analysis.problem: 如何系统建模AR中的矛盾虚拟内容攻击，并评估VLM对此类攻击的检测与推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验表明当前VLM对矛盾虚拟内容有一定理解能力，但在检测和推理对抗性内容操纵方面仍有改进空间，且检测准确率与延迟之间存在权衡。
analysis.method: 构建ContrAR基准，包含312个真实世界AR视频（经10名参与者验证），并评估11个VLM（包括商业和开源模型）。
contributions: 系统建模了AR中的矛盾虚拟内容攻击。
提出了ContrAR基准，用于评估VLM在AR环境下的鲁棒性。
对11个VLM进行了全面评估，揭示了现有模型的不足与挑战。
analysis.experiments: 在ContrAR基准上评估了11个VLM，包括商业和开源模型，结果显示了检测准确率与延迟的权衡。
limitations: 基准规模有限（312个视频），可能无法覆盖所有攻击类型。
未提供具体改进方法或解决方案。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 构建ContrAR基准测试，评估VLM在AR中对抗矛盾虚拟内容攻击的鲁棒性。

papers.title: Attention-Guided Flow-Matching for Sparse 3D Geological Generation
papers.abstract: Constructing high-resolution 3D geological models from sparse 1D borehole and 2D surface data is a highly ill-posed inverse problem. Traditional heuristic and implicit modeling methods fundamentally fail to capture non-linear topological discontinuities under extreme sparsity, often yielding unrealistic artifacts. Furthermore, while deep generative architectures like Diffusion Models have revolutionized continuous domains, they suffer from severe representation collapse when conditioned on sparse categorical grids. To bridge this gap, we propose 3D-GeoFlow, the first Attention-Guided Continuous Flow Matching framework tailored for sparse multimodal geological modeling. By reformulating discrete categorical generation as a simulation-free, continuous vector field regression optimized via Mean Squared Error, our model establishes stable, deterministic optimal transport paths. Crucially, we integrate 3D Attention Gates to dynamically propagate localized borehole features across the volumetric latent space, ensuring macroscopic structural coherence. To validate our framework, we curated a large-scale multimodal dataset comprising 2,200 procedurally generated 3D geological cases. Extensive out-of-distribution (OOD) evaluations demonstrate that 3D-GeoFlow achieves a paradigm shift, significantly outperforming heuristic interpolations and standard diffusion baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个注意力引导的连续流匹配框架3D-GeoFlow，用于从稀疏钻孔和地表数据生成高保真3D地质模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 从稀疏1D钻孔和2D地表数据构建高分辨率3D地质模型是高度病态逆问题，传统启发式和隐式建模方法无法捕捉非线性拓扑不连续性，且扩散模型在稀疏分类网格条件下会出现严重的表征崩溃。
analysis.problem: 如何从稀疏多模态地质数据（1D钻孔+2D地表）生成具有宏观结构一致性的高保真3D地质模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 扩散模型在稀疏分类网格条件下会出现严重的表征崩溃；传统方法在极端稀疏条件下产生不真实伪影。
analysis.method: 提出3D-GeoFlow，将离散分类生成重新表述为无模拟的连续向量场回归，通过均方误差优化建立稳定、确定性的最优传输路径，并集成3D注意力门动态传播局部钻孔特征至体素潜在空间。
contributions: 首个将注意力引导的连续流匹配框架应用于稀疏多模态3D地质建模。
构建了包含2200个程序生成3D地质案例的大规模多模态数据集。
analysis.experiments: 在程序生成的大规模多模态数据集上进行分布外评估，3D-GeoFlow显著优于启发式插值和标准扩散基线。
limitations: 数据集为程序生成，可能无法完全代表真实地质复杂性。
方法在极端稀疏条件下的泛化能力需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个注意力引导的连续流匹配框架3D-GeoFlow，用于从稀疏钻孔和地表数据生成高保真3D地质模型。

papers.title: The Breakthrough of Sleep: A Contactless Approach for Accurate Sleep Stage Detection Using the Sleepal AI Lamp
papers.abstract: Sleep staging is essential for the assessment of sleep quality and the diagnosis of sleep-related disorders. Conventional polysomnography (PSG), while considered the gold standard, is intrusive, labor-intensive, and unsuitable for long-term monitoring. This study evaluates the performance of the Sleepal AI Lamp, a contactless, radar-based consumer-grade sleep tracker, in comparison with gold-standard polysomnography (PSG), using a large-scale dataset comprising 1022 overnight recordings. We extract multi-scale respiratory and motion-related features from radar signals to train a frequency-augmented deep learning model. For the binary sleep-wake classification task, experimental results demonstrated that the model achieved an accuracy of 92.8% alongside a macro-averaged F1 score of 0.895. For four-stage classification (wake, light NREM (N1 + N2), deep NREM (N3), REM), the model achieved an accuracy of 78.5% with a Cohen's kappa coefficient of 0.695 in healthy individuals and maintained a stable accuracy of 77.2% with a kappa of 0.677 in a heterogeneous population including patients with varying severities of obstructive sleep apnea (OSA). These experimental results demonstrate that the sleep staging performance of the contactless Sleepal AI Lamp is in high agreement with expert-labeled PSG sleep stages. Our findings suggest that non-contact radar sensing, combined with advanced temporal modeling, can provide reliable sleep staging performance without requiring physical contact or wearable devices. Owing to its unobtrusive nature, ease of deployment, and robustness to long-term use, the contactless Sleepal AI Lamp shows strong potential for clinical screening, home-based sleep assessment, and continuous longitudinal sleep monitoring in real-world medical and healthcare applications.

analysis.tldr: 基于雷达的非接触式睡眠分期AI灯在1022夜数据集上达到92.8%的睡眠-觉醒分类准确率和78.5%的四阶段分类准确率，与金标准PSG高度一致。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统多导睡眠监测（PSG）虽为金标准，但侵入性强、成本高、不适合长期监测，亟需一种非接触式、可长期使用的睡眠分期方案。
analysis.problem: 如何利用非接触式雷达传感器实现高精度、多阶段的睡眠分期，并验证其在真实人群（包括OSA患者）中的可靠性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 从雷达信号中提取多尺度呼吸和运动相关特征，训练频率增强的深度学习模型，实现睡眠-觉醒二分类和四阶段（觉醒、浅NREM、深NREM、REM）分类。
contributions: 首次在大规模（1022夜）数据集上验证了非接触式雷达AI灯与PSG在睡眠分期上的一致性。
提出频率增强的深度学习模型，利用多尺度呼吸和运动特征实现高精度睡眠分期。
analysis.experiments: 在1022夜记录上，二分类准确率92.8%，宏平均F1=0.895；四分类在健康人群中准确率78.5%，kappa=0.695，在包括OSA患者的异质人群中准确率77.2%，kappa=0.677。
limitations: 摘要未提及模型在更复杂睡眠障碍（如不宁腿综合征）上的表现。
未与其他非接触式方法（如摄像头、床垫传感器）进行直接比较。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于雷达的非接触式睡眠分期AI灯在1022夜数据集上达到92.8%的睡眠-觉醒分类准确率和78.5%的四阶段分类准确率，与金标准PSG高度一致。

papers.title: CLIP-Guided Data Augmentation for Night-Time Image Dehazing
papers.abstract: Nighttime image dehazing faces a more complex degradation pattern than its daytime counterpart, as haze scattering couples with low illumination, non-uniform lighting, and strong light interference. Under limited supervision, this complexity aggravates domain drift and training instability, since target-domain samples are scarce while naively introducing external data may weaken adaptation due to distribution mismatch. This paper presents our solution to the NTIRE 2026 Night Time Image Dehazing Challenge, built as a unified framework that integrates domain-aligned data construction, stage-wise training, and inference-time enhancement. Specifically, a pre-trained CLIP visual encoder screens candidate external samples by similarity to construct training data closer to the target domain. NAFNet is then trained in two stages, first adapting to the target domain and then expanding to broader degradation patterns. At inference time, TLC, x8 self-ensemble, and weighted snapshot fusion are combined to improve output stability. Rather than relying on complex network redesign, the proposed framework offers a practical and effective pipeline for nighttime image dehazing.

analysis.tldr: 利用CLIP筛选外部数据增强夜间图像去雾，结合两阶段训练和推理增强。
analysis.research_motivation: 夜间图像去雾面临低光照、非均匀照明和强光干扰等复杂退化，且目标域样本稀缺，直接引入外部数据会导致分布不匹配和域漂移。
analysis.problem: 在有限监督下，如何有效利用外部数据增强夜间图像去雾模型的训练，避免域漂移和训练不稳定。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出夜间去雾的退化模式比白天更复杂，目标域样本稀缺，外部数据引入会因分布不匹配削弱适应性。
analysis.method: 提出统一框架：1) 使用预训练CLIP视觉编码器筛选与目标域相似的外部样本构建训练数据；2) 两阶段训练NAFNet，先适应目标域再扩展退化模式；3) 推理时结合TLC、8倍自集成和加权快照融合。
contributions: 提出CLIP引导的数据增强方法，通过相似性筛选外部样本以对齐目标域分布。
设计两阶段训练策略和推理增强组合，提升夜间去雾的稳定性和性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖预训练CLIP模型，可能引入额外计算开销。
两阶段训练和推理增强的复杂度较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用CLIP筛选外部数据增强夜间图像去雾，结合两阶段训练和推理增强。

papers.title: Thinking Diffusion: Penalize and Guide Visual-Grounded Reasoning in Diffusion Multimodal Language Models
papers.abstract: Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) are emerging as promising alternatives to autoregressive (AR) LLMs. Recently, this paradigm has been extended to multimodal tasks, leading to the development of diffusion multimodal large language models (dMLLMs). These models are expected to retain the reasoning capabilities of LLMs while enabling faster inference through parallel generation. However, when combined with Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning, dMLLMs exhibit two critical issues. First, we observe that dMLLMs often generate the final answer token at a very early timestep. This trend indicates that the model determines the answer before sufficient reasoning, leading to degraded reasoning performance. Second, during the initial timesteps, dMLLMs show minimal dependency on visual prompts, exhibiting a fundamentally different pattern of visual information utilization compared to AR vision-language models. In summary, these findings indicate that dMLLMs tend to generate premature final answers without sufficiently grounding on visual inputs. To address these limitations, we propose Position and Step Penalty (PSP) and Visual Reasoning Guidance (VRG). PSP penalizes tokens in later positions during early timesteps, delaying premature answer generation and encouraging progressive reasoning across timesteps. VRG, inspired by classifier-free guidance, amplifies visual grounding signals to enhance the model's alignment with visual evidence. Extensive experiments across various dMLLMs demonstrate that our method achieves up to 7.5% higher accuracy while delivering more than 3x speedup compared to reasoning with four times more diffusion steps.

analysis.tldr: 针对扩散多模态大语言模型在推理时过早生成答案和视觉依赖不足的问题，提出位置步长惩罚和视觉推理引导方法，提升准确率并加速推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散大语言模型作为自回归模型的替代方案，在多模态任务中具有并行生成的优势，但结合思维链推理时存在推理质量下降的问题，限制了其应用潜力。
analysis.problem: 扩散多模态大语言模型在推理过程中过早生成最终答案，且对视觉输入的依赖不足，导致推理性能下降。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到两个关键现象：1）模型在早期时间步就生成最终答案token，表明答案在充分推理前已确定；2）初始时间步对视觉提示的依赖极小，与自回归视觉语言模型的信息利用模式不同。
analysis.method: 提出位置步长惩罚（PSP）和视觉推理引导（VRG）。PSP在早期时间步惩罚后位置token，延迟过早答案生成；VRG受无分类器引导启发，增强视觉对齐信号。
contributions: 揭示了扩散多模态大语言模型在推理时过早生成答案和视觉依赖不足的问题
提出PSP和VRG方法，有效提升推理准确率并加速推理
analysis.experiments: 在多种扩散多模态大语言模型上进行实验，相比使用四倍扩散步数的推理，方法实现了高达7.5%的准确率提升和超过3倍的加速。
limitations: 方法可能对扩散步数等超参数敏感
未在更大规模模型或更多样化任务上验证
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 针对扩散多模态大语言模型在推理时过早生成答案和视觉依赖不足的问题，提出位置步长惩罚和视觉推理引导方法，提升准确率并加速推理。

papers.title: A Weak-Signal-Aware Framework for Subsurface Defect Detection: Mechanisms for Enhancing Low-SCR Hyperbolic Signatures
papers.abstract: Subsurface defect detection via Ground Penetrating Radar is challenged by "weak signals" faint diffraction hyperbolas with low signal-to-clutter ratios, high wavefield similarity, and geometric degradation. Existing lightweight detectors prioritize efficiency over sensitivity, failing to preserve low-frequency structures or decouple heterogeneous clutter. We propose WSA-Net, a framework designed to enhance faint signatures through physical-feature reconstruction. Moving beyond simple parameter reduction, WSA-Net integrates four mechanisms: Signal preservation using partial convolutions; Clutter suppression via heterogeneous grouping attention; Geometric reconstruction to sharpen hyperbolic arcs; Context anchoring to resolve semantic ambiguities. Evaluations on the RTSTdataset show WSA-Net achieves 0.6958 mAP@0.5 and 164 FPS with only 2.412 M parameters. Results prove that signal-centric awareness in lightweight architectures effectively reduces false negatives in infrastructure inspection.

analysis.tldr: 提出WSA-Net，通过物理特征重建增强探地雷达弱信号双曲线检测，在轻量级架构下实现高精度与实时性。
analysis.research_motivation: 探地雷达检测地下缺陷时，微弱信号（低信杂比、高波场相似性、几何退化）导致现有轻量检测器灵敏度不足，无法有效保留低频结构或解耦杂波。
analysis.problem: 如何设计轻量级网络以增强微弱双曲线信号，同时抑制杂波并恢复几何结构，实现高精度实时检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出微弱信号具有低信杂比、高波场相似性和几何退化特征，现有轻量检测器因优先效率而牺牲灵敏度，导致漏检。
analysis.method: 提出WSA-Net，集成四个机制：部分卷积保留信号、异质分组注意力抑制杂波、几何重建锐化双曲线弧、上下文锚定解决语义歧义。
contributions: 提出信号中心感知的轻量级框架WSA-Net，通过物理特征重建增强微弱双曲线信号。
在RTST数据集上实现0.6958 mAP@0.5和164 FPS，仅2.412M参数，证明信号感知可有效减少漏检。
analysis.experiments: 在RTST数据集上评估，达到0.6958 mAP@0.5和164 FPS，参数仅2.412M。
limitations: 可能仅在特定探地雷达数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
未与更多非轻量级方法对比，性能上限待探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出WSA-Net，通过物理特征重建增强探地雷达弱信号双曲线检测，在轻量级架构下实现高精度与实时性。

papers.title: SCMAPR: Self-Correcting Multi-Agent Prompt Refinement for Complex-Scenario Text-to-Video Generation
papers.abstract: Text-to-Video (T2V) generation has benefited from recent advances in diffusion models, yet current systems still struggle under complex scenarios, which are generally exacerbated by the ambiguity and underspecification of text prompts. In this work, we formulate complex-scenario prompt refinement as a stage-wise multi-agent refinement process and propose SCMAPR, i.e., a scenario-aware and Self-Correcting Multi-Agent Prompt Refinement framework for T2V prompting. SCMAPR coordinates specialized agents to (i) route each prompt to a taxonomy-grounded scenario for strategy selection, (ii) synthesize scenario-aware rewriting policies and perform policy-conditioned refinement, and (iii) conduct structured semantic verification that triggers conditional revision when violations are detected. To clarify what constitutes complex scenarios in T2V prompting, provide representative examples, and enable rigorous evaluation under such challenging conditions, we further introduce T2V-Complexity, which is a complex-scenario T2V benchmark consisting exclusively of complex-scenario prompts. Extensive experiments on 3 existing benchmarks and our T2V-Complexity benchmark demonstrate that SCMAPR consistently improves text-video alignment and overall generation quality under complex scenarios, achieving up to 2.67% and 3.28 gains in average score on VBench and EvalCrafter, and up to 0.028 improvement on T2V-CompBench over 3 State-Of-The-Art baselines. The codes of SCMAPR are publicly available at https://github.com/HiThink-Research/SCMAPR.

analysis.tldr: 提出自纠正多智能体提示精炼框架SCMAPR，提升复杂场景下文本到视频生成的对齐质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本到视频生成在复杂场景下因提示模糊和未指定而表现不佳，亟需系统化的提示精炼方法。
analysis.problem: 复杂场景下文本提示的模糊性和欠指定导致生成视频与文本对齐差、质量低。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 复杂场景提示存在歧义和欠指定，现有方法难以有效处理。
analysis.method: 提出SCMAPR框架，包含场景路由、策略合成与条件精炼、结构化语义验证与自纠正三个阶段的智能体协作。
contributions: 提出场景感知的自纠正多智能体提示精炼框架SCMAPR
构建复杂场景T2V基准T2V-Complexity
analysis.experiments: 在VBench、EvalCrafter、T2V-CompBench及自建基准上实验，平均分提升2.67%、3.28和0.028。
limitations: 依赖预定义场景分类，可能无法覆盖所有复杂场景
多智能体协作可能增加推理开销
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自纠正多智能体提示精炼框架SCMAPR，提升复杂场景下文本到视频生成的对齐质量。

papers.title: Auditable Agents
papers.abstract: LLM agents call tools, query databases, delegate tasks, and trigger external side effects. Once an agent system can act in the world, the question is no longer only whether harmful actions can be prevented--it is whether those actions remain answerable after deployment. We distinguish accountability (the ability to determine compliance and assign responsibility), auditability (the system property that makes accountability possible), and auditing (the process of reconstructing behavior from trustworthy evidence). Our claim is direct: no agent system can be accountable without auditability. To make this operational, we define five dimensions of agent auditability, i.e., action recoverability, lifecycle coverage, policy checkability, responsibility attribution, and evidence integrity, and identify three mechanism classes (detect, enforce, recover) whose temporal information-and-intervention constraints explain why, in practice, no single approach suffices. We support the position with layered evidence rather than a single benchmark: lower-bound ecosystem measurements suggest that even basic security prerequisites for auditability are widely unmet (617 security findings across six prominent open-source projects); runtime feasibility results show that pre-execution mediation with tamper-evident records adds only 8.3 ms median overhead; and controlled recovery experiments show that responsibility-relevant information can be partially recovered even when conventional logs are missing. We propose an Auditability Card for agent systems and identify six open research problems organized by mechanism class.

analysis.tldr: 提出智能体系统可审计性的五维框架与三类机制，论证无审计则无问责。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM智能体可调用工具、查询数据库、触发外部副作用，部署后不仅需预防有害行为，更需确保行为可被问责。现有系统缺乏审计能力，导致责任归属困难。
analysis.problem: 如何定义和实现LLM智能体系统的可审计性，使其在部署后能够可靠地重建行为并分配责任。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出基本安全前提广泛未满足（6个开源项目617个安全问题），且单一机制不足以实现审计。
analysis.method: 定义可审计性的五个维度（动作可恢复性、生命周期覆盖、策略可检查性、责任归属、证据完整性）和三类机制（检测、强制、恢复），提出审计卡（Auditability Card）作为系统文档工具。
contributions: 区分问责、可审计性与审计，明确可审计性是问责的必要条件。
提出五维可审计性框架和三机制分类，揭示信息-干预约束导致单一方法不足。
通过生态系统测量、运行时可行性实验和恢复实验提供分层证据。
提出审计卡并识别六个开放研究问题。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及三类实验：生态系统测量（617个安全问题）、运行时可行性（预执行中介+防篡改记录，中位开销8.3ms）、受控恢复实验（部分恢复责任相关信息）。
limitations: 实验基于有限开源项目，可能不覆盖所有智能体系统。
审计卡的具体应用和有效性尚未在真实部署中验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出智能体系统可审计性的五维框架与三类机制，论证无审计则无问责。

papers.title: CoEnv: Driving Embodied Multi-Agent Collaboration via Compositional Environment
papers.abstract: Multi-agent embodied systems hold promise for complex collaborative manipulation, yet face critical challenges in spatial coordination, temporal reasoning, and shared workspace awareness. Inspired by human collaboration where cognitive planning occurs separately from physical execution, we introduce the concept of compositional environment -- a synergistic integration of real-world and simulation components that enables multiple robotic agents to perceive intentions and operate within a unified decision-making space. Building on this concept, we present CoEnv, a framework that leverages simulation for safe strategy exploration while ensuring reliable real-world deployment. CoEnv operates through three stages: real-to-sim scene reconstruction that digitizes physical workspaces, VLM-driven action synthesis supporting both real-time planning with high-level interfaces and iterative planning with code-based trajectory generation, and validated sim-to-real transfer with collision detection for safe deployment. Extensive experiments on challenging multi-arm manipulation benchmarks demonstrate CoEnv's effectiveness in achieving high task success rates and execution efficiency, establishing a new paradigm for multi-agent embodied AI.

analysis.tldr: 提出CoEnv框架，通过组合真实与仿真环境实现多机器人协作的安全策略探索与高效部署。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体具身系统在空间协调、时间推理和共享工作空间感知方面面临挑战，现有方法难以兼顾安全策略探索与可靠真实部署。
analysis.problem: 如何实现多机器人协作中仿真与真实环境的有效结合，以支持安全策略探索和高效真实部署。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CoEnv框架，包含三个步骤：真实到仿真的场景重建、VLM驱动的动作合成（支持实时规划和基于代码的迭代规划）、以及带碰撞检测的仿真到真实迁移。
contributions: 提出组合环境概念，将真实与仿真组件协同集成，实现多机器人统一决策空间。
开发CoEnv框架，通过仿真进行安全策略探索并确保可靠真实部署。
analysis.experiments: 在多臂操作基准上进行了广泛实验，验证了高任务成功率和执行效率。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的场景重建和仿真环境。
VLM驱动的动作合成在复杂动态场景下的泛化能力有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CoEnv框架，通过组合真实与仿真环境实现多机器人协作的安全策略探索与高效部署。

papers.title: Can We Trust a Black-box LLM? LLM Untrustworthy Boundary Detection via Bias-Diffusion and Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown a high capability in answering questions on a diverse range of topics. However, these models sometimes produce biased, ideologized or incorrect responses, limiting their applications if there is no clear understanding of which topics their answers can be trusted. In this research, we introduce a novel algorithm, named as GMRL-BD, designed to identify the untrustworthy boundaries (in terms of topics) of a given LLM, with black-box access to the LLM and under specific query constraints. Based on a general Knowledge Graph (KG) derived from Wikipedia, our algorithm incorporates with multiple reinforcement learning agents to efficiently identify topics (some nodes in KG) where the LLM is likely to generate biased answers. Our experiments demonstrated the efficiency of our algorithm, which can detect the untrustworthy boundary with just limited queries to the LLM. Additionally, we have released a new dataset containing popular LLMs including Llama2, Vicuna, Falcon, Qwen2, Gemma2 and Yi-1.5, along with labels indicating the topics on which each LLM is likely to be biased.

analysis.tldr: 提出GMRL-BD算法，通过偏差扩散和多智能体强化学习，在黑盒访问和有限查询下检测LLM的不可信边界（易产生偏见回答的主题）。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM可能产生偏见、意识形态化或不正确的回答，但用户不清楚哪些主题的回答不可信，限制了其应用。
analysis.problem: 在黑盒访问和有限查询约束下，高效识别LLM在哪些主题上容易产生偏见回答。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM在不同主题上可靠性不同，存在不可信边界；摘要未提供具体失败模式或瓶颈分析。
analysis.method: 基于Wikipedia知识图谱，结合多个强化学习智能体，通过偏差扩散策略高效探索LLM易产生偏见回答的主题节点。
contributions: 提出GMRL-BD算法，用于黑盒LLM的不可信边界检测，查询效率高。
发布包含多个流行LLM（Llama2、Vicuna等）的偏见主题标注数据集。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到实验证明了算法效率，能以有限查询检测不可信边界，但未提供具体数值或基准对比。
limitations: 依赖Wikipedia知识图谱，可能覆盖不全特定领域主题。
仅检测偏见主题，未涵盖其他不可信形式（如事实错误）。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GMRL-BD算法，通过偏差扩散和多智能体强化学习，在黑盒访问和有限查询下检测LLM的不可信边界（易产生偏见回答的主题）。

papers.title: Unifying VLM-Guided Flow Matching and Spectral Anomaly Detection for Interpretable Veterinary Diagnosis
papers.abstract: Automatic diagnosis of canine pneumothorax is challenged by data scarcity and the need for trustworthy models. To address this, we first introduce a public, pixel-level annotated dataset to facilitate research. We then propose a novel diagnostic paradigm that reframes the task as a synergistic process of signal localization and spectral detection. For localization, our method employs a Vision-Language Model (VLM) to guide an iterative Flow Matching process, which progressively refines segmentation masks to achieve superior boundary accuracy. For detection, the segmented mask is used to isolate features from the suspected lesion. We then apply Random Matrix Theory (RMT), a departure from traditional classifiers, to analyze these features. This approach models healthy tissue as predictable random noise and identifies pneumothorax by detecting statistically significant outlier eigenvalues that represent a non-random pathological signal. The high-fidelity localization from Flow Matching is crucial for purifying the signal, thus maximizing the sensitivity of our RMT detector. This synergy of generative segmentation and first-principles statistical analysis yields a highly accurate and interpretable diagnostic system (source code is available at: https://github.com/Pu-Wang-alt/Canine-pneumothorax).

analysis.tldr: 提出VLM引导的流匹配与随机矩阵理论异常检测结合的犬气胸诊断方法，实现高精度可解释诊断。
analysis.research_motivation: 犬气胸自动诊断面临数据稀缺和模型可解释性不足的挑战，现有方法难以兼顾准确性与可信度。
analysis.problem: 如何在小样本条件下实现高精度且可解释的犬气胸自动诊断。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出双阶段范式：1）VLM引导的迭代流匹配进行病灶分割定位；2）基于随机矩阵理论的频谱异常检测，通过分析特征矩阵的特征值统计异常识别病变。
contributions: 首个公开的像素级标注犬气胸数据集
提出VLM引导流匹配与RMT异常检测协同的诊断框架，兼具高精度与可解释性
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对犬气胸单一疾病，泛化性待验证
流匹配迭代过程可能计算开销较大
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VLM引导的流匹配与随机矩阵理论异常检测结合的犬气胸诊断方法，实现高精度可解释诊断。

papers.title: On the Role of Fault Localization Context for LLM-Based Program Repair
papers.abstract: Fault Localization (FL) is a key component of Large Language Model (LLM)-based Automated Program Repair (APR), yet its impact remains underexplored. In particular, it is unclear how much localization is needed, whether additional context beyond the predicted buggy location is beneficial, and how such context should be retrieved. We conduct a large-scale empirical study on 500 SWE-bench Verified instances using GPT-5-mini, evaluating 61 configurations that vary file-level, element-level, and line-level context. Our results show that more context does not consistently improve repair performance. File-level localization is the dominant factor, yielding a 15-17x improvement over a no-file baseline. Expanding file context is often associated with improved performance, with successful repairs most commonly observed in configurations with approximately 6-10 relevant files. Element-level context expansion provides conditional gains that depend strongly on the file context quality, while line-level context expansion frequently degrades performance due to noise amplification. LLM-based retrieval generally outperforms structural heuristics while using fewer files and tokens. Overall, the most effective FL context strategy typically combines a broad semantic understanding at higher abstraction levels with precise line-level localization. These findings challenge our assumption that increasing the localization context uniformly improves APR, and provide practical guidance for designing LLM-based FL strategies.

analysis.tldr: 故障定位上下文并非越多越好，文件级定位是主导因素，行级扩展反而可能降低修复性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于LLM的自动程序修复中，故障定位是关键组件，但其影响尚未充分探索，特别是上下文量、额外上下文是否有益以及如何检索上下文等问题不明确。
analysis.problem: 研究故障定位上下文对LLM自动程序修复性能的影响，包括不同粒度（文件级、元素级、行级）上下文的作用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 更多上下文并不一致地提升修复性能；文件级定位是主导因素，带来15-17倍改进；行级上下文扩展常因噪声放大而降低性能；LLM检索优于结构启发式。
analysis.method: 在500个SWE-bench Verified实例上使用GPT-5-mini进行大规模实证研究，评估61种配置，变化文件级、元素级和行级上下文。
contributions: 揭示了故障定位上下文对LLM自动程序修复的非单调影响，挑战了上下文越多越好的假设。
提供了设计LLM故障定位策略的实用指导，如优先文件级定位、谨慎行级扩展。
analysis.experiments: 在500个SWE-bench Verified实例上使用GPT-5-mini评估61种配置，报告了修复性能改进倍数和成功修复的上下文模式。
limitations: 仅使用单一模型GPT-5-mini，可能不泛化到其他LLM。
实验限于SWE-bench Verified数据集，可能不覆盖所有真实场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 故障定位上下文并非越多越好，文件级定位是主导因素，行级扩展反而可能降低修复性能。

papers.title: A Synthetic Eye Movement Dataset for Script Reading Detection: Real Trajectory Replay on a 3D Simulator
papers.abstract: Large vision-language models have achieved remarkable capabilities by training on massive internet-scale data, yet a fundamental asymmetry persists: while LLMs can leverage self-supervised pretraining on abundant text and image data, the same is not true for many behavioral modalities. Video-based behavioral data -- gestures, eye movements, social signals -- remains scarce, expensive to annotate, and privacy-sensitive. A promising alternative is simulation: replace real data collection with controlled synthetic generation to produce automatically labeled data at scale.
